title: Sampling More, Getting Less: Calibration is the Diversity Bottleneck in LLMs
summary: Diversity is essential for language-model applications ranging from creative generation to scientific discovery, yet modern LLMs often collapse into a narrow subset of plausible outputs. While prior work has developed benchmarks for measuring this lack of diversity, less is known about how the step-by-step probability distributions at inference time cause the problem. We introduce a validity--diversity framework that attributes diversity collapse to how an LLM allocates probability mass across valid and invalid continuations during decoding. This framework decomposes the bottleneck into two complementary forms of miscalibration. First, order calibration: valid tokens are not reliably ranked above invalid tokens, so rank-based cutoff rules must trade off between recovering valid continuations and admitting invalid ones. Second, shape calibration: probability mass is overly concentrated only on few valid continuations while having a heavy-tail of mixed valid and invalid tokens, so maintaining high validity limits diversity. We formalize both mechanisms and show that local failures compound across decoding steps, producing strong sequence-level losses in diversity. Empirically, we develop controlled diagnostics for probing these bottlenecks, including tasks with exactly known valid sets and oracle cutoff baselines. Across 14 language models spanning multiple families and scales, we find that diversity collapse is not merely a limitation of particular sampling heuristics, but a consequence of order and shape miscalibration in the LLM distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个有效性-多样性框架，将LLM的多样性坍塌归因于解码时的两种校准问题：顺序校准（有效token未可靠排在无效token之上）和形状校准（概率质量过度集中在少数有效token上）。实验表明，多样性坍塌是LLM分布本身的固有缺陷，而非特定采样策略的限制。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有基准测试衡量LLM输出缺乏多样性的问题，但较少有研究从推理时逐步骤概率分布的角度分析多样性坍塌的根本原因。本文旨在揭示解码过程中概率分布如何导致多样性的丧失。
AI.method: 构建了一个有效性-多样性理论框架，将多样性坍塌分解为顺序校准和形状校准两种互补形式的误校准问题。设计了可控的诊断性实验（包括已知有效集合和oracle截断基线），在14个不同规模和系列的语言模型上进行实证分析。
AI.result: 发现多样性坍塌并非特定采样启发式方法的局限，而是LLM分布中顺序校准和形状校准问题的必然结果。局部校准失败会在解码步骤中累积，导致序列层面的多样性严重下降。
AI.conclusion: LLM的多样性问题根源在于模型概率分布本身的校准缺陷，未来需要从模型训练或推理算法层面直接解决顺序和形状校准问题，而非仅通过调整采样策略来缓解。

title: ClinicalBench: Stress-Testing Assertion-Aware Retrieval for Cross-Admission Clinical QA on MIMIC-IV
comment: 46 pages including appendices (two-column preprint format). Under review at JAMIA. Code, frozen evaluator, and benchmark released at https://huggingface.co/datasets/alexstinard/epikg-clinicalbench. ClinicalBench v2 is a 400-question MIMIC-IV stress test for assertion-aware retrieval
summary: Reasoning benchmarks measure clinical performance on clean inputs. We evaluate the step before reasoning: retrieval over real EHR notes, where negation, temporality, and family-versus-patient attribution can flip a correct answer to a wrong one. EpiKG carries an assertion label and a temporality tag with every fact in a patient knowledge graph, then routes retrieval by question intent. ClinicalBench is a 400-question test over 43 MIMIC-IV patients across 9 assertion-sensitive categories. A 7-condition ablation tests each piece of EpiKG across six LLMs (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-OSS 20B, MedGemma 27B, Gemma 4 31B, MedGemma 1.5 4B, Qwen 3.5 35B). Three physicians blindly adjudicated 100 paired items. The author-blind primary endpoint, leave-author-out paired exact McNemar on 50 unanimous-strict items rated by two external physicians, yields +22.0 percentage points (95 percent Newcombe CI [+5.1, +31.5], p=0.0192). The architectural novelty, intent-aware KG-RAG over a Contriever dense-RAG baseline (C2b to C4g_kw on the change-excluded n=362 endpoint), is +8.84 percentage points (paired McNemar p=1.79e-3); +12.43 percentage points under oracle intent. Sensitivities agree directionally: three-rater physician majority +24.0 percentage points (subject to single-author circularity); deterministic keyword reproducibility proxy +39.5 percentage points. Across the six models, the gain shrinks as the LLM-alone baseline rises (beta=-1.123, r=-0.921, p=0.009). With n=6 this looks more like regression to the mean than encoding substituting for model size. Physician adjudication identified 56 percent of auto-generated reference answers as defective, a methodological finding indicating that NLP-pipeline clinical-QA benchmarks require physician adjudication to be usable. ClinicalBench, the frozen evaluator, three-rater adjudication data, and the EpiKG output stack are publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EpiKG，一种为电子健康记录（EHR）中的检索增强生成（RAG）设计的知识图谱方法，通过为每个事实添加断言标签和时间标签，并基于问题意图路由检索。在ClinicalBench（400个问题，43名患者，9个敏感类别）上的评估显示，与Contriever密集RAG基线相比，准确率提升+8.84个百分点（p=1.79e-3），三位医生盲审发现56%的自动生成参考答案存在缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准测试只评估在干净输入上的临床性能，而忽略了检索这一步——在真实EHR笔记中，否定、时间性、家族史与患者本人的归属关系等细节会完全翻转正确答案。因此需要为检索环节设计能处理这些断言敏感信息的架构。
AI.method: EpiKG为患者知识图谱中的每个事实添加断言标签（如否定、疑似、肯定）和时间标签（如过去、现在、家族史），然后根据问题意图路由检索。创建ClinicalBench基准测试包含400个问题，覆盖43名MIMIC-IV患者和9个断言敏感类别，并由三位医生进行盲审。
AI.result: 在50个严格一致项目上，leave-author-out配对精确McNemar检验显示+22.0个百分点（p=0.0192）。与Contriever密集RAG基线相比，架构创新带来+8.84个百分点（p=1.79e-3）。医师评审发现56%的自动生成参考答案存在缺陷。增益随LLM基线提升而缩小（beta=-1.123, r=-0.921, p=0.009）。
AI.conclusion: EpiKG在断言敏感的临床检索上显著优于基线方法；NLP流水线生成的临床QA基准需要医师评审才能可用；数据集和代码已公开。

title: Decomposing Evolutionary Mixture-of-LoRA Architectures: The Routing Lever, the Lifecycle Penalty, and a Substrate-Conditional Boundary
summary: We decompose an evolutionary mixture-of-LoRA system on a from-scratch ~150M-parameter widened-D substrate (D=1536, V=32000; D/V approx 0.048; the "widened-1536" substrate) into three factors -- a router rewrite (parallel sigmoid gate with learnable per-adapter floor and bounded temperature anneal, fed post-stack hidden states rather than token-embedding means), a per-domain leave-one-out evaluation scope, and a lifecycle of death plus alpha-blend inheritance plus SVD mutation plus slot reallocation -- and report a 5-of-8 partial 2^3 factorial run at n=3 seeds and 25000 adaptation steps per cell. The attribution chain is sharp on this substrate: the router rewrite carries the entire +0.0426 nat balanced log-PPL improvement (Delta = log PPL_ref - log PPL_test, positive = improvement; t=12.86, p=0.006) attributed to "the full evolutionary system vs the static B3 baseline"; the headline full-system-vs-B3 balanced contrast itself is +0.015 nats, t=1.94, p=0.19 at n=3 and does not clear alpha=0.05. The per-domain evaluation scope is null at seed-resolution, and the lifecycle is a net drag of approx -0.028 nats (t=-4.46,p=0.047 in the primary chain). An auxiliary alpha=0 inheritance counterfactual at n=3 seeds is sign-inconsistent at the headline metric and underpowered for either an equivalence or load-bearing conclusion (corrected from an earlier arithmetic-mean aggregator that erroneously cleared inheritance; see Appendix B.11). A base-perturbation probe directionally refutes a "genomic-context" reframe of the lifecycle role. A controllable synthetic sandbox locates a substrate-conditional regime boundary: evolutionary search on the routing channel is load-bearing only when adapters are pre-aligned to the task; in every other regime tested it underperforms, ties, or actively degrades the gradient solution.

AI.tldr: 本文对~150M参数的widened-1536基座上进化式mixture-of-LoRA系统进行三因素分解，发现路由重写是唯一显著提升的因素（+0.0426 nats），而生命周期机制反而是净拖累（-0.028 nats）。通过合成沙盒实验发现，进化搜索路由通道仅在适配器预对齐任务时才有效。
AI.motivation: 探究进化式mixture-of-LoRA系统中各组件（路由重写、评估范围、生命周期机制）的独立贡献，并验证其在不同条件下的适用边界。
AI.method: 采用5-of-8部分2^3因子实验设计，在widened-1536基座上（D=1536, V=32000）进行n=3种子、25000步适配的对照实验，辅以合成沙盒进行边界条件探测。
AI.result: 路由重写是唯一显著的正向贡献（+0.0426 nats, p=0.006）；生命周期机制是净拖累（-0.028 nats, p=0.047）；全系统vs静态基线未达显著性（p=0.19）；进化搜索仅在适配器预对齐任务时有效。
AI.conclusion: 进化式mixture-of-LoRA系统的性能提升主要归因于路由重写而非生命周期机制，且该方法有严格的适用条件限制（需适配器预对齐），并非通用解决方案。

title: The Bicameral Model: Bidirectional Hidden-State Coupling Between Parallel Language Models
comment: 9 pages main text, 5 figures, 24 pages appendix
summary: Existing multi-model and tool-augmented systems communicate by generating text, serializing every exchange through the output vocabulary. Can two pretrained language models instead coordinate through a continuous, concurrent channel? The Bicameral Model couples two frozen language models through a trainable neural interface on their intermediate hidden states. At every generation step, both models run in lockstep: a primary model drives the task while an auxiliary model operates tools, solves constraints, or executes code, with both conditioning on each other's activations through a translation network and a learned suppression gate ($\sim$1\% of combined parameters). The gate learns a selective communication protocol from task loss alone, without a prescribed format. We demonstrate the mechanism across three tool backends. On arithmetic, coupling two 0.5B models with a calculator raises accuracy from 36\% to 96\%. On logic grid puzzles, coupling two 0.6B models with a Z3 solver achieves $1.7\times$ the unaugmented baseline on ZebraLogic. On mathematical reasoning, coupling with a Python sandbox enables the auxiliary to generate problem-specific code from hidden-state signals alone, without ever seeing the problem text.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双室模型（Bicameral Model），通过可训练的神经接口连接两个冻结的语言模型的中间隐状态，让它们在连续通道中并行协调，一个主模型驱动任务，一个辅助模型操作工具，无需文本序列化。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模型和工具增强系统需要通过文本序列化每个交换，这限制了通信效率。作者希望探索两个预训练语言模型能否通过连续的、并行的通道直接协调，而非依赖离散文本。
AI.method: 将两个冻结的LM通过可训练的神经接口（翻译网络+学习抑制门）连接在中间隐状态上。每一步两个模型并行运行，主模型驱动任务，辅助模型操作工具，彼此通过隐状态条件化。抑制门（约1%参数）从任务损失中学习选择性通信协议，无需预设格式。
AI.result: 算术任务上，两个0.5B模型+计算器准确率从36%提升至96%；逻辑网格谜题上，两个0.6B模型+Z3求解器在ZebraLogic上达到未增强基线的1.7倍；数学推理上，辅助模型仅从隐状态信号生成问题特定代码，无需看到问题文本。
AI.conclusion: 通过连续、并行的隐状态通信机制，冻结的LM可以有效协调工具使用，通信协议可从头学习，且参数量开销极小。这为多模型协作提供了新的范式。

title: A Cascaded Generative Approach for e-Commerce Recommendations
summary: Personalized storefronts in large e-commerce marketplaces are often assembled from many independent components: static themes per page section ("placement"), retrieval systems to fetch eligible products per placement, and pointwise rankers to order content. While effective in optimizing for aggregate preferences, this paradigm is rigid and can limit personalization and semantic cohesion across the page. This makes it poorly suited to support dynamic objectives and merchandising requirements over time. To address this, we introduce a cascaded merchandising framework that decomposes storefront construction into two generative tasks: (i) placement-level theme generation and (ii) constrained keyword generation per placement to power product retrieval. Teacher-student fine-tuning is leveraged to improve scalability of this framework under production latency and cost constraints. Fine-tuned model ablations are shown to approach closed-weight LLM performance. We further contribute frameworks for AI-driven content evaluation and quality filtering, enabling safe and automated deployment of dynamic content at scale. Generative output is fused with traditional ranking models to preserve hybrid infrastructure. In online experiments, this framework yields an estimated +2.7% lift in cart adds per page view over a strong baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种级联式商品展示框架，将电商店铺首页构建分解为两个生成任务：位置级主题生成和受约束的关键词生成，结合教师-学生微调提升可扩展性，并通过AI驱动的内容评估与质量过滤实现安全部署，在线实验显示购物车添加量提升2.7%。
AI.motivation: 传统电商店铺首页由独立组件（静态主题、检索系统、排序器）拼装而成，这种范式刚性且缺乏语义连贯性，难以支持动态目标和不断变化的营销需求，因此需要更灵活、可扩展的个性化展示框架。
AI.method: 提出级联式商品展示框架：(i) 位置级主题生成，(ii) 每个位置受约束的关键词生成以驱动产品检索。利用教师-学生微调提升生产环境下的可扩展性，融合AI内容评估与质量过滤，并将生成式输出与传统排序模型结合。
AI.result: 在线实验中，该框架在强基线上实现了每次页面浏览购物车添加量提升+2.7%。微调模型消融实验接近闭源大语言模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 级联式生成框架能有效替代传统刚性组件式店铺构建，提升个性化与语义连贯性，且在成本和延迟约束下具备可扩展性，为动态电商内容生成提供了可行的工业化方案。

title: Interpretable EEG Microstate Discovery via Variational Deep Embedding: A Systematic Architecture Search with Multi-Quadrant Evaluation
summary: EEG microstate analysis segments continuous brain electrical activity into brief, quasi-stable topographic configurations that reflect discrete functional brain states. Conventional approaches such as Modified K-Means operate directly in electrode space with hard assignment, offering no learned latent representation, no generative decoder, and no mechanism to decode latent configurations into verifiable scalp topographies, limiting both model transparency and interpretability. To address this, we present a Convolutional Variational Deep Embedding (Conv-VaDE) model that jointly learns topographic reconstruction and probabilistic soft clustering in a shared latent space. Conv-VaDE enables generative decoding of cluster prototypes into verifiable scalp topographies, replacing opaque hard partitioning with probabilistic soft assignment. A polarity invariance scheme and a four-dimensional grid search over cluster count (K from 3 to 20), latent dimensionality, network depth, and channel width are conducted to systematically reveal how each architectural design choice shapes the quality, stability, and interpretability of learned EEG microstate representations. The model is evaluated on the LEMON resting-state eyes-closed EEG dataset with ten participants using topographic template formation, clustering stability, and global explained variance (GEV). The architecture search reveals that depth L = 4 appears consistently across all 18 best-performing configurations, yielding a best-case GEV of 0.730 and a silhouette of 0.229 at K = 4 across the model sweeps, where moderately deep networks with compact channel widths and small latent dimensionality dominate across the full K range. These results establish that principled architecture search, rather than model scale, is the key to interpretable and stable EEG microstate discovery via variational deep embedding.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种卷积变分深度嵌入（Conv-VaDE）模型，用于EEG微状态分析。该方法联合学习拓扑重建和概率软聚类，通过架构搜索（K、潜在维度、网络深度、通道宽度）发现深度L=4在所有最佳配置中一致出现，最高GEV达0.730，表明合理的架构设计比模型规模更能促进可解释的EEG微状态发现。
AI.motivation: 传统EEG微状态分析方法（如改进K-means）直接在电极空间进行硬分配，缺乏学习到的潜在表示、生成解码器以及将潜在配置解码为可验证头皮拓扑的机制，限制了模型的透明性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出Conv-VaDE模型，在共享潜在空间中联合学习拓扑重建和概率软聚类。采用极性不变性方案，并对聚类数K（3-20）、潜在维度、网络深度和通道宽度进行四维网格搜索，系统分析架构选择对EEG微状态表征质量、稳定性和可解释性的影响。
AI.result: 在LEMON数据集（10名受试者，静息态闭眼EEG）上，架构搜索表明深度L=4在所有18个最佳配置中一致出现，K=4时最佳GEV为0.730，轮廓系数为0.229。中等深度网络配合紧凑通道宽度和小潜在维度在全K范围内占优。
AI.conclusion: 原理性的架构搜索（而非模型规模）是通过变分深度嵌入实现可解释且稳定的EEG微状态发现的关键。

title: Principle-Guided Supervision for Interpretable Uncertainty in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Uncertainty quantification complements model predictions by characterizing their reliability, which is essential for high-stakes decision making such as medical image segmentation. However, most existing methods reduce uncertainty to a scalar confidence estimate, leaving its spatial distribution semantically underconstrained. In this work, we focus on uncertainty interpretability, namely, whether estimated uncertainty behaves in a human-understandable manner with respect to sources of ambiguity. We identify three perception-aligned principles requiring the spatial distribution of uncertainty to reflect: (1) image contrast between structures, (2) severity of image corruption, and (3) geometric complexity in anatomical structures. Accordingly, we develop a principle-guided uncertainty supervision framework (PriUS) based on evidential learning, in which the corresponding supervision objectives are explicitly enforced during training. We further introduce quantitative metrics to measure the consistency between predicted uncertainty and image attributes that induce ambiguity. Experiments on ACDC, ISIC, and WHS datasets showed that, compared with state-of-the-art methods, PriUS produced more consistent uncertainty estimates while maintaining competitive segmentation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriUS框架，基于证据学习，通过三个感知对齐原则（图像对比度、退化程度、几何复杂度）引导不确定性量化，使其空间分布具有可解释性，在医学图像分割中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法通常将不确定性简化为标量置信度，其空间分布缺乏语义约束，导致不确定性估计在临床决策中难以被人类理解。本文旨在让不确定性估计的行为与人类感知对齐，增强其可解释性。
AI.method: 提出PriUS框架，基于证据学习（evidential learning）实现。定义了三个感知对齐原则（图像对比度、退化程度、几何复杂度），并将其显式作为监督目标在训练中约束不确定性估计的空间分布。同时引入定量指标来衡量不确定性预测与图像属性之间的一致性。
AI.result: 在ACDC、ISIC、WHS三个医学图像分割数据集上，PriUS相比现有SOTA方法产生了更一致的不确定性估计，同时保持了有竞争力的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将人类感知知识以原则形式引入不确定性监督，能够在保持分割性能的同时显著提升不确定性估计的可解释性和一致性，对高风险决策场景具有重要价值。

title: How Does Differential Privacy Affect Social Bias in LLMs? A Systematic Evaluation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) trained on web-scale corpora can memorize sensitive training data, posing significant privacy risks. Differential privacy (DP) has emerged as a principled framework that limits the influence of individual data points during training, yet the relationship between differential privacy and social bias in LLMs remains poorly understood. To investigate this, we present a systematic evaluation of social bias in a pretrained LLM trained with DP-SGD, comparing a DP model against non-DP baselines across four complementary paradigms: sentence scoring, text completion, tabular classification, and question answering. We find that DP reduces bias in sentence scoring tasks, where bias is measured through controlled likelihood comparisons, yet this improvement does not generalize across all tasks. Our results reveal a discrepancy between logit-level bias and output-level bias. Moreover, decreasing memorization does not necessarily reduce unfairness, underscoring the importance of multi-paradigm evaluation when assessing fairness in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了使用差分隐私（DP-SGD）训练的大语言模型中的社会偏见，发现DP在句子评分任务中能减少偏见，但这种改善并不泛化到所有任务；同时，减少记忆并不一定减少不公平性，强调了多范式评估的重要性。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私（DP）被广泛用于保护训练数据隐私，但DP与LLM中社会偏见之间的关系尚不清晰。本文旨在系统探究DP训练对LLM社会偏见的影响。
AI.method: 使用DP-SGD训练预训练LLM，与非DP基线进行对比；通过四种互补范式（句子评分、文本补全、表格分类、问答）系统评估社会偏见。
AI.result: DP在句子评分任务中减少了偏见（通过受控似然比较衡量），但这种改善不泛化到其他任务；发现logit级偏见与输出级偏见之间存在差异；减少记忆并不一定减少不公平性。
AI.conclusion: DP与公平性之间存在复杂关系，评估LLM公平性时需要采用多范式评估方法。

title: EVOCHAMBER: Test-Time Co-evolution of Multi-Agent System at Individual, Team, and Population Scales
summary: We argue that multi-agent test-time evolution is not single-agent evolution replicated N times. A single-agent learner can only evolve its own context and memory. A multi-agent system additionally evolves who collaborates, how they collaborate, and how knowledge flows across the population. These components have no single-agent counterpart and can produce phenomena such as emergent specialization. Yet prior test-time methods either confine experiences to individual agents, forfeiting cross-agent learning, or broadcast symmetrically to all agents, erasing the specialization that makes collaboration valuable. We present EVOCHAMBER, a training-free framework that instantiates test-time evolution at three levels over a coevolving agent pool. At its core is CODREAM (Collaborative Dreaming), a post-task protocol triggered on team failure or disagreement, in which agents collaboratively reflect, distill insights, and route them asymmetrically from strong to weak agents on the failed niche, preserving specialization while filling knowledge gaps. Team-level operators assemble niche-conditioned teams and select collaboration structures online. Population-level lifecycle operators fork, merge, prune, and seed agents under performance pressure. On three heterogeneous task streams with Qwen3-8B, EVOCHAMBER reaches 63.9% on competition math, 75.7% on code, and 87.1% on multi-domain reasoning, outperforming the best baseline by 32% relative on math and confirming asymmetric cross-agent transfer as the primary driver in ablation. Starting from several identically initialized agents, four to five stable niche specialists spontaneously emerge, a structural signature of multi-agent evolution that no single-agent learner can express. See our code at: https://github.com/Mercury7353/EvoChamber

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVOCHAMBER，一个无需训练的多智能体测试时演化框架，通过三层演化（个体、团队、种群）和CODREAM知识不对称传递机制，在数学、代码、多领域推理任务上显著超越基线，并展现出单智能体无法实现的 emergent specialization 现象。
AI.motivation: 已有测试时方法要么将经验限制在单个智能体内（损失跨智能体学习），要么对称广播给所有智能体（抹杀专业化分工的价值）。作者认为多智能体测试时演化不是单智能体演化的N次复制，而应额外演化"谁与谁合作、如何合作、知识如何在种群中流动"，这些是单智能体无法实现的。
AI.method: EVOCHAMBER包含三层演化：(1) 个体层：CODREAM机制，当团队失败或分歧时，智能体协作反思、提炼洞察，并将知识从强智能体不对称地传递给弱智能体；(2) 团队层：在线组建基于特定"niche"的团队并选择协作结构；(3) 种群层：在性能压力下对智能体进行fork、merge、prune、seed等生命周期操作。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上，EVOCHAMBER在竞赛数学达到63.9%，代码75.7%，多领域推理87.1%。相比最佳基线，数学相对提升32%。消融实验证实不对称跨智能体知识传递是主要驱动因素。从同质初始智能体出发，涌现出4-5个稳定的 niche specialists。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体测试时演化具有单智能体所不具备的结构特性（如 emergent specialization），EVOCHAMBER通过多层次演化和不对称知识路由有效利用了这些特性，在多个任务上取得显著提升。

title: QuIDE: Mastering the Quantized Intelligence Trade-off via Active Optimization
summary: There is currently no unified metric for evaluating the efficiency of quantized neural networks. We propose QuIDE, built around the Intelligence Index I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1), which collapses the compression-accuracy-latency trade-off into a single score. Experiments across six settings -- SimpleCNN (MNIST, CIFAR), ResNet-18 (ImageNet-1K), and Llama-3-8B -- show a task-dependent Pareto Knee. 4-bit quantization is optimal for MNIST and large LLMs, while 8-bit is the sweet spot for complex CNN tasks (ResNet-18 on ImageNet), where 4-bit PTQ collapses accuracy catastrophically. The accuracy-gated variant I' correctly flags these non-viable configurations that the raw I would reward. QuIDE provides a reproducible evaluation protocol and a ready-to-use fitness function for mixed-precision search.

AI.tldr: QuIDE 提出了一种统一指标——智能指数 I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1)，用于评估量化神经网络在压缩率、精度和延迟之间的权衡，并在多种任务上识别出任务依赖的 Pareto 最优位宽。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏统一的量化神经网络效率评估指标，难以在压缩率、精度和延迟之间进行公平比较和权衡。
AI.method: 提出 QuIDE 框架，核心是智能指数 I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1)，其中 C 为压缩率、P 为精度、T 为延迟；并设计了准确率门控变体 I' 来过滤不可行配置。
AI.result: 在 SimpleCNN (MNIST/CIFAR)、ResNet-18 (ImageNet-1K) 和 Llama-3-8B 上实验发现：4-bit 量化对 MNIST 和大 LLM 最优，8-bit 是复杂 CNN 任务（如 ImageNet）的甜点位，4-bit PTQ 在复杂任务上精度崩溃。
AI.conclusion: QuIDE 提供了一个可复现的评估协议和可用于混合精度搜索的现成适应度函数，准确率门控变体 I' 能有效标记原始 I 会误判的不可行配置。

title: The first global agricultural field boundary map at 10m resolution
summary: The agricultural field is the natural unit at which crops are planted, managed, regulated, and reported, yet most global remote-sensing products for agriculture are only available at the pixel level. While some high-quality field-level data products exist, they come from parcel registries covering only parts of Europe or from ML-derived products for individual countries. No openly available, globally consistent map of agricultural field boundaries exists to date. Here we present the first global field boundary dataset at 10\,m resolution for the years 2024 and 2025, comprising 3.17 billion remote-sensing field polygons (1.62 B in 2024 and 1.55 B in 2025) across 241 countries and territories, produced by applying a U-Net segmentation model trained on the Fields of The World dataset to cloud-free Sentinel-2 mosaics. Validated against ground-truth field boundaries in 24 countries, the map achieved a mean pixel-level recall of 0.85 with 14 countries exceeding 0.90. Evaluation against full-country ground-truth datasets in Austria, Latvia, and Finland yielded F1 scores of 0.89, 0.88, and 0.74, respectively. Because reference data for global validation is inherently incomplete, we accompanied the map with a 500 m confidence layer that identifies regions where predictions are reliable. We release the dataset openly as three global maps: the confidence-thresholded default field boundary dataset, the full unfiltered dataset, and the continuous-valued confidence raster. These maps provide the first globally consistent field-level unit of analysis for crop monitoring, food security, and downstream agricultural science.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个全球一致的农田边界数据集（10m分辨率，2024-2025年），包含31.7亿个多边形，覆盖241个国家和地区。使用U-Net模型基于Sentinel-2影像生成，在24个国家验证，平均像素级召回率0.85，并提供了置信度图层。
AI.motivation: 农业领域需要以田块为自然单元进行作物管理、监管和报告，但现有全球遥感产品多为像素级，缺乏公开、全球一致的农田边界地图。
AI.method: 将Fields of The World数据集上训练的U-Net分割模型应用于无云Sentinel-2镶嵌影像，生成10m分辨率的全球农田边界，并附带500m置信度图层。
AI.result: 生成31.7亿个多边形（2024年16.2亿，2025年15.5亿），覆盖241个国家；24个国家的平均像素级召回率0.85（14国>0.90）；奥地利、拉脱维亚、芬兰的F1分数分别为0.89、0.88、0.74。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集提供了首个全球一致的田块级分析单元，可用于作物监测、粮食安全和农业科学等下游任务，并以开放形式发布三种图层。

title: Instructions shape Production of Language, not Processing
summary: Instructions trigger a production-centered mechanism in language models. Through a cognitively inspired lens that separates language processing and production, we reveal this mechanism as an asymmetry between the two stages by probing task-specific information layer-wise across five binary judgment tasks. Specifically, we measure how instruction tokens shape information both when sample tokens, the input under evaluation, are processed and when output tokens are produced. Across prompting variations, task-specific information in sample tokens remains largely stable and correlates only weakly with behavior, whereas the same information in output tokens varies substantially and correlates strongly with behavior. Attention-based interventions confirm this pattern causally: blocking instruction flow to all subsequent tokens reduces both behavior and information in output tokens, whereas blocking it only to sample tokens has minimal effect on either. The asymmetry generalizes across model families and tasks, and becomes sharper with model scale and instruction-tuning, both of which disproportionately affect the production stage. Our findings suggest that understanding model capabilities requires jointly assessing internals and behavior, while decomposing the internal perspective by token position to distinguish the processing of input tokens from the production of output tokens.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了语言模型中指令触发的一种“生产中心”机制：通过认知视角区分语言处理与生产阶段，发现指令主要影响输出token的信息表征，而对输入token影响甚微，这种不对称性随模型规模增大和指令微调而加剧。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对指令如何影响模型内部机制理解不足，作者借鉴认知科学中语言处理与生产的区分，希望深入探究指令在模型不同阶段（输入处理 vs. 输出生成）的作用差异。
AI.method: 在五个二元判断任务上，逐层探测任务相关信息在样本token（输入处理阶段）和输出token（输出生产阶段）的分布；通过注意力干预（阻断指令流向不同token）验证因果关系；在不同模型家族、规模、指令微调条件下验证泛化性。
AI.result: 1) 输入token中的任务信息稳定且与行为弱相关；2) 输出token中的任务信息变化大且与行为强相关；3) 阻断指令流向所有后续token显著降低行为和输出信息，而仅阻断流向输入token影响甚微；4) 该不对称性随模型规模和指令微调而加剧。
AI.conclusion: 理解模型能力需要联合评估内部表征和行为，且需按token位置分解内部视角，区分输入处理与输出生产阶段。

title: RankQ: Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning via Self-Supervised Action Ranking
summary: Offline-to-online reinforcement learning (RL) improves sample efficiency by leveraging pre-collected datasets prior to online interaction. A key challenge, however, is learning an accurate critic in large state--action spaces with limited dataset coverage. To mitigate harmful updates from value overestimation, prior methods impose pessimism by down-weighting out-of-distribution (OOD) actions relative to dataset actions. While effective, this essentially acts as a behavior cloning anchor and can hinder downstream online policy improvement when dataset actions are suboptimal. We propose RankQ, an offline-to-online Q-learning objective that augments temporal-difference learning with a self-supervised multi-term ranking loss to enforce structured action ordering. By learning relative action preferences rather than uniformly penalizing unseen actions, RankQ shapes the Q-function such that action gradients are directed toward higher-quality behaviors. Across sparse reward D4RL benchmarks, RankQ achieves performance competitive with or superior to seven prior methods. In vision-based robot learning, RankQ enables effective offline-to-online fine-tuning of a pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) model in a low-data regime, achieving on average a 42.7% higher simulation success rate than the next best method. In a high-data setting, RankQ improves simulation performance by 13.7% over the next best method and achieves strong sim-to-real transfer, increasing real-world cube stacking success from 43.1% to 84.7% relative to the VLA's initial performance.

AI.tldr: 提出RankQ，通过自监督多术语排序损失替代传统悲观正则化，在离线到在线强化学习中学习动作相对偏好而非统一惩罚OOD动作，从而提升策略优化效果，在D4RL和机器人操控任务中取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 离线到在线强化学习中，传统悲观方法通过下采样OOD动作来防止值高估，但这本质上等同于行为克隆锚定，当数据集动作次优时会阻碍后续在线策略改进。需要一种既能抑制值高估又能引导策略向高质量行为改进的新方法。
AI.method: 设计RankQ，在时序差分学习中引入自监督多术语排序损失，通过学习相对动作偏好（而非统一惩罚未见动作）来塑造Q函数，使动作梯度指向更高质量的行为。
AI.result: 在稀疏奖励D4RL基准上达到或超越7种先前方法；在视觉机器人学习中，低数据场景下平均模拟成功率比次优方法高42.7%，高数据场景下提高13.7%，真实世界方块堆叠成功率从43.1%提升至84.7%。
AI.conclusion: RankQ通过结构化动作排序损失有效解决了离线到在线RL中悲观正则化导致的策略改进受限问题，在多种场景下显著优于现有方法，且能有效微调预训练的VLA模型。

title: Steering Without Breaking: Mechanistically Informed Interventions for Discrete Diffusion Language Models
summary: Discrete diffusion language models (DLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising all positions in parallel, offering an alternative to autoregressive models. Controlled generation methods for DLMs, imported from autoregressive models, apply uniform intervention at every denoising steps. We show this uniform schedule degrades quality, and the damage compounds when multiple attributes are steered jointly. To diagnose the failure, we train sparse autoencoders on four DLMs (124M-8B parameters) and find that different attributes commit on distinct schedules, varying in timing, sharpness, and magnitude. For instance, topic commits within the first 2\% of denoising, whereas sentiment emerges gradually over 20\% of the process. Consequently, uniform intervention wastes steering capacity on steps where the target attribute has already solidified or has yet to emerge. We propose a novel adaptive scheduler that concentrates interventions on the steps where an attribute is actively forming and leaves the rest of generation untouched. The cost-control trade-off admits a closed-form characterization: the advantage of adaptive over uniform scheduling is governed by a single dispersion statistic of the commitment distribution. Across four DLMs and seven steering tasks, our method achieves precise control without the degradation typical of uniform interventions. Especially on challenging simultaneous three-attribute control, it reaches up to 93\% steering strength, beating the strongest baseline by up to 15\% points while preserving generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文发现离散扩散语言模型在不同生成步骤中，不同属性（如主题、情感）的"定型"时间不一致，统一干预会浪费控制能力并降低质量。作者提出自适应调度器，仅在属性活跃形成的步骤进行干预，在7个控制任务上达到93%的操控强度，比最强基线高15%。
AI.motivation: 现有受控生成方法对离散扩散语言模型的所有去噪步骤进行统一干预，但不同属性在生成过程中固化的时间点不同（主题在前2%就定型，情感需20%逐渐形成），统一干预导致控制能力浪费和质量下降，尤其在多属性联合控制时问题更严重。
AI.method: 在4个离散扩散语言模型（124M-8B参数）上训练稀疏自编码器，分析不同属性在去噪过程中的定型时间分布差异。据此提出自适应调度器，只在属性活跃形成的步骤进行干预，其余步骤不干预，并给出了自适应调度优于统一调度的闭式条件（由定型分布的离散度决定）。
AI.result: 在4个DLM和7个控制任务上，自适应调度方法在保持生成质量的同时实现了精确控制。在三属性联合控制任务中达到93%的操控强度，比最强基线高15个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 不同属性在扩散生成过程中有各自的"定型时间表"，自适应干预调度比统一干预更高效且质量更好。该方法具有闭式可解的成本-控制权衡特性。

title: HiDream-O1-Image: A Natively Unified Image Generative Foundation Model with Pixel-level Unified Transformer
comment: Source codes and models are available at Github: https://github.com/HiDream-ai/HiDream-O1-Image and Huggingface: https://huggingface.co/HiDream-ai/HiDream-O1-Image
summary: The evolution of visual generative models has long been constrained by fragmented architectures relying on disjoint text encoders and external VAEs. In this report, we present HiDream-O1-Image, a natively unified generative foundation model via pixel-space Diffusion Transformer, that pioneers a paradigm shift from modular architectures to an end-to-end in-context visual generation engine. By mapping raw image pixels, text tokens, and task-specific conditions into a single shared token space, HiDream-O1-Image achieves a structural unification of multimodal inputs within an Unified Transformer (UiT) architecture. This native encoding paradigm eliminates the need for separate VAEs or disjoint pre-trained text encoders, allowing the model to treat diverse generation and editing tasks as a consistent in-context reasoning process. Extensive experiments show that HiDream-O1-Image excels across various generation tasks, including text-to-image generation, instruction-based editing, and subject-driven personalization. Notably, with only 8B parameters, HiDream-O1-Image (8B) achieves performance parity with or even surpasses established state-of-the-art models with significantly larger parameters (e.g., 27B Qwen-Image). Crucially, to validate the immense scalability of this paradigm, we successfully scale the architecture up to over 200B parameters. Experimental results demonstrate that this massive-scale version HiDream-O1-Image-Pro (200B+) unlocks unprecedented generative capabilities and superior performance, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks. Ultimately, HiDream-O1-Image highlights the immense potential of natively unified architectures and charts a highly scalable path toward next-generation multimodal AI.

AI.tldr: HiDream-O1-Image 提出了一种原生统一的视觉生成基础模型，通过像素空间的扩散Transformer将图像、文本和任务条件映射到统一的token空间中，消除了对独立VAE和文本编码器的需求，仅8B参数即可超越27B Qwen-Image，并成功扩展到200B+参数规模。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型依赖碎片化的架构，需要独立的文本编码器和VAE，缺乏原生统一的多模态处理能力，限制了模型的可扩展性和效率。
AI.method: 提出Unified Transformer (UiT)架构，将原始图像像素、文本token和任务特定条件映射到单一共享token空间，在像素空间上进行扩散Transformer训练，实现端到端的上下文视觉生成引擎。
AI.result: 8B参数模型在文本到图像生成、指令编辑、主体驱动个性化等任务上达到或超越27B Qwen-Image等更大模型；成功扩展到200B+参数规模，在多项基准上达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 原生统一的视觉生成架构具有巨大的可扩展性潜力，为下一代多模态AI提供了高效且可扩展的新范式。

title: ReVision: Scaling Computer-Use Agents via Temporal Visual Redundancy Reduction
summary: Computer-use agents~(CUAs) rely on visual observations of graphical user interfaces, where each screenshot is encoded into a large number of visual tokens. As interaction trajectories grow, the token cost increases rapidly, limiting the amount of history that can be incorporated under fixed context and compute budgets. This has resulted in no or very limited improvement in the performance when using history unlike other domains. We address this inefficiency by introducing ReVision, which is used to train multimodal language models on trajectories where redundant visual patches are removed using a learned patch selector that compares patch representations across consecutive screenshots while preserving spatial structure required by the model. Across three benchmarks, OSWorld, WebTailBench, and AgentNetBench, when processing trajectories with 5 history screenshots using Qwen2.5-VL-7B, ReVision reduces token usage by approximately 46% on average while improving success rate by 3% over the no drop baseline. This establishes a clear efficiency gain, enabling agents to process longer trajectories with fewer tokens. With this improved efficiency, we revisit the role of history in CUAs and find that performance continues to improve as more past observations are incorporated when redundancy is removed. This suggests that the commonly observed saturation in visual history is not due to limited usefulness of past information, but rather a consequence of inefficient token representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReVision，通过可学习的补丁选择器在连续截图间去除冗余视觉补丁，大幅减少视觉token数量（平均减少46%），同时提升GUI智能体的任务成功率（约3%），并发现去除冗余后引入更多历史信息可持续提升性能，挑战了"视觉历史饱和"的既有认知。
AI.motivation: 当前计算机使用智能体依赖GUI截图编码为大量视觉token，随着交互轨迹增长token成本急剧上升，限制了历史信息的利用。以往研究认为引入更多历史信息对性能提升有限甚至饱和，但这种"饱和"可能源于token表示的低效而非历史信息本身无用。
AI.method: 提出ReVision框架，在训练多模态语言模型时加入可学习的补丁选择器，该选择器通过比较连续截图间的补丁表示来识别并去除冗余视觉补丁，同时保留模型所需的空间结构信息。
AI.result: 在OSWorld、WebTailBench、AgentNetBench三个基准上，使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B处理5张历史截图时，ReVision平均减少约46%的token使用量，同时成功率提升约3%。去除冗余后，引入更多历史观测可持续提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉历史性能饱和并非由于过去信息本身无用，而是由于token表示的低效。ReVision通过消除冗余实现了效率与性能的双赢，使智能体能够用更少token处理更长轨迹。

title: OLIVIA: Online Learning via Inference-time Action Adaptation for Decision Making in LLM ReAct Agents
summary: Large language model agents interleave reasoning, action selection, and observation to solve sequential decision-making tasks. In deployed settings where agents repeatedly handle related multi-step tasks, small action-selection errors can accumulate into wasted tool calls, latency, and reduced reliability. Despite this need for deployment-time improvement, existing inference-time adaptation methods for LLM agents mainly rely on prompting or retrieval, which influence behavior indirectly through context manipulation. For ReAct-style agents, such approaches do not expose an explicit decision layer that can score candidate actions, represent uncertainty, or be updated online from action-level feedback. As a result, they provide limited support for trackable, fine-grained, and uncertainty-aware adaptation during deployment. We propose OLIVIA, an inference-time action adaptation framework for ReAct-style agents. OLIVIA models the LLM's final action-selection layer as a contextual linear bandit over candidate actions, with frozen hidden states as decision contexts. This choice is particularly suitable for deployment because it adapts behavior directly at the action-selection interface, preserves the underlying reasoning process, and provides explicit uncertainty estimates and lightweight online updates from action-level feedback. With upper-confidence-bound exploration, OLIVIA improves the policy sample-efficiently with minimal computational overhead. We instantiate OLIVIA on four benchmarks and show that it consistently improves task performance over static ReAct and prompt-based inference-time baselines. Our results suggest that explicit online decision layers provide an effective alternative to purely prompt- or retrieval-based adaptation for LLM agents during deployment.

AI.tldr: OLIVIA 提出了一种推理时动作适应框架，将 ReAct 风格 LLM Agent 的最终动作选择层建模为上下文线性 bandit，通过在线学习和上置信界探索，在部署阶段高效改进动作选择，减少错误累积。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 在部署中处理多步任务时，小动作选择错误会累积导致资源浪费和可靠性下降。而现有推理时适应方法（提示/检索）缺乏显式决策层，无法对候选动作打分、表示不确定性或在线更新。
AI.method: 将冻结的 LLM 隐藏状态作为决策上下文，将最终动作选择建模为上下文线性 bandit，使用 UCB 探索策略，支持轻量级在线更新和不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在四个基准上一致优于静态 ReAct 和基于提示的推理时基线，样本高效地提升了任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式在线决策层是 LLM Agent 部署时相比纯提示/检索适应的有效替代方案。

title: Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) improves in-domain performance but can degrade out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. Prior work suggests that this degradation is related to changes in dominant singular subspaces of pretrained weight matrices. However, directly identifying loss-sensitive directions with Hessian or Fisher information is computationally expensive at LLM scale. In this work, we propose preserving projected rotations in pretrained singular subspaces as an efficient proxy for Fisher-sensitive directions, which we call Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT). RPSFT penalizes changes in the projected top-$k$ singular-vector block of each pretrained weight matrix, limiting unnecessary rotation while preserving task adaptation. Across model families and sizes trained on math reasoning data, RPSFT improves the in-domain/OOD trade-off over standard SFT and strong SFT baselines, better preserves pretrained representations, and provides stronger initializations for downstream RL fine-tuning. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT.git}{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT}.

AI.tldr: 提出旋转保持微调（RPSFT），通过在预训练权重矩阵的奇异子空间中约束投影旋转，作为Fisher敏感方向的高效代理，在SFT中改善域内/域外泛化权衡。
AI.motivation: SFT会损害域外泛化，先前工作认为这与预训练权重矩阵主导奇异子空间的变化有关，但直接使用Hessian或Fisher信息在LLM规模下计算成本过高。
AI.method: RPSFT对预训练权重矩阵的top-k奇异向量块施加投影旋转惩罚，限制不必要的旋转同时保留任务适应能力，作为Fisher敏感方向的轻量级代理。
AI.result: 在多个模型家族和规模上（基于数学推理数据），RPSFT相比标准SFT和强基线方法改善了域内/域外权衡，更好保留预训练表征，并为下游RL微调提供更强初始化。
AI.conclusion: RPSFT是一种高效且有效的SFT方法，在不牺牲域内性能的前提下提升域外泛化，且对后续RLHF训练有益。

title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together: Background-Invariant Representations via Linear Structure in VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs), such as CLIP and SigLIP 2, are widely used for image classification, yet their vision encoders remain vulnerable to systematic biases that undermine robustness. In particular, correlations between foreground objects and their backgrounds constitute a salient and practically important class of spurious dependencies. In this work, we revisit the well-known property of high linear additivity in VLM embedding spaces and show that it enables a decomposition of scene representations into foreground and background components. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a pre-training approach that exploits this property to construct background-invariant representations using synthetic data. Our method achieves, to our knowledge, the first worst-group accuracy exceeding $90\%$ on Waterbirds under perfect ($100\%$) spurious correlation (i.e., no minority-group examples in the training data). Furthermore, it demonstrates strong sim-to-real transfer and requires no access to real-world debiased data, making it practical for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文利用VLM嵌入空间的高线性可加性，将场景表示分解为前景和背景组件，提出一种基于合成数据的前置训练方法构建背景不变表示，在完美虚假相关（无少数群体样本）的Waterbirds数据集上实现了首个超过90%的最差群体准确率。
AI.motivation: VLM视觉编码器存在系统性偏见，尤其前景-背景的虚假相关严重影响模型鲁棒性，现有方法依赖真实世界去偏数据，缺乏实用性。
AI.method: 利用VLM嵌入空间的高线性可加性将场景表示分解为前景和背景成分，通过合成数据构造背景不变表示的前置训练方法。
AI.result: 在完美虚假相关（100%虚假相关）的Waterbirds上实现>90%最差群体准确率，具备强sim-to-real迁移能力，无需真实去偏数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了VLM中背景虚假相关导致的鲁棒性问题，且实用性强（无需真实去偏数据），对未来VLM的公平性和鲁棒性研究有重要参考价值。

title: RETUYT-INCO at BEA 2026 Shared Task 2: Meta-prompting in Rubric-based Scoring for German
comment: To be presented at the BEA 2026 workshop, co-located with ACL 2026
summary: In this paper, we present the RETUYT-INCO participation at the BEA 2026 shared task "Rubric-based Short Answer Scoring for German". Our team participated in track 1 (Unseen answers three-way), track 3 (Unseen answers two-way) and track 4 (Unseen questions two-way). Since these tracks required scoring short student answers using specific rubrics, we looked for ways to handle the changing nature of the task. We created a method called Meta-prompting. In this approach, an LLM creates a custom prompt based on examples from the Train set. This prompt is then used to grade new student answers. Along with this method, we also describe other approaches we used, such as classic machine learning, fine-tuning open-source LLMs, and different prompting techniques. According to the official results, our team placed 6th out of 8 participants in Track 1 with a QWK of 0.729. In Track 3, we secured 4th place out of 9 with a QWK of 0.674, and we also placed 4th out of 8 in Track 4 with a QWK of 0.49.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Meta-prompting方法，让LLM基于训练集示例自动生成评分提示，用于德语短答案的基于量规的自动评分。在BEA 2026共享任务中，团队在三个赛道分别获得第6名（QWK 0.729）、第4名（QWK 0.674）和第4名（QWK 0.49）。
AI.motivation: 解决基于量规的德语短答案自动评分问题，需要处理任务中不断变化的特性（不同问题、不同量规），现有方法难以灵活适应。
AI.method: 提出Meta-prompting方法：让LLM根据训练集示例自动生成自定义提示，再用该提示对新答案进行评分。同时尝试了经典机器学习、微调开源LLM、不同提示技巧等方法。
AI.result: Track 1（未见答案三分类）：第6/8名，QWK=0.729；Track 3（未见答案二分类）：第4/9名，QWK=0.674；Track 4（未见问题二分类）：第4/8名，QWK=0.49。
AI.conclusion: Meta-prompting方法在德语自动评分任务中表现中等，仍有较大提升空间，特别是未见问题场景（Track 4）表现较弱。

title: The Many Faces of On-Policy Distillation: Pitfalls, Mechanisms, and Fixes
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) and on-policy self-distillation (OPSD) have emerged as promising post-training methods for large language models, offering dense token-level supervision on trajectories sampled from the model's own policy. However, existing results on their effectiveness remain mixed: while OP(S)D has shown promise in system prompt and knowledge internalization, recent studies also report instability and degradation. In this work, we present a comprehensive empirical study of when OPD and OPSD work, when they fail, and why. We find that OPD on mathematical reasoning is highly sensitive to teacher choice and loss formulation, whereas OPSD fails in our tested settings due to test-time absence of instance-specific privileged information (PI). In contrast, OPSD is effective when PI represents a shared latent rule, such as a system prompt or alignment preference. We identify three failure mechanisms: (1) distribution mismatch between teacher and student caused by conditioning on student-generated prefixes, (2) optimization instability from biased TopK reverse-KL gradients, and (3) an OPSD-specific limitation where the student learns a PI-free policy that aggregates PI-conditioned teachers, which is insufficient when PI is instance-specific. We further show that stop-gradient TopK objectives, RLVR-adapted teachers, and SFT-stabilized students mitigate these failures.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了on-policy蒸馏（OPD）和on-policy自蒸馏（OPSD）在大语言模型后训练中的有效性，发现OPD在数学推理中对教师模型选择和损失函数高度敏感，OPSD在特权信息（PI）为实例特定时失败、在PI为共享潜在规则（如系统提示）时有效，并识别了三种失败机制及相应的缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对OP(S)D的效果结论不一（有的显示能内化系统提示和知识，有的报告不稳定和退化），缺乏对其何时有效、何时失败及原因的系统理解。
AI.method: 通过大量对照实验，系统分析OPD和OPSD在不同场景（数学推理、系统提示内化、对齐偏好）下的表现，识别三种失败机制：分布不匹配、TopK反向KL梯度不稳定、OPSD中学生学到聚合PI条件教师的PI无关策略。
AI.result: OPD在数学推理中高度依赖教师选择和损失函数；OPSD在PI为共享潜在规则时有效，在PI为实例特定时失败；stop-gradient TopK目标、RLVR适配教师和SFT稳定学生可缓解失败。
AI.conclusion: OP(S)D并非通用的有效方法，其效果高度依赖使用场景（尤其是PI的性质），需要针对性地设计训练目标和教师策略。

title: Vertex-Softmax: Tight Transformer Verification via Exact Softmax Optimization
summary: Certified verification of transformer attention requires bounding the softmax function over interval constraints on the pre-softmax scores. Existing verifiers relax softmax ndependently of the downstream objective, leaving avoidable slack. We prove that the exact optimum of this score-box problem is attained at a vertex of the constraint box, and establish a threshold structure theorem showing that, after sorting the objective coefficients, the optimum lies among only linearly many candidates, yielding the Vertex-Softmax primitive with log-linear complexity in the sequence length. We further prove a formal optimality result showing that Vertex-Softmax is the tightest sound bound obtainable from score intervals alone, characterizing precisely what additional structure (score correlations, score-value coupling) is needed for further improvement. Integrated into a CROWN Convex Relaxation based Optimization for Worst-case Neurons)-style verifier with a formal soundness guarantee, Vertex-Softmax significantly improves certified rates and substantially tightens lower bounds across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10 attention models, while consistently matching or outperforming alpha-CROWN and branch-and-bound baselines at a fraction of their cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vertex-Softmax方法，通过理论证明softmax在区间约束下的最优解位于顶点且具备阈值结构，实现了对Transformer注意力机制的形式化验证，在保证严格性的同时显著提升验证效率和紧致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的Transformer注意力验证器对softmax函数进行独立松弛，忽略了与下游目标的耦合，导致验证边界存在不必要的松弛。需要更紧致的softmax边界方法以提升验证效果。
AI.method: 理论证明softmax在区间约束下的最优解位于顶点（vertex），并提出阈值结构定理：对目标系数排序后，最优解仅在线性多个候选点中。基于此设计Vertex-Softmax原始方法，具有log-linear复杂度，并集成到CROWN风格的验证器中。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10的注意力模型上，Vertex-Softmax显著提升了认证率（certified rates），大幅收紧下界，并以极低的计算成本一致匹配或超越alpha-CROWN和分支定界（branch-and-bound）基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Vertex-Softmax是仅从分数区间可获得的最紧致可靠边界，证明了进一步提升需要额外结构信息（分数相关性、分数-值耦合）。该方法可即插即用地增强现有验证器。

title: LatentHDR: Decoupling Exposure from Diffusion via Conditional Latent-to-Latent Mapping for Text/Image-to-Panoramic HDR
summary: High Dynamic Range (HDR) generation remains challenging for generative models, which are largely limited to low dynamic range outputs. Recent diffusionbased approaches approximate HDR by generating multiple exposure-conditioned samples, incurring high computational cost and structural inconsistencies across exposures. We propose LatentHDR, a framework that decouples scene generation from exposure modeling in latent space. A pretrained diffusion backbone produces a single coherent scene representation, while a lightweight conditional latent to-latent head deterministically maps it to exposure-specific representations. This enables the generation of a dense, structurally consistent exposure stack in a single pass. This design eliminates multi-pass diffusion, ensures cross-exposure alignment, and enables scalable HDR synthesis. LatentHDR supports both textand image-conditioned HDR generation for perspective and panoramic scenes. Experiments on synthetic data and the SI-HDR benchmark show that LatentHDR achieves state-of-the-art dynamic range with competitive perceptual quality, while reducing computation by an order of magnitude. Our results demonstrate that high-quality HDR generation can be achieved through structured latent modeling, challenging the need for stochastic multi-exposure generation.

AI.tldr: 提出 LatentHDR 框架，通过在潜在空间中解耦场景生成与曝光建模，无需多遍扩散即可生成结构一致的 HDR 曝光栈，计算量降低一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型生成 HDR 图像需要多次采样不同曝光条件的样本，计算成本高且跨曝光结构不一致，亟需高效且结构一致的 HDR 生成方案。
AI.method: 在潜在空间中，使用预训练扩散骨干生成单一场景表示，再通过轻量级条件潜在到潜在（latent-to-latent）头将其确定性映射到特定曝光表示，实现单次生成密集且结构一致的曝光栈。
AI.result: 在合成数据和 SI-HDR 基准上达到 SOTA 动态范围，感知质量竞争力强，计算量降低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 高质量 HDR 生成可通过结构化潜在建模实现，无需随机多曝光生成，挑战了现有范式。

title: HEBATRON: A Hebrew-Specialized Open-Weight Mixture-of-Experts Language Model
summary: We present Hebatron, a Hebrew-specialized open-weight large language model built on the NVIDIA Nemotron-3 sparse Mixture-of-Experts architecture. Training employs a three-phase easy-to-hard curriculum with continuous anti-forgetting anchoring, followed by supervised fine-tuning on 2 million bilingual Hebrew--English samples. The curriculum ordering alone yields a 3-point aggregate benchmark gain over the reversed configuration. Hebatron achieves a Hebrew reasoning average of 73.8\%, outperforming DictaLM-3.0-24B-Thinking (68.9\%) and remaining competitive with Gemma-3-27B-IT on GSM8K-HE and Israeli Trivia, while activating only 3B parameters per forward pass across a 30B-parameter model, delivering approximately 9 times higher inference throughput at native context lengths up to 65,536 tokens. To our knowledge, this is the first language-specific adaptation of the Nemotron-3 architecture for any target language, and the first open-weight Hebrew-specialized MoE model with native long-context support. Model weights are released openly to support further research in Hebrew and Semitic-language NLP.

AI.tldr: Hebatron 是一个基于 Nemotron-3 MoE 架构的希伯来语专用大语言模型，通过三阶段课程学习与反遗忘锚定训练，在激活仅3B参数（总参30B）下取得73.8%的希伯来语推理平均分，性能超越现有希伯来语模型，且推理吞吐量提升约9倍，支持原生65K tokens上下文。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在希伯来语等低资源语言上表现不佳，且缺乏开源的、支持长上下文的希伯来语专用MoE模型。作者旨在填补这一空白，同时探索语言特定架构适配与高效训练策略。
AI.method: 基于 Nemotron-3 稀疏 MoE 架构（30B总参，3B激活），采用三阶段由易到难课程学习（easy-to-hard curriculum）加连续反遗忘锚定（anti-forgetting anchoring），再经过200万双语希英样本的监督微调。
AI.result: 希伯来语推理平均分73.8%，优于DictaLM-3.0-24B-Thinking（68.9%），在GSM8K-HE和以色列常识问答上与Gemma-3-27B-IT相当。推理吞吐量提升约9倍，支持65K上下文。课程顺序相比逆序带来3个百分点的增益。
AI.conclusion: 首次将Nemotron-3架构适配到特定语言（希伯来语），首次开源支持长上下文的希伯来语MoE模型，验证了课程学习与反遗忘锚定在低资源语言模型训练中的有效性。

title: Don't Look at the Numbers: Visual Anchoring Bias and Layer-wise Representation in VLMs
summary: Embedded numeric anchors on images systematically bias Vision-Language Model quality judgments across six VLMs from five architectural families (ANOVA eta^2 = 0.18-0.77, all p < 0.001). Anchor effects are 2.5x larger than severe image quality degradation, confirming bias is not reducible to visual changes. Layer-wise probing reveals consistent dissociation: layers where anchor classification saturates (L12-L34) are suboptimal for quality prediction, with optimal layers deeper (R^2 = 0.69-0.91). Fusion analysis identifies architecture-dependent integration -- instant fusion at L1-L2 in two models versus partial or no fusion in three others. These results establish a causal account of visual anchoring bias, linking behavioral susceptibility to representation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文发现嵌入在图像中的数值锚点会系统性偏置视觉语言模型的质量判断，锚点效应是严重图像质量退化的2.5倍；通过分层探针分析揭示了锚点分类与质量预测在层上的分离，以及不同架构下锚点融合方式存在差异。
AI.motivation: 探究视觉语言模型在质量判断任务中是否受到嵌入数值锚点的系统性偏置，并揭示其内部表征机制。
AI.method: 在6个VLMs（来自5种架构族）上进行锚点嵌入实验，使用ANOVA分析效应量；通过分层探针（layer-wise probing）分析锚点分类与质量预测在不同层的表现；进行融合分析（fusion analysis）识别架构依赖的锚点集成方式。
AI.result: 锚点效应量eta^2=0.18-0.77（p<0.001），效应大小是严重图像质量退化的2.5倍；锚点分类饱和层（L12-L34）对质量预测非最优，最优层更深（R^2=0.69-0.91）；不同架构下锚点融合方式不同，有即时融合（L1-L2）、部分融合或不融合。
AI.conclusion: 建立了视觉锚定偏误的因果解释，将行为层面的易感性连接至表征动力学。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Scale Graph Neural Networks: Scalable Heterophilous Learning with Oversmoothing and Oversquashing Mitigation
summary: Graphs with heterophily, where adjacent nodes carry different labels, are prevalent in real-world applications, from social networks to molecular interactions. However, existing spectral Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches tailored for heterophilous graph classification suffer from hub-dominated (node with large degree) aggregation and oversmoothing, as their suboptimal polynomial filters introduce approximation errors and blend distant signals. To address the degree-biased aggregation and suboptimal polynomial filtering, we introduce a Hierarchical Multi-view HAAR (HMH), a novel spectral graph-learning framework that scales in near-linear time . HMH first learns feature- and structure-aware signed affinities via a heterophily-aware encoder, then constructs a soft graph hierarchy guided by these embeddings. At each hierarchical level, HMH constructs a sparse, orthonormal, and locality-aware Haar basis to apply learnable spectral filters in the frequency domain. Finally, skip-connection unpooling layers combine outputs from all hierarchical levels back into the original graph, effectively preventing hub domination and long-range signal bottleneck (over-squashing). Experimentation shows that HMH outperforms state-of-the-art spectral baselines, achieving up to a 3% improvement on node classification and 7% points on graph classification datasets, all while maintaining linear scalability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HMH框架，通过分层多视图HAAR小波基和异质性感知编码器，解决异构图分类中的中心节点主导聚合和过度平滑问题，实现近线性时间扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有面向异构图的光谱GNN方法存在中心节点（大度节点）主导的聚合偏差和过度平滑问题，原因是次优多项式滤波器引入逼近误差并混合远距离信号，亟需一种可扩展且无偏的谱图学习框架。
AI.method: HMH框架包含：(1) 异质性感知编码器学习特征和结构感知的有符号亲和度；(2) 基于这些嵌入构建软图层次结构；(3) 在每个层次上构建稀疏、正交且局部感知的Haar基，在频域应用可学习谱滤波器；(4) 跳跃连接反池化层将各层次输出合并回原始图。
AI.result: 在节点分类上提升高达3%，在图分类数据集上提升高达7%，同时保持线性可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: HMH通过层次化Haar小波基有效解决了中心节点主导和长距离信号瓶颈问题，为异构图分类提供了一种可扩展且高性能的谱图学习方案。

title: USEMA: a Scalable Efficient Mamba Like Attention for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate medical image segmentation is an integral part of the medical image analysis pipeline that requires the ability to merge local and global information. While vision transformers are able to capture global interactions using vanilla self-attention, their quadratic computational complexity in the input size remains a struggle for medical image segmentation tasks. Motivated by the dispersion property of vanilla self-attention and recent development of Mamba form of attention, Scalable and Efficient Mamba like Attention (SEMA) utilizes token localization via local window attention to avoid dispersion and maintain focusing, complemented by theoretically consistent arithmetic averaging to capture global aspect of attention. In this work, we present USEMA, a hybrid UNet architecture that merges the local feature extraction ability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with SEMA attention. We conduct experiments with USEMA across a variety of modalities and image sizes, demonstrating improved computational efficiency compared to transformer based models using full self-attention, and superior segmentation performance relative to purely convolution and Mamba-based models.

AI.tldr: USEMA是一种混合UNet架构，通过结合CNN的局部特征提取能力与SEMA注意力（基于Mamba启发的局部窗口注意力+算术平均实现全局信息），在医学图像分割中实现了比纯卷积、纯Mamba和全自注意力Transformer模型更高的计算效率和分割性能。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformer的自注意力计算复杂度随输入大小呈二次增长，在医学图像分割中效率低下；而Mamba形式的注意力虽有改进，但仍需进一步优化局部与全局信息的融合方式。
AI.method: 提出SEMA（可扩展高效Mamba类注意力），利用局部窗口注意力避免自注意力分散问题，结合理论上一致的算术平均来捕获全局信息；并将其嵌入UNet架构（USEMA），形成CNN与SEMA混合的编解码结构。
AI.result: 在多模态、多尺寸医学图像分割实验上，USEMA比基于全自注意力的Transformer模型计算效率更高，分割性能优于纯卷积模型和纯Mamba模型。
AI.conclusion: 局部窗口注意力+算术平均全局聚合是一种兼顾效率与效果的注意力机制设计范式，混合CNN-Mamba架构在医学图像分割任务中具有显著优势。

title: ReAD: Reinforcement-Guided Capability Distillation for Large Language Models
summary: Capability distillation applies knowledge distillation to selected model capabilities, aiming to compress a large language model (LLM) into a smaller one while preserving the abilities needed for a downstream task. However, most existing methods treat capabilities as independent training targets and overlook how improving one capability can reshape the student's broader capability profile, especially when multiple abilities jointly determine task success. We study capability distillation under a fixed token budget and identify two consistent patterns: distillation induces systematic, budget-dependent cross-capability transfer, and additional budget often brings limited task-relevant gains while sometimes degrading other useful abilities. Building on these insights, we propose ReAD, a Reinforcement-guided cApability Distillation framework that explicitly accounts for capability interdependence. ReAD first infers task-essential capabilities, then generates capability-targeted supervision on the fly, and finally uses an uncertainty-aware contextual bandit to adaptively allocate the distillation budget based on expected utility gains. Extensive experiments show that ReAD improves downstream utility under the same token budget while reducing harmful spillover and wasted distillation effort compared to strong baselines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LabRAI/ReAD.

AI.tldr: 提出ReAD框架，利用强化学习引导的能力蒸馏方法，在固定token预算下通过不确定性感知的上下文bandit自适应分配蒸馏预算，以处理能力间的相互依赖关系，提升下游任务效用并减少有害溢出和浪费。
AI.motivation: 现有能力蒸馏方法将能力视为独立训练目标，忽略了能力间的相互影响和迁移效应，导致在固定预算下任务相关收益有限且可能损害其他有用能力。
AI.method: ReAD包含三步：1）推断任务必要能力；2）动态生成针对性的能力监督信号；3）使用不确定性感知的上下文bandit，基于预期效用增益自适应分配蒸馏预算。
AI.result: 在相同token预算下，ReAD相比强基线方法提升了下游任务效用，同时减少了有害能力溢出和不必要的蒸馏开销。
AI.conclusion: 能力蒸馏中存在预算依赖的跨能力迁移模式，ReAD通过显式建模能力相互依赖关系能更高效地利用蒸馏预算。

title: Do Vision-Language-Models show human-like logical problem-solving capability in point and click puzzle games?
summary: Vision-Language(-Action) Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to interactive environments, yet existing benchmarks often overlook the complex physical reasoning required for point-and-click puzzle games. This paper introduces Vision-Language Against The Incredible Machine (VLATIM), a benchmark designed to evaluate human-like logical problem-solving capabilities within the classic physics puzzle game The Incredible Machine 2 (TIM). Unlike existing benchmarks, VLATIM specifically targets the critical gap between high-level logical reasoning and continuous action spaces requiring precise mouse interactions. This benchmark is structured into five progressive parts, assessing capabilities that range from basic visual grounding and domain understanding to multi-step manipulation and full puzzle solving. Our results reveal a significant disparity between reasoning and execution. While large proprietary models demonstrate superior planning abilities, they struggle with precise visual grounding. Consequently, they do not yet show human-like problem-solving capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VLATIM基准测试，用于评估视觉语言模型在物理解谜游戏《The Incredible Machine 2》中的逻辑推理和精确操作能力，发现大模型在规划上表现良好但在精确视觉定位上存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLM基准测试忽略了点按式解谜游戏中所需的复杂物理推理能力，特别是高级逻辑推理与连续动作空间（精确鼠标交互）之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 构建了VLATIM基准，分为五个渐进式部分：基础视觉定位、领域理解、多步操作到完整谜题解决，评估VLM在TIM2游戏中的物理逻辑推理能力。
AI.result: 大型专有模型在规划能力上表现更优，但在精确视觉定位方面存在困难，整体尚未达到类人的问题解决能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在物理推理任务中存在推理与执行的显著差距，尤其在需要精细视觉-动作对齐的场景下仍远不及人类水平。

title: LEAP: Unlocking dLLM Parallelism via Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection
summary: Diffusion Language Models (dLLMs) have garnered significant attention for their potential in highly parallel processing. The parallel capabilities of existing dLLMs stem from the assumption of conditional independence at high confidence levels, which ensures negligible discrepancy between the marginal and joint distributions. However, the stringent confidence thresholds required to preserve accuracy severely constrain the scalability of parallelism. Through systematic token-level statistical analysis, we reveal that a substantial proportion of tokens converge to their correct predictions early in the denoising process yet fail to reach standard confidence thresholds, confirming that current confidence-based criteria are overly conservative. In response, we introduce LEAP (Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection for Accelerated Parallel Decoding). LEAP is a training-free, plug-and-play method that leverages future context filtering and multi-sequence superposition to detect early-converging tokens. By validating the alignment between early convergence and correctness, we enable reliable early decoding of these tokens. Benchmarking across diverse domains demonstrates that LEAP significantly lowers inference latency and decoding steps. Compared to confidence-based decoding, the average number of denoising steps is reduced by about 30%. On the GSM8K dataset, combining LEAP with dParallel accelerates decoding to 7.2 tokens per step while preserving model precision. LEAP effectively breaks the reliance on high-confidence priors, offering a novel paradigm for parallel decoding.

AI.tldr: LEAP是一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，通过前瞻上下文过滤和多序列叠加检测早期收敛token，在不依赖高置信度先验的情况下加速扩散语言模型的并行解码，在GSM8K等数据集上实现了约30%的去噪步数减少和7.2 tokens/步的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型（dLLMs）的并行解码依赖于高置信度阈值来保证条件独立性，但该阈值过于保守，大量token虽已早期收敛却未达到置信度标准，严重限制了并行性的可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出LEAP（Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection for Accelerated Parallel Decoding），一种训练-free的即插即用方法，通过前瞻上下文过滤和多序列叠加来检测早期收敛的token，并验证早期收敛与正确性之间的对齐关系，从而实现对这些token的可靠早期解码。
AI.result: 在多个领域的基准测试中，相比基于置信度的解码，平均去噪步数减少约30%；在GSM8K数据集上，LEAP结合dParallel将解码加速至每步7.2个token，同时保持模型精度。
AI.conclusion: LEAP打破了传统方法对高置信度先验的依赖，为扩散语言模型的并行解码提供了一种新范式。

title: Unpacking the Eye of the Beholder: Social Location, Identity, and the Moving Target of Political Perspectives
summary: Political and social identities structure how people evaluate political information, a finding decades deep in political science and routinely discarded by computational tools that often produce single scores that treat a piece of text, an image, or a video as if it means the same thing to everyone. This paper shows that it does not, and that the difference is consequential. To address this problem, I develop the Perspectivist Visual Political Sentiment (PVPS) classifier, which learns from approximately 82,000 evaluations by 5,575 U.S. adults to predict how audiences defined by political and social identities will evaluate the same image. Unlike standard tools that average systematic disagreement away, PVPS preserves it, returning an evaluative profile that records who agrees, who diverges, and along which identity lines. Applied to several influential studies of visual sentiment, PVPS shows that perceived violence in protest imagery and the emotional mechanisms behind protest image engagement both change substantively once audience identity is taken into account. It follows that what a political image conveys is a moving target, and measuring it requires knowing whom it is moving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视角主义视觉政治情感（PVPS）分类器，利用约8.2万条美国成人评估数据，预测不同政治和社会身份群体对同一图像的情感评价差异，而非像传统工具那样平均化分歧。应用于抗议图像研究后发现，身份差异显著影响感知到的暴力程度和情感机制。
AI.motivation: 传统计算工具将文本/图像/视频视为对所有人具有相同含义，忽略了政治科学中数十年的发现：政治和社会身份结构性地决定了人们如何评估政治信息。这种单分数方法丢失了有意义的群体分歧。
AI.method: 开发PVPS分类器，基于约82,000条来自5,575名美国成人的评估数据，训练模型预测不同身份定义受众对同一图像的情感评价，输出包含谁同意、谁分歧以及沿着哪些身份线分歧的评估档案。
AI.result: 将PVPS应用于视觉情感研究后发现：1）抗议图像中的感知暴力程度因受众身份不同而显著变化；2）抗议图像参与背后的情感机制也因身份而异。表明图像传达的含义是动态的，取决于谁在观看。
AI.conclusion: 政治图像传达的含义是一个移动的目标，测量它需要知道它在谁那里移动。传统单分数工具掩盖了系统性的观点分歧，而视角主义方法能更准确地捕捉政治传播中的身份结构化差异。

title: Predicting Psychological Well-Being from Spontaneous Speech using LLMs
summary: We investigate the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) for zero-shot prediction of Ryff Psychological Well-Being (PWB) scores from spontaneous speech. Using a few minutes of voice recordings from 111 participants in the PsyVoiD database, we evaluated 12 instruction-tuned LLMs, including Llama-3 (8B, 70B), Ministral, Mistral, Gemma-2-9B, Gemma-3 (1B, 4B, 27B), Phi-4, DeepSeek (Qwen and Llama), and QwQ-Preview. A domain-informed prompt was developed in collaboration with experts in clinical psychology and linguistics. Results show that LLMs can extract semantically meaningful cues from spontaneous speech, achieving Spearman correlations of up to 0.8 on 80\% of the data. Additionally, to enhance explainability, we conducted statistical analyses to characterise prediction variability and systematic biases, alongside keyword-based word cloud analyses to highlight the linguistic features driving the models' predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用多种大型语言模型（LLMs）从自发语音中零样本预测Ryff心理幸福感（PWB）分数，在111名参与者的数据集上，通过领域提示实现了最高0.8的Spearman相关性，并进行了可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 探索LLMs在心理健康评估中的零样本预测能力，特别是从自发语音中自动预测心理幸福感，以减少传统问卷调查的局限性。
AI.method: 使用12种指令微调LLMs（Llama-3、Ministral、Mistral、Gemma等），结合临床心理学和语言学专家协作开发的领域提示，对PsyVoiD数据库中111名参与者的自发语音进行零样本PWB分数预测，并进行统计分析和关键词云解释。
AI.result: LLMs能在80%的数据上实现高达0.8的Spearman相关性，能从自发语音中提取语义上有意义的线索进行心理幸福感预测。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在零样本心理幸福感预测方面展现出潜力，但存在预测变异性和系统性偏差，需要进一步研究以提高可靠性。

title: PIVOT: Bridging Planning and Execution in LLM Agents via Trajectory Refinement
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents frequently generate seemingly coherent plans that fail upon execution due to infeasible actions, constraint violations, and compounding errors over extended horizons. PIVOT (Plan-Inspect-eVOlve Trajectories) addresses this plan-execution misalignment through a self-supervised framework that treats trajectories as optimizable objects iteratively refined via environment interaction. The framework comprises four stages: PLAN generates candidate trajectories; INSPECT executes them and computes structured losses with textual gradients encoding plan-execution discrepancies; EVOLVE applies these signals to produce improved trajectories; and VERIFY performs a final global check against task constraints. A monotonic acceptance process ensures a non-decreasing solution quality. Empirical evaluations on DeepPlanning and GAIA demonstrate state-of-the-art performance: with human-in-the-loop (HITL) feedback, PIVOT establishes a strong upper bound up to 94% relative improvement in constraint satisfaction, while its fully autonomous variant retains substantial gains, showing that the core trajectory-refinement mechanism remains effective without external supervision. At the same time, PIVOT remains computationally efficient, requiring up to 3x to 5x fewer tokens than competing refinement methods. These findings establish that (self- or human-supervised) feedback-based trajectory optimization is a principled methodology for mitigating plan-execution gaps in autonomous agent systems.

AI.tldr: PIVOT是一个四阶段自监督框架（PLAN→INSPECT→EVOLVE→VERIFY），通过将轨迹视为可优化对象并利用环境交互产生的文本梯度进行迭代精炼，有效解决LLM智能体规划与执行之间的错位问题。在DeepPlanning和GAIA上达到SOTA，约束满足率提升达94%，且比竞争方法节省3-5倍token。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体生成的规划往往看似合理但执行失败，原因包括不可行动作、约束违反以及在长程任务中累积错误。现有方法缺乏系统性地利用执行反馈来优化规划轨迹的机制。
AI.method: 四阶段自监督框架：1) PLAN - 生成候选轨迹；2) INSPECT - 执行轨迹并计算结构化损失，产生文本梯度编码规划-执行差异；3) EVOLVE - 利用这些信号生成改进轨迹；4) VERIFY - 最终全局检查任务约束。采用单调接受过程确保解质量非递减。
AI.result: 在DeepPlanning和GAIA上取得SOTA。有人类参与时约束满足率相对提升达94%；全自主变体仍保持显著收益；相比竞争方法节省3-5倍token计算量。
AI.conclusion: 基于反馈（自监督或人类监督）的轨迹优化是弥合自主智能体系统规划-执行鸿沟的一种原则性方法论。

title: $ξ$-DPO: Direct Preference Optimization via Ratio Reward Margin
summary: Reference-free preference optimization has emerged as an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning from human feedback, with Simple Preference Optimization(SimPO) demonstrating strong performance by eliminating the explicit reference model through a simple objective. However, the joint tuning of the hyperparameters $β$ and $γ$ in SimPO remains a central challenge. We argue that this difficulty arises because the margin formulation in SimPO is not easily interpretable across datasets with different reward gap structures. To better understand this issue, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of SimPO and find that $β$ implicitly controls sample filtering, while the effect of $γ$ depends on the reward gap structure of the dataset. Motivated by these observations, we propose $ξ$-DPO: Direct preference optimization via ratio reward margin. We first reformulate the preference objective through an equivalent transformation, changing the optimization target from maximizing the likelihood of reward gaps to minimizing the distance between reward gaps and optimal margins. Then, we redefine the reward in a ratio form between the chosen and rejected, which effectively cancels the effect of $β$ and yields a bounded and interpretable margin. This margin is called the ratio reward margin and is denoted by $ξ$. Unlike the margin $γ$ in SimPO, $ξ$ explicitly represents the desired relative separation between chosen and rejected responses and can be determined from the initial reward gap distribution, avoiding repeated trial-and-error tuning. ....

AI.tldr: 本文提出ξ-DPO，通过引入比率奖励边际（ratio reward margin）替代SimPO中的超参数β和γ，实现无需反复调参的偏好优化。
AI.motivation: SimPO中的超参数β和γ难以联合调优，且其边际公式在不同数据集的奖励差距结构下缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 将偏好目标从最大化奖励差距的似然转化为最小化奖励差距与最优边际之间的距离；将奖励重新定义为选答与拒答之间的比率形式，消除β的影响，得到有界且可解释的比率奖励边际ξ，ξ可直接从初始奖励差距分布确定。
AI.result: ξ-DPO消除了SimPO中β和γ的繁琐调参过程，ξ具有显式的语义含义，可从数据分布直接确定。
AI.conclusion: 通过可解释的比率奖励边际，ξ-DPO实现了更高效、更直观的无参考偏好优化。

title: Hi-GaTA: Hierarchical Gated Temporal Aggregation Adapter for Surgical Video Report Generation
summary: Automated, clinician-grade assessment reports for surgical procedures could reduce documentation burden and provide objective feedback, yet remain challenging due to the difficulty of aligning dense spatio-temporal video representations with language-based reasoning and the scarcity of high-quality, privacy-preserving datasets. To address this gap, we establish a benchmark comprising 214 high-quality simulated surgical videos paired with surgeon-authored evaluation reports. Building on this resource, we propose a Perception-Alignment-Reasoning framework for surgical video report generation, featuring Hi-GaTA, a novel lightweight temporal adapter that efficiently compresses long video sequences into compact, LLM-compatible visual prefix tokens through short-to-long-range temporal aggregation. For robust visual perception, we pretrain Sur40k, a surgical-specific ViViT-style video encoder on 40,000 minutes of public surgical videos to capture fine-grained spatio-temporal procedural priors. Hi-GaTA employs a temporal pyramid with text-conditioned dual cross-attention, and improves multi-scale consistency through cross-level gated fusion and an increasing-depth strategy. Finally, we fine-tune the LLM backbone using LoRA to enable coherent and stylistically consistent surgical report generation under limited supervision. Experiments show our approach achieves the best overall performance, with consistent gains over strong Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) baselines. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each proposed component.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个由214个高质量模拟手术视频与外科医生撰写的评估报告组成的基准，并提出了一种面向手术视频报告生成的感知-对齐-推理框架。该框架包含一个新型轻量级时间适配器Hi-GaTA，通过短程到长程的时间聚合将长视频序列压缩为LLM兼容的视觉前缀标记，并预训练了手术专用视频编码器Sur40k。实验表明该方法在多项指标上优于强多模态大模型基线。
AI.motivation: 手术过程自动生成临床级别的评估报告能够减轻文档负担并提供客观反馈，但由于密集时空视频表示与基于语言的推理难以对齐，以及缺乏高质量、保护隐私的数据集，这一任务仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 1) 构建214个高质量模拟手术视频与对应报告的基准；2) 提出Perception-Alignment-Reasoning框架，包含：a) 预训练手术专用视频编码器Sur40k（ViViT架构，4万分钟数据）；b) 轻量级时间适配器Hi-GaTA（时间金字塔+文本条件双交叉注意力+跨层级联门控融合+递增深度策略）；c) 使用LoRA微调LLM骨干网络。
AI.result: 该方法在整体性能上达到最优，一致性地优于强MLLM基线，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了手术视频报告生成中的时空对齐与长视频压缩问题，为自动手术评估提供了可行方案。

title: SOMA: Efficient Multi-turn LLM Serving via Small Language Model
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multi-turn dialogue settings where preserving conversational context across turns is essential. A standard serving practice concatenates the full dialogue history at every turn, which reliably maintains coherence but incurs substantial cost in latency, memory, and API expenditure, especially when queries are routed to large proprietary models. Existing approaches often struggle to balance the trade-off between response quality and efficiency. We propose a framework that exploits the early turns of a session to estimate a local response manifold and then adapt a smaller surrogate model to this local region for the remainder of the conversation. Concretely, we learn soft prompts that maximize semantic divergence between the large and surrogate small language models' responses to surface least-aligned local directions, stabilize training with anti-degeneration control, and distill the mined cases into localized LoRA fine-tuning so the surrogate runs without prompts at inference. A simple gate enables a one-time switch with rollback on drift. We further provide a theoretical analysis for key components in SOMA. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of SOMA. The source code is provided at: https://github.com/LabRAI/SOMA.

AI.tldr: 提出SOMA框架，利用对话早期轮次估计局部响应流形，将小型替代模型适配到该局部区域，通过软提示学习、反退化控制和局部LoRA微调，在保持响应质量的同时显著降低多轮对话的开销。
AI.motivation: 多轮对话中拼接完整历史会带来高延迟、高内存和高API成本，现有方法难以平衡质量与效率，因此需要一种能在保持对话连贯性的同时降低推理成本的框架。
AI.method: 1) 在对话早期用大模型估计局部响应流形；2) 学习软提示最大化大/小模型间的语义差异以发现最不对齐的方向；3) 反退化控制稳定训练；4) 将挖掘的案例蒸馏到局部LoRA微调，使小模型推理时无需提示；5) 简单门控支持一次性切换并带回滚机制。
AI.result: 实验表明SOMA在多种设置下有效平衡了响应质量与效率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部流形估计和小模型适配，SOMA在多轮对话中实现了高质量与高效率的良好权衡，且提供了理论分析支撑关键组件。

title: Rethinking LLMOps for Fraud and AML: Building a Compliance-Grade LLM Serving Stack
summary: Fraud detection and anti-money-laundering (AML) compliance are high-value domains for large language models (LLMs), but their serving requirements differ sharply from generic chat workloads. Compliance prompts are often prefix-heavy, schema-constrained, and evidence-rich, combining reusable policy instructions, risk taxonomies, transaction or document context, and short structured outputs such as JSON labels or risk factors. These properties make prefix reuse, KV-cache efficiency, runtime tuning, model orchestration, and output validation first-order systems concerns. This paper introduces a workload-aware LLMOps stack for fraud and AML workloads using self-hosted open-weight models such as Meta Llama and Alibaba Qwen. The stack combines vLLM-style runtime tuning, PagedAttention, Automatic Prefix Caching, multi-adapter serving, adapter and prompt-length-aware batching, sleep/wake lifecycle management, speculative decoding, and optional prefill/decode disaggregation. To avoid exposing institution-specific data, the reproducibility track converts public synthetic AML datasets, including IBM AML and SAML-D, into prefix-heavy compliance prompts with reusable policy text, transaction evidence, typology definitions, and schema-constrained outputs. We also incorporate an LLM-as-judge quality gate using deterministic compliance checks, reference metrics, expert-adjudicated calibration data where available, and multi-judge rubric scoring. Across public-synthetic AML workloads and controlled serving benchmarks, workload-aware tuning improved throughput from 612-650 to 3,600 requests/hour, reduced P99 latency from 31-38 seconds to 6.4-8.7 seconds, and increased GPU utilization from 12% to 78%. These results show that regulated LLM performance is a workload-design, serving-optimization, and quality-gating problem, not only a model-selection problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套面向反欺诈和反洗钱（AML）合规场景的LLMOps技术栈，通过vLLM运行时调优、PagedAttention、自动前缀缓存、多适配器服务、sleep/wake生命周期管理、推测解码、预填充/解码分离等优化，结合LLM-as-judge质量门控，在公开合成AML数据集上将吞吐量从612-650提升至3,600请求/小时，P99延迟从31-38秒降至6.4-8.7秒，GPU利用率从12%提升至78%。
AI.motivation: 反欺诈和反洗钱场景对LLM的服务需求与通用聊天负载有显著差异，其提示词通常具有前缀重量大、模式约束严格、证据丰富等特点，导致现有LLM服务系统效率低下。作者旨在设计一套工作负载感知的LLMOps技术栈，专门优化这类合规场景的推理性能。
AI.method: 构建了一套完整LLMOps栈，包含：vLLM运行时调优、PagedAttention、自动前缀缓存（APC）、多适配器服务、适配器与提示长度感知批处理、sleep/wake生命周期管理、推测解码、可选的预填充/解码分离。同时引入LLM-as-judge质量门控，结合确定性合规检查、参考指标、专家校准数据和多裁判评分。使用IBM AML和SAML-D等公开合成AML数据集构造前缀密集型合规提示进行可重复性实验。
AI.result: 工作负载感知调优将吞吐量从612-650提升至3,600请求/小时，P99延迟从31-38秒降至6.4-8.7秒，GPU利用率从12%提升至78%。
AI.conclusion: 受监管环境下的LLM性能不仅是模型选择问题，更是工作负载设计、服务优化和质量门控的系统工程问题。

title: TMPO: Trajectory Matching Policy Optimization for Diverse and Efficient Diffusion Alignment
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown extraordinary potential in aligning diffusion models to downstream tasks, yet most of them still suffer from significant reward hacking, which degrades generative diversity and quality by inducing visual mode collapse and amplifying unreliable rewards. We identify the root cause as the mode-seeking nature of these methods, which maximize expected reward without effectively constraining probability distribution over acceptable trajectories, causing concentration on a few high-reward paths. In contrast, we propose Trajectory Matching Policy Optimization (TMPO), which replaces scalar reward maximization with trajectory-level reward distribution matching. Specifically, TMPO introduces a Softmax Trajectory Balance (Softmax-TB) objective to match the policy probabilities of K trajectories to a reward-induced Boltzmann distribution. We prove that this objective inherits the mode-covering property of forward KL divergence, preserving coverage over all acceptable trajectories while optimizing reward. To further reduce multi-trajectory training time on large-scale flow-matching models, TMPO incorporates Dynamic Stochastic Tree Sampling, where trajectories share denoising prefixes and branch at dynamically scheduled steps, reducing redundant computation while improving training effectiveness. Extensive results across diverse alignment tasks such as human preference, compositional generation and text rendering show that TMPO improves generative diversity over state-of-the-art methods by 9.1%, and achieves competitive performance in all downstream and efficiency metrics, attaining the optimal trade-off between reward and diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TMPO，通过轨迹级奖励分布匹配替代标量奖励最大化，解决扩散模型RL对齐中的奖励破解问题（模式崩溃），结合Softmax-TB目标和动态随机树采样，在保持多样性的同时优化奖励。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型RL对齐方法存在严重的奖励破解问题（reward hacking），导致生成多样性和质量下降。作者发现根本原因在于这些方法追求最大化期望奖励，具有"模式寻找"（mode-seeking）特性，缺乏对可接受轨迹概率分布的有效约束，导致集中在少数高奖励路径上。
AI.method: 1) Softmax Trajectory Balance (Softmax-TB) 目标：将K条轨迹的策略概率匹配到奖励诱导的玻尔兹曼分布，利用前向KL散度的模式覆盖特性。2) Dynamic Stochastic Tree Sampling：轨迹共享去噪前缀并在动态调度步骤分支，减少大规模流匹配模型的多轨迹训练计算开销。
AI.result: 在人类偏好、组合生成、文本渲染等对齐任务上，生成多样性较SOTA方法提升9.1%，在所有下游指标和效率指标上达到竞争性表现，实现了奖励与多样性的最优权衡。
AI.conclusion: TMPO通过轨迹级分布匹配有效缓解了奖励破解问题，在提升多样性的同时不牺牲奖励优化效果，为扩散模型RL对齐提供了新的范式。

title: ABRA: Agent Benchmark for Radiology Applications
summary: Existing medical-agent benchmarks deliver imaging as pre-selected samples, never as an environment the agent must navigate. We introduce ABRA, a radiology-agent benchmark in which the agent operates an OHIF viewer and an Orthanc DICOM server through twenty-one function-calling tools that span slice navigation, windowing, series selection, pixel-coordinate annotation, and structured reporting. ABRA contains 655 programmatically generated tasks across three difficulty tiers and eight types (viewer control, metadata QA, vision probe, annotation, longitudinal comparison, BI-RADS reporting, and oracle variants of annotation and BI-RADS reporting), drawn from LIDC-IDRI, Duke Breast Cancer MRI, and NLST New-Lesion LongCT. Each episode is scored along Planning, Execution, and Outcome (Bluethgen et al., 2025) by task-type-specific automatic scorers. Ten current models, five closed-weight and five open-weight, reach at least 89% Execution on real annotation but only 0-25% Outcome; on the paired oracle variant where a simulated detector supplies the finding, Outcome on the same task reaches 69-100% across the models evaluated, localising the bottleneck to perception rather than tool orchestration. Code, task generators, and scorers are released at https://github.com/Luab/ABRA

AI.tldr: ABRA是一个放射学智能体基准测试，包含655个编程生成的任务，要求智能体通过21个函数调用工具操作OHIF查看器和Orthanc DICOM服务器。实验发现，当前模型在真实标注任务中执行得分高（≥89%）但结果得分低（0-25%），而通过模拟检测器提供发现后结果得分大幅提升至69-100%，表明瓶颈在于感知而非工具编排。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗智能体基准测试将影像作为预选样本，而非智能体需要主动探索的环境，无法评估智能体在真实放射学工作流中的导航和交互能力。
AI.method: 构建了ABRA基准，包含655个程序生成的任务（3个难度等级、8种类型），基于21个函数调用工具模拟真实OHIF查看器和Orthanc DICOM服务器操作，并设计了任务类型特定的自动评分器（从规划、执行、结果三个维度评分）。
AI.result: 10个当前模型（5个闭源+5个开源）在真实标注任务中执行得分≥89%但结果得分仅0-25%；在配有模拟检测器的任务变体中，结果得分提升至69-100%，证明主要瓶颈是视觉感知而非工具编排能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在执行单个工具操作（执行维度）上表现良好，但从影像中正确感知和识别发现（结果维度）的能力严重不足，这是未来需要重点突破的方向。

title: Large Language Models for Causal Relations Extraction in Social Media: A Validation Framework for Disaster Intelligence
