AI.motivation: 现有基准测试显示LLM近乎完美，但掩盖了真实部署中极端可靠性（如99.999% vs 99.9%）的关键差异，而标准蒙特卡洛方法评估这种极低故障概率需要海量推理，计算不可行。
AI.method: 观察到LLM故障呈现强系统性模式——少数输入子集贡献了大部分故障，利用交叉熵方法（CEM）学习一个集中在易故障输入上的采样分布，从而高效估计极端故障率。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct等三个模型上，相比均匀采样实现最高156.22倍推理量缩减；发现标准准确率相同的模型在故障率上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性是独立于标准基准的可衡量模型质量维度，该框架为可靠性关键应用提供了可行的极端可靠性评估方案。

title: The Midas Touch for Metric Depth
summary: Recent advances have markedly improved the cross-scene generalization of relative depth estimation, yet its practical applicability remains limited by the absence of metric scale, local inconsistencies, and low computational efficiency. To address these issues, we present \emph{\textbf{M}idas \textbf{T}ouch for \textbf{D}epth} (MTD), a mathematically interpretable approach that converts relative depth into metric depth using only extremely sparse 3D data. To eliminate local scale inconsistencies, it applies a segment-wise recovery strategy via sparse graph optimization, followed by a pixel-wise refinement strategy using a discontinuity-aware geodesic cost. MTD exhibits strong generalization and achieves substantial accuracy improvements over previous depth completion and depth estimation methods. Moreover, its lightweight, plug-and-play design facilitates deployment and integration on diverse downstream 3D tasks. Project page is available at https://mias.group/MTD.

AI.tldr: MTD是一种将相对深度转换为公制度量的数学可解释方法，通过稀疏图优化和像素级精炼策略，在轻量级、即插即用的框架下显著提升了跨场景深度估计的泛化能力和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有相对深度估计在跨场景泛化上有进步，但缺乏公制度量、存在局部不一致性且计算效率低，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出MTD方法：(1) 利用极稀疏3D数据将相对深度转换为公制深度；(2) 通过稀疏图优化的分段恢复策略消除局部尺度不一致；(3) 使用不连续性感知测地代价进行像素级精炼。
AI.result: 相比现有深度补全和深度估计方法，MTD展现了强泛化能力和显著的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: MTD为深度估计提供了一种轻量级、即插即用的解决方案，便于部署到多种下游3D任务中。

title: Sign Language Recognition and Translation for Low-Resource Languages: Challenges and Pathways Forward
summary: Sign languages are natural, visual-gestural languages used by Deaf communities worldwide. Over 300 distinct sign languages remain severely low-resource due to limited documentation, sparse datasets, and insufficient computational tools. This systematic review synthesizes literature on sign language recognition and translation for under-resourced languages, using Azerbaijan Sign Language (AzSL) as a case study. Analysis of global initiatives extracts eight actionable lessons, including community co-design, dialectal diversity capture, and privacy-preserving pose-based representations. Turkic sign languages (Kazakh, Turkish, Azerbaijani) receive special attention, as linguistic proximity enables effective transfer learning. We propose three paradigm shifts: from architecture-centric to data-centric AI, from signer-independent to signer-adaptive systems, and from reference-based to task-specific evaluation metrics. A technical roadmap for AzSL leverages lightweight MediaPipe-based architectures, community-validated annotations, and offline-first deployment. Progress requires sustained interdisciplinary collaboration centered on Deaf communities to ensure cultural authenticity, ethical governance, and practical communication benefit.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了手语识别与翻译领域针对低资源语言的进展，以阿塞拜疆手语为案例，提出了从架构中心转向数据中心AI、从独立于手语者转向自适应系统、从参考指标转向任务特定评估指标三大范式转变，并给出了基于MediaPipe、社区验证注释和离线部署的技术路线图。
AI.motivation: 全球超过300种手语由于文档稀少、数据集稀疏和计算工具不足而处于严重的低资源状态，缺乏有效的识别与翻译工具，阻碍了聋人社群的沟通与包容。
AI.method: 系统综述全球低资源手语识别与翻译研究，以阿塞拜疆手语为案例，结合突厥语系手语（哈萨克语、土耳其语、阿塞拜疆语）的语言邻近性分析迁移学习可行性，提出三大范式转变及具体技术路线图（轻量级MediaPipe架构、社区验证注释、离线优先部署）。
AI.result: 从全球项目中提取了八项可操作经验，包括社区协同设计、方言多样性捕获和隐私保护的姿态表示；证明了突厥语系手语间语言邻近性可实现有效的迁移学习。
AI.conclusion: 低资源手语识别与翻译的进步需要以聋人社群为中心的跨学科持久合作，以确保文化真实性、伦理治理和实际的沟通效益。

title: OOM-Free Alpamayo via CPU-GPU Memory Swapping for Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Submitted to IEEE RTCSA on March 26, 2026 (KST); Accepted on May 4, 2026 (KST)
summary: End-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving unify perception, reasoning, and control in a single neural network, achieving strong driving performance but requiring 20-60GB of GPU memory-far exceeding the 12-16GB available on commodity GPUs. We present a framework, which enables memory-efficient VLA inference on VRAM-constrained GPUs through system-level optimization alone, without model modification. Our work proceeds in three stages: (1) Sequential Demand Layering reduces VRAM usage from model-level to layer-level granularity; (2) Pipelined Demand Layering hides parameter transfer time within layer execution time via transfer--compute overlap; and (3) a GPU-Resident Layer Decision Policy, informed by per-module residency benefit analysis, eliminates the residual transfer overhead that pipelining cannot hide. We further propose a performance prediction model that determines the optimal configuration-both the number and placement of resident layers-from a single profiling run with less than 1.3% prediction error across all configurations. Applied to NVIDIA's Alpamayo-R1-10B (21.52GB) on an RTX 5070Ti (16GB), our work achieves up to 3.55x speedup over Accelerate offloading while maintaining full BF16 precision.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需修改模型、仅通过系统级优化即可在显存受限GPU上高效推理VLA模型的框架，通过顺序需求分层、流水线需求分层和GPU驻留层决策策略，实现了3.55倍加速。
AI.motivation: 端到端VLA模型在自动驾驶中性能出色，但需要20-60GB GPU显存，远超消费级GPU（12-16GB）的容量，严重限制了其实际部署。
AI.method: 三阶段优化：(1) 顺序需求分层，将显存使用从模型级降至层级粒度；(2) 流水线需求分层，通过计算-传输重叠隐藏参数传输时间；(3) GPU驻留层决策策略，基于模块级驻留收益分析消除残差传输开销。另提出性能预测模型，从单次profiling确定最优配置。
AI.result: 在RTX 5070Ti（16GB）上运行Alpamayo-R1-10B（21.52GB），相比Accelerate offloading实现最高3.55倍加速，且保持完整BF16精度，预测误差低于1.3%。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统级优化即可显著提升VLA模型在显存受限GPU上的推理效率，无需修改模型架构，为消费级GPU部署大模型提供了实用方案。

title: Enforcing Constraints in Generative Sampling via Adaptive Correction Scheduling
summary: Hard constraints in generative sampling are typically enforced by projection, applied either once at the end of sampling or after every update. This binary framing overlooks a fundamental issue: projection changes the distribution of states which future updates depend on. As a result, delayed projection can produce samples that are feasible but inconsistent with the intended sampling dynamics, even after final projection. We formalize constraint enforcement as a correction scheduling problem over the generative rollout. Using one-step constraint defect as a local signal of geometric mismatch, we introduce adaptive correction scheduling, a state-dependent policy that allocates projection budget to the steps that most strongly perturb the trajectory. Terminal and stepwise projection arise as limiting cases of this family. Across controlled manifold rollouts and a learned projected diffusion sampler, adaptive scheduling improves the cost-accuracy frontier at matched projection budgets, recovering 71.2% of full stepwise benefit with 75% fewer corrections. These results show that constraint timing is a first-class design variable in generative sampling, and that enforcing feasibility alone is insufficient to preserve the intended constrained sampling dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应校正调度策略，将生成采样中的约束执行形式化为一个校正调度问题。与传统的末端投影或每步投影不同，该方法根据单步约束缺陷自适应分配投影预算，在减少75%修正次数的同时恢复了71.2%的完整逐步投影收益，证明约束时机是生成采样中的一等设计变量。
AI.motivation: 传统生成采样中约束强制执行采用二元方式——要么在采样结束时一次性投影，要么在每次更新后投影。这忽略了投影会改变未来更新依赖的状态分布，导致延迟投影可能产生可行但与预期采样动力学不一致的样本。作者旨在解决约束时机这一被忽视的根本性问题。
AI.method: 将约束强制执行形式化为生成过程中的校正调度问题。定义"单步约束缺陷"作为几何不匹配的局部信号，据此提出自适应校正调度——一种状态相关的策略，将投影预算分配给对轨迹扰动最强的步骤。末端投影和逐步投影是该策略的极限情况。
AI.result: 在受控流形滚动和学习投影扩散采样器上，自适应调度在匹配投影预算下改善了成本-精度前沿，以减少75%的修正次数恢复了71.2%的完整逐步投影收益。
AI.conclusion: 约束时机是生成采样中的一等设计变量，仅确保可行性不足以保持预期的约束采样动力学。

title: A Mixture Autoregressive Image Generative Model on Quadtree Regions for Gaussian Noise Removal via Variational Bayes and Gradient Methods
summary: This paper addresses the problem of image denoising for grayscale images. We propose a probabilistic image generative model that combines a quadtree region-partitioning model with a mixture autoregressive model, and propose a framework that reduces MAP (maximum a posteriori)-estimation-based denoising to the maximization of a variational lower bound. To maximize this lower bound, we develop an algorithm that alternately applies variational Bayes and gradient methods. We particularly demonstrate that the gradient-based update rule can be computed analytically without numerical computation or approximation. We carried out some experiments to verify that the proposed algorithm actually removes image noise and to identify directions for future improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合四叉树区域划分和混合自回归模型的概率图像生成模型，用于灰度图像去噪，通过变分下界最大化实现MAP估计去噪，并开发了交替应用变分贝叶斯和梯度方法的算法。
AI.motivation: 解决灰度图像去噪问题，提出一种概率生成模型框架来改进去噪效果。
AI.method: 结合四叉树区域划分模型与混合自回归模型，构建概率图像生成模型；将MAP估计去噪转化为最大化变分下界问题；开发交替应用变分贝叶斯和梯度方法的算法，其中梯度更新规则可解析计算无需数值近似。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提算法确实能够去除图像噪声，并指出了未来改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 该概率框架有效实现了图像去噪，梯度更新可解析计算是重要优势，但文章属于经典计算机视觉/图像处理领域工作。

title: Metaphor Is Not All Attention Needs
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where their ability to resist harmful instructions is essential. Although post-training aims to make models robust against many jailbreak strategies, recent evidence shows that stylistic reformulations, such as poetic transformation, can still bypass safety mechanisms with alarming effectiveness. This raises a central question: why do literary jailbreaks succeed? In this work, we investigate whether their effectiveness depends on specific poetic devices, on a failure to recognize literary formatting, or on deeper changes in how models process stylistically irregular prompts. We address this problem through an interpretability analysis of attention patterns. We perform input-level ablation studies to assess the contribution of individual and combinations of poetic devices; construct an interpretable vector representation of attention maps; cluster these representations and train linear probes to predict safety outcomes and literary format. Our results show that models distinguish poetic from prose formats with high accuracy, yet struggle to predict jailbreak success within each format. Clustering further reveals clear separation by literary format, but not by safety label. These findings indicate that jailbreak success is not caused by a failure to recognize poetic formatting; rather, poetic prompts induce distinct processing patterns that remain largely independent of harmful-content detection. Overall, literary jailbreaks appear to misalign large language models not through any single poetic device, but through accumulated stylistic irregularities that alter prompt processing and avoid lexical triggers considered during post-training. This suggests that robustness requires safety mechanisms that account for style-induced shifts in model behavior. We use Qwen3-14B as a representative open-weight case study.

AI.tldr: 本文通过注意力模式可解释性分析，研究了文学性越狱攻击（如诗歌风格）为何能绕过LLM的安全机制。结果表明模型能准确区分诗歌与散文格式，但无法预测越狱成功率；文学越狱并非通过单一诗歌手法，而是通过累积的风格不规则性改变模型处理过程，从而规避后训练中的词汇触发机制。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在安全关键场景中部署，尽管经过后训练对齐，文学性风格改写（如诗歌化转换）仍能高效绕过安全机制。研究者旨在探究文学越狱成功的原因：是特定诗歌手法的作用？是对文学格式的识别失败？还是风格不规则输入导致模型处理过程的深层变化？
AI.method: 对Qwen3-14B进行注意力模式可解释性分析：1) 输入级消融实验，评估单个及组合诗歌手法的贡献；2) 构建注意力图的可解释向量表示；3) 对这些表示进行聚类并训练线性探针预测安全结果和文学格式。
AI.result: 模型能以高准确率区分诗歌与散文格式，但在各格式内难以预测越狱成功率；聚类显示文学格式的清晰分离，但安全标签无此分离。越狱成功并非源于对诗歌格式的识别失败，而是诗歌提示诱导出不同的处理模式，且这些模式与有害内容检测相对独立。
AI.conclusion: 文学越狱并非通过单一诗歌手法起作用，而是通过累积的风格不规则性改变提示处理过程，规避后训练中的词汇触发机制。鲁棒性需要安全机制考虑风格诱导的模型行为变化。

title: Explaining and Breaking the Safety-Helpfulness Ceiling via Preference Dimensional Expansion
summary: In the realm of multi-objective alignment for large language models, balancing disparate human preferences often manifests as a zero-sum conflict. Specifically, the intrinsic tension between competing goals dictates that aggressively optimizing for one metric (e.g., helpfulness) frequently incurs a substantial penalty on another (e.g., harmlessness). While prior work mainly focuses on data selection, parameter merging, or algorithmic balancing during training, these approaches merely force compromises between divergent preferences along a fixed Pareto frontier, failing to fundamentally resolve the inherent trade-off. In this work, we approach this problem from a novel perspective of multi-dimensional rewards. By scaling up the model's rollouts and analyzing the outputs across different reward dimensions, we arrive at a critical conclusion: the conflict among multiple objectives stems from the fact that the prompt itself inherently restricts the achievable multi-dimensional rewards. Based on this core observation, we propose MORA: Multi-Objective Reward Assimilation. Specifically, MORA isolates single-reward prompts through pre-sampling and expands their reward diversity by rewriting the original questions to incorporate multi-dimensional intents. Extensive experiments demonstrate that: (1) in sequential alignment, MORA achieves single-preference improvements ranging from 5% to 12.4%, with exceptional gains in harmlessness, after multiple-preference alignment across helpful, harmless, and truthful dimensions. (2) In simultaneous alignment, MORA achieves an average overall reward improvement of 4.6%. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MORA-MPA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MORA方法，通过预采样识别单奖励提示并重写问题以融入多维度意图，从而解决LLM多目标对齐中的固有冲突，在顺序对齐和同时对齐中分别实现了5%-12.4%的单偏好提升和4.6%的整体奖励提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多目标对齐方法（如数据选择、参数合并、算法平衡）只能在固定帕累托前沿上强制折中，无法从根本上解决不同人类偏好（如有用性与无害性）之间的零和冲突。本文旨在探索一种能够真正缓解多目标固有冲突的新方法。
AI.method: MORA (Multi-Objective Reward Assimilation) 方法：1) 通过预采样识别单奖励提示（即prompt本身限制了可达到的多维奖励）；2) 对原始问题进行改写，融入多维度意图以扩展奖励多样性。
AI.result: 1) 顺序对齐中，单偏好提升5%-12.4%，无害性维度提升尤为显著；2) 同时对齐中，平均整体奖励提升4.6%。
AI.conclusion: 多目标间的冲突源于prompt本身对多维奖励的固有限制，通过MORA方法在提示层面进行干预可以有效缓解这一冲突，实现更好的多目标对齐效果。

title: Leveraging RAG for Training-Free Alignment of LLMs
summary: Large language model (LLM) alignment algorithms typically consist of post-training over preference pairs. While such algorithms are widely used to enable safety guardrails and align LLMs with general human preferences, we show that state-of-the-art alignment algorithms require significant computational resources while being far less capable of enabling refusal guardrails for recent agentic attacks. Thus, to improve refusal guardrails against such attacks without drastically increasing computational overhead, we introduce Retrieval Augmented Generation for Pref erence alignment (RAG-Pref), a simple RAG-based alignment algorithm which conditions on preferred and dispreferred samples to leverage contrastive information during inference. RAG-Pref is online (training-free), compatible with off-the-shelf packages, and, when combined with offline (training-based) alignment algorithms, enables more than an average 3.7 factor improvement in agentic attack refusals across five widely used LLMs, compared to 2.9 for other online alignment algorithms and 1.5 for offline alignment alone. We conclude by showing that, in stark contrast to other online alignment methods, RAG-Pref similarly increases performance on general human-preference alignment tasks and does not drastically increase overall computational requirements.

AI.tldr: 提出RAG-Pref，一种基于检索增强生成（RAG）的在线对齐算法，通过注入偏好对比信息来提升LLM的拒绝防护能力，在降低计算开销的同时显著增强对agentic攻击的防御效果。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM对齐算法（如RLHF、DPO等）计算开销大，且对最新的agentic攻击（如越狱攻击）的拒绝防护能力不足。作者希望在不显著增加计算负担的前提下，提升LLM的拒绝安全护栏能力。
AI.method: 提出RAG-Pref算法：在推理阶段，通过检索与当前输入相关的偏好样本（preferred和dispreferred），利用对比信息进行条件生成。该方法是online的、无需训练，可与现有offline对齐算法（如DPO）组合使用。
AI.result: 在5个广泛使用的LLM上，RAG-Pref + offline对齐相比纯offline对齐提升3.7倍的agentic攻击拒绝率，优于其他online对齐方法（2.9倍）和纯offline对齐（1.5倍）。同时，RAG-Pref在通用人类偏好对齐任务上也有提升，且计算开销不显著增加。
AI.conclusion: RAG-Pref是一种简单高效的对齐增强方法，在提升安全拒绝能力方面优于传统online对齐方法，且不带来额外计算负担，具有实用价值。

title: Logit-Attention Divergence: Mitigating Position Bias in Multi-Image Retrieval via Attention-Guided Calibration
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance in multi-image cross-modal retrieval, yet suffer from severe position bias, where predictions are dominated by input order rather than semantic relevance. Through empirical analysis, we identify a phenomenon termed Logit-Attention Divergence, in which output logits are heavily biased while internal attention maps remain well-aligned with relevant visual evidence. This observation reveals a fundamental limitation of existing logit-level calibration methods such as PriDe. Based on this insight, we propose a training-free, attention-guided debiasing framework that leverages intrinsic attention signals for instance-level correction at inference time, requiring only a minimal calibration set with negligible computational overhead. Experiments on MS-COCO-based benchmarks show that our method substantially improves permutation invariance and achieves state-of-the-art performance, enhancing accuracy by over 40\% compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/brightXian/LAD.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态大模型在多图像跨模态检索中存在严重的位置偏见（Logit-Attention Divergence现象），并提出一种无需训练、基于注意力引导的去偏框架，通过利用内在注意力信号在推理时进行实例级校正，在MS-COCO基准上实现了超过40%的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在多图像检索中受输入顺序主导而非语义相关性，存在严重位置偏见；且已有logit级校准方法（如PriDe）因忽视Logit-Attention发散现象而效果有限。
AI.method: 提出训练无关的注意力引导去偏框架：利用模型内在的注意力信号（而非logit）在推理时进行实例级校正，仅需极小的校准集，计算开销可忽略。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO基准上，该方法显著提升了排列不变性，达到SOTA性能，相比基线准确率提升超过40%。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了logit-level校准方法的根本局限，证明了注意力信号是更可靠的去偏信息来源，为多模态检索中的位置偏见问题提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Latent Causal Void: Explicit Missing-Context Reconstruction for Misinformation Detection
summary: Automatic misinformation detection performs well when deception is visible in what an article explicitly states. However, some misinformation articles remain locally coherent and only become misleading once compared with contemporaneous reports that supply background facts the article omits. We study this omission-relevant setting and observe that current omission-aware approaches typically either attach retrieved context as auxiliary evidence or infer a categorical omission signal, leaving the specific missing fact implicit. We propose \emph{Latent Causal Void} (LCV), a retrieval-guided detector that explicitly reconstructs the missing fact for each target sentence and uses it as a textual cross-source relation in graph reasoning. Concretely, LCV retrieves temporally aligned context articles, asks a frozen instruction-tuned large language model to generate a short missing-context description for each sentence--article pair, and feeds the resulting relation text into a heterograph over target sentences and context articles. On the bilingual benchmark of Sheng et al., LCV improves over the strongest omission-aware baseline by $2.56$ and $2.84$ macro-F1 points on the English and Chinese splits, respectively. The results indicate that modeling the missing cross-source fact itself, rather than only attaching retrieved evidence or predicting an omission signal, is a useful representation for omission-aware misinformation detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent Causal Void (LCV)方法，通过让大语言模型显式重构被省略的上下文事实，并构建异构图进行推理，在误导信息检测任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动误信息检测方法在处理"省略性误导"（文章局部连贯但通过省略关键背景事实来误导读者）时表现不足。已有方法要么简单附加检索到的上下文作为辅助证据，要么仅推断一个类别化的省略信号，无法显式建模被省略的具体事实。
AI.method: LCV包含三个步骤：1) 检索时间对齐的上下文文章；2) 使用冻结的指令微调大语言模型为每个句子-文章对生成简短的缺失上下文描述；3) 将生成的缺失事实作为文本化的跨源关系，输入到由目标句子和上下文文章构成的异构图中进行推理。
AI.result: 在Sheng等人的双语基准上，LCV在英文和中文数据上分别比最强的省略感知基线高出2.56和2.84个macro-F1点。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模被省略的跨源事实本身，而不仅仅是附加检索证据或预测省略信号，是一种对省略感知的误导信息检测更有效的表示方法。

title: Persistent and Conversational Multi-Method Explainability for Trustworthy Financial AI
summary: Financial institutions increasingly require AI explanations that are persistent, cross-validated across methods, and conversationally accessible to human decision-makers. We present an architecture for human-centered explainable AI in financial sentiment analysis that combines three contributions. First, we treat XAI artifacts -- LIME feature attributions, occlusion-based word importance scores, and saliency heatmaps -- as persistent, searchable objects in distributed S3-compatible storage with structured metadata and natural-language summaries, enabling semantic retrieval over explanation history and automatic index reconstruction after system failures. Second, we enable multi-method explanation triangulation, where a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) assistant compares and synthesizes results from multiple XAI methods applied to the same prediction, allowing users to assess explanation robustness through natural-language dialogue. Third, we evaluate the faithfulness of generated explanations using automated checks over grounding completeness, hallucinated claims, and method-attribution behavior. We demonstrate the architecture on an EXTRA-BRAIN financial sentiment analysis pipeline using FinBERT predictions and present evaluation results showing that constrained prompting reduces hallucination rate by 36\% and increases method-attribution citations by 73\% compared to naive prompting. We discuss implications for trustworthy, human-centered AI services in regulated financial environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向金融情感分析的人类中心可解释AI架构，将LIME、遮挡词重要性、显著性热图等XAI产物作为持久化可检索对象存储于S3，通过RAG助手实现多方法解释三角验证，并利用自动化检查评估生成解释的忠实性。实验表明约束提示将幻觉率降低36%，方法归因引用增加73%。
AI.motivation: 金融机构需要持久化、可交叉验证且可通过对话访问的AI解释，现有XAI方法缺乏系统性的存储、检索和多方法对比机制。
AI.method: 1) 将XAI产物（LIME、遮挡词重要性、显著性热图）作为持久化对象存储于S3，附带结构化元数据和自然语言摘要；2) 基于RAG的助手实现多方法解释三角验证，通过自然语言对话综合对比不同XAI方法的结果；3) 自动化忠实性检查（完备性、幻觉、方法归因）。
AI.result: 约束提示相比朴素提示将幻觉率降低36%，方法归因引用增加73%。
AI.conclusion: 该架构适用于受监管金融环境中可信、人类中心的AI服务，通过系统化的XAI产物管理和多方法三角验证提升了解释的可靠性和可访问性。

title: ADMM-Q: An Improved Hessian-based Weight Quantizer for Post-Training Quantization of Large Language Models
summary: Quantization is an effective strategy to reduce the storage and computation footprint of large language models (LLMs). Post-training quantization (PTQ) is a leading approach for compressing LLMs. Popular weight quantization procedures, including GPTQ and RTN, suffer in model utility, especially at aggressive quantization levels (sub-4-bit). We propose ADMM-Q, a novel weight quantization algorithm that considers the layer-wise quantization problem. Our algorithm is based on a combinatorial variant of the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM). Our operator-splitting procedure updates weights continuously to minimize the layer-wise reconstruction error, while gradually enforcing the quantization constraints with convergence guarantees. We propose additional algorithmic enhancements (e.g., penalty scheduling, preconditioning, and a local search post-processing step) to make ADMM-Q efficient at LLM scale. ADMM-Q is modular and can be used as a drop-in replacement for any weight quantizer within existing quantization pipelines: ADMM-Q is fully composable with existing techniques including range clipping, learned or random rotations, and activation scaling. Using ADMM-Q in place of GPTQ on Qwen3-8B, we decrease WikiText-2 perplexity in: (i) the W3A16 weight-only setting (12.85 $\rightarrow$ 10.06); (ii) the W4A8 SmoothQuant procedure (9.29 $\rightarrow$ 8.68); and (iii) the W2A4KV4 SpinQuant procedure (66.11 $\rightarrow$ 19.42).

AI.tldr: 提出ADMM-Q，一种基于交替方向乘子法(ADMM)的权重量化算法，通过组合优化方法逐层最小化重构误差并在LLM上实现高效压缩，在多个量化设置下优于GPTQ等现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有后训练量化方法（如GPTQ、RTN）在激进量化（低于4-bit）时模型效用严重下降，需要一种能在保持效率的同时更好地保持模型性能的量化算法。
AI.method: 基于组合优化的ADMM变体，通过算子分裂过程连续更新权重以最小化逐层重构误差，同时逐步施加量化约束并具有收敛保证。额外包含惩罚调度、预条件和局部搜索后处理等增强策略，支持模块化替换现有量化器。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上，W3A16权重量化困惑度从12.85降至10.06；W4A8 SmoothQuant从9.29降至8.68；W2A4KV4 SpinQuant从66.11降至19.42，显著优于GPTQ。
AI.conclusion: ADMM-Q是一种高效、模块化的权重量化算法，可即插即用替代现有量化器，在多种量化设置下均能显著提升模型效用，尤其适用于极端低位量化场景。

title: PointForward: Feedforward Driving Reconstruction through Point-Aligned Representations
summary: High-fidelity reconstruction of driving scenes is crucial for autonomous driving. While recent feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods enable fast reconstruction, their per-pixel Gaussian prediction paradigm often suffers from multi-view inconsistency and layering artifacts. Moreover, existing methods often model dynamic instances via dense flow prediction, which lacks explicit cross-view correspondence and instance-level consistency. In this paper, we propose PointForward, a feedforward driving reconstruction framework through point-aligned representations. Unlike pixel-aligned methods, we initialize sparse 3D queries in world space and aggregate multi-view image information via spatial-temporal fusion onto these queries, enforcing explicit cross-view consistency in a single feedforward pass. To handle scene dynamics, we introduce scene graphs that explicitly organize moving instances during reconstruction. By leveraging 3D bounding boxes, our method enables instance-level motion propagation and temporally consistent dynamic representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PointForward achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale driving benchmarks. The code will be available upon the publication of the paper.

AI.tldr: 提出PointForward，一种基于点对齐表示的前馈式驾驶场景重建框架，通过3D查询点初始化、时空融合以及场景图显式建模动态实例，解决了多视角不一致和分层伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3DGS方法在驾驶场景重建中存在多视角不一致和分层伪影，且对动态实例的建模缺乏跨视角对应和实例级一致性。
AI.method: 1) 在世界空间中初始化稀疏3D查询点，通过时空融合聚合多视图图像信息；2) 引入场景图，利用3D边界框实现实例级运动传播和动态表示。
AI.result: 在大规模驾驶基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 点对齐表示相比像素对齐方法能更好地保持跨视角一致性，场景图为动态驾驶场景重建提供了有效的显式建模方式。

title: Correcting Selection Bias in Sparse User Feedback for Large Language Model Quality Estimation: A Multi-Agent Hierarchical Bayesian Approach
summary: [Abridged] Production LLM deployments receive feedback from a non-random fraction of users: thumbs sit mostly in the tails of the satisfaction distribution, and a naive average over them can land 40-50 percentage points away from true system quality. We treat this as a topic- and sentiment- stratified selection-bias problem and propose a three-agent hierarchical Bayesian pipeline that does not require ground-truth labels on individual interactions. A Topic Clustering Agent partitions the stream via UMAP + HDBSCAN over text embeddings; a Bias Modeling Agent fits a two-stage hierarchical Beta-Binomial under NUTS, inferring per-topic selection rates $s_c$ and quality $q_c$ with partial pooling; a Synthesis Agent reweights $q_c$ by true topic prevalence $\hatπ_c = n_c/N$ to report a bias-corrected aggregate posterior $\bar Q = \sum_c \hatπ_c q_c$ with credible interval, plus drift signals for online recalibration. Validation uses UltraFeedback (N=10,232 retained interactions, $C=18$ clusters, $Q^\star=0.6249$) with simulated topic- and sentiment-dependent selection biases. We compare five Bayesian variants against Naive and IPW baselines. A mild prior on the feedback channel (typical positive-feedback rate and negative-to-positive ratio, both readable from any production dashboard without labels) keeps Hierarchical-Informed within 4-13 pp of $Q^\star$ as the bias ratio sweeps from 1:1 to 30:1, with 95% credible intervals covering $Q^\star$ in 50/50 random-seed replicates at $κ_{\max}=10$. Without channel-side priors, every weak-prior variant misses $Q^\star$ by 22-33 pp: the per-cluster sufficient statistics admit a one-parameter family of equally good fits, and the prior on the bias channel (not on latent quality) is what breaks the degeneracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个三智能体分层贝叶斯流水线，用于纠正生产级LLM部署中因非随机用户反馈（满意度分布尾部的点赞）导致的40-50百分点的选择偏差。通过主题聚类（UMAP+HDBSCAN）、分层Beta-Binomial建模（NUTS采样）和加权聚合，无需个体交互的真实标签，仅需反馈通道的先验知识即可将偏差控制在4-13个百分点内。
AI.motivation: 生产环境中LLM的用户反馈存在严重的选择偏差（非随机采样），直接平均会导致评估结果偏离真实质量40-50个百分点，需要一种无需真实标签的偏差校正方法。
AI.method: 三智能体分层贝叶斯流水线：(1) 主题聚类：UMAP+HDBSCAN对文本嵌入进行流式分区；(2) 偏差建模：两层分层Beta-Binomial模型（NUTS采样），推断每主题选择率s_c和质量q_c，带部分池化；(3) 合成：按真实主题流行度加权q_c，得到校正后的后验聚合质量Q̄，并输出漂移信号用于在线重校准。
AI.result: 在UltraFeedback数据集上（N=10,232，C=18簇，真实Q*=0.6249），当偏差比从1:1扫到30:1时，带反馈通道先验的分层知情模型（Hierarchical-Informed）与真实质量偏差仅4-13个百分点，95%置信区间在50/50随机种子复制中覆盖Q*；而无通道先验的弱先验变体偏差达22-33个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 反馈通道的先验（而非潜在质量的先验）是打破模型退化的关键：每个聚类的充分统计量允许一族同样好的拟合，通道先验才是消除选择偏差的核心因素。

title: Measuring What Matters Beyond Text: Evaluating Multimodal Summaries by Quality, Alignment, and Diversity
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have facilitated Multimodal Summarization with Multimodal Output (MSMO), wherein systems generate concise textual summaries accompanied by salient visuals from multimodal sources. However, current MSMO evaluation remains fragmented: text quality, image-text alignment, and visual diversity are typically assessed in isolation using unimodal metrics, making it difficult to capture whether the modalities jointly support a faithful and useful summary. To address this gap, we introduce MM-Eval, a unified evaluation framework that integrates assessments of textual quality, cross-modal alignment, and visual diversity. MM-Eval comprises three components: (1) text quality, measured using OpenFActScore for factual consistency and G-Eval for coherence, fluency, and relevance; (2) image-text relevance, evaluated via an MLLM-as-a-judge approach; and (3) image-set diversity, quantified using Truncated CLIP Entropy. We calibrate MM-Eval through a learned aggregation model trained on the mLLM-EVAL news benchmark, aligning component contributions with human preferences. Our analysis reveals a text-dominant hierarchy in this setting, where factual consistency acts as a critical determinant of perceived overall quality, while visual relevance and diversity provide complementary signals. MM-Eval improves over heuristic aggregation baselines and provides an interpretable, reference-weak framework for comparative evaluation of multimodal summaries.

AI.tldr: MM-Eval是一个面向多模态大模型摘要（MSMO）的统一评估框架，整合了文本质量、图文对齐和视觉多样性三个维度，通过可学习的聚合模型校准以匹配人类偏好，并发现事实一致性是整体质量的关键决定因素。
AI.motivation: 现有MSMO评估方式碎片化，文本质量、图文对齐和视觉多样性被割裂使用单模态指标评估，难以反映模态是否共同支持忠实有用的摘要。
AI.method: 提出MM-Eval评估框架，包含三组件：1) 文本质量（OpenFActScore评估事实一致性，G-Eval评估连贯性、流畅性和相关性）；2) 图文相关性（MLLM-as-a-judge方法）；3) 图像集多样性（Truncated CLIP Entropy）。通过基于mLLM-EVAL新闻基准训练的可学习聚合模型进行校准。
AI.result: 发现文本主导的层次结构，事实一致性是整体质量的关键决定因素，视觉相关性和多样性提供互补信号；MM-Eval优于启发式聚合基线。
AI.conclusion: MM-Eval提供了一个可解释、弱参考的统一框架用于多模态摘要的比较评估。

title: LiBaGS: Lightweight Boundary Gap Synthesis for Targeted Synthetic Data Selection
summary: Synthetic data is useful only when the added samples fill missing parts of the training distribution that matter for the downstream task. We introduce LiBaGS, a lightweight, generator-agnostic method for targeted synthetic training data selection. LiBaGS scores candidate synthetic samples by combining decision-boundary proximity, predictive uncertainty, real-data density, and support validity, so that selected samples are both informative and likely to remain on the real data manifold. We then use a boundary-gap allocation rule that targets sparse but realistic decision-boundary neighborhoods, rather than simply adding more data or selecting only the most uncertain candidates. LiBaGS also learns when enough synthetic samples have been added through a marginal-value stopping rule, assigns softer labels near ambiguous boundaries, and uses a diversity objective to avoid redundant near-duplicate selections. Experiments show that LiBaGS improves accuracy over classical oversampling, hard augmentation, uncertainty and density ablations, and targeted-generation selection criteria.

AI.tldr: 提出LiBaGS方法，通过结合决策边界邻近性、预测不确定性、真实数据密度和支持有效性来有目标地选择合成训练数据，并采用边界间隙分配规则、边际值停止规则、软标签分配和多样性目标，以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 合成数据只有在填补了训练分布中对于下游任务重要的缺失部分时才有用，现有方法缺乏针对性的选择机制来识别哪些合成样本真正有价值。
AI.method: LiBaGS框架：1) 综合评分（决策边界邻近性+预测不确定性+真实数据密度+支持有效性）；2) 边界间隙分配规则（针对稀疏但真实的决策边界邻域）；3) 边际值停止规则（学习何时停止添加合成样本）；4) 边界附近软标签分配；5) 多样性目标避免冗余选择。
AI.result: 实验表明LiBaGS在准确性上优于经典过采样、硬增强、不确定性和密度消融以及目标生成选择标准。
AI.conclusion: LiBaGS是一种轻量级、生成器无关的合成训练数据目标选择方法，能够更有效地利用合成数据提升模型性能。

title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation
summary: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. Existing AR distillation approaches typically rely on frame sinks or student-side degradation training. The former transfers poorly to driving due to fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes, while the latter remains bounded by the teacher's single-pass output length and thus provides only a limited supervision horizon. A natural question is: can the teacher itself be extended via AR rollout to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost? The key difficulty is that a standard teacher drifts under its own predictions, contaminating the supervision it provides. Our key insight is to make the teacher rollout-capable, ensuring reliable supervision from its own AR rollouts. This is instantiated as HorizonDrive, an anti-drifting training-and-distillation framework for AR driving simulation. First, scheduled rollout recovery (SRR) trains the base model to reconstruct ground-truth future clips from prediction-corrupted histories, yielding a teacher that remains stable across long AR rollouts. Second, the rollout-capable teacher is extended via AR rollout, providing long-horizon distribution-matching supervision under bounded memory, while a short-window student aligns to it with teacher rollout DMD (TRD) for efficient real-time deployment. HorizonDrive natively supports minute-scale AR rollout under bounded memory; on nuScenes, HorizonDrive reduces FID by 52% and FVD by 37%, and lowers ARE and DTW by 21% and 9% relative to the strongest long-horizon streaming baselines, while remaining competitive with single-pass driving video generators.

AI.tldr: 提出 HorizonDrive 框架，通过让教师模型具备自回归滚动能力（抗漂移训练），在有限内存下提供无限时域监督，并蒸馏给学生模型用于实时驾驶仿真，大幅提升长时域生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归蒸馏方法（帧接收器或学生侧降级训练）在驾驶场景中因快速自运动和场景变化效果不佳，且教师单次输出长度限制了监督时域。作者探索能否通过教师自身自回归滚动提供无限时域监督，但教师会在自身预测下漂移。核心动机是让教师具备滚动能力以提供可靠的长时域监督。
AI.method: 1) 调度式滚动恢复（SRR）：从被预测污染的历史中重建真实未来片段，训练出长时域自回归滚动稳定的教师模型。2) 教师滚动 DMD（TRD）：利用可滚动的教师进行自回归扩展，在有限内存下提供长时域分布匹配监督，学生模型通过短窗口对齐实现实时部署。
AI.result: 在 nuScenes 上，HorizonDrive 相比最强长时域流式基线，FID 降低 52%，FVD 降低 37%，ARE 降低 21%，DTW 降低 9%，且与单次通过驾驶视频生成器效果相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过让教师模型具备自回归滚动能力，可以有效解决长时域监督的漂移问题，实现分钟级自回归滚动下的高质量驾驶仿真，兼顾了长时域质量和实时部署效率。

title: Mitigating Context-Memory Conflicts in LLMs through Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding
summary: Large language models accumulate extensive parametric knowledge through pre-training. However, knowledge conflicts occur when outdated or incorrect parametric knowledge conflicts with external knowledge in the context. Existing methods address knowledge conflicts through contrastive decoding, but in conflict-free scenarios, static approaches disrupt output distribution. Other dynamic decoding methods attempt to measure the degree of conflict but still struggle with complex real-world situations. In this paper, we propose a two-stage decoding method called Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding (DCRD), to predict and mitigate context-memory conflicts. DCRD first analyzes the attention map to assess context fidelity and predict potential conflicts. Based on this prediction, the input is directed to one of two decoding paths: (1) greedy decoding, or (2) context fidelity-based dynamic decoding. This design enables DCRD to handle conflicts efficiently while maintaining high accuracy and decoding efficiency in conflict-free cases. Additionally, to simulate scenarios with frequent knowledge updates, we constructed ConflictKG, a knowledge conflict QA benchmark. Experiments on four LLMs across six QA datasets show that DCRD outperforms all baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段动态认知协调解码方法（DCRD），通过注意力图分析预测上下文与模型参数知识之间的冲突，并动态选择贪婪解码或基于上下文保真度的解码路径，从而高效处理知识冲突，同时在无冲突场景下保持高准确率和解码效率。同时构建了ConflictKG基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在知识冲突场景下通过对比解码处理冲突，但在无冲突场景中会破坏输出分布；动态解码方法虽尝试衡量冲突程度，但在复杂真实场景中表现不佳。需要一种既能有效处理冲突、又不影响无冲突场景性能的解码方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段解码方法DCRD：第一阶段通过分析注意力图评估上下文保真度并预测潜在冲突；第二阶段根据预测将输入导向两条解码路径之一——(1) 贪婪解码（无冲突）或 (2) 基于上下文保真度的动态解码（有冲突）。同时构建了ConflictKG知识冲突问答基准数据集。
AI.result: 在4种LLM和6个QA数据集上的实验表明，DCRD在所有基线方法中表现最佳，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DCRD通过动态预测和缓解上下文-记忆冲突，在冲突场景下高效处理问题，同时在无冲突场景下保持高准确率，是一种优于现有方法的解码策略。

title: Toward Stable Value Alignment: Introducing Independent Modules for Consistent Value Guidance
summary: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human values typically relies on post-training or inference-time steering that directly manipulates the backbone's parameters or representation space. However, a critical gap exists: the model's residual stream is highly dynamic, in which values exist as fragile, low-dimensional properties, inherently incompatible with the stability required for consistent value expression. In this paper, we propose the Stable Value Guidance Transformer (SVGT), which addresses this gap through an independent value module incorporating two key designs: (1) independent value modeling, maintaining normative representations in a dedicated value space isolated from the backbone, and (2) explicit behavioral guidance, transducing these stable signals into learnable latent Bridge Tokens. These tokens serve as dynamic value anchors to explicitly steer the generative trajectory, ensuring robust adherence across diverse contexts without disrupting the backbone's internal representations. Experiments across multiple backbones and safety benchmarks show that SVGT generally reduces harmful scores by over 70% while maintaining generation fluency, demonstrating the efficacy of architecturally grounded value modeling. Our code is available at https://github.com/Clervils/SVGT.git.

AI.tldr: SVGT通过独立的值模块和可学习的桥接令牌（Bridge Tokens）实现稳定的价值对齐，在不破坏骨干模型内部表示的情况下，将有害性分数降低70%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM价值对齐方法（如后训练或推理时干预）直接操作骨干网络参数或表示空间，但残差流高度动态，价值观作为脆弱的低维属性难以稳定表达。
AI.method: 提出SVGT，包含两个关键设计：(1) 独立价值建模——在专用价值空间中维护规范表示，与骨干网络隔离；(2) 显式行为引导——将稳定信号转化为可学习的桥接令牌（Bridge Tokens），作为动态价值锚点引导生成轨迹。
AI.result: 在多个骨干网络和安全基准上，SVGT将有害性分数降低70%以上，同时保持生成流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 架构级价值建模（独立价值模块+桥接令牌）能有效实现稳定且鲁棒的价值对齐，验证了该范式的有效性。

title: A Comparative Study of Model Selection Criteria for Symbolic Regression
summary: Effective model selection is critical in symbolic regression (SR) to identify mathematical expressions that balance accuracy and complexity, and have low expected error on unseen data. Many modern implementations of genetic programming (GP) for SR generate a set of Pareto optimal candidate solutions, but reliable automatic selection of solutions that generalize well remains an open issue. Current literature offers various information-theoretic and Bayesian approaches, yet comprehensive comparisons of their performance across different data regimes are limited. This study presents a systematic empirical comparison of widely used selection criteria: the Akaike information criterion (AIC), the corrected AIC (AICc), the Bayesian information criterion (BIC), minimum description length (MDL), as well as Efron's bootstrap estimate for the in-sample prediction error on seven synthetic datasets with Gaussian noise. We rank candidate expressions generated by perturbing ground-truth functions to assess generalization error and selection probability of the ground-truth expression. Our findings reveal that MDL consistently identifies models with the lowest test error and the shortest length across most datasets. While no single criterion dominates all results, MDL and BIC produced the highest probability of selecting the ground-truth expressions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了符号回归中多种模型选择准则（AIC、AICc、BIC、MDL及Efron自助法）在含噪合成数据集上的表现，发现MDL在泛化误差和模型简洁性上表现最优，MDL和BIC选出真实表达式的概率最高。
AI.motivation: 符号回归中需平衡表达式精度与复杂度以提升泛化能力，现有遗传编程虽能生成Pareto最优候选集，但可靠自动选择泛化性好的解仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 在7个含高斯噪声的合成数据集上，对真实函数进行扰动生成候选表达式，系统比较AIC、AICc、BIC、MDL和Efron自助法五种选择准则的泛化误差和真实表达式选择概率。
AI.result: MDL在大多数数据集上获得最低测试误差和最短表达式长度；MDL和BIC选出真实表达式的概率最高；没有单一准则在所有场景中完全占优。
AI.conclusion: MDL是符号回归中稳健的模型选择准则，尤其适合注重泛化误差和模型简洁性的场景，但不同数据场景下应结合多种准则使用。

title: Keep What Audio Cannot Say: Context-Preserving Token Pruning for Omni-LLMs
summary: Omnimodal Large Language Models (Omni-LLMs) incur substantial computational overhead due to the large number of multimodal input tokens they process, making token reduction essential for real-world deployment. Existing Omni-LLM pruning methods typically reduce this cost by selecting tokens that are important for the current query or strongly aligned with cross-modal cues. However, such strategies can discard evidence that falls outside these criteria, even when needed for different questions or for understanding context beyond aligned audio-visual cues. To address this limitation, we reframe Omni-LLM token reduction as preserving broad audio-visual context while removing cross-modal redundancy. We propose ContextGuard, an inference-time token pruning framework built on this principle. ContextGuard predicts coarse visual semantics from audio and prunes video tokens whose coarse semantics are likely recoverable from audio, while retaining additional video tokens to preserve localized visual details that audio alone cannot specify. For further compression, our method merges temporally similar video tokens. The framework requires no downstream LLM fine-tuning and uses only an independently trained lightweight predictor. On Qwen2.5-Omni and Video-SALMONN2+ at 3B and 7B scales across six audio-visual benchmarks, ContextGuard outperforms prior inference-time pruning methods while pruning more tokens. Notably, on Qwen2.5-Omni 7B, ContextGuard achieves full-token-level performance on five of six benchmarks while pruning 55% of input tokens.

AI.tldr: 提出ContextGuard，一种面向多模态大模型（Omni-LLM）的推理时token剪枝框架，通过保留可恢复的视觉语义并去除跨模态冗余，在剪枝55%输入token的同时保持甚至提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Omni-LLM的token剪枝方法通常基于当前查询或跨模态对齐的重要性选择token，可能丢弃对后续问题或上下文理解有价值的证据。作者希望通过保留更广泛的音视频上下文信息来解决这一局限。
AI.method: ContextGuard：1) 从音频预测粗粒度视觉语义；2) 剪枝那些粗粒度语义可从音频中恢复的视频token；3) 保留包含音频无法提供的局部视觉细节的token；4) 融合时间上相似的视频token实现进一步压缩。使用独立训练的轻量级预测器，无需微调下游LLM。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Omni和Video-SALMONN2+（3B/7B）六个音视频基准上，ContextGuard在剪枝更多token的同时优于先前推理时剪枝方法。在Qwen2.5-Omni 7B上，剪枝55%输入token后在五个基准上达到完整token级别的性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于"保留可恢复语义、去除冗余"的token剪枝策略在Omni-LLM上是有效的，能够在大幅压缩token的同时保持模型性能，为多模态大模型的高效推理提供了新思路。

title: Mechanistic Interpretability of ASR models using Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Understanding the internal machinations of deep Transformer-based NLP models is more crucial than ever as these models see widespread use in various domains that affect the public at large, such as industry, academia, finance, health. While these models have advanced rapidly, their internal mechanisms remain largely a mystery. Techniques such as Sparse Autoencoders (SAE) have emerged to understand these mechanisms by projecting dense representations into a sparse vector. While existing research has demonstrated the viability of the SAE in interpreting text-based Large Language Models (LLMs), there are no equivalent studies that demonstrate the application of a SAE to audio processing models like Automatic Speech Recognizers (ASRs). In this work, a SAE is applied to Whisper, a Transformer-based ASR, training a high-dimensional sparse latent space on frame-level embeddings extracted from the Whisper encoder. Our work uncovers diverse monosemantic features across linguistic and non-linguistic boundaries, and demonstrates cross-lingual feature steering. This work establishes the viability of a SAE model and demonstrates that Whisper encodes a rich amount of linguistic information.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将稀疏自编码器（SAE）应用于音频处理模型Whisper，在编码器帧级嵌入上训练高维稀疏潜空间，发现了跨语言和非语言边界的多语义特征，并展示了跨语言特征引导的能力。
AI.motivation: 深度Transformer模型广泛应用但内部机制仍不透明，现有SAE解释性研究仅针对文本LLM，缺乏对音频处理模型（如ASR）的类似研究。
AI.method: 在Whisper编码器的帧级嵌入上训练高维稀疏自编码器（SAE），构建稀疏潜空间，并分析提取到的特征。
AI.result: SAE成功提取出跨语言和非语言边界的多语义特征，并实现了跨语言特征引导。
AI.conclusion: 验证了SAE在音频Transformer模型（Whisper）上的可行性，表明Whisper编码了丰富的语言信息。

title: SafeSteer: A Decoding-level Defense Mechanism for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are gaining increasing attention. Due to the heterogeneity of their input features, they face significant challenges in terms of jailbreak defenses. Current defense methods rely on costly fine-tuning or inefficient post-hoc interventions, limiting their ability to address novel attacks and involving performance trade-offs. To address the above issues, we explore the inherent safety capabilities within MLLMs and quantify their intrinsic ability to discern harmfulness at decoding stage. We observe that 1) MLLMs can distinguish the harmful and harmless inputs during decoding process, 2) Image-based attacks are more stealthy. Based on these insights, we introduce SafeSteer, a decoding-level defense mechanism for MLLMs. Specifically, it includes a Decoding-Probe, a lightweight probe for detecting and correcting harmful output during decoding, which iteratively steers the decoding process toward safety. Furthermore, a modal semantic alignment vector is integrated to transfer the strong textual safety alignment to the vision modality. Experiments on multiple MLLMs demonstrate that SafeSterr can improve MLLMs' safety by up to 33.40\% without fine-tuning. Notably, it can maintain the effectiveness of MLLMs, ensuring a balance between their helpfulness and harmlessness.

AI.tldr: SafeSteer是一种针对多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的**解码级防御机制**，通过轻量级探针（Decoding-Probe）在解码阶段检测并纠正有害输出，并结合模态语义对齐向量将文本安全对齐迁移到视觉模态，无需微调即可显著提升模型安全性（最高提升33.40%），同时保持有用性与无害性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs的越狱防御方法存在两个核心问题：1）依赖昂贵的微调或低效的事后干预；2）面对新型攻击时泛化能力有限且存在性能权衡。作者希望探索MLLMs内在的安全能力，开发一种轻量、高效、无需微调的防御方案。
AI.method: 1）通过实验观察发现MLLMs在解码阶段本身具备区分有害/无害输入的能力，且图像攻击更具隐蔽性；2）提出SafeSteer框架：包含Decoding-Probe（轻量级探针，在解码时检测和纠正有害输出，迭代引导解码方向）和模态语义对齐向量（将文本模态的安全对齐能力迁移到视觉模态）。
AI.result: 在多个MLLMs上实验表明，SafeSteer无需微调即可将模型安全性提升高达33.40%，同时保持模型的有效性，在有用性与无害性之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: SafeSteer验证了利用MLLMs内在安全能力进行解码级防御的可行性，为多模态模型的轻量级安全对齐提供了一种高效、可拓展的新思路。

title: Internalizing Curriculum Judgment for LLM Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
summary: In LLM Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT), curriculum learning drives both efficiency and performance. Yet, current methods externalize curriculum judgment via handcrafted heuristics or auxiliary models, risking misalignment with the policy's training dynamics. In this paper, we introduce METIS (METacognitive Internalized Self-judgment), a novel framework that internalizes curriculum judgment as a native capability. Leveraging a critical observation that within-prompt reward variance effectively gauges prompt informativeness, METIS predicts this metric based on recent training outcomes as lightweight in-context learning examples. This intrinsic self-judgment then dynamically dictates the training allocation. Moreover, METIS closes the loop between judgment and optimization by jointly optimizing the standard RFT rewards and a self-judgment reward. This allows the policy to learn what to learn next, as a form of metacognition. Across extensive discrete and continuous RFT benchmarks from mathematical reasoning, code generation, to agentic function-calling, METIS consistently delivers superior performance while accelerating convergence by up to 67%. By bypassing handcrafted heuristics and auxiliary models, our work establishes a simple, closed-loop, and highly efficient curriculum internalization paradigm for LLM reinforcement fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: METIS是一个将课程学习判断内化为模型原生能力的框架，通过自预测提示信息量来动态分配训练资源，实现强化微调的加速（最高67%）和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有强化微调中的课程学习依赖外部启发式规则或辅助模型来判断训练样本的难度，这可能导致与策略训练动态的错配，缺乏自适应性。
AI.method: 提出METIC框架，关键发现是prompt内奖励方差可有效衡量提示信息量；基于近期训练结果构造轻量级上下文学习示例来预测该指标；通过联合优化标准RFT奖励和自判断奖励形成闭环，让策略学会"学什么"。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成、agentic函数调用等多个离散/连续RFT基准上，METIS一致优于现有方法，收敛速度提升最高67%。
AI.conclusion: 通过内化课程判断（元认知机制），无需手工启发式或辅助模型，建立了简单、闭环、高效的课程内化范式。

title: Grounding by Remembering: Cross-Scene and In-Scene Memory for 3D Functional Affordances
summary: Functional affordance grounding requires more than recognizing an object: an agent must localize the specific region that supports an interaction, such as the handle to pull or the button to press. This is difficult for training-free vision-language pipelines because actionable regions are often small, visually ambiguous, and repeated across multiple same-category instances in a scene. We propose AFFORDMEM, a framework that grounds 3D functional affordances by remembering geometry at two levels. The first is cross-scene affordance memory: the agent maintains a category-level memory bank of RGB images with affordance regions rendered as overlays, and recalls the most informative examples at query time to guide a frozen VLM toward small operable subregions that text-only prompting consistently misses. The second is in-scene spatial memory: as the agent processes the scene, it organizes candidate instances and their 3D spatial relations into a structured scene graph, enabling the language model to resolve references over distant or currently unobserved candidates such as "the second handle from the top." AFFORDMEM requires no model fine-tuning and no target-scene annotation, using a reusable memory bank built from source scenes. On SceneFun3D, our method improves AP50 over the prior training-free state of the art by 3.23 on Split 0 and 3.7 on Split 1. Ablation studies support complementary benefits: cross-scene affordance memory improves fine-grained localization, while in-scene spatial memory provides the larger gain on spatially qualified queries. The project homepage is available at the project page.

AI.tldr: AFFORDMEM通过两级记忆（跨场景功能记忆和场景内空间记忆）实现零训练3D功能可供性定位，无需微调或标注即可在SceneFun3D上显著提升AP50指标。
AI.motivation: 现有训练免费的视觉-语言管道难以准确定位功能性的小区域（如手柄、按钮），因为可操作区域通常很小、视觉模糊，且在场景中同类别实例中重复出现。
AI.method: 提出AFFORDMEM框架：1) 跨场景功能记忆：维护类别级的RGB图像记忆库，查询时召回最相关示例引导冻结VLM；2) 场景内空间记忆：构建结构化场景图，组织候选实例及其3D空间关系，使语言模型能解析远程引用。
AI.result: 在SceneFun3D上，Split 0的AP50提升3.23，Split 1提升3.7；消融实验验证了两级记忆的互补优势。
AI.conclusion: 无需微调和目标场景标注，通过可复用的记忆库即可显著提升3D功能可供性定位性能。

title: Combining On-Policy Optimization and Distillation for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to long-context tasks requires post-training methods that remain accurate and coherent over thousands of tokens. Existing approaches are limited in several ways: 1) off-policy methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and knowledge distillation (KD) suffer from exposure bias and limited recovery from model-generated errors over long horizons; 2) on-policy reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) better align training with model-generated states, but are unstable and sample-inefficient due to sparse rewards; 3) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance, but does not directly optimize arbitrary reward signals. In this paper, we propose Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO), a method for long-context reasoning that augments GRPO with dense guidance from a stronger teacher via OPD. We also introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic long-context dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. We conduct extensive experiments and ablations comparing off-policy training, sparse-reward GRPO, and our combined approach, leading to an improved recipe for long-context alignment. Overall, our results show that combining outcome-based policy optimization with knowledge distillation in a single objective provides a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning, while preserving short-context capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出dGRPO方法，结合GRPO（结果级强化学习）与在线知识蒸馏（OPD）以解决长上下文推理中强化学习不稳定和样本效率低的问题，并引入LongBlocks长上下文合成数据集。实验表明该方法在保持短上下文能力的同时，更稳定有效地提升长上下文推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文LLM后训练方法存在局限：离策略方法（SFT、KD）因暴露偏差在长序列中恢复能力差；在策略强化学习（GRPO）虽更好但对齐但奖励稀疏导致不稳定和样本低效；在线蒸馏（OPD）提供密集指导但无法直接优化任意奖励信号。作者希望结合三者优势，提出更稳定高效的长上下文对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出dGRPO（Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization），将GRPO（基于结果/奖励信号的策略优化）与在线知识蒸馏（OPD，来自更强教师模型的密集token级指导）融合到单一目标函数中。同时构建LongBlocks合成长上下文数据集，涵盖多跳推理、上下文定位和长文生成任务。
AI.result: 通过对比离策略训练、稀疏奖励GRPO和dGRPO的广泛实验与消融研究，证明组合方法在长上下文推理上更稳定有效，同时能保持短上下文能力。
AI.conclusion: 将结果级策略优化与知识蒸馏结合到单一目标中，为长上下文对齐提供了一条更稳定有效的路径，改进了长上下文后训练的整体方案。

title: Allegory of the Cave: Measurement-Grounded Vision-Language Learning
summary: Vision-language models typically reason over post-ISP RGB images, although RGB rendering can clip, suppress, or quantize sensor evidence before inference. We study whether grounding improves when the visual interface is moved closer to the underlying camera measurement. We formulate measurement-grounded vision-language learning and instantiate it as PRISM-VL, which combines RAW-derived Meas.-XYZ inputs, camera-conditioned grounding, and Exposure-Bracketed Supervision Aggregation for transferring supervision from RGB proxies to measurement-domain observations. Using a quality-controlled 150K instruction-tuning set and a held-out benchmark targeting low-light, HDR, visibility-sensitive, and hallucination-sensitive cases, PRISM-VL-8B reaches 0.6120 BLEU, 0.4571 ROUGE-L, and 82.66\% LLM-Judge accuracy, improving over the RGB Qwen3-VL-8B baseline by +0.1074 BLEU, +0.1071 ROUGE-L, and +4.46 percentage points. These results suggest that part of VLM grounding error arises from information lost during RGB rendering, and that preserving measurement-domain evidence can improve multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM-VL，通过将视觉语言模型的输入从传统RGB图像替换为从RAW传感器数据导出的测量域表示（Meas.-XYZ），并引入相机条件化对齐和曝光包围监督聚合方法，显著提升了VLM在低光、HDR等困难场景下的推理能力。实验表明，RGB渲染过程中丢失的传感器信息是VLM接地错误的重要来源。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常基于ISP处理后的RGB图像进行推理，但RGB渲染过程会截断、抑制或量化传感器原始证据。本文旨在探究将视觉接口向底层相机测量数据靠近是否能改善VLM的grounding能力，即减少因RGB渲染导致的信息丢失对多模态推理的负面影响。
AI.method: 1) 提出测量域视觉语言学习范式，用RAW导出的Meas.-XYZ输入替代RGB图像；2) 设计PRISM-VL框架，包含相机条件化grounding（camera-conditioned grounding）和曝光包围监督聚合（Exposure-Bracketed Supervision Aggregation）两个关键组件，实现从RGB代理到测量域观测的监督迁移；3) 构建了15万条质量控制指令微调集和专门针对低光、HDR、可见性敏感和幻觉敏感场景的测试基准。
AI.result: PRISM-VL-8B在测试集上达到0.6120 BLEU、0.4571 ROUGE-L和82.66% LLM-Judge准确率，相比RGB基线Qwen3-VL-8B分别提升+0.1074 BLEU、+0.1071 ROUGE-L和+4.46个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 部分VLM grounding错误源自RGB渲染过程中的信息丢失，保留测量域证据能够改善多模态推理能力，验证了将视觉接口向传感器数据靠近的有效性。

title: DeconDTN-Toolkit: A Library for Evaluation and Enhancement of Robustness to Provenance Shift
summary: Despite the burgeoning body of work on distribution shifts, provenance shift-where the relationship between data source and label changes at deployment-remains poorly understood and under-addressed. In this paper, we establish a formal connection between provenance shift, counterfactual invariance, and invariant learning to derive a learning objective for robustness. We then introduce \textsc{DeconDTN-Toolkit}, a specialized evaluation and remediation suite designed to simulate provenance shifts of varying degrees while maintaining the training protocol and the infrastructure of existing benchmarks. We reveal the vulnerability of Empirical Risk Minimization under provenance shift, introduce a robust out-of-distribution performance indicator, and conduct a comprehensive evaluation on existing algorithms. Our work provides both the theoretical grounding and the practical tools necessary to characterize the problem of confounding by provenance, and implementations of methods to mitigate it.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分布偏移中一种被忽视的类型——来源偏移（provenance shift），即数据来源与标签之间的关系在部署时发生变化。作者建立了来源偏移、反事实不变性和不变学习之间的形式化联系，提出了一个学习目标，并开发了DeconDTN-Toolkit评估套件。实验表明经验风险最小化在来源偏移下表现脆弱，并提供了缓解该问题的理论工具和实践方法。
AI.motivation: 来源偏移（provenance shift）在现有分布偏移研究中被严重忽视，缺乏理论理解和评测工具。作者希望填补这一空白，建立理论框架并提供实用工具。
AI.method: 从理论上建立来源偏移、反事实不变性与不变学习的形式化联系，推导鲁棒性学习目标；开发DeconDTN-Toolkit评估套件，用于模拟不同程度来源偏移并进行综合评测。
AI.result: 揭示了经验风险最小化（ERM）在来源偏移下的脆弱性；提出了鲁棒性OOD性能指标；对现有算法进行了全面评估。
AI.conclusion: 提供了解决来源偏移问题的理论依据和实践工具，为该研究方向奠定了基础。

title: RNA-FM: Flow-Matching Generative Model for Genome-wide RNA-Seq Prediction
comment: 15 pages, 13 tables, 3 figures. Accepted by the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML2026). Code is available at https://github.com/YXSong000/RNA-FM
summary: Histopathology whole-slide images (WSIs) are routinely acquired in clinical practice and contain rich tissue morphology but lack direct molecular architecture and functional programs defining pathological states, whereas RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) provides genome-wide transcriptional profiles at substantial cost, thereby motivating WSI-based genome-wide transcriptomic prediction. Existing approaches for predicting gene expression from WSIs predominantly rely on deterministic regression with one-to-one mapping, limiting their ability to capture biological heterogeneity and predictive uncertainty. We propose RNA-FM, a flow-matching generative framework for genome-wide bulk RNA-seq prediction from WSIs. RNA-FM formulates transcriptomic prediction as a continuous-time conditional transport problem, learning a velocity field that maps a simple prior to the target gene expression distribution conditioned on morphologies. By integrating pathway-level structure, RNA-FM enables scalable and biologically interpretable genome-wide gene expression imputation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RNA-FM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches while maintaining biological meaningfulness. Code is available at https://github.com/YXSong000/RNA-FM.

AI.tldr: RNA-FM 提出了一种基于流匹配的生成框架，用于从组织病理学全切片图像（WSI）预测全基因组批量RNA-seq表达，通过将转录组预测建模为连续时间条件传输问题，并整合通路级结构信息，在保持生物学可解释性的同时优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的从WSI预测基因表达的方法主要依赖确定性回归（一对一的映射），难以捕捉生物异质性和预测不确定性。同时，RNA测序成本高昂，而WSI是临床常规获取的，因此需要一种更准确且能体现生物变异性的WSI→基因表达预测方法。
AI.method: RNA-FM 采用流匹配（flow-matching）生成框架，将转录组预测建模为连续时间条件传输问题，学习一个速度场（velocity field），将简单先验分布映射到以组织形态为条件的靶基因表达分布，并整合了通路级结构信息以实现可扩展和生物学可解释的全基因组基因表达推断。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，RNA-FM 在性能上一致优于当前最先进的方法，同时保持了生物学意义（biologically meaningfulness）。
AI.conclusion: RNA-FM 证明了生成式流匹配框架在WSI→基因表达预测任务中的有效性，能够更好地处理生物异质性和预测不确定性，为计算病理学与转录组学交叉研究提供了新思路。

title: Mind the Pause: Disfluency-Aware Objective Tuning for Multilingual Speech Correction with LLMs
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) transcripts often contain disfluencies, such as fillers, repetitions, and false starts, which reduce readability and hinder downstream applications like chatbots and voice assistants. If left unaddressed, such disfluencies can significantly degrade the reliability of downstream systems. Most existing approaches rely on classical models that focus on identifying disfluent tokens for removal. While this strategy is effective to some extent, it often disrupts grammatical structure and semantic coherence, leading to incomplete or unnatural sentences. Recent literature explored the use of large language models (LLMs); however, these efforts have primarily focused on disfluency detection or data augmentation, rather than performing comprehensive correction. We propose a multilingual correction pipeline where a sequence tagger first marks disfluent tokens, and these signals guide instruction fine-tuning of an LLM to rewrite transcripts into fluent text. To further improve reliability, we add a contrastive learning objective that penalizes the reproduction of disfluent tokens, encouraging the model to preserve grammar and meaning while removing disfluent artifacts. Our experiments across three Indian languages, namely Hindi, Bengali, and Marathi show consistent improvements over strong baselines, including multilingual sequence-to-sequence models. These results highlight that detection-only strategies are insufficient. Combining token-level cues with instruction tuning and contrastive learning provides a practical and scalable solution for multilingual disfluency correction in speech-driven NLP systems. We make the codes publicly available at https://github.com/deepak-kumar-98/Mind-the-Pause.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多语言ASR转录文本不流畅校正流水线：先用序列标注器标记不流畅标记，再通过指令微调引导LLM重写为流畅文本，并引入对比学习目标惩罚生成不流畅标记。在三门印度语言上验证了该方法优于强基线模型。
AI.motivation: ASR转录文本常包含填充词、重复、假起始等不流畅现象，降低可读性并影响下游系统（如聊天机器人、语音助手）的可靠性。现有方法依赖经典模型识别并移除不流畅标记，但常破坏语法结构和语义连贯性；而LLM相关工作主要聚焦于检测或数据增强，缺乏全面的校正。
AI.method: 提出多语言校正流水线：(1) 序列标注器标记不流畅标记；(2) 基于这些信号对LLM进行指令微调，将转录文本重写为流畅文本；(3) 添加对比学习目标，惩罚模型生成本应被移除的不流畅标记，从而保持语法和语义。
AI.result: 在印地语、孟加拉语、马拉地语三种印度语言上的实验表明，该方法一致优于强基线（包括多语言序列到序列模型），证明了仅依赖检测策略是不够的。
AI.conclusion: 将标记级线索与指令微调及对比学习相结合，为语音驱动的NLP系统提供了一种实用且可扩展的多语言不流畅校正方案。代码已开源。

title: OptArgus: A Multi-Agent System to Detect Hallucinations in LLM-based Optimization Modeling
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate natural-language optimization problems into mathematical formulations and solver code, but matching the reference objective value is not a reliable test of correctness: an artifact may agree numerically while still changing the underlying optimization semantics. We formulate this issue as \emph{optimization-modeling hallucination detection}, namely structural consistency auditing over the problem description, symbolic model, and solver implementation. We develop, to our knowledge, the first fine-grained hallucination taxonomy specifically for optimization modeling, spanning objective, variable, constraint, and implementation failures. We use this taxonomy to design OptArgus, a multi-agent detector with conductor routing, specialist auditors, and evidence consolidation. To evaluate this setting, we introduce a three-part benchmark suite with $484$ clean artifacts, $1266$ controlled injected artifacts, and $6292$ natural LLM-generated artifacts. Against a matched single-agent baseline, OptArgus produces fewer false alarms on clean artifacts, more accurate top-ranked localization on controlled single-error cases, and stronger detection on natural model outputs. Together, these contributions turn optimization-modeling hallucination detection into a concrete empirical problem and suggest that modular, taxonomy-grounded auditing is a practical route to more reliable optimization modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出优化建模幻觉检测问题，即LLM将自然语言优化问题翻译为数学公式和求解器代码时，即使数值匹配也可能存在语义错误。作者构建了首个针对优化建模的细粒度幻觉分类体系，并设计了多智能体检测器OptArgus，通过基准测试验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM用于优化建模时，仅以目标函数数值匹配作为评估标准不可靠（数值一致但语义可能错误），需要系统性的结构一致性审计方法。
AI.method: 提出优化建模幻觉的细粒度分类体系（目标、变量、约束、实现四类失败）；设计OptArgus多智能体检测框架，包含调度路由、专业审计员、证据整合模块。
AI.result: 构建484个干净样本、1266个受控注入样本、6292个LLM生成样本的基准测试集。相比单智能体基线，OptArgus在干净样本上更少误报，在单错误定位上更准确，在自然生成样本上检测更强。
AI.conclusion: 将优化建模幻觉检测转化为可实证的问题，表明模块化、基于分类学的审计是实现更可靠优化建模的实用路径。

title: Extending Kernel Trick to Influence Functions
summary: In this paper, we present a dual representation of the influence functions, whose computational complexity scales with dataset size rather than model size. Both analytically and experimentally, we show that this representation can be an efficient alternative to the original influence functions for estimating changes in parameters, model outputs and loss due to data point removal, when model size is large relative to dataset size, or when evaluating the original influence functions in parameter space is infeasible. The dual representation, however, is limited to linearizable models, which are models whose behavior can be approximated by their linearizations throughout training, and requires materializing a matrix, whose size grows with the product of model output dimension and dataset size.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种影响函数的对偶表示，其计算复杂度随数据集大小而非模型大小增长，适合模型远大于数据集或无法直接在参数空间评估影响函数的场景，但仅限于可线性化的模型。
AI.motivation: 传统影响函数的计算复杂度取决于模型参数量，当模型规模很大时计算成本极高甚至不可行。作者希望设计一种替代方案，使得计算复杂度与数据集大小相关，从而在大模型场景下更高效。
AI.method: 提出影响函数的对偶表示，将计算复杂度从模型大小转移到数据集大小。该表示需要实例化一个大小为(模型输出维度 × 数据集大小)的矩阵，且要求模型在训练过程中行为可用其线性化近似。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验表明，当模型规模远大于数据集规模时，该对偶表示是原始影响函数的高效替代方案，能有效估计移除数据点后参数、模型输出和损失的变化。
AI.conclusion: 对偶表示在大模型小数据场景下提供了实用的影响函数计算途径，但受限于线性化假设和矩阵存储开销，适用范围有一定局限。

title: Single-Shot HDR Recovery via a Video Diffusion Prior
summary: Recent generative methods for single-shot high dynamic range (HDR) image reconstruction show promising results, but often struggle with preserving fidelity to the input image. They require separate models to handle highlights and shadows, or sacrifice interpretability by directly predicting the final HDR image. We address these limitations by re-casting single-shot HDR reconstruction as conditional video generation and fusing the generated frames into an HDR image. We finetune a video diffusion model to generate an exposure bracket, conditioned on a low dynamic range (LDR) input. We fuse this image bracket using per-pixel weights predicted by a light-weight UNet. This formulation is simple, interpretable, and effective. Rather than directly hallucinating an HDR image, it explicitly reconstructs the intermediate exposure stack and fuses it into the final output. Our method eliminates the need for separate models across exposure regimes and produces HDR reconstructions with high input fidelity. On quantitative benchmarks, we outperform state-of-the-art generative baselines with comparable model capacity on several reconstruction metrics. Human evaluators further prefer our results in 72% of pairwise comparisons against existing methods. Finally, we show that this input-conditioned sequence generation and fusion framework extends beyond HDR to other image reconstruction tasks, such as all-in-focus image recovery from a single defocus-blurred input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将单次高动态范围（HDR）图像重建重新定义为条件视频生成任务，通过微调视频扩散模型生成曝光包围序列，再由轻量级UNet预测逐像素权重融合为最终HDR图像。该方法简洁、可解释且保持高输入保真度，在定量指标和人工评估上均优于现有方法，并可推广至其他图像重建任务。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式单次HDR重建方法存在两个问题：1）需要分离模型分别处理高光和阴影区域，复杂度高；2）直接预测最终HDR图像，缺乏可解释性和对输入的保真度。作者希望设计一种更简单、可解释且保真度高的方法。
AI.method: 将单次HDR重建视为条件视频生成问题：微调视频扩散模型以低动态范围（LDR）输入为条件，生成曝光包围序列（exposure bracket）；再使用轻量级UNet预测逐像素融合权重，将生成的包围帧融合为最终HDR图像。
AI.result: 在定量基准上，以可比模型容量超越现有生成式基线；人类评估者在72%的成对比较中偏好本方法结果；该方法还可推广到其他图像重建任务（如单张散焦模糊输入的全聚焦图像恢复）。
AI.conclusion: 显式重建中间曝光堆叠再融合的框架比直接端到端预测HDR更有效，兼具简洁性、可解释性和高保真度，具有跨任务泛化潜力。

title: PreScam: A Benchmark for Predicting Scam Progression from Early Conversations
summary: Conversational scams, such as romance and investment scams, are emerging as a major form of online fraud. Unlike one-shot scam lures such as fake lottery or unpaid toll messages, they unfold through multi-turn conversations in which scammers gradually manipulate victims using evolving psychological techniques. However, existing research mainly focuses on static scam detection or synthetic scams, leaving open whether language models can understand how real-world scams progress over time. We introduce PreScam, a benchmark for modeling scam progression from early conversations. Built from user-submitted scam reports, PreScam filters and structures 177,989 raw reports into 11,573 conversational scam instances spanning 20 scam categories. Each instance is hierarchically structured according to the scam lifecycle defined by the proposed scam kill chain, and further annotated at the turn level with scammer psychological actions and victim responses. We benchmark models on two tasks: real-time termination prediction, which estimates whether a conversation is approaching the termination stage, and scammer action prediction, which forecasts the scammer's subsequent actions. Results show a clear gap between surface-level fluency and progression modeling: supervised encoders substantially outperform zero-shot LLMs on real-time termination prediction, while next-action prediction remains only moderately successful even for strong LLMs. Taken together, these results show that current models can capture some scam-related cues, yet still struggle to track how risk escalates and how manipulation unfolds across turns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PreScam基准，从用户提交的欺诈报告中构建了11,573个对话式欺诈实例，涵盖20个类别，并按照"欺诈杀伤链"进行层次化标注。实验发现，有监督编码器在实时终止预测上显著优于零样本LLM，而即使是强大的LLM在预测欺诈者下一步行动上也表现平平，表明现有模型虽能捕捉欺诈线索，但难以跟踪风险升级和操纵过程。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于静态欺诈检测或合成欺诈数据，忽略了真实世界对话式欺诈（如杀猪盘、投资诈骗）在多轮对话中逐步演变的动态特性，缺乏评估语言模型理解欺诈进展能力的基准。
AI.method: 从177,989份用户提交的欺诈报告中筛选结构化为11,573个对话实例，按20个欺诈类别分类，基于提出的欺诈杀伤链进行层次化标注，并在对话轮次级别标注欺诈者心理行为和受害者反应。设计两个评估任务：实时终止预测（判断对话是否接近终止阶段）和欺诈者行动预测（预测欺诈者下一步行动）。
AI.result: 有监督编码器在实时终止预测上大幅优于零样本LLM；即使是GPT-4等强LLM在下一步行动预测上也仅取得中等成功；模型在表面流畅性和进展建模之间存在明显差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型能捕捉部分欺诈相关线索，但难以追踪欺诈风险在多轮对话中如何逐步升级以及操纵手段如何展开，需要进一步发展对话级进展建模能力。

title: When Reasoning Traces Become Performative: Step-Level Evidence that Chain-of-Thought Is an Imperfect Oversight Channel
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) traces are increasingly used both to improve language model capability and to audit model behavior, implicitly assuming that the visible trace remains synchronized with the computation that determines the answer. We test this assumption with a step-level Detect-Classify-Compare framework built around an answer-commitment proxy that is cross-validated with Patchscopes, tuned-lens probes, and causal direction ablation. Across nine models and seven reasoning benchmarks, latent commitment and explicit answer arrival align on only 61.9% of steps on average. The dominant mismatch pattern is confabulated continuation: 58.0% of detected mismatch events occur after the answer-commitment proxy has already stabilized while the trace continues producing deliberative-looking text, and a vacuousness analysis shows that the committed answer does not change during these steps. In architecture-matched Qwen2.5/DeepSeek-R1-Distill comparisons, the reasoning pipeline changes failure composition more than aggregate alignment, most clearly at 32B where confabulated steps decrease as contradictory states increase. Lower step-level alignment is also associated with larger CoT utility, suggesting that the settings that benefit most from CoT are often the least temporally faithful. Paired truncation and a complementary donor-corruption test further indicate that much post-commitment text is not load-bearing for the final answer. These findings suggest that CoT can remain useful while still being an unreliable report of when the answer was formed.

AI.tldr: 本文通过提出Detect-Classify-Compare框架，系统性地检验了思维链(CoT)跟踪与模型实际计算过程的时间同步性。发现仅在61.9%的步骤中，模型的潜在答案承诺与显式答案到达是对齐的。主要的不匹配模式是"虚构延续"(confabulated continuation)——模型在答案已确定后仍在生成看似深思熟虑的文本。研究还发现，低步骤对齐与更大的CoT效用相关，表明CoT收益最大的场景往往是最不时间忠实(time-faithful)的。
AI.motivation: 现有工作默认思维链的可见文本与模型决定答案的实际计算过程是同步的，但这种假设从未被系统性检验。作者希望验证CoT是否真的如实反映了模型的推理时间线。
AI.method: 提出Detect-Classify-Compare框架，使用答案承诺代理(answer-commitment proxy)进行交叉验证，结合Patchscopes、tuned-lens探针和因果方向消融(causal direction ablation)等方法。在9个模型和7个推理基准上进行实验。
AI.result: 1) 潜在承诺与显式答案仅61.9%的步骤对齐；2) 58%的不匹配来自"虚构延续"——答案已稳定但文本继续生成；3) 在32B模型中，虚构步骤减少但矛盾状态增加；4) 低步骤对齐与更大的CoT效用相关；5) 截断实验和捐赠-破坏测试表明，承诺后的大部分文本对最终答案不重要。
AI.conclusion: CoT虽然有用，但其文本并不是模型计算过程的可靠时间报告。CoT可以在不忠实反映答案形成时间的情况下仍然有价值。

title: Support-Proximity Augmented Diffusion Estimation for Offline Black-Box Optimization
summary: Offline black-box optimization aims to discover novel designs with high property scores using only a static dataset, a task fundamentally challenged by the out-of-distribution (OOD) extrapolation problem. Existing approaches typically bifurcate into inverse methods, which struggle with the ill-posed nature of mapping scores to designs, and forward methods, which often lack the distributional expressivity to quantify uncertainty effectively. In this work, we propose SPADE (Support-Proximity Augmented Diffusion Estimation), a novel framework that reimagines forward surrogate modeling through the lens of conditional generative modeling. SPADE models the forward likelihood p(y|x) using a diffusion model, but with two critical enhancements to tailor it for optimization: (1) a Calibrated Diffusion Estimation module that enforces global consistency in statistical moments and pairwise rankings, and (2) a Support-Proximity Regularization mechanism that implicitly internalizes the data manifold constraint p(x) via kNN-based density estimation. Theoretically, we prove that our regularization is first-order equivalent to maximizing a Bayesian posterior with a valid design prior. Empirically, SPADE achieves state-of-the-art performance across Design-Bench tasks and an LLM data mixture optimization benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出SPADE框架，通过条件扩散模型、校准扩散估计和支持邻近正则化，解决离线黑箱优化中的OOD外推问题，在Design-Bench和LLM数据混合优化任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 离线黑箱优化面临分布外（OOD）外推挑战，现有逆向方法存在不适定性，正向方法缺乏分布表达能力来有效量化不确定性，亟需新框架。
AI.method: 将前向代理建模视为条件生成模型，使用扩散模型建模p(y|x)，包含两个关键增强：(1) 校准扩散估计模块，强制全局统计矩和成对排名一致性；(2) 支持邻近正则化，通过kNN密度估计隐式内化数据流形约束p(x)。
AI.result: 在Design-Bench任务和LLM数据混合优化基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 理论证明所提正则化与在有效设计先验下最大化贝叶斯后验一阶等价，验证了方法的合理性。

title: Unlocking UML Class Diagram Understanding in Vision Language Models
summary: Although Vision Language Models (VLMs) have seen tremendous progress across all kinds of use cases, they still fall behind in answering questions regard-ing diagrams compared to photos. Although progress has been made in the area of bar charts, line charts and other diagrams like that there is still few research concerned with other types of diagrams, e.g. in the computer science domain. Our work presents a benchmark for visual question answering based on UML class diagrams which is both challenging and manageable. We further construct a large-scale training dataset with 16.000 image-question-answer triples and show that a LoRA-based finetune easily outperforms Qwen 3.5 27B, which is a recent and well-performing VLM in many other benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于UML类图的视觉问答基准（VQA）并构建了16,000个三元组的大规模训练集，通过LoRA微调轻松超越了Qwen 3.5 27B等主流VLM。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在图表理解方面落后于照片理解，且已有研究主要针对柱状图、折线图等，缺乏对计算机科学领域图表（如UML类图）的研究。
AI.method: 构建UML类图VQA基准数据集（16,000个图像-问题-答案三元组），采用LoRA（低秩适配）微调方法对VLM进行领域适配。
AI.result: LoRA微调模型在UML类图VQA任务上轻松超越了Qwen 3.5 27B这一近期表现优秀的VLM。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定领域图表（如UML类图）的VQA任务，LoRA微调是一种高效且有效的方法，可以显著提升VLM在该领域的表现。

title: PRISM: Pareto-Efficient Retrieval over Intent-Aware Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon language agents accumulate conversation history far faster than any fixed context window can hold, making memory management critical to both answer accuracy and serving cost. Existing approaches either expand the context window without addressing what is retrieved, perform heavy ingestion-time fact extraction at substantial token cost, or rely on heuristic graph traversal that leaves both accuracy and efficiency on the table. We present PRISM, a training-free retrieval-side framework that treats long-horizon memory as a joint retrieval-and-compression problem over a graph-structured memory. PRISM combines four orthogonal inference-time components: Hierarchical Bundle Search over typed relation paths, Query-Sensitive Edge Costing that aligns traversal with detected query intent, Evidence Compression that compresses the candidate bundle into a compact answer-side context, and Adaptive Intent Routing that routes most queries through zero-LLM tiers. By formulating retrieval as min-cost selection over typed path templates and pairing it with an LLM-side compression step, PRISM surfaces the right evidence under a strict context budget without any fine-tuning or modification to the upstream ingestion pipeline. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that PRISM delivers substantially higher LLM-judge accuracy than every same-protocol baseline at an order-of-magnitude smaller context budget, occupying a previously empty corner of the accuracy-context-cost frontier and demonstrating a superior balance between answer quality and retrieval efficiency.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个无需训练的检索侧框架，将长时记忆建模为图结构上的联合检索-压缩问题，通过分层束搜索、查询敏感边成本、证据压缩和自适应意图路由四个组件，在极小上下文预算下实现高精度问答。
AI.motivation: 现有长时对话记忆管理方法存在三方面问题：扩展上下文窗口但不筛选内容、做繁重的信息提取消耗大量token、依赖启发式图遍历导致准确率和效率双低。需要一种在严格上下文预算下既能准确检索又能控制成本的方案。
AI.method: PRISM包含四个正交推理时组件：1) 分层束搜索（在类型化关系路径上搜索）2) 查询敏感边成本（根据检测到的查询意图调整遍历）3) 证据压缩（将候选束压缩为紧凑的答案侧上下文）4) 自适应意图路由（将大部分查询路由到零LLM层级）。将检索建模为类型化路径模板上的最小成本选择问题。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上，PRISM在相同协议下比所有基线方法的LLM评判准确率更高，且上下文预算小一个数量级，在准确率-上下文成本前沿上占据了一个此前空白的角落。
AI.conclusion: PRISM在无需微调或修改上游流水线的条件下，实现了答案质量与检索效率之间的优越平衡，证明了图结构记忆+联合检索-压缩范式在处理长时对话中的有效性。

title: Towards Visually Grounded Multimodal Summarization via Cross-Modal Transformer and Gated Attention
summary: Multimodal summarization requires models to jointly understand textual and visual inputs to generate concise, semantically coherent summaries. Existing methods often inject shallow visual features into deep language models, leading to representational mismatches and weak cross-modal grounding. We propose a unified framework that jointly performs text summarization and representative image selection. Our system, SPeCTrA-Sum (Sampler Perceiver with Cross-modal Transformer and gated Attention for Summarization), introduces two key innovations. First, a Deep Visual Processor (DVP) aligns the visual encoder with the language model at corresponding depths, enabling hierarchical, layer-wise fusion that preserves semantic consistency. Second, a lightweight Visual Relevance Predictor (VRP) selects salient and diverse images by distilling soft labels from a Determinantal Point Processes (DPP) teacher. SPeCTrA-Sum is trained using a multi-objective loss that combines autoregressive summarization, cross-modal alignment, and DPP-based distillation. Experiments show that our system produces more accurate, visually grounded summaries and selects more representative images, demonstrating the benefits of depth-aware fusion and principled image selection for multimodal summarization.

AI.tldr: 提出SPeCTrA-Sum框架，通过深度视觉处理器（DVP）实现层次化跨模态融合，以及基于行列式点过程（DPP）的视觉相关性预测器（VRP）来选择代表性图像，提升多模态摘要的准确性和视觉对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态摘要方法通常将浅层视觉特征注入深层语言模型，导致表示不匹配和跨模态对齐薄弱。
AI.method: 提出SPeCTrA-Sum框架，包含两个核心创新：(1) 深度视觉处理器（DVP），在不同深度层次上将视觉编码器与语言模型对齐，实现分层逐层融合；(2) 视觉相关性预测器（VRP），通过蒸馏行列式点过程（DPP）教师模型的软标签来选择显著且多样化的图像。训练采用多目标损失（自回归摘要+跨模态对齐+DPP蒸馏）。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统生成的摘要更准确、视觉对齐更好，选择的图像更具代表性。
AI.conclusion: 深度感知融合和基于DPP的图像选择方法对于多模态摘要任务有效。

title: A Proof-of-Concept Simulation-Driven Digital Twin Framework for Decision-Aware Diabetes Modeling
summary: This paper presents a proof-of-concept digital twin framework for simulation-driven diabetes modeling using benchmark clinical data, synthetic temporal augmentation, and illustrative continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) analysis. Unlike traditional predictive models, the framework focuses on generating interpretable simulated trajectories rather than clinically validated outcomes. Evaluation is conducted using a public dataset combined with controlled synthetic scenarios to illustrate temporal behavior and intervention effects. Results illustrate the feasibility of integrating prediction with counterfactual simulation for decision-aware analysis. This work does not claim clinical readiness but provides a foundation for future research on simulation-driven digital twin systems in healthcare.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向糖尿病建模的数字孪生框架，基于基准临床数据、合成时间增强和CGM分析，实现可解释的模拟轨迹生成，而非临床预测。
AI.motivation: 传统预测模型缺乏可解释性和反事实仿真能力，难以支持决策感知分析，亟需一种仿真驱动的数字孪生框架来模拟糖尿病病程和干预效果。
AI.method: 使用公开数据集结合受控合成场景，通过时间增强和CGM分析，构建可解释的模拟轨迹并整合反事实仿真。
AI.result: 结果表明该框架能够将预测与反事实仿真结合，实现决策感知的时间行为分析，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不具备临床就绪性，但为未来数字孪生系统在医疗仿真驱动研究方面奠定了基础。

title: Hide to See: Reasoning-prefix Masking for Visual-anchored Thinking in VLM Distillation
summary: Recent think-answer approaches in VLMs, such as Qwen3-VL-Thinking, boost reasoning performance by leveraging intermediate thinking steps before the final answer, but their high computational cost limits real-world deployment. To distill such capabilities into compact think-answer VLMs, a primary objective is to improve the student's ability to utilize visual evidence throughout its reasoning trace. To this end, we introduce a novel think-answer distillation framework that encourages the student to anchor its thinking on visual information by masking the student's salient reasoning prefixes. To compensate for such masked textual cues, the student is encouraged to rely more on visual evidence as an alternative source of information during distillation. Our masking strategies include: 1) token-wise salient reasoning-prefix masking, which masks high-influence reasoning prefixes selectively for each next-token prediction, and 2) self-paced masking budget scheduling, which gradually increases the masking scale according to distillation difficulty, {measured by discrepancy between teacher--student distributions. In the distillation phase, the student is guided by our salient reasoning-prefix mask, which blocks both future tokens and salient reasoning cues, in place of the standard causal mask used for auto-regressive language modeling.
