Specifically, the evolution of the prediction-target mismatch depends on the model's parameterization through the matrix $JJ^\top$ where $J$ is the Jacobian of the model with respect to its parameters. The projections effectively replace $JJ^\top$ with the identity. We call this effect error whitening. Once the parameterization is removed, the prediction-target mismatch evolves according to dynamics dictated by the structure of the loss and the projection produced by the optimizer. Error whitening is a special property of Gauss-Newton descent that rigorously distinguishes it from Newton's method. We empirically demonstrate that Gauss-Newton optimizers follow the theoretically predicted function space dynamics and outperforms Newton's method, Adam, and Muon across case studies spanning supervised learning, physics-informed deep learning, and approximate dynamic programming.

AI.tldr: 本文从函数空间视角分析了广义高斯-牛顿（GGN）矩阵为何优于牛顿法，揭示了其核心机制——误差白化（error whitening）。GGN和仅含雅可比矩阵的变体都能消除模型参数化带来的扭曲，将牛顿方向或损失梯度投影到模型切空间，使预测-目标差异的演化独立于参数化。实验证明该方法在多个领域优于牛顿法、Adam和Muon。
AI.motivation: 尽管实证表明高斯-牛顿下降法优于牛顿法，但理论解释不足。作者旨在从函数空间视角严格区分二者，揭示高斯-牛顿优化器的优越性根源。
AI.method: 采用函数空间分析，证明GGN矩阵将牛顿方向投影到模型切空间，而雅可比变体将函数空间损失梯度投影到切空间。这种投影消除参数化影响（用恒等矩阵替换$JJ^\top$），称为误差白化。
AI.result: 实验表明高斯-牛顿优化器遵循理论预测的函数空间动力学，在有监督学习、物理信息深度学习、近似动态规划等场景中优于牛顿法、Adam和Muon。
AI.conclusion: 误差白化是高斯-牛顿下降区别于牛顿法的核心特性，为设计更优的优化算法提供了理论指导。

title: CaC: Advancing Video Reward Models via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Concentrating
summary: In this paper, we propose Concentrate and Concentrate (CaC), a coarse-to-fine anomaly reward model based on Vision-Language Models. During inference, it first conducts a global temporal scan to anchor anomalous time windows, then performs fine-grained spatial grounding within the localized interval, and finally derives robust judgments via structured spatiotemporal Chain-of-Thought reasoning. To equip the model with these capabilities, we construct the first large-scale generated video anomaly dataset with per-frame bounding-box annotations, temporal anomaly windows, and fine-grained attribution labels. Building on this dataset, we design a three-stage progressive training paradigm. The model initially learns spatial and temporal anchoring through single- and multi-frame supervised fine-tuning, and then is optimized by a reinforcement learning strategy based on two-turn Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Beyond conventional accuracy rewards, we introduce Temporal and Spatial IoU rewards to supervise the intermediate localization process, effectively guiding the model toward more grounded and interpretable spatiotemporal reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CaC can stably concentrate on subtle anomalies, achieving a 25.7% accuracy improvement on fine-grained anomaly benchmarks and, when used as a reward signal, CaC reduces generated-video anomalies by 11.7% while improving overall video quality.

AI.tldr: 提出CaC模型，一种基于视觉语言模型的粗到细异常检测奖励模型，通过分阶段训练（监督微调+两轮GRPO强化学习）实现时空定位推理，在细粒度异常检测上提升25.7%准确率，并作为奖励信号减少生成视频异常11.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法缺乏细粒度时空定位能力，且缺乏高质量标注数据集。作者希望通过视觉语言模型实现从粗粒度时间定位到细粒度空间定位的渐进式推理，并作为奖励信号提升视频生成质量。
AI.method: 1) 构建首个大规模生成视频异常数据集（含逐帧边界框、时间窗口、归因标签）；2) 三阶段训练：单帧/多帧监督微调+两轮GRPO强化学习；3) 引入Temporal/ Spatial IoU奖励监督中间定位过程；4) 推理时：全局时间扫描→细粒度空间定位→时空Chain-of-Thought推理。
AI.result: 细粒度异常基准上准确率提升25.7%；作为奖励信号减少生成视频异常11.7%并提升整体视频质量。
AI.conclusion: 粗到细的时空推理+结构化CoT+针对中间过程的IoU奖励能有效提升视觉语言模型的异常检测能力，并可作为奖励信号改善视频生成质量。

title: A Comparative Study of Controlled Text Generation Systems Using Level-Playing-Field Evaluation Principles
summary:
Background: Many different approaches to controlled text generation (CTG) have been proposed over recent years, but it is difficult to get a clear picture of which approach performs best, because different datasets and evaluation methods are used in each case to assess the control achieved.
  Objectives: Our aim in the work reported in this paper is to develop an approach to evaluation that enables us to comparatively evaluate different CTG systems in a manner that is both informative and fair to the individual systems.
  Methods: We use a level-playing-field (LPF) approach to comparative evaluation where we (i) generate and process all system outputs in a standardised way, and (ii) apply a shared set of evaluation methods and datasets, selected based on those currently in use, in order to ensure fair evaluation.
  Results: When re-evaluated in this way, performance results for a representative set of current CTG systems differ substantially from originally reported results, in most cases for the worse. This highlights the importance of a shared standardised way of assessing controlled generation.
  Conclusions: The discrepancies revealed by LPF evaluation demonstrate the urgent need for standardised, reproducible evaluation practices in CTG. Our results suggest that without such practices, published performance claims may substantially misrepresent true system capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于水平竞技场（LPF）的标准化评估方法，用于公平比较不同的可控文本生成（CTG）系统，并发现重新评估后的性能结果普遍低于原始报告结果，揭示了CTG领域缺乏标准化评估的严重问题。
AI.motivation: 由于CTG领域存在多种方法，但各自使用不同的数据集和评估标准，导致难以公平比较不同系统的实际性能，迫切需要一种标准化评估方法。
AI.method: 采用水平竞技场（LPF）方法：1) 对所有系统输出进行标准化生成与处理；2) 使用统一选定的评估方法和数据集进行公平比较。
AI.result: 代表性CTG系统在LPF重新评估下的性能与原报告结果存在显著差异，且多数情况下性能明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了CTG领域迫切需要标准化、可复现的评估实践，否则已发表的性能声明可能严重误导系统的真实能力。

title: Domain Restriction via Multi SAE Layer Transitions
summary: The general-purpose nature of Large Language Models (LLMs) presents a significant challenge for domain-specific applications, often leading to out-of-domain (OOD) interactions that undermine the provider's intent. Existing methods for detecting such scenarios treat the LLM as an uninterpretable black box and overlook the internal processing of inputs. In this work we show that layer transitions provide a promising avenue for extracting domain-specific signature. Specifically, we present several lightweight ways of learning on internal dynamics encoded using a sparse autoencoder (SAE) that exhibit great capability in distinguishing OOD texts. Building on top of SAEs representation transitions enables us to better interpret the LLM internal evolution of input processing and shed light on its decisions. We provide a comprehensive analysis of the method and benchmark it with the gemma-2 2B and 9B models. Our results emphasize the efficacy of the internal process in capturing fine-grained input-related details.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）学习LLM内部层间转换的动态表征，以检测领域外（OOD）文本输入，相比传统黑盒方法更有效且更具可解释性。
AI.motivation: LLM在领域特定应用中常遭遇OOD交互，现有检测方法将LLM视为不可解释的黑盒，忽略了内部处理过程，因此需要一种能利用模型内部表征进行OOD检测的方法。
AI.method: 利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）对LLM内部层间转换进行编码，学习轻量级的OOD检测器，基于gemma-2 2B和9B模型进行实验。
AI.result: 基于SAE的层间转换表征在区分OOD文本方面表现出色，能够捕捉输入处理的细粒度细节，在gemma-2 2B和9B模型上均有效。
AI.conclusion: LLM内部层间转换是提取领域特征的有效途径，SAE表征转换不仅能提升OOD检测性能，还能增强模型决策的可解释性。

title: $\varepsilon$-Good Action Identification in Fixed-Budget Monte Carlo Tree Search
summary:
We study the fixed-budget max-min action identification problem in depth-2 max-min trees, an important special case of Monte Carlo Tree Search. A learner sequentially allocates $T$ samples to leaves and then recommends a subtree whose minimum leaf value is largest. Motivated by approximate planning, we focus on $\varepsilon$-good subtree identification, where any subtree whose min value is within $\varepsilon$ of the optimal maximin value is acceptable.
  Our main contribution is an $\varepsilon$-agnostic algorithm: it does not require $\varepsilon$ as input, but achieves instance-dependent error bounds for every meaningful $\varepsilon$. We show that the misidentification probability decays as $\exp(-\widetildeΘ(T/H_2(\varepsilon)))$, where $H_2(\varepsilon)$ captures both cross-subtree and within-subtree gaps. When each subtree has a single leaf, the problem reduces to standard fixed-budget best-arm identification, and our analysis recovers, up to accelerating factors, known $\varepsilon$-good guarantees for halving-style methods while giving a new $\varepsilon$-good guarantee for Successive Rejects.
  On the lower-bound side, we provide complementary positive and negative results showing that max-min identification has a different hardness structure from standard $K$-armed bandits. To our knowledge, this is the first provable fixed-budget algorithmic guarantee for max-min action identification.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度为2的max-min树中的固定预算最优动作识别问题，提出了一种不依赖ε输入的ε-agnostic算法，并给出了相应的错误概率界。
AI.motivation: 受近似规划（Monte Carlo Tree Search）启发，研究在有限预算下识别最优max-min子树的问题，该问题在标准bandit问题中未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出了一种ε-agnostic算法，无需预设ε作为输入，能够自动适应实例，并推导了误识别概率随预算T指数衰减的界，依赖跨子树和子树内差距的联合度量H₂(ε)。
AI.result: 误识别概率上界为exp(-Θ̃(T/H₂(ε)))；在单叶子子树退化情形下，恢复并改进了已知halving方法和Successive Rejects的ε-good保证；首次给出了max-min动作识别的固定预算算法保证。
AI.conclusion: Max-min识别问题具有与标准K臂bandit不同的困难结构，本文填补了相关理论空白。

title: WorldComp2D: Spatio-semantic Representations of Object Identity and Location from Local Views
comment: Accepted as a regular paper at ICML2026
summary: Learning latent representations that capture both semantic and spatial information is central to efficient spatio-semantic reasoning. However, many existing approaches rely on implicit latent structures combined with dense feature maps or task-specific heads, limiting computational efficiency and flexibility. We propose WorldComp2D, a novel lightweight representation learning framework that explicitly structures latent space geometry according to object identity and spatial proximity using multiscale local receptive fields. This framework consists of (i) a proximity-dependent encoder that maps a given observation into a spatio-semantic latent space and (ii) a localizer that infers the coordinates of objects in the input from the resulting spatio-semantic representation. Using facial landmark localization as a proof-of-concept, we show that, compared to SoTA lightweight models, WorldComp2D reduces the numbers of parameters and FLOPs by up to 4.0X and 2.2X, respectively, while maintaining real-time performance on CPU. These results demonstrate that explicitly structured latent spaces provide an efficient and general foundation for spatio-semantic reasoning. This framework is open-sourced at https://github.com/JinSeongmin/WorldComp2D.

AI.tldr: 提出WorldComp2D框架，通过显式结构化的潜在空间（按物体身份和空间邻近性组织）实现高效时空语义推理，在人脸关键点定位任务上相比轻量级SOTA模型参数量减少4.0倍、FLOPs减少2.2倍。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖隐式潜在结构配合密集特征图或任务特定头，计算效率和灵活性受限，缺乏显式组织潜在空间以同时捕捉语义和空间信息的能力。
AI.method: 提出WorldComp2D框架，包含：(i) 邻近性依赖编码器，将观测映射到时空语义潜在空间；(ii) 定位器，从潜在表示推断物体坐标。通过多尺度局部感受野显式按物体身份和空间邻近性组织潜在空间几何结构。
AI.result: 在人脸关键点定位任务上，相比轻量级SOTA模型，参数减少4.0倍，FLOPs减少2.2倍，并在CPU上保持实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式结构化潜在空间为时空语义推理提供了高效且通用的基础。

title: Question Difficulty Estimation for Large Language Models via Answer Plausibility Scoring
summary: Estimating question difficulty is a critical component in evaluating and improving large language models (LLMs) for question answering (QA). Existing approaches often rely on readability formulas, retrieval-based signals, or popularity statistics, which may not fully capture the reasoning challenges posed to modern LLMs. In this paper, we introduce Q-DAPS (Question Difficulty based on Answer Plausibility Scores) method, a novel approach that estimates question difficulty by computing the entropy of plausibility scores over candidate answers. We systematically evaluate Q-DAPS across four prominent QA datasets-TriviaQA, NQ, MuSiQue, and QASC-demonstrating that it consistently outperforms baselines. Moreover, Q-DAPS shows strong robustness across hyperparameter variations and question types. Extensive ablation studies further show that Q-DAPS remains robust across different plausibility estimation paradigms, model sizes, and realistic settings. Human evaluations further confirm strong alignment between Q-DAPS's difficulty estimates and human judgments of question difficulty. Overall, Q-DAPS provides an interpretable, scalable, and bias-resilient approach to question difficulty estimation in modern QA systems.

AI.tldr: 提出Q-DAPS方法，通过计算候选答案的 plausibility 分数熵来估计问题难度，在多个QA数据集上优于基线方法，且具有鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有问题难度估计方法（如可读性公式、检索信号、流行度统计）无法充分捕捉现代LLM面临的推理挑战，需要一种更有效的难度估计方法。
AI.method: Q-DAPS通过计算候选答案plausibility分数的熵来度量问题难度——熵越高，表明模型对答案的不确定性越大，问题越难。
AI.result: 在TriviaQA、NQ、MuSiQue、QASC四个数据集上一致优于基线方法；对超参数变化和问题类型具有强鲁棒性；在不同plausibility估计范式、模型规模和现实场景下表现稳健；与人工判断高度一致。
AI.conclusion: Q-DAPS是一种可解释、可扩展、对偏差具有鲁棒性的问题难度估计方法，适用于现代QA系统。

title: When Simulation Lies: A Sim-to-Real Benchmark and Domain-Randomized RL Recipe for Tool-Use Agents
comment: Dataset, code, and benchmark leaderboard are available at https://github.com/WillChow66/robustbench-tc-release.git and https://huggingface.co/spaces/willchow66/robustbench-tc-leaderboard
summary: Tool-use language agents are evaluated on benchmarks that assume clean inputs, unambiguous tool registries, and reliable APIs. Real deployments violate all these assumptions: user typos propagate into hallucinated tool names, a misconfigured request timeout can stall an agent indefinitely, and duplicate tool names across servers can freeze an SDK. We study these failures as a sim-to-real gap in the tool-use partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), where deployment noise enters through the observation, action space, reward-relevant metadata, or transition dynamics. We introduce RobustBench-TC, a benchmark with 22 perturbation types organized by these four POMDP components, each grounded in a verified GitHub issue or documented tool-calling failure. Across 21 models from 1.5B to 32B parameters (including the closed-source o4-mini), the robustness profile is sharply uneven: observation perturbations reduce accuracy by less than 5%, while reward-relevant and transition perturbations reduce accuracy by roughly 40% and 30%, respectively; scale alone does not close these gaps. We then propose ToolRL-DR, a domain-randomization reinforcement learning (RL) recipe that trains a tool-use agent on perturbation-augmented trajectories spanning the three statically encodable POMDP components. On a 3B backbone, ToolRL-DR-Full retains roughly three-quarters of clean accuracy and reaches an aggregate perturbed accuracy comparable to open-source 14B function-calling baselines while substantially narrowing the gap to o4-mini. It closes approximately 27% of the Transition gap despite never seeing transition perturbations in training, suggesting that RL on adversarial static tool-use inputs induces a more persistent retry policy that transfers to unseen runtime failures. The dataset, code and benchmark leaderboard are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobustBench-TC基准，包含22种基于真实问题的工具调用扰动，发现现有工具语言代理在部署噪声下表现脆弱（观察扰动影响小，奖励/转移扰动使准确率下降30-40%）；并提出ToolRL-DR领域随机化RL方法，在3B模型上显著缩小与o4-mini的差距，且训练中未见过的转移扰动也有27%的改善。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中工具型语言代理面临用户拼写错误、超时配置错误、工具名重复等噪声，而现有基准均假设干净输入，存在巨大的sim-to-real差距。
AI.method: 1) 构建RobustBench-TC，包含22种扰动类型，按POMDP四组件（观察、动作空间、奖励相关元数据、转移动态）分类；2) 提出ToolRL-DR，在扰动增强轨迹上进行领域随机化强化学习训练。
AI.result: 观察扰动准确率下降<5%，奖励相关扰动下降约40%，转移扰动下降约30%；规模提升无法弥合差距。ToolRL-DR-Full（3B）保留约3/4干净准确率，扰动准确率接近开源14B基线，显著缩小与o4-mini差距，且转移扰动gap缩小约27%。
AI.conclusion: 工具语言代理在部署噪声下存在严重鲁棒性缺陷，领域随机化RL是有效的缓解手段，且训练中未见过的转移扰动也有跨场景迁移效果。

title: Neural Statistical Functions
summary: Classical deep learning typically operates on individual cases. Despite its success, real-world usage often requires repeated inference to estimate statistical quantities for complex decision-making tasks involving uncertainty or extreme-value analysis, resulting in substantial latency. We introduce neural statistical functions, a new family of models learned from pre-trained single-sample predictors and scattered data samples, which can directly infer statistics over continuous operating condition ranges without explicit sampling. By introducing the notion of prefix statistics, we transform and unify diverse statistical functions (e.g., integrals, quantiles, and maxima) into an interval-conditional framework, in which a principled identity between the prefix statistics and the individual-case regression serves as the learning objective. Neural statistical functions achieve strong performance in estimating essential statistics of complex physical processes, including accumulated energy in dynamical systems, quantiles of aerodynamic responses, and maximum stress in crash processes, while achieving up to a 100$\times$ reduction in model evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经统计函数（Neural Statistical Functions），一种能从预训练的单样本预测器和稀疏数据样本中直接推断连续操作条件范围内统计量（如积分、分位数、最大值）的新模型族，无需显式采样，在复杂物理过程统计估计中实现高达100倍模型评估缩减。
AI.motivation: 经典深度学习在单个样本上表现优异，但实际应用中往往需要重复推理来估计统计量（如不确定性、极值分析），导致大量延迟。本文旨在设计一种能直接推断统计量的模型，避免重复采样的高成本。
AI.method: 提出"前缀统计量"概念，将积分、分位数、最大值等多种统计函数统一转化为区间条件框架；利用前缀统计量与单样本回归之间的恒等关系作为学习目标，从预训练的单样本预测器和稀疏数据样本中学习。
AI.result: 在复杂物理过程（动力系统累积能量、空气动力学响应分位数、碰撞过程最大应力）的统计估计中取得强性能，模型评估次数减少高达100倍。
AI.conclusion: 神经统计函数为高效统计推断提供了一种新范式，显著降低了复杂决策任务中重复采样的计算开销，在需要统计量估计的工程应用中具有重要价值。

title: BronchoLumen: Analysis of recent YOLO-based architectures for real-time bronchial orifice detection in video bronchoscopy
summary: Bronchoscopy is routinely conducted in pulmonary clinics and intensive care units, but navigating the complex branching of the respiratory tract remains challenging. This paper introduces BronchoLumen, a real-time YOLO-based system for detecting bronchial orifices in video bronchoscopy, aiming to assist navigation and CAD systems. The paper investigates if bronchial orifices can be robustly detected across image domains using state-of-the-art object detection and a limited set of public image data. The study includes the description and comparison of YOLOv8, a widely adopted architecture, and YOLOv12, a more recent architecture integrating attention-based modules to improve spatial reasoning. Both models are trained and tested solely on publicly available datasets comprising different image domains. A comparison of both models is conducted based on the common metrics mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.9 with the latter emphasizing localization accuracy. For YOLOv8 we obtained a mAP@0.5 of 0.91 on an in-domain and 0.68 on a cross-domain test set. YOLOv12 achieved 0.84 and 0.68 respectively with slightly better localization accuracy with mAP@0.5:0.9 of 0.48 and 0.26 compared to YOLOv8 with 0.45 and 0.25. Challenges like motion blur and low contrast occasionally entailed uncertainties but the system demonstrated overall robustness in most scenarios. BronchoLumen is an open-weight, YOLO-based solution for bronchial orifice detection offering high accuracy and efficiency across multiple image domains. While the more recent YOLOv12 achieves better localization accuracy, we observed a slightly worse precision. The models have been made publicly available to foster further research in bronchoscopy navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BronchoLumen，一个基于YOLOv8和YOLOv12的实时支气管镜视频中支气管口检测系统。实验表明YOLOv8在域内测试集mAP@0.5达0.91，YOLOv12定位精度略优但整体精度略低，系统在多种场景下表现鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 支气管镜检查中呼吸道分支复杂，导航困难。现有方法缺乏在公开数据集上跨域检测支气管口的鲁棒方案，且YOLOv12等新架构在医疗图像领域的应用尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv8和YOLOv12两种目标检测架构，在多个公开数据集（涵盖不同图像域）上训练和测试。YOLOv12集成了注意力模块以增强空间推理能力。评估指标为mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.9。
AI.result: YOLOv8在域内测试集mAP@0.5达0.91，跨域为0.68；YOLOv12分别为0.84和0.68。定位精度方面YOLOv12略优（mAP@0.5:0.9分别为0.48/0.26 vs 0.45/0.25），但整体精度稍差。运动模糊和低对比度偶有不确定性。
AI.conclusion: BronchoLumen是一个高效、跨域鲁棒的支气管口检测方案。YOLOv12定位更准但精度略有牺牲。模型已开源以促进支气管镜导航研究。

title: Stories in Space: In-Context Learning Trajectories in Conceptual Belief Space
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) update their behavior in context, which can be viewed as a form of Bayesian inference. However, the structure of the latent hypothesis space over which this inference operates remains unclear. In this work, we propose that LLMs assign beliefs over a low-dimensional geometric space - a conceptual belief space - and that in-context learning corresponds to a trajectory through this space as beliefs are updated over time. Using story understanding as a natural setting for dynamic belief updating, we combine behavioral and representational analyses to study these trajectories. We find that (1) belief updates are well-described as trajectories on low-dimensional, structured manifolds; (2) this structure is reflected consistently in both model behavior and internal representations and can be decoded with simple linear probes to predict behavior; and (3) interventions on these representations causally steer belief trajectories, with effects that can be predicted from the geometry of the conceptual space. Together, our results provide a geometric account of belief dynamics in LLMs, grounding Bayesian interpretations of in-context learning in structured conceptual representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLMs在低维几何空间（概念信念空间）中进行信念更新，上下文学习对应信念轨迹。通过故事理解实验发现信念更新位于低维流形上，且与行为和内部表征一致，可通过线性探针解码，对表征的干预能因果性地引导信念轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将LLM的上下文学习视为贝叶斯推理，但潜在假设空间的结构尚不明确。本文旨在揭示LLM信念更新的几何结构，为贝叶斯解释提供具体的表征基础。
AI.method: 以故事理解为场景，结合行为分析（模型输出）和表征分析（内部激活），研究信念更新轨迹。使用低维流形学习、线性探针解码、以及表征干预（因果操纵）等方法。
AI.result: (1) 信念更新可被描述为低维结构化流形上的轨迹；(2) 这种结构在行为和内部表征中一致体现，线性探针可预测行为；(3) 对表征的干预能因果性地引导信念轨迹，且效果可由概念空间的几何结构预测。
AI.conclusion: LLM的信念动态可以用几何空间来描述，为上下文学习的贝叶斯解释提供了结构化表征基础，揭示了LLM推理的潜在几何机制。

title: From Noise to Diversity: Random Embedding Injection in LLM Reasoning
summary: Recent soft prompt research has tried to improve reasoning by inserting trained vectors into LLM inputs, yet whether the gain comes from the learned content or from the act of injection itself has not been carefully separated. We study Random Soft Prompts (RSPs), which drop the training step entirely and append a freshly drawn sequence of random embedding vectors to the input. Each RSP vector is sampled from an isotropic Gaussian fitted to the entrywise mean and variance of the pretrained embedding table; the sequence carries no learned content, and yet reaches accuracy comparable to optimized soft prompts on math reasoning benchmarks in several settings. The mechanism unfolds in two stages: because attention has to absorb a never-seen-before random position, the distribution over the first few generated tokens flattens and reasoning trajectories branch, and as generation continues this influence dilutes naturally so the response commits to a single completion. We show that during inference RSPs lift early-stage token diversity and, combined with temperature sampling, widen Pass@N, the probability that at least one out of N attempts is correct. Beyond inference, we carry the same effect into DAPO training and demonstrate practical gains. Our contributions are: (i) RSP isolates the simplest form of soft prompt -- training-free, freshly resampled -- providing a unified lens for the structural effect of injection that variants otherwise differing in training and form all share; (ii) a theoretical and empirical validation of the underlying mechanism; and (iii) an extension from inference to training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出随机软提示（RSP），丢弃训练步骤，直接在输入后追加随机嵌入向量，在数学推理任务上达到与优化软提示相当的性能。机制上，RSP通过引入未见过的随机位置，在早期生成阶段增加token多样性，结合温度采样提升Pass@N，并可扩展到DAPO训练中。
AI.motivation: 现有软提示研究通过注入训练向量提升推理能力，但未区分收益来自学习内容还是注入行为本身。本文旨在分离这一混淆因素，探究无训练随机软提示的作用。
AI.method: 从预训练嵌入表的逐元素均值和方差拟合各向同性高斯分布，从中采样随机向量序列作为软提示，不经过任何训练。分析注意力机制如何处理这些从未见过的随机位置，验证其对token分布和推理多样性的影响。
AI.result: 随机软提示在数学推理基准上达到与优化软提示相当的准确率；能提升早期token多样性，结合温度采样显著提高Pass@N；该效果可迁移到DAPO训练中并带来实际收益。
AI.conclusion: 软提示的结构性注入行为本身就能带来增益，与学习到的内容无关。RSP提供了一个统一视角来理解各类软提示变体共享的机制，并从推理扩展到训练阶段。

title: Epistemic Uncertainty for Test-Time Discovery
summary: Automated scientific discovery using large language models relies on identifying genuinely novel solutions. Standard reinforcement learning penalizes high-variance mutations, which leads the policy to prioritize familiar patterns. As a result, the maximum reward plateaus even as the average reward increases. Overcoming this limitation requires a signal that distinguishes unexplored regions from intrinsically difficult problems. This necessitates measuring disagreement across independently adapted weight hypotheses rather than relying on a single network's confidence. UG-TTT addresses this challenge by maintaining a small ensemble of low-rank adapters over a frozen base model. The per-token disagreement, quantified as the mutual information between ensemble predictions and weight hypotheses, isolates epistemic uncertainty and identifies positions where insufficient coverage leads to adapter divergence rather than intrinsic problem difficulty. This measure is incorporated as an exploration bonus into the policy gradient, directing the policy toward positions where persistent adapter disagreement signals low training coverage, the same frontier where genuine discovery is possible. A nuclear norm regularizer ensures the adapters remain distinct from one another, thereby preserving the exploration signal throughout training. Across four scientific discovery benchmarks, UG-TTT increases the maximum reward on three tasks, maintains substantially higher solution diversity, and an ablation study confirms that the regularizer is essential for sustaining this behavior.

AI.tldr: UG-TTT通过维护冻结基模型上的低秩适配器小集成，利用适配器间的互信息分歧作为探索奖励信号，引导策略向训练覆盖不足（即真正可发现新解）的区域探索，并用核范数正则化保持适配器多样性，从而在科学发现基准中提升最大奖励和解多样性。
AI.motivation: 标准RL会惩罚高方差突变，导致策略偏好熟悉模式，最大奖励随平均奖励提升而停滞。需要能区分未探索区域与本质上困难问题的信号，而非依赖单一网络的置信度。
AI.method: 在冻结基模型上维护一个小的低秩适配器集成；计算集成预测与权重假设之间的互信息来量化每个token的分歧，以此隔离认知不确定性；将这一度量作为探索奖励加入策略梯度；使用核范数正则化确保适配器保持差异。
AI.result: 在四个科学发现基准测试的三个上提升了最大奖励，保持了显著更高的解多样性；消融实验证实正则化器对维持该行为至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 通过适配器集成的认知不确定性信号可以引导策略向训练覆盖不足的区域探索，从而突破标准RL的奖励停滞瓶颈，实现真正的科学发现。

title: Focusable Monocular Depth Estimation
summary: Monocular depth foundation models generalize well across scenes, yet they are typically optimized with uniform pixel-wise objectives that do not distinguish user-specified or task-relevant target regions from the surrounding context. We therefore introduce Focusable Monocular Depth Estimation (FDE), a region-aware depth estimation task in which, given a specified target region, the model is required to prioritize foreground depth accuracy, preserve sharp boundary transitions, and maintain coherent global scene geometry. To prioritize task-critical region modeling, we propose FocusDepth, a prompt-conditioned monocular relative depth estimation framework that guides depth modeling to focus on target regions via box/text prompts. The core Multi-Scale Spatial-Aligned Fusion (MSSA) in FocusDepth spatially aligns multi-scale features from Segment Anything Model 3 to the Depth Anything family and injects them through scale-specific, gated conditional fusion. This enables dense prompt cue injection without disrupting geometric representations, thereby endowing the depth estimation model with focused perception capability. To study FDE, we establish FDE-Bench, a target-centric monocular relative depth benchmark built from image-target-depth triplets across five datasets, containing 252.9K/72.5K train/val triplets and 972 categories spanning real-world and embodied simulation environments. On FDE-Bench, FocusDepth consistently improves over globally fine-tuned DA2/DA3 baselines under both box and text prompts, with the largest gains appearing in target boundary and foreground regions while preserving global scene geometry. Ablations show that MSSA's spatial alignment is the key design factor, as disrupting prompt-geometry correspondence increases AbsRel by up to 13.8%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出聚焦式单目深度估计（FDE）任务，并设计了FocusDepth框架，通过将SAM3的多尺度特征与Depth Anything系列进行空间对齐和条件融合，使得模型能根据用户指定的区域（框/文本提示）优先优化目标区域的深度精度、边界清晰度和全局几何一致性。同时构建了包含97.2K样本的FDE-Bench基准。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度基础模型在训练时使用统一的逐像素损失，无法区分用户指定的目标任务区域与背景上下文，导致在特定区域上的深度估计精度不足。
AI.method: 提出FocusDepth框架，核心是多尺度空间对齐融合（MSSA），将SAM3的多尺度特征与Depth Anything系列特征进行空间对齐，并通过尺度特定的门控条件融合注入，实现密集提示注入而不破坏几何表示。
AI.result: 在FDE-Bench上，FocusDepth在框和文本提示下均优于全局微调的DA2/DA3基线，最大提升出现在目标边界和前景区域，同时保持全局场景几何。消融实验显示空间对齐是关键，破坏提示-几何对应会使AbsRel增加高达13.8%。
AI.conclusion: 通过条件提示引导深度模型关注特定区域是提升任务相关深度估计精度的有效途径，空间对齐的跨模型特征融合是实现这一目标的关键技术。

title: ORBIT: Preserving Foundational Language Capabilities in GenRetrieval via Origin-Regulated Merging
summary: Despite the rapid advancements in large language model (LLM) development, fine-tuning them for specific tasks often results in the catastrophic forgetting of their general, language-based reasoning abilities. This work investigates and addresses this challenge in the context of the Generative Retrieval (GenRetrieval) task. During GenRetrieval fine-tuning, we find this forgetting occurs rapidly and correlates with the distance between the fine-tuned and original model parameters. Given these observations, we propose ORBIT, a novel approach that actively tracks the distance between fine-tuned and initial model weights, and uses a weight averaging strategy to constrain model drift during GenRetrieval fine-tuning when this inter-model distance exceeds a maximum threshold. Our results show that ORBIT retains substantial text and retrieval performance by outperforming both common continual learning baselines and related regularization methods that also employ weight averaging.

AI.tldr: 在生成式检索(GenRetrieval)微调中，LLM会快速遗忘通用推理能力，且遗忘程度与参数偏移距离相关。ORBIT通过跟踪参数距离并采用权重平均策略来限制模型漂移，在保留通用能力的同时优于持续学习基线和正则化方法。
AI.motivation: LLM在针对生成式检索(GenRetrieval)任务微调时，会出现灾难性遗忘(catastrophic forgetting)，导致通用语言推理能力大幅下降。本文旨在解决这一特定场景下的遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出ORBIT方法：在GenRetrieval微调过程中，主动跟踪微调参数与初始模型参数之间的距离，当距离超过预设阈值时，采用权重平均(weight averaging)策略来约束模型参数漂移，从而缓解遗忘。
AI.result: ORBIT在保留文本理解和检索性能方面，显著优于常见的持续学习基线和同样使用权重平均的正则化方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过主动监控和约束参数漂移，可以有效缓解GenRetrieval微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，该方法简单有效且迁移性强。

title: Counterfactual Trace Auditing of LLM Agent Skills
comment: Code and data are available at https://github.com/WillChow66/CTA.git
summary: Large Language Model agents are increasingly augmented with agent skills. Current evaluation methods for skills remain limited. Most deployed benchmarks report only pass rate before and after a skill is attached, treating the skill as a black box change to agent behavior. We introduce Counterfactual Trace Auditing (CTA), a framework for measuring how a skill changes agent behavior. CTA pairs each with skill agent trace with a without skill counterpart on the same task, segments both traces into goal directed phases, aligns the phases, and emits structured Skill Influence Pattern (SIP) annotations. These annotations describe the behavioral effect of a skill rather than only its task outcome. We instantiate CTA on SWE-Skills-Bench with Claude across 49 software engineering tasks. The resulting audit reveals a clear evaluation gap. Pass rate changes by only +0.3 percentage points on average, suggesting little aggregate effect. Yet CTA identifies 522 SIP instances across the same paired traces, showing that the skills substantially reshape agent behavior even when pass rate is nearly unchanged. The audit also separates several recurring effects that pass rate cannot detect, including literal template copying, off task artifact creation, excess planning, and task recovery. Three findings emerge. First, high baseline tasks contain most of the observed skill effects, although their pass rate is already saturated and therefore cannot reflect those effects. Second, tasks with moderate baseline performance show the most recoverable gain, but often at substantially higher token cost. Third, the dominant SIP type can be identified by baseline bucket: surface anchoring is most common on ceiling tasks and edge-case prompting is most common on mid-range and floor tasks. These regularities turn informal failure mode observations into reproducible behavioral measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Counterfactual Trace Auditing (CTA) 框架，通过对比有无技能的智能体执行同一任务的行为轨迹，生成结构化技能影响模式注释，揭示传统通过率指标无法捕捉的技能行为变化。在 SWE-Skills-Bench 上的实验发现，尽管平均通过率仅提升 0.3%，CTA 却识别出 522 个影响模式，并总结出三种关键发现。
AI.motivation: 当前评估技能对 LLM Agent 影响的方法仅限于报告附加技能前后的通过率，将技能视为黑盒变化，无法揭示技能如何具体改变智能体的行为模式。作者旨在提出一种细粒度、可解释的审计框架，量化技能对行为的真实影响。
AI.method: CTA 框架：1) 为每个任务收集有技能和无技能两条执行轨迹；2) 将两条轨迹分割为以目标为导向的阶段；3) 对齐对应阶段；4) 生成结构化技能影响模式注释。在 SWE-Skills-Bench 上使用 Claude 对 49 个软件工程任务进行实例化审计。
AI.result: 通过率仅变化 +0.3%，但 CTA 识别出 522 个 SIP 实例。发现三类规律：1) 高基线任务包含最多技能效应但通过率已饱和；2) 中等基线任务可恢复收益最大但 token 成本显著更高；3) 主要 SIP 类型可被基线水平预测（表面锚定常见于高基线任务，边缘提示常见于中低基线任务）。
AI.conclusion: CTA 揭示了传统通过率评估无法发现的行为层面技能影响，将非正式的失败模式观察转化为可重复的行为测量，为 Agent 技能评估提供了更全面的框架。

title: VERDI: Single-Call Confidence Estimation for Verification-Based LLM Judges via Decomposed Inference
summary:
LLM-as-Judge systems are widely deployed for automated evaluation, yet practitioners lack reliable methods to know when a judge's verdict should be trusted. Token log-probabilities, the standard post-hoc confidence signal, are unavailable for many commercial LLMs and, even when accessible, saturate above 0.999 with structured JSON output.
  We introduce VERDI (VERification-Decomposed Inference), a method that extracts confidence from the reasoning trace a structured judge already produces, with no additional inference calls. VERDI decomposes each verification-style evaluation into sub-checks and derives three structural signals: Step-Verdict Alignment, Claim-Level Margin, and Evidence Grounding Score. We combine them with Platt-scaled logistic regression.
  On three public benchmarks, VERDI achieves AUROC 0.72-0.91 on GPT-4.1-mini and 0.66-0.80 on GPT-5.4-mini. On Qwen3.5-4B/9B/27B, where answer-token logprobs are anti-calibrated (higher confidence on errors, AUROC 0.32-0.49), VERDI achieves 0.56-0.70. We additionally validate on a production system with eight rubrics (AUROC 0.73-0.88 on factual rubrics), demonstrate cross-model transfer (AUROC 0.66-0.69), and show that a 33M-parameter NLI (Natural Language Inference) model provides a scalable alternative to regex extraction.

AI.tldr: VERDI是一种从LLM Judge的推理轨迹中提取置信度信号的方法，无需额外推理调用。它通过分解验证式评估为子检查，推导出三个结构信号（步骤-裁决对齐、声明级边际、证据基础评分），结合Platt缩放逻辑回归实现可信度评估。在多个基准和商业模型上表现优于传统logprobs方法。
AI.motivation: LLM-as-Judge系统被广泛用于自动化评估，但实践者缺乏可靠方法来判断何时应信任法官的裁决。传统token log-probabilities置信度信号对许多商业LLM不可用，且在使用时因结构化JSON输出导致饱和度超过0.999，无法有效区分置信度。
AI.method: VERDI将验证式评估分解为子检查，从推理轨迹中提取三个结构信号：Step-Verdict Alignment（步骤与裁决的一致性）、Claim-Level Margin（声明级边际）、Evidence Grounding Score（证据基础评分）。然后通过Platt缩放逻辑回归组合这些信号，输出校准的置信度概率。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准上，GPT-4.1-mini AUROC 0.72-0.91，GPT-5.4-mini AUROC 0.66-0.80。在Qwen3.5系列（4B/9B/27B）上，传统logprobs反校准（AUROC 0.32-0.49），VERDI达到0.56-0.70。在生产系统8个评分标准上AUROC 0.73-0.88（事实性评分），跨模型迁移AUROC 0.66-0.69。
AI.conclusion: VERDI有效解决了LLM Judge置信度估计问题，特别是当token logprobs不可用或反校准时的替代方案。跨模型迁移能力表明其泛化性，33M参数的NLI模型可作为正则表达式的可扩展替代方案。

title: M$^4$-SAM: Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts with Memory-Augmented SAM for RGB-D Video Salient Object Detection
summary: The Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) has emerged as a foundation model for universal segmentation. Owing to its generalizable visual representations, SAM2 has been successfully applied to various downstream tasks. However, extending SAM2 to the RGB-D video salient object detection (RGB-D VSOD) task encounters three challenges including limited spatial modeling of linear LoRA, insufficient employment of SAM's multi-scale features, and dependence of initialization on explicit prompts. To address the issues, we present Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts with Memory-Augmented SAM (M$^4$-SAM), which equips SAM2 with modality-related PEFT, hierarchical feature fusion, and prompt-free memory initialization. Firstly, we inject Modality-Aware MoE-LORA, which employs convolutional experts to encode local spatial priors and introduces a modality dispatcher for efficient multi-modal fine-tuning, into SAM2's encoder. Secondly, we deploy Gated Multi-Level Feature Fusion, which hierarchically aggregates multi-scale encoder features with an adaptive gating mechanism, to balance spatial details and semantic context. Finally, to conduct zero-shot VSOD without manual prompts, we utilize a Pseudo-Guided Initialization, where a coarse mask is regarded as a pseudo prior and used to bootstrap the memory bank. Extensive experiments demonstrate that M$^4$-SAM achieves the state-of-the-art performance across all evaluation metrics on three public RGB-D VSOD datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SAM2在RGB-D视频显著性目标检测任务中的三大挑战（LoRA空间建模有限、多尺度特征利用不足、依赖显式提示初始化），提出了M⁴-SAM模型，通过模态感知MoE-LoRA、门控多级特征融合和伪引导初始化三个模块，在三个公开数据集上达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: SAM2作为通用分割基础模型，在扩展到RGB-D视频显著性目标检测任务时面临三个挑战：1) 线性LoRA空间建模能力有限；2) 未能充分利用SAM的多尺度特征；3) 依赖显式提示进行初始化。
AI.method: 1) Modality-Aware MoE-LoRA：使用卷积专家（convolutional experts）编码局部空间先验，并引入模态调度器实现高效多模态微调；2) Gated Multi-Level Feature Fusion：通过自适应门控机制分层聚合多尺度编码器特征，平衡空间细节与语义上下文；3) Pseudo-Guided Initialization：将粗粒度掩码作为伪先验引导记忆库初始化，实现无需手动提示的零样本VSOD。
AI.result: 在三个公开RGB-D VSOD数据集上，所有评估指标均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: M⁴-SAM有效解决了SAM2在RGB-D VSOD任务中的三大挑战，为将基础分割模型适配到特定下游任务提供了有效范式。

title: Predicting Disagreement with Human Raters in LLM-as-a-Judge Difficulty Assessment without Using Generation-Time Probability Signals
comment: Accepted to Educational Data Mining (EDM) 2026 (Poster/Demo Track)
summary: Automatic generation of educational materials using large language models (LLMs) is becoming increasingly common, but assigning difficulty levels to such materials still requires substantial human effort. LLM-as-a-Judge has therefore attracted attention, yet disagreement with human raters remains a major challenge. We propose a method for predicting which LLM-generated difficulty ratings are likely to disagree with human raters, so that such cases can be sent for re-rating. Unlike prior approaches, our method does not rely on generation-time probability signals, which must be collected during rating generation and are often difficult to compare across LLMs. Instead, exploiting the fact that difficulty is an ordinal scale, we use a separate embedding space, such as ModernBERT, and identify disagreement candidates based on the geometric consistency of the rating set. Experiments on English CEFR-based sentence difficulty assessment with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3-235B-A22B showed that the proposed method achieved higher AUC for predicting disagreement with human raters than probability-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需生成阶段概率信号的方法，利用现代BERT等嵌入空间和几何一致性来预测LLM生成的难度评级与人工评分者之间是否存在分歧，从而将可能分歧的案例送去重新评分。
AI.motivation: LLM自动生成教育材料越来越普遍，但难度评级仍需大量人工。LLM-as-a-Judge虽受关注，但与人工评分者的分歧仍是重大挑战，需要一种方法自动识别可能分歧的案例。
AI.method: 利用难度是序数刻度这一特点，使用单独的嵌入空间（如ModernBERT），基于评级集合的几何一致性来识别可能产生分歧的候选案例，不依赖生成阶段的概率信号。
AI.result: 在英语CEFR句子难度评估任务上（使用GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3-235B-A22B），所提方法在预测与人工评分者分歧的AUC上优于基于概率的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何一致性的方法无需生成阶段概率信号即可有效预测LLM难度评级与人工评分者的分歧，为减少人工审核成本提供可行方案。

title: Assessing and Mitigating Miscalibration in LLM-Based Social Science Measurement
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in social science as scalable measurement tools for converting unstructured text into variables that can enter standard empirical designs. Measurement validity demands more than high average accuracy, which requires well calibrated confidence that faithfully reflects the empirical probability of each measurement being correct. This paper studies the model miscalibration in LLM-based social science measurement. We begin with a case study on FOMC and show that confidence based filtering can change downstream regression estimates when LLM confidence is miscalibrated. We then audit calibration across 14 social science constructs covering both proprietary models, including GPT-5-mini, DeepSeek-V3.2, and open source models. Across tasks and model families, reported confidence is poorly aligned with tolerance-based correctness. As a simple mitigation, we propose a soft label distillation pipeline for calibrating Bert with LLM. The method converts an LLM score and its verbalized confidence into a soft target distribution, then trains a smaller discriminative classifier on encoder models for these targets. Averaged across datasets, this approach reduces ECE by 43.2\% and Brier by 34.0\%. These results suggest that LLM-based social science pipelines should treat calibration as part of measurement validity, rather than as an optional post-processing concern.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型（LLMs）在社会科学测量中的校准问题，发现LLMs的置信度与真实正确率严重不匹配，并提出一种基于软标签蒸馏的校准方法（用Bert蒸馏LLM），平均降低ECE 43.2%、Brier 34.0%。
AI.motivation: LLMs越来越多地被用作社会科学中的可扩展测量工具，但测量效度要求模型置信度能真实反映每次测量正确的概率。现有研究忽略了模型校准问题，导致基于置信度过滤的下游回归估计可能产生偏差。
AI.method: 提出软标签蒸馏（soft label distillation）管道：将LLM的分数及其口头化置信度转换为软目标分布，然后用更小的判别式分类器（Bert）在这些目标上训练。在14个社会科学构念上对GPT-5-mini、DeepSeek-V3.2及开源模型进行校准审计。
AI.result: 在多个任务和模型家族中，LLM报告的置信度与基于容忍度的正确性对齐较差。提出的蒸馏方法平均降低ECE 43.2%、Brier 34.0%。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的社会科学流水线应将校准视为测量效度的一部分，而非可选的后期处理步骤。

title: Physics-Informed Teacher-Student Ensemble Learning for Traffic State Estimation with a Varying Speed Limit Scenario
comment: The IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026
summary: Physics-informed deep learning (PIDL) neural networks have shown their capability as a useful instrument for transportation practitioners in utilizing the underlying relationship between the state variables for traffic state estimation (TSE). Another efficient traffic management approach is implementing varying speed limits (VSLs) on transportation corridors to control traffic and mitigate congestion. However, the existing training architecture of PIDL in the literature cannot accommodate the changing traffic characteristics on a freeway with VSL. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel framework integrating teacher-student ensemble training with PIDL neural networks for TSE under VSL scenarios. The physics of flow conservation law is encoded locally in the teacher models by PIDL, and the student model uses a multi-layer perceptron classifier (MLP) to identify traffic characteristics and selects the ensemble member of PIDL neural networks for TSE. This integrated framework provides a natural solution for capturing the heterogeneity of VSL and accurately addressing the TSE problem. The case study results validate the proposed ensemble approach, demonstrating its superior performance in TSE compared to other popular baseline methods, as indicated by relative L2 error.

AI.tldr: 提出了教师-学生集成训练与物理信息深度学习(PIDL)神经网络相结合的新框架，用于解决变速限制(VSL)场景下的交通状态估计(TSE)问题。教师模型通过PIDL局部编码守恒律物理信息，学生模型用MLP分类器识别交通特征并选择合适的集成成员，有效处理了VSL异质性。
AI.motivation: 现有的PIDL训练架构无法适应带有变速限制(VSL)的高速公路交通特征变化，需要一种能捕捉VSL异质性并准确进行交通状态估计的新方法。
AI.method: 提出教师-学生集成训练框架：教师模型通过PIDL局部编码流量守恒物理定律，学生模型采用多层感知器(MLP)分类器识别交通特征，并从PIDL神经网络集成成员中选择合适的模型进行TSE。
AI.result: 案例研究表明该方法在TSE任务上优于其他主流基线方法，相对L2误差指标表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该集成框架能天然地捕捉VSL异质性，为VSL场景下的交通状态估计提供了准确有效的解决方案。

title: Revisiting Shadow Detection from a Vision-Language Perspective
summary: Shadow detection is commonly formulated as a vision-driven dense prediction problem, where models rely primarily on pixel-wise visual supervision to distinguish shadows from non-shadow regions. However, this formulation can become unreliable in visually ambiguous cases, where similar dark regions may correspond either to cast shadows or to intrinsically dark surfaces, making visual evidence alone insufficient for establishing a stable decision rule. In this work, we revisit shadow detection from a vision--language perspective and argue that robust prediction benefits from an explicit semantic reference beyond visual cues alone. We propose SVL, a Shadow Vision--Language framework that uses language as an explicit semantic reference to disambiguate shadows from visually similar dark regions. SVL aligns the global image representation with shadow-related text embeddings through a scene-level shadow ratio regression objective, thereby providing image-level guidance on the overall extent of shadows. To transfer this global guidance to dense inference, SVL introduces a global-to-local coupling mechanism that enforces consistency between image-level guidance and patch-level predictions. In parallel, SVL applies local patch-level constraints with text embeddings to improve fine-grained discrimination under challenging appearance conditions. Built on a frozen DINOv3 image encoder, the framework learns only lightweight projection and decoding modules, yielding a parameter-efficient design with less than $1\%$ trainable parameters. Extensive experiments on multiple shadow detection benchmarks, including dedicated hard-case evaluations, suggest strong overall performance and improved robustness under visually ambiguous conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SVL框架，通过引入语言作为显式语义参考来解决阴影检测中视觉模糊（暗区是阴影还是深色表面）的问题，仅需不到1%的可训练参数。
AI.motivation: 传统阴影检测依赖像素级视觉监督，但在视觉模糊情况下（如深色表面与阴影相似）容易出错，因为仅有视觉线索不足以建立稳定的决策规则。
AI.method: 提出SVL（Shadow Vision-Language）框架：1）场景级阴影比率回归，对齐全局图像与阴影文本嵌入；2）全局到局部的耦合机制，确保图像级指导与patch级预测一致；3）局部patch级文本约束提升细粒度判别。基于冻结的DINOv3编码器，仅训练轻量投影和解码模块。
AI.result: 在多个阴影检测基准和困难案例评估上表现出强泛化性能和鲁棒性，优于传统纯视觉方法。
AI.conclusion: 语言作为显式语义参考能有效辅助阴影检测在视觉模糊情况下的鲁棒决策，且参数高效的设计验证了视觉-语言融合的实用性。

title: Geometric Factual Recall in Transformers
summary: How do transformer language models memorize factual associations? A common view casts internal weight matrices as associative memories over pairs of embeddings, requiring parameter counts that scale linearly with the number of facts. We develop a theoretical and empirical account of an alternative, \emph{geometric} form of memorization in which learned embeddings encode relational structure directly, and the MLP plays a qualitatively different role. In a controlled setting where a single-layer transformer must memorize random bijections from subjects to a shared attribute set, we prove that a logarithmic embedding dimension suffices: subject embeddings encode \emph{linear superpositions} of their associated attribute vectors, and a small MLP acts as a relation-conditioned selector that extracts the relevant attribute via ReLU gating, and not as an associative key-value mapping. We extend these results to the multi-hop setting -- chains of relational queries such as ``Who is the mother of the wife of $x$?'' -- providing constructions with and without chain-of-thought that exhibit a provable capacity-depth tradeoff, complemented by a matching information-theoretic lower bound. Empirically, gradient descent discovers solutions with precisely the predicted structure. Once trained, the MLP transfers zero-shot to entirely new bijections when subject embeddings are appropriately re-initialized, revealing that it has learned a generic selection mechanism rather than memorized any particular set of facts.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上和实证上证明，Transformer模型可以通过几何空间中的线性叠加方式记忆事实关联，而非传统的键值记忆模式；其中MLP充当关系条件选择器，且在对数嵌入维度下即可实现记忆，并揭示了容量-深度权衡。
AI.motivation: 挑战Transformer语言模型记忆事实关联的传统观点（即权重矩阵作为键值对联想记忆，参数与事实数量呈线性关系），提出并证明一种更高效的几何记忆机制。
AI.method: 在单层Transformer记忆随机双射（subject到共享属性集）的受控实验中，理论证明对数嵌入维度足够；通过数学构造证明MLP作为ReLU门控选择器而非键值映射；扩展到多跳推理场景并给出理论下界；通过实验验证梯度下降能发现该结构，并展示零样本迁移能力。
AI.result: 证明了对数嵌入维度即可记忆事实关联；MLP学习到的是通用选择机制而非具体事实；揭示了多跳推理中的容量-深度权衡。
AI.conclusion: Transformer的记忆机制可以是几何的而非联想式的，MLP充当关系条件化的选择器，这为理解LLM的泛化和压缩性质提供了新视角。

title: On the Limitations of Large Language Models for Conceptual Database Modeling
summary: This article analyzes the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as support for the conceptual modeling of relational databases through the automatic generation of Entity-Relationship (ER) diagrams from natural language requirements. The approach combines different language models with prompt engineering techniques to evaluate their ability to identify entities, relationships, and attributes in a conceptually consistent manner. The experimental evaluation involved three LLMs, each subjected to three prompting techniques (Zero-Shot, Chain of Thought, and Chain of Thought + Verifier), applied to the same requirements scenario with progressively increasing complexity. The generated diagrams were qualitatively analyzed through direct comparison with the textual requirements, considering the structural and semantic adherence of the modeled elements. The results indicate that, although LLMs show reasonable performance in less complex scenarios, their reliability decreases as the complexity of the requirements increases, with a rise in inconsistencies, ambiguities, and failures in representing constraints. These findings reinforce that, in their current state, LLMs are not sufficiently mature for reliable use in complex scenarios, and the cost of validation may offset the apparent productivity gains.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用LLM从自然语言需求自动生成ER图（概念建模），评估了三种LLM在三种提示策略下的表现。结果显示，LLM在简单场景下表现尚可，但随着需求复杂度增加，其可靠性显著下降，产生大量不一致、歧义和约束表示失败问题。
AI.motivation: 探索LLM能否辅助关系数据库的概念建模（即从自然语言自动生成ER图），以提升数据库设计效率。
AI.method: 选取三种LLM，分别使用Zero-Shot、Chain of Thought、Chain of Thought + Verifier三种提示技术，在同一需求场景（复杂度递增）下生成ER图，并与文本需求进行定性的结构/语义对比分析。
AI.result: ① 低复杂度场景下LLM表现合理；② 随着需求复杂度增加，模型可靠性下降，出现更多不一致、歧义和约束表示失败；③ 验证成本可能抵消生产力提升的收益。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在复杂场景下尚不够成熟可靠，不能独立用于实际的概念建模任务。

title: Gradient-Free Noise Optimization for Reward Alignment in Generative Models
summary: Existing reward alignment methods for diffusion and flow models rely on multi-step stochastic trajectories, making them difficult to extend to deterministic generators. A natural alternative is noise-space optimization, but existing approaches require backpropagation through the generator and reward pipeline, limiting applicability to differentiable settings. To address this, here we present ZeNO (Zeroth-order Noise Optimization), a gradient-free framework that formulates noise optimization as a path-integral control problem, estimable from zeroth-order reward evaluations alone. When instantiated with an Ornstein--Uhlenbeck reference process, the update connects to Langevin dynamics implicitly targeting a reward-tilted distribution. ZeNO enables effective inference-time scaling and demonstrates strong performance across diverse generators and reward functions, including a protein structure generation task where backpropagation is infeasible.

AI.tldr: ZeNO是一种零阶噪声优化框架，通过将噪声优化建模为路径积分控制问题，仅利用奖励评估即可对齐扩散/流模型，无需反向传播，适用于蛋白质结构生成等不可微分场景。
AI.motivation: 现有奖励对齐方法依赖多步随机轨迹，难以扩展到确定性生成器；噪声空间优化虽自然但需反向传播，限制了其在不可微分场景的应用。本文旨在提出一种无需梯度的通用框架。
AI.method: 将噪声优化形式化为路径积分控制问题，利用零阶（仅奖励值）估计；实例化时采用Ornstein-Uhlenbeck参考过程，其更新隐式关联到Langevin动力学，目标分布偏向高奖励区域。
AI.result: 在多种生成器和奖励函数上实现有效的推理时扩展，并在反向传播不可行的蛋白质结构生成任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ZeNO提供了一种无梯度的替代方案，扩展了奖励对齐方法的适用边界，特别是在非可微生成器和任务中。

title: Urban Risk-Aware Navigation via VQA-Based Event Maps for People with Low Vision
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, submitted to IEEE T-ITS
summary: Visual impairment affects hundreds of millions of people worldwide, severely limiting their ability to navigate urban environments safely and independently. While wearable assistive devices offer a promising platform for real-time hazard detection, existing approaches rely on task-specific vision pipelines that lack flexibility and generalizability. In this work, we propose an event map framework based on visual question answering that leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for pedestrian scene description and hazard identification across diverse real-world environments, using a three-level hierarchical query structure to enable fine-grained scene understanding without task-specific retraining. Model responses are aggregated into a weighted risk scoring system that maps street segments into four discrete safety categories, producing navigable risk-aware event maps for route planning. To support evaluation and future research, we introduce a geographically diverse dataset spanning 20 cities across six continents, comprising over 800 annotated images and 18,000 answered questions. We benchmark four VQA architectures -ViLT, LLaVA, InstructBLIP, and Qwen-VL- and find that generative Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) substantially outperform classification-based approaches, with Qwen-VL achieving the best overall balance of precision and recall. These results demonstrate the viability of MLLMs as a flexible and generalizable foundation for assistive navigation systems for visually impaired people.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉问答的事件地图框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLMs）为视障人士实现无需任务特定重训练的实时场景描述与危险识别，并通过四层级安全评分系统生成可导航的风险感知地图。在覆盖六大洲20个城市的800+张图像和18,000个问答对的数据集上，Qwen-VL在精度与召回率上取得最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴辅助设备依赖任务特定的视觉管线，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力，难以应对多样化真实环境。需要一种更通用、可扩展的框架来帮助视障人士安全导航。
AI.method: 提出基于VQA的事件地图框架：1) 采用三级层级化查询结构实现细粒度场景理解，无需任务特定重训练；2) 通过加权风险评分系统将街道段映射为四个离散安全类别；3) 构建覆盖六大洲20个城市的多样化数据集；4) 评测ViLT、LLaVA、InstructBLIP、Qwen-VL四种VQA架构。
AI.result: 生成式多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）显著优于基于分类的方法，其中Qwen-VL在精度和召回率上取得最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs可作为视障辅助导航系统中灵活、通用的基础模型，验证了多模态大模型在该应用场景的可行性和优越性。

title: A Causal Language Modeling Detour Improves Encoder Continued Pretraining
summary: When adapting an encoder to a new domain, the standard approach is to continue training with Masked Language Modeling (MLM). We show that temporarily switching to Causal Language Modeling (CLM) followed by a short MLM decay improves downstream performance. On biomedical texts with ModernBERT, this CLM detour outperforms MLM baselines trained on identical data and compute across 8 French and 11 English biomedical tasks, by +1.2-2.8pp and +0.3-0.8pp respectively, depending on model size. We investigate the reasons for these gains. We find that CLM's dense supervision impacts low transformer layers (0-7) far more than MLM does. Freezing low layers during CLM eliminates the downstream benefit; freezing mid layers preserves it. The representational changes persist through the MLM decay phase, even when it matches the CLM phase in length, and they scale with model capacity. We release ModernCamemBERT-bio and ModernBERT-bio as state-of-the-art biomedical encoders in Base and Large sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在领域适配中，先使用因果语言模型（CLM）训练，再回归掩码语言模型（MLM）微调，能显著提升下游任务性能；分析了CLM的密集监督主要影响低层Transformer层，且这种表征变化在后续MLM阶段得以保留。
AI.motivation: 标准领域适配使用MLM继续训练，但作者发现这种方式可能不是最优的，希望通过引入CLM作为"绕路"来提升下游性能，并探究其背后的原因机制。
AI.method: 在领域适配过程中，先使用CLM训练一段时间，再切换回MLM进行短时间衰减训练。在ModernBERT架构上，使用生物医学文本进行实验，并在法语和英语的生物医学NLP任务上评估。通过冻结不同层来分析CLM对各层的影响机制。
AI.result: 该方法在8个法语和11个英语生物医学任务上，分别比纯MLM基线高出+1.2-2.8pp（Base）和+0.3-0.8pp（Large）。CLM的密集监督主要影响低层（0-7层）；冻结低层会消除收益，冻结中层则保留收益。表征变化在MLM衰减阶段得以保持，且收益随模型容量增大而提升。
AI.conclusion: CLM detour（先CLM后MLM）是一种简单有效的领域适配策略，尤其适用于编码器模型；其收益来源于CLM对低层Transformer层的更强监督，且这种影响具有持久性。释放了SOTA生物医学编码器ModernCamemBERT-bio和ModernBERT-bio。

title: Random-Set Graph Neural Networks
summary: Uncertainty quantification has become an important factor in understanding the data representations produced by Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Despite their predictive capabilities being ever useful across industrial workspaces, the inherent uncertainty induced by the nature of the data is a huge mitigating factor to GNN performance. While aleatoric uncertainty is the result of noisy and incomplete stochastic data such as missing edges or over-smoothing, epistemic uncertainty arises from lack of knowledge about a system or model (e.g., a graph's topology or node feature representation), which can be reduced by gathering more data and information. In this paper, we propose an original new framework in which node-level epistemic uncertainty is modelled in a belief function (finite random set) formalism. The resulting Random-Set Graph Neural Networks have a belief-function head predicting a random set over the list of classes, from which both a precise probability prediction and a measure of epistemic uncertainty can be obtained. Extensive experiments on 9 different graph learning datasets, including real-world autonomous driving benchmarks as such Nuscene and ROAD, demonstrate RS-GNN's superior uncertainty quantification capabilities

AI.tldr: 本文提出RS-GNN框架，利用信念函数（有限随机集）对图神经网络中的认知不确定性进行建模，在9个数据集上展现了优越的不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络在处理节点级预测时存在由数据噪声（偶然不确定性）和模型知识缺乏（认知不确定性）带来的不确定性，现有方法难以有效区分和量化这两种不确定性，影响GNN在工业场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出RS-GNN（随机集图神经网络），在GNN顶部添加信念函数头，将预测输出建模为类别标签集上的随机集，同时输出精确概率预测和认知不确定性度量。
AI.result: 在9个图学习数据集（包括NuScenes和ROAD等真实自动驾驶基准）上，RS-GNN在不确定性量化方面表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于信念函数的随机集建模能够有效捕捉图数据的节点级认知不确定性，提升GNN在关键应用中的可靠性。

title: gym-invmgmt: An Open Benchmarking Framework for Inventory Management Methods
summary: Inventory-policy comparisons are often difficult to interpret because performance depends on the evaluation contract as much as on the policy itself. Differences in topology, demand regime, information access, feasibility constraints, shortage treatment, and Key Performance Indicator (KPI) definitions can change method rankings. We present gym-invmgmt, a Gymnasium-compatible extension of the OR-Gym inventory-management lineage for auditable cross-paradigm evaluation. The benchmark evaluates optimization, heuristic, and learned controllers under a shared CoreEnv transition, reward, action-bound, and KPI contract, while varying stress conditions through a 22-scenario core grid plus four supplemental MARL-mode rows. Within these released scenarios, informed stochastic programming provides the strongest non-oracle reference, reflecting the value of scenario hedging under forecast access, but at substantially higher online computational cost. Among learned controllers, the Proximal Policy Optimization Transformer variant (PPO-Transformer) achieves the strongest learned-policy quality at fast inference, while Residual Reinforcement Learning (Residual RL) provides competitive hybrid performance. The graph neural network variant (PPO-GNN) is highly competitive on the default divergent topology but less robust on the serial topology. Imitation learning performs well in stationary regimes but degrades under demand shift, and the bounded Large Language Model (LLM) policy-parameter baseline is best interpreted as a diagnostic controller rather than an autonomous inventory optimizer. Overall, the benchmark identifies scenario-conditioned leaders while showing that performance depends jointly on information access, demand shift, topology, and policy representation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个可审计的跨范式库存管理基准测试平台gym-invmgmt，在统一评估合约下比较了优化、启发式和强化学习等多种控制方法，发现没有单一方法在所有条件下占优，表现依赖于信息获取、需求变化、拓扑结构和策略表示等因素。
AI.motivation: 现有的库存策略比较难以解释，因为评估合约本身（如拓扑结构、需求模式、信息获取等）对性能的影响不亚于策略本身，导致方法排名不可靠。需要一个统一的、可审计的评估框架来进行公平的跨范式比较。
AI.method: 基于OR-Gym的库存管理层，构建了一个Gymnasium兼容的基准测试平台gym-invmgmt。在统一的CoreEnv合约（包括转移、奖励、动作边界和KPI）下评估优化方法（随机规划）、启发式方法和学习型控制器（PPO-Transformer、PPO-GNN、残差强化学习、模仿学习、LLM基线），并通过22个场景核心网格加4个MARL场景来变化压力条件。
AI.result: 信息型随机规划提供最强的非预言参考但在线计算成本高；PPO-Transformer在快速推理下达到最强学习策略质量；残差强化学习提供有竞争力的混合性能；PPO-GNN在默认发散拓扑上极具竞争力但在序列拓扑上不够稳健；模仿学习在平稳场景表现好但在需求变化下退化；有界LLM策略参数基线更应被视为诊断控制器而非自主库存优化器。
AI.conclusion: 场景条件决定了领导者，性能取决于信息获取、需求变化、拓扑结构和策略表示的共同作用。该基准测试为跨范式库存管理比较提供了统一的可审计框架。

title: SB-BEVFusion: Enhancing the Robustness against Sensor Malfunction and Corruptions
summary: Multimodal sensor fusion has demonstrated remarkable performance improvements over unimodal approaches in 3D object detection for autonomous vehicles. Typically, existing methods transform multimodal data from independent sensors, such as camera and LiDAR, into a unified bird's-eye view (BEV) representation for fusion. Although effective in ideal conditions, this strategy suffers from substantial performance deterioration when camera or LiDAR data are missing, corrupted, or noisy. To address this vulnerability, we develop a framework-agnostic fusion module for camera and LiDAR data that allows for handling cases when one of the two modalities is missing or corrupted. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our module, we instantiate it in BEVFusion [1], a well-established framework to combine camera and LiDAR data for 3D object detection. By means of quantitative experiments on the MultiCorrupt dataset, we demonstrate that our module achieves favorable performance improvements under scenarios of missing and corrupted modalities, substantially outperforming existing unified representation approaches across a wide range of sensor deterioration scenarios and reaching state-of-the-art performance in scenarios of corrupted modality due to extreme weather conditions and sensor failure.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种框架无关的多模态融合模块，用于处理自动驾驶中相机和LiDAR数据缺失或损坏的情况，在BEVFusion框架上实例化后，在MultiCorrupt数据集上实现了对传感器退化场景的鲁棒性提升，达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有统一BEV表征的多模态融合方法在理想条件下有效，但在相机或LiDAR数据缺失、损坏或噪声干扰时性能显著下降，亟需提升融合方法对传感器退化的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 开发了一种框架无关的融合模块，可处理任一模态缺失或损坏的情况，并将其实例化到BEVFusion框架中。
AI.result: 在MultiCorrupt数据集上，该模块在缺失和损坏模态场景下取得显著性能提升，在极端天气和传感器故障导致的模态损坏场景中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提融合模块有效增强了多模态3D检测对传感器退化场景的鲁棒性，优于现有统一表征方法。

title: The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weaken as generative systems improve. We instead adopt a Computational Social Science perspective and ask whether synthetic political discourse behaves like an observed online population. We construct a paired corpus of 1,789,406 posts across nine crisis events: COVID-19, the Jan. 6 Capitol attack, the 2020 and 2024 U.S. elections, Dobbs/Roe v. Wade, the 2020 BLM protests, U.S. midterms, the Utah shooting, and the U.S.-Iran war. For each event, we compare observed discourse from social platforms with synthetic discourse generated for the same context. We evaluate four dimensions: emotional intensity, structural regularity, lexical-ideological framing, and cross-event dependency, using mean gaps and dispersion evidence. Across events, synthetic discourse is fluent but population-level unrealistic. It is generally more negative and less dispersed in sentiment, structurally more regular, and lexically more abstract than observed discourse. Observed discourse instead shows broader emotional variation, longer-tailed structural distributions, and more context-specific, colloquial lexical markers. These differences are event-dependent: larger for fast-moving, decentralized crises and smaller for formal or institutionally mediated events. We summarize them with a simple event-level measure, the Caricature Gap. Our findings suggest that the main limitation of synthetic political discourse is not grammar or fluency, but reduced population realism. Population-level auditing complements traditional text-detection and provides a CSS framework for evaluating the social realism of generated discourse.

AI.tldr: 论文提出从计算社会科学视角检测AI生成的政治文本，通过对比9个危机事件中178万条真实与合成社交媒体帖子，发现合成文本在情感、结构、词汇等群体层面特征上缺乏"人口真实性"（population realism），并提出了"漫画差距"（Caricature Gap）指标来量化这种差异。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测方法多关注句子层面的困惑度、突发性等线索，但随着大模型能力提升，这些信号逐渐减弱。作者希望从群体层面（population-level）出发，探究合成政治话语是否在行为特征上与真实在线人群一致。
AI.method: 构建涵盖9个危机事件的配对语料库（178万条帖子），从情感强度、结构规律性、词汇-意识形态框架、跨事件依赖性四个维度，通过均值差距和离散度证据对比真实与合成话语。
AI.result: 合成话语虽流畅但群体层面不真实：情感更负面且离散度更低、结构更规律、词汇更抽象。差异大小与事件类型相关：快速演变的去中心化危机差异更大，正式制度化事件差异较小。提出了"漫画差距"（Caricature Gap）作为事件级度量指标。
AI.conclusion: 合成政治话语的主要局限不在于语法或流畅度，而在于缺乏群体真实性。群体层面的审计方法可以补充传统文本检测，为评估生成文本的社会真实性提供计算社会科学框架。

title: BadSKP: Backdoor Attacks on Knowledge Graph-Enhanced LLMs with Soft Prompts
summary: Recent knowledge graph (KG)-enhanced large language models (LLMs) move beyond purely textual knowledge augmentation by encoding retrieved subgraphs into continuous soft prompts via graph neural networks, introducing a graph-conditioned channel that operates alongside the standard text interface. However, existing backdoor attacks are largely designed for the textual channel, and their effectiveness against this dual-channel architecture remains unclear. We show that this architecture creates a robustness gap: text-channel backdoor attacks that readily compromise textual KG prompting systems become largely ineffective against soft-prompt-based counterparts. We interpret this gap through semantic anchoring, whereby graph-derived soft prompts bias the generation-driving hidden state toward query-consistent semantics and suppress surface-level malicious instructions. Because this anchoring effect is itself induced by the graph channel, an attacker who manipulates graph-level representations can in turn redirect it toward adversarial semantics. To demonstrate this risk, we propose BadSKP, a backdoor attack that targets the graph-to-prompt interface through a multi-stage optimization strategy: it constructs adversarial target embeddings, optimizes poisoned node embeddings to steer the induced soft prompt, and approximates the optimized representations with fluent adversarial node attributes. Experiments on two soft-prompt KG-enhanced LLMs across four datasets show that BadSKP achieves high attack success under both frozen and trojaned settings, while text-only attacks remain unreliable even under perplexity-based defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文发现图增强LLM的双通道架构（文本+图软提示）对文本后门攻击具有天然鲁棒性，但提出了一种通过操纵图嵌入实现的高效后门攻击方法BadSKP。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击主要针对文本通道，但对新兴的图增强LLM双通道架构（文本+图软提示）的有效性尚不清楚，作者旨在揭示该架构的鲁棒性漏洞并提出针对性攻击。
AI.method: 提出BadSKP多阶段优化攻击：1) 构造对抗目标嵌入；2) 优化中毒节点嵌入以诱导软提示；3) 用流畅的对抗节点属性近似优化后的表示。
AI.result: 在2种软提示图增强LLM、4个数据集上，BadSKP在冻结和木马设置下均取得高攻击成功率，而纯文本攻击即使结合困惑度防御仍不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 图增强LLM的双通道架构虽然天然抵御文本后门攻击，但图通道本身成为新的攻击面，需针对性防御。

title: The tractability landscape of diffusion alignment: regularization, rewards, and computational primitives
summary: Inference-time reward alignment asks how to turn a pre-trained diffusion model with base law $p$ into a sampler that favors a reward $r$ while remaining close to $p$. Since there is no canonical distributional distance for this closeness constraint, different choices lead to different "reward-aligned" laws and, just as importantly, different algorithmic problems. We develop a primitive-based approach to reward alignment: rather than assuming arbitrary reward-aligned laws can be sampled, we ask which simple algorithmic primitives suffice to implement alignment for non-trivial reward classes. If closeness is measured in KL distance, the target law is $q(x) \propto p(x) \exp(λ^{-1}r(x))$. For this setting, we show that linear exponential tilts of the form $q(x)\propto p(x)\exp(\langle θ, x \rangle)$ -- which according to recent work [MRR26] can be efficiently sampled from -- are a sufficient primitive for aligning to a very broad class of convex low-dimensional rewards. If closeness is measured in Wasserstein distance, the corresponding primitive is a proximal transport oracle: given $x$, solve $\mbox{argmax}_y \{r(y)- λc(x,y)\}$. This oracle can be efficiently implemented for concave or low-dimensional Lipschitz rewards $r(x)=f(Ax)$. Together, these results illustrate that the choice of distribution distance for alignment affects the computational primitive and the tractable reward class.

AI.tldr: 本文研究扩散模型在推理时进行奖励对齐的问题，提出基于原语的方法：若用KL散度衡量接近度，线性指数倾斜是充分原语；若用Wasserstein距离，近端传输oracle是相应原语。不同距离度量导致不同计算原语和可处理奖励类别。
AI.motivation: 推理时奖励对齐需要让扩散模型在保持与基础分布接近的同时偏向高奖励，但缺乏规范的分布距离定义。不同距离选择导致不同的奖励对齐分布和算法问题，亟需系统化的原语方法。
AI.method: 提出基于原语的奖励对齐框架：1) KL距离下，目标分布为指数倾斜形式，利用线性指数倾斜作为原语可对齐广泛凸低维奖励；2) Wasserstein距离下，近端传输oracle作为原语，可高效处理凹或低维Lipschitz奖励。
AI.result: KL距离下线性指数倾斜原语可处理凸低维奖励类；Wasserstein距离下近端传输oracle可处理凹或低维Lipschitz奖励类。不同距离选择影响计算原语和可处理奖励类别。
AI.conclusion: 分布距离的选择决定了奖励对齐所需的计算原语和可处理的奖励类别，为扩散模型推理时对齐提供了系统性指导。

title: OTT-Vid: Optimal Transport Temporal Token Compression for Video Large Language Models
summary: As Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) scale to longer and more complex videos, their inference cost grows rapidly due to the large volume of visual tokens accumulated across frames. Training-free token compression has emerged as a practical solution to this bottleneck. However, existing temporal compression methods rely primarily on cross-frame token similarity or segmentation heuristics, overlooking each token's semantic role within its frame and failing to adapt compression strength to the compressibility of each frame pair. In this work, we propose OTT-Vid, a transport-derived allocation framework for temporal token compression. Our approach consists of two stages: spatial pruning identifies representative content within each frame, and optimal transport (OT) is then solved between neighboring frames to estimate temporal compressibility. We formulate this OT with non-uniform token mass, which protects semantically important tokens from aggressive compression, and a locality-aware cost that captures both feature and spatial disparities. The resulting transport plan jointly balances token importance and matching cost, while its total cost defines the transport difficulty of each frame pair, which we use to allocate compression budgets dynamically. Experiments on six benchmarks spanning video question answering and temporal grounding show that OTT-Vid preserves 95.8% of VQA and 73.9% of VTG performance while retaining only 10% of tokens, consistently outperforming existing state-of-the-art training-free compression methods.

AI.tldr: OTT-Vid提出了一种基于最优传输的训练时无需训练的时序令牌压缩方法，通过空间剪枝和最优输运分配压缩预算，在保留仅10%令牌的情况下，在视频问答和时序定位任务上分别保持95.8%和73.9%的性能，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 视频大模型在处理长视频时，视觉令牌数量激增导致推理成本高昂。现有训练时无需训练的令牌压缩方法仅基于跨帧令牌相似度或分割启发式，忽略了每个令牌在其帧内的语义角色，且无法自适应调整压缩强度，因此需要更精细的压缩框架。
AI.method: 两阶段压缩框架：(1) 空间剪枝，识别每帧内代表性内容；(2) 利用最优传输（Optimal Transport）估计相邻帧间的时序可压缩性。创新点包括：非均匀令牌质量分配保护重要语义令牌、局部感知代价函数结合特征和空间差异、通过传输总成本动态分配压缩预算。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集上，仅保留10%令牌时，VQA性能保持95.8%，VTG性能保持73.9%，一致优于现有的训练时无需压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于最优传输的令牌分配框架能够更好地权衡令牌重要性和匹配代价，实现自适应、语义感知的视频令牌压缩，有效降低推理成本。

title: Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
summary: We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of documents, enabling embeddings to adapt in real time to the target task. We conduct extensive experiments with state-of-the-art text embedding models across a diverse set of challenging search and classification benchmarks. Empirical results indicate that LLM-guided query refinement yields consistent gains across all models and datasets, with relative improvements of up to +25% in literature search, intent detection, key-point matching, and nuanced query-instruction following. The refined queries improve ranking quality and induce clearer binary separation across the corpus, enabling the embedding space to better reflect the nuanced, task-specific constraints of each ad-hoc user query. Importantly, this expands the range of practical settings in which embedding models can be effectively deployed, making them a compelling alternative when costly LLM pipelines are not viable at corpus-scale. We release our experimental code for reproducibility, at https://github.com/IBM/task-aware-embedding-refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种LLM引导的查询精炼范式，通过利用生成式LLM对少量文档的反馈来改进嵌入模型的查询表示，在零样本搜索和分类任务上取得了显著提升（最高+25%），使嵌入模型在无法大规模部署LLM的场景中成为有竞争力的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 嵌入模型在零样本搜索和分类任务中性能有限，而大规模LLM管线的推理成本过高。作者希望结合两者的优势，通过LLM的少量反馈来优化嵌入表示，在不引入大规模LLM推理负担的前提下提升嵌入模型的性能。
AI.method: 提出LLM-guided query refinement范式：在少量文档上利用生成式LLM的反馈信息，动态优化（精炼）用户查询的嵌入表示，使嵌入空间能够实时适应目标任务的特定约束。
AI.result: 在文献搜索、意图检测、关键点匹配和细粒度指令跟踪等多个基准测试上，该方法在所有测试的嵌入模型和数据集上均取得一致改进，相对提升最高达+25%。精炼后的查询不仅提升了排序质量，还在语料库中形成了更清晰的二分类边界。
AI.conclusion: LLM引导的查询精炼范式有效扩展了嵌入模型在零样本场景中的可用性，使其在无法大规模部署LLM的实际场景中成为有吸引力的替代方案。代码已开源。

title: LegalCheck: Retrieval- and Context-Augmented Generation for Drafting Municipal Legal Advice Letters
comment: Accepted at ICAIL 2026 as Short Paper
summary: Public-sector legal departments in the Netherlands face acute staff shortages, increased case volumes, and increased pressure to meet regulatory compliance. This paper presents LegalCheck, a novel system that addresses these challenges by automating the drafting of objection response letters through a combination of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Context-Augmented Generation (CAG). Using a large language model (LLM) alongside curated legal knowledge bases, LegalCheck performs retrieval of relevant laws and precedents, and uses controlled prompting to incorporate both external knowledge and case-specific details into a coherent draft. An expert-in-the-loop review ensures that each generated letter is legally sound and contextually appropriate. In a real-world deployment within the Municipality of Amsterdam, LegalCheck produced near-final advice letters in minutes rather than hours, while maintaining high legal consistency and factual accuracy. The output is based on actual regulations and prior cases, providing explainable outputs that captured the vast majority of required legal reasoning (often 80\% to 100\% of essential content). Legal professionals found that the system reduced their workload and ensured a consistent application of legal standards, without replacing human judgment. These results demonstrate substantial efficiency gains, improved legal consistency, and positive user acceptance. More broadly, this work illustrates how responsible AI can be deployed in the legal domain by augmenting LLMs with domain knowledge and governance mechanisms.

AI.tldr: LegalCheck是一个结合RAG和CAG的自动化系统，用于荷兰公共法律部门起草异议回复信。在阿姆斯特丹市政厅的实际部署中，将起草时间从数小时缩短至数分钟，保持了较高的法律一致性和事实准确性（覆盖80%-100%的必要法律推理），且被法律专业人员广泛接受。
AI.motivation: 荷兰公共法律部门面临人员短缺、案件量增加和监管合规压力，急需自动化工具来提升效率，同时确保法律文本的准确性和一致性。
AI.method: 系统结合检索增强生成（RAG）和上下文增强生成（CAG），使用LLM配合 curated 法律知识库检索相关法律和先例，通过受控提示将外部知识和案件细节整合到草稿中，并引入专家在环审查机制确保法律合理性和上下文适当性。
AI.result: 在实际部署中，起草时间从小时级降至分钟级，输出覆盖80%-100%的必要法律推理内容，法律专业人员认为系统减少了工作负担并确保法律标准的统一应用。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了如何通过将LLM与领域知识和治理机制相结合，在法律领域负责任地部署AI，实现显著的效率提升和用户正面接受，同时不取代人类判断。

title: Causal Fairness for Survival Analysis
summary: In the data-driven era, large-scale datasets are routinely collected and analyzed using machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) to inform decisions in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, employment, and criminal justice, raising concerns about the fairness behavior of these systems. Existing works in fair ML cover tasks such as bias detection, fair prediction, and fair decision-making, but largely focus on static settings. At the same time, fairness in temporal contexts, particularly survival/time-to-event (TTE) analysis, remains relatively underexplored, with current approaches to fair survival analysis adopting statistical fairness definitions, which, even with unlimited data, cannot disentangle the causal mechanisms that generate disparities. To address this gap, we develop a causal framework for fairness in TTE analysis, enabling the decomposition of disparities in survival into contributions from direct, indirect, and spurious pathways. This provides a human-understandable explanation of why disparities arise and how they evolve over time. Our non-parametric approach proceeds in four steps: (1) formalizing the necessary assumptions about censoring and lack of confounding using a graphical model; (2) recovering the conditional survival function given covariates; (3) applying the Causal Reduction Theorem to reframe the problem in a form amenable to causal pathway decomposition; (4) estimating the effects efficiently. Finally, our approach is used to analyze the temporal evolution of racial disparities in outcome after admission to an intensive care unit (ICU).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对生存/时间事件分析中公平性的因果框架，能够将生存差异分解为直接、间接和虚假路径的贡献，从而解释不公平现象的产生原因及其随时间演变的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有的公平机器学习研究主要关注静态设置，而生存/时间事件分析中的公平性问题尚未得到充分探索。传统统计公平性定义（即使拥有无限数据）也无法解耦产生差异的因果机制。
AI.method: 采用非参数方法，分四步进行：(1) 通过图模型形式化审查和混杂缺失的必要假设；(2) 恢复给定协变量下的条件生存函数；(3) 应用因果约简定理，将问题转化为适用于因果路径分解的形式；(4) 高效估计因果效应。
AI.result: 该方法可量化直接、间接和虚假路径对生存差异的贡献，揭示不公平随时间演变的规律，并在ICU入院后种族差异分析中展示了其应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文为生存分析中的公平性提供了因果解释框架，超越了传统的统计公平性定义，有望推动高 stakes 领域（如医疗）中更深层次的公平性理解和干预。

title: Mitigating Action-Relation Hallucinations in LVLMs via Relation-aware Visual Enhancement
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on diverse vision-language tasks. However, LVLMs still suffer from hallucinations, generating text that contradicts the visual input. Existing research has primarily focused on mitigating object hallucinations, but often overlooks more complex relation hallucinations, particularly action relations involving interactions between objects. In this study, we empirically observe that the primary cause of action-relation hallucinations in LVLMs is the insufficient attention allocated to visual information. Thus, we propose a framework to locate action-relevant image regions and enhance the LVLM's attention to those regions. Specifically, we define the Action-Relation Sensitivity (ARS) score to identify attention heads that are most sensitive to action-relation changes, thereby localizing action-relevant image regions that contain key visual cues. Then, we propose the Relation-aware Visual Enhancement (RVE) method to enhance the LVLM's attention to these action-relevant image regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, compared to existing baselines, our method achieves superior performance in mitigating action-relation hallucinations with negligible additional inference cost. Furthermore, it effectively generalizes to spatial-relation hallucinations and object hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LVLM中动作关系幻觉的主要原因是视觉注意力不足，提出通过ARS分数定位对动作关系敏感的注意力头及相应图像区域，再用RVE方法增强对这些区域的注意力，有效缓解幻觉且计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM幻觉缓解研究主要关注物体级幻觉，忽略了更复杂的动作关系幻觉（如物体间交互），本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1) 定义Action-Relation Sensitivity (ARS)分数，识别对动作关系变化最敏感的注意力头，定位关键视觉区域；2) 提出Relation-aware Visual Enhancement (RVE)方法，增强LVLM对这些动作相关图像区域的注意力。
AI.result: 相比现有基线，该方法在缓解动作关系幻觉上表现更优，且额外推理成本可忽略；同时能泛化到空间关系幻觉和物体幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 视觉注意力不足是动作关系幻觉的主要原因，通过定位关键区域并增强注意力可有效缓解各类幻觉。

title: LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
summary: Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task success, leaving open how to directly evaluate whether memory systems effectively internalize environment-specific experience. To address this gap, we introduce LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2), a benchmark for evaluating whether memory systems can help agents acquire the experience needed to become knowledgeable colleagues in customized environments. LME-V2 contains 451 manually curated questions covering five core memory abilities for web agents: static state recall, dynamic state tracking, workflow knowledge, environment gotchas, and premise awareness. Questions are paired with history trajectories containing up to 500 trajectories and 115M tokens. We use a context gathering formulation: memory systems consume history trajectories and return compact evidence for downstream question answering. We propose a suite of two memory methods: AgentRunbook-R, an efficient RAG-based memory with knowledge pools for raw state observations, events, and strategy notes, and AgentRunbook-C, which stores trajectories as files and invokes a coding agent to gather evidence in an augmented sandbox. Experiments show that AgentRunbook-C achieves the best performance with 72.5% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest RAG baseline (48.5%) and the off-the-shelf coding agent baseline (69.3%). Despite the strong performance gains, coding agent based methods have high latency costs. While AgentRunbook-C advances the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier, substantial room for improvement remains. Together, these results establish LME-V2 as a challenging testbed for developing long-term memory systems for environment experience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2)，一个用于评估Web智能体长期记忆系统是否能有效内化环境经验的基准测试，包含451个手工问题，覆盖五种核心记忆能力。同时提出了两种记忆方法AgentRunbook-R（基于RAG）和AgentRunbook-C（基于编码智能体），实验表明AgentRunbook-C达到72.5%准确率，但存在高延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆基准大多关注用户历史、短轨迹或下游任务成功率，缺乏直接评估记忆系统是否能内化特定环境经验的测试方法。
AI.method: 构建了LME-V2基准（451个问题，五种核心能力），提出AgentRunbook-R（RAG+知识池）和AgentRunbook-C（编码智能体+增强沙箱）两种记忆方法。
AI.result: AgentRunbook-C达到72.5%平均准确率，优于最强RAG基线（48.5%）和现成编码智能体基线（69.3%），但延迟成本较高。
AI.conclusion: LME-V2是评估长期记忆系统的挑战性测试平台，AgentRunbook-C推进了准确率-延迟帕累托前沿，但仍有较大改进空间。

title: LLMs and the ZPD
comment: Short paper submitted to Interspeech 2026 (Desk Reject) 4 pages, plus references. 2 figures
summary: One hundred years ago Vygotsky and his circle were exploring the nature of consciousness and defining what would become psychology in the Soviet Union.
