To address this, we propose Hierarchical-Cluster SOINN (HC-SOINN), a novel classifier that captures the topological structure of these manifolds via a ``local-to-global'' representation. Furthermore, we introduce Structure-Topology Alignment via Residuals (STAR) method, which employs a fine-grained pointwise trajectory tracking mechanism to actively deform the learned topology, allowing it to adapt precisely to complex non-linear feature drift. Theoretical analysis and Procrustes distance experiments validate our framework's resilience to manifold deformations. We integrated HC-SOINN into seven state-of-the-art methods by replacing their original classifiers, achieving consistent improvements that highlight the effectiveness and robustness of our approach. Code is available at https://github.com/yhyet/HC_SOINN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HC-SOINN分类器（基于层次聚类SOINN）和STAR方法（结构-拓扑对齐），用于解决类增量学习（CIL）中传统最近类均值（NCM）分类器在特征流形未完全坍塌时的次优问题，通过捕捉和适应特征拓扑结构提升CIL性能。
AI.motivation: 类增量学习中，NCM分类器虽抗遗忘但假设特征坍缩为单点，实际中特征漂移导致类呈复杂流形分布，NCM分类器因此次优。
AI.method: 提出HC-SOINN分类器，通过"局部到全局"方式捕获特征流形的拓扑结构；提出STAR方法，利用细粒度逐点轨迹追踪机制主动变形已学拓扑，适应非线性特征漂移。
AI.result: 将HC-SOINN集成到7种SOTA方法中，替换原分类器后均取得一致性提升，理论分析和Procrustes距离实验验证了框架对流形变形的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HC-SOINN分类器能有效处理CIL中非线性特征漂移导致的流形变形问题，显著提升现有方法的性能。

title: Do Enterprise Systems Need Learned World Models? The Importance of Context to Infer Dynamics
summary: World models enable agents to anticipate the effects of their actions by internalizing environment dynamics. In enterprise systems, however, these dynamics are often defined by tenant-specific business logic that varies across deployments and evolves over time, making models trained on historical transitions brittle under deployment shift. We ask a question the world-models literature has not addressed: when the rules can be read at inference time, does an agent still need to learn them? We argue, and demonstrate empirically, that in settings where transition dynamics are configurable and readable, runtime discovery complements offline training by grounding predictions in the active system instance. We propose enterprise discovery agents, which recover relevant transition dynamics at runtime by reading the system's configuration rather than relying solely on internalized representations. We introduce CascadeBench, a reasoning-focused benchmark for enterprise cascade prediction that adopts the evaluation methodology of World of Workflows on diverse synthetic environments, and use it together with deployment-shift evaluation to show that offline-trained world models can perform well in-distribution but degrade as dynamics change, whereas discovery-based agents are more robust under shift by grounding their predictions in the current instance. Our findings suggest that, in configurable enterprise environments, agents should not rely solely on fixed internalized dynamics, but should incorporate mechanisms for discovering relevant transition logic at runtime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在企业系统中，当环境动态可通过配置读取时，智能体应通过运行时发现（读取系统配置）而非仅依赖离线训练的世界模型来预测状态转移。作者构建了CascadeBench基准并验证了发现型智能体在部署偏移下比纯离线模型更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 企业系统的动态规则因租户而异且持续演化，离线训练的世界模型在部署偏移下表现脆弱。现有世界模型文献未考虑"规则可在推理时读取"这一场景，因此需要探索是否仍需学习这些规则。
AI.method: 提出企业发现型智能体（Enterprise Discovery Agents），在运行时通过读取系统配置恢复相关转移动态，而非仅依赖内部化表征。构建CascadeBench基准（基于World of Workflows评估方法）进行分布内和部署偏移下的对比实验。
AI.result: 离线世界模型在分布内表现良好，但动态变化时性能下降；发现型智能体通过将预测基于当前实例，在部署偏移下更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 在可配置的企业环境中，智能体不应仅依赖固定的内部化动态，而应结合机制在运行时发现相关转移逻辑。

title: Deep Minds and Shallow Probes
summary: Neural representations are not unique objects. Even when two systems realize the same downstream computation, their hidden coordinates may differ by reparameterization. A probe family intended to reveal structure already present in a representation should therefore be stable under the relevant representation symmetries rather than be tied to a particular basis. We study this group action in the tractable exact setting of the final readout layer, where equivalent realizations induce affine changes of hidden coordinates. The resulting symmetry principle singles out a unique hierarchy of shallow coordinate-stable probes, with linear probes as its degree-1 member. We also show that a natural object for cross-model probe transfer is a shared probe-visible quotient--the representation modulo directions invisible to the probe family--rather than the full hidden state. Experiments on synthetic and real-world tasks support both predictions, showing where degree-2 probes help beyond linear ones and how quotient-based transfer enables coverage-aware monitor portability across model families. These results point toward a broader geometric representation theory of neural probing, with coverage-aware monitor transfer as a concrete operational consequence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经表示中的对称性问题，提出探针族应对表示的重参数化变换保持稳定，并推导出一类坐标稳定的浅层探针层次结构（线性探针为度1成员）。进一步提出跨模型探针迁移应基于"探针可见商空间"而非完整隐状态，实验验证了度2探针的优势和基于商空间的迁移方法。
AI.motivation: 神经表示不是唯一的——即使两个系统实现相同的下游计算，其隐藏坐标可能因重参数化而不同。现有探针方法往往绑定到特定基，缺乏对表示对称性的鲁棒性，这阻碍了探针在不同模型间的迁移和可解释性分析。
AI.method: 研究了最终读出层等价的精确设置，其中等价实现诱导隐藏坐标的仿射变换。基于对称性原理，推导出一类坐标稳定的浅层探针层次结构（线性探针为其度1成员）。提出跨模型探针迁移应在"探针可见商空间"（表示模去探针族不可见的方向）上进行。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：(1) 度2探针在某些任务上优于线性探针；(2) 基于商空间的迁移方法能实现跨模型族的有覆盖感知的监控器迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该工作指向了神经探针的更广泛的几何表示理论，并将有覆盖感知的监控器迁移作为具体的操作化成果。

title: Vector Scaffolding: Inter-Scale Orchestration for Differentiable Image Vectorization
summary: Differentiable vector graphics have enabled powerful gradient-based optimization of vector primitives directly from raster images. However, existing frameworks formulate this as a flat optimization problem, forcing hundreds to thousands of randomly initialized curves to blindly compete for pixel-level error reduction. This disordered optimization leads to topology collapse, where macroscopic structures are distorted by internal high-frequency noise, resulting in a redundant and uneditable "polygon soup" that limits practical editability. To address this limitation, we propose Vector Scaffolding, a novel hierarchical optimization framework that shifts from flat pixel-matching to structured topological construction tailored for vector graphics. By identifying a key cause of topology collapse as the mathematical imbalance between area and boundary gradients, we introduce Interior Gradient Aggregation to stabilize the learning dynamics of multi-scale curve mixtures. Upon this stabilized landscape, we employ Progressive Stratification and Rapid Inflation Scheduling to progressively densify vector primitives with extremely high learning rates ($\times 50$). Experiments demonstrate that our approach accelerates optimization by $2.5\times$ while simultaneously improving PSNR by up to 1.4 dB over the previous state of the art.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Vector Scaffolding的分层优化框架，通过内部梯度聚合、渐进分层和快速膨胀调度等技术，解决了可微分矢量图形优化中的拓扑坍塌问题，在加速2.5倍的同时将PSNR提升最高1.4 dB。
AI.motivation: 现有的可微分矢量图形优化框架采用扁平化优化方式，导致大量随机初始化的曲线盲目竞争像素级误差，引起拓扑坍塌（宏观结构扭曲、内部高频噪声、生成冗余不可编辑的"多边形汤"），限制了实际可编辑性。
AI.method: 1) 识别拓扑坍塌的关键原因是面积梯度和边界梯度的数学不平衡；2) 提出内部梯度聚合（Interior Gradient Aggregation）来稳定多尺度曲线混合的学习动态；3) 采用渐进分层（Progressive Stratification）和快速膨胀调度（Rapid Inflation Scheduling）逐步稠密化矢量基元，支持极高学习率（×50倍）。
AI.result: 优化速度提升2.5倍，PSNR相比之前最先进方法提升最高1.4 dB。
AI.conclusion: 从扁平像素匹配转向结构化拓扑构建的分层优化框架，有效解决了可微分矢量图形优化中的拓扑坍塌问题，兼顾了优化效率和质量。

title: MolDeTox: Evaluating Language Model's Stepwise Fragment Editing for Molecular Detoxification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have recently shown promising capabilities in various scientific domain. In particular, these advances have opened new opportunities in drug discovery, where the ability to understand and modify molecular structures is critical for optimizing drug properties such as efficacy and toxicity. However, existing models and benchmarks often overlook toxicity-related challenges, focusing primarily on general property optimization without adequately addressing safety concerns. In addition, even existing toxicity repair benchmarks suffer from limited data diversity, low structural validity of generated molecules, and heavy reliance on proxy models for toxicity assessment. To address these limitations, we propose MolDeTox, a novel benchmark for molecular detoxification, designed to enable fine-grained and reliable evaluation of toxicity-aware molecular optimization across stepwise tasks. We evaluate a wide range of general-purpose LLMs and VLMs under diverse settings, and demonstrate that understanding and generating molecules at the fragment-level improves structural validity and enhances the quality of generated molecules. Moreover, through detailed task-level performance analysis, MolDeTox provides an interpretable benchmark that enables a deeper understanding of the detoxification process. Our dataset is available at : https://huggingface.co/datasets/MolDeTox/MolDeTox

AI.tldr: 提出MolDeTox基准，用于分子解毒的细粒度评估，发现片段级分子理解与生成能提升结构有效性和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM/VLM在药物发现中忽视毒性挑战，且已有毒性修复基准存在数据多样性不足、生成分子结构有效性低、依赖代理模型评估等问题。
AI.method: 构建MolDeTox基准，涵盖逐步任务（stepwise tasks），支持片段级（fragment-level）分子理解和生成，评估多种通用LLM和VLM。
AI.result: 片段级的分子理解与生成能改善结构有效性和生成质量；MolDeTox提供可解释的细粒度任务级性能分析。
AI.conclusion: MolDeTox填补了分子解毒评估领域的空白，为毒性感知的分子优化提供了可靠、细粒度的基准。

title: Beyond Prediction: Interval Neural Networks for Uncertainty-Aware System Identification
summary: System identification (SysID) is critical for modeling dynamical systems from experimental data, yet traditional approaches often fail to capture nonlinear behaviors. While deep learning offers powerful tools for modeling such dynamics, incorporating uncertainty quantification is essential to ensure reliable predictions. This paper presents a systematic framework for constructing and training interval Neural Networks (INNs) for uncertainty-aware SysID. By extending crisp neural networks into interval counterparts, we develop Interval LSTM and NODE models that propagate uncertainty through interval arithmetic without probabilistic assumptions. This design allows them to represent uncertainty and produce prediction intervals. For training, we propose two strategies: Cascade INN (C-INN), a two-stage approach converting a trained crisp NN into an INN, and Joint INN (J-INN), a one-stage framework jointly optimizing prediction accuracy and interval precision. Both strategies employ uncertainty-aware loss functions and parameterization tricks to ensure reliable learning. Comprehensive experiments on multiple SysID datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of both approaches and benchmark their performance against well-established uncertainty-aware baselines: C-INN achieves superior point prediction accuracy, whereas J-INN yields more accurate and better-calibrated prediction intervals. Furthermore, to reveal how uncertainty is represented across model parameters, the concept of channel-wise elasticity is introduced, which is used to identify distinct patterns across the two training strategies. The results of this study demonstrate that the proposed framework effectively integrates deep learning with uncertainty-aware modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区间神经网络（INN）的系统辨识框架，通过区间LSTM和NODE模型进行不确定性量化，并设计了C-INN（两阶段）和J-INN（单阶段）两种训练策略，实验表明C-INN在点预测上更优，J-INN在校准区间上更优。
AI.motivation: 传统系统辨识方法难以捕捉非线性行为，而深度学习方法缺乏不确定性量化，导致预测不可靠。本文旨在将深度学习与不确定性量化有机结合，提出适用于系统辨识的区间神经网络框架。
AI.method: 将传统神经网络扩展为区间神经网络（INN），构建区间LSTM和区间NODE模型，通过区间算术传播不确定性。提出两种训练策略：C-INN（两阶段，先训练普通NN再转换为INN）和J-INN（单阶段，联合优化预测精度和区间精度），并引入通道弹性（channel-wise elasticity）分析参数级不确定性表示。
AI.result: 在多个系统辨识数据集上，C-INN在点预测精度上优于现有方法，J-INN在预测区间的准确性和校准性上表现更佳；通道弹性分析揭示了两类训练策略下不确定性表示的不同模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的INN框架有效融合了深度学习与不确定性感知建模，为系统辨识提供了灵活且可靠的解决方案，两种训练策略各有侧重，可根据实际需求选择。

title: RealDiffusion: Physics-informed Attention for Multi-character Storybook Generation
summary: While modern diffusion models excel at generating diverse single images, extending this to sequential generation reveals a fundamental challenge: balancing narrative dynamism with multi-character coherence. Existing methods often falter at this trade-off, leading to artifacts where characters lose their identity or the story stagnates. To resolve this critical tension, we introduce RealDiffusion, a unified framework designed to reconcile robust coherence with narrative dynamism. Heat diffusion serves as a dissipative prior that averages neighboring features along the sequence and removes high-frequency noise within the subject region. This suppresses attribute drift and stabilizes identity across frames. A region-aware stochastic process then introduces small perturbations that explore nearby modes and prevent collapse so the story maintains pose change and scene evolution. We thus introduce a lightweight, training-free Physics-informed Attention mechanism that injects controllable physical priors into the self-attention layers during inference. By modeling feature evolution as a configurable physical system, our method regularizes spatio-temporal relationships without suppressing intentional, prompt-driven changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RealDiffusion achieves substantial gains in character coherence while preserving narrative dynamism, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/ShmilyQi-CN/RealDiffusion.

AI.tldr: RealDiffusion 提出了一种轻量级、无需训练的物理启发注意力机制，通过热扩散先验和区域感知随机过程，在扩散模型的序列生成中平衡角色连贯性与叙事动态性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在序列生成中难以平衡叙事动态性和多角色连贯性，角色容易丢失身份或故事停滞不前。
AI.method: 1) 热扩散作为耗散先验，平均相邻帧特征并去除高频噪声以稳定身份；2) 区域感知随机过程引入小扰动，探索邻近模式防止崩溃；3) 物理启发的注意力机制（Physics-informed Attention）在推理时注入可控物理先验到自注意力层。
AI.result: 在角色连贯性和叙事动态性上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: RealDiffusion 有效解决了序列生成中连贯性与动态性的核心矛盾，且无需额外训练。

title: Goal-Oriented Reasoning for RAG-based Memory in Conversational Agentic LLM Systems
summary: LLM-based conversational AI agents struggle to maintain coherent behavior over long horizons due to limited context. While RAG-based approaches are increasingly adopted to overcome this limitation by storing interactions in external memory modules and performing retrieval from them, their effectiveness in answering challenging questions (e.g., multi-hop, commonsense) ultimately depends on the agent's ability to reason over the retrieved information. However, existing methods typically retrieve memory based on semantic similarity to the raw user utterance, which lacks explicit reasoning about missing intermediate facts and often returns evidence that is irrelevant or insufficient for grounded reasoning. In this work, we introduce Goal-Mem, a goal-oriented reasoning framework for RAG-based agentic memory that performs explicit backward chaining from the user's utterance as a goal. Rather than progressively expanding from retrieved context, Goal-Mem decomposes each goal into atomic subgoals, performs targeted memory retrieval to satisfy each subgoal, and iteratively identifies what information from memory should be retrieved when intermediate goals cannot be resolved. We formalize this process in Natural Language Logic, a logical system that combines the verifiability of reasoning provided by FOL with the expressivity of natural language. Through extensive experiments on two datasets and comparing to nine strong memory baselines, we show that Goal-Mem consistently improves performance, particularly on tasks requiring multi-hop reasoning and implicit inference.

AI.tldr: 提出Goal-Mem框架，通过目标导向的反向链式推理改进RAG记忆检索，将用户查询分解为原子子目标并逐步检索记忆，在自然语言逻辑框架下进行可验证推理，在多跳推理任务上表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG记忆代理基于语义相似度检索记忆，缺乏对缺失中间事实的显式推理，导致检索到的证据相关性不足，难以支持多跳和常识推理任务。
AI.method: 提出Goal-Mem框架：将用户查询作为目标，通过反向链式分解为原子子目标，对每个子目标进行针对性记忆检索，并在自然语言逻辑系统中形式化推理过程，结合一阶逻辑的可验证性与自然语言的表达力。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上与9种强基线对比，Goal-Mem在多跳推理和隐式推理任务上持续提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 目标导向的反向推理机制比基于语义相似度的检索更能有效支持复杂推理任务，自然语言逻辑框架为推理可验证性提供了保障。

title: Drop the Act: Probe-Filtered RL for Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Reasoning models post-hoc rationalize answers they have already committed to internally, producing chains of *reasoning theater*: deliberative-looking steps that contribute nothing to correctness. This wastes inference tokens, pollutes interpretability, and obscures what the model actually computed. We introduce **ProFIL** (**Pro**be-**Fil**tered Reinforcement Learning) to *reduce theater, increase chain-of-thought faithfulness, and shrink chain length* in a single, drop-in extension to Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). A multi-head attention probe is trained *once* on the *frozen* base model to detect post-commitment steps from internal activations alone; during GRPO, rollouts whose probe score exceeds a threshold have their advantage zeroed. *Our central finding is that a probe trained on a frozen base, with verifier-derived labels and no human annotation, provides a stable signal that suppresses theater while resisting the RL-obfuscation failure mode predicted by prior work.* Across four reasoning domains (GSM8K, LiveCodeBench, ToolUse, MMLU-Redux) and two model architectures (Llama-8B, Qwen-7B), ProFIL reduces post-commitment theater by **11--100%**, raises faithful-fraction (e.g., +24pp on LiveCodeBench under an independent Claude 3.7 Sonnet judge), and shortens chains by 4--19%, all while preserving or improving task accuracy. ProFIL also beats a matched length-penalty GRPO baseline, isolating the gain as semantic commitment-detection rather than chain compression. Probe weights, training configurations, and rollouts are released across all four domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ProFIL，通过在 GRPO 中引入基于冻结基座模型内部激活的多头注意力探针来检测并抑制推理模型的后承诺阶段（reasoning theater），从而减少冗长但无益的推理步骤，提升思维链忠实度并缩短链长，同时保持或提升任务准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有推理模型在生成链式思维时，常出现"推理剧场"现象——模型内部已确定答案后仍在生成看似深思熟虑但实际无用的步骤，浪费推理 token、污染可解释性、掩盖真实计算过程。需要一种方法自动检测并抑制这种行为。
AI.method: ProFIL 包含三个关键组件：(1) 在冻结基座模型上训练一个多头注意力探针，利用验证器标签（无人工标注）从内部激活中检测后承诺步骤；(2) 在 GRPO 强化学习训练中，对探针得分超过阈值的 rollout 将其 advantage 置零；(3) 探针仅训练一次，冻结使用，避免 RL 训练中的分布偏移导致的失效问题。
AI.result: 在 GSM8K、LiveCodeBench、ToolUse、MMLU-Redux 四个推理领域及 Llama-8B、Qwen-7B 两种架构上，ProFIL 将后承诺剧场减少 11-100%，忠实分数提升最高 24pp（LiveCodeBench），链长缩短 4-19%，且保持或提升任务准确率，优于等长惩罚的 GRPO 基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于冻结基座模型内部激活的探针能够提供稳定信号，有效抑制推理剧场现象，且能抵抗 RL 训练导致的分布偏移，是一种简单有效的推理链条优化方案。

title: Learn to Think: Improving Multimodal Reasoning through Vision-Aware Self-Improvement Training
summary: Post-training with explicit reasoning traces is common to improve the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, acquiring high-quality reasoning traces is often costly and time-consuming. Hence, the self-improvement paradigm has emerged, enabling MLLMs to self-generate reasoning traces for training without external supervision. Despite its effectiveness, we reveal two shortcomings in the self-improvement training of MLLMs: 1) data imbalance, where simple samples are over-trained, but the challenging yet crucial samples are under-trained; 2) language prior bias, where MLLMs overly rely on linguistic priors while neglecting the visual cues. To this end, we propose VISTA, a vision-aware self-improvement training framework for enhancing the multimodal reasoning of MLLMs. Specifically, VISTA first introduces a prefix resampling strategy to reuse the partial correct reasoning traces for efficient data collection, and then designs a vision-aware attention score to quantify the model's focus on visual information. Extensive experiments show that VISTA can be applied to various post-training scenarios, i.e., supervised fine-tuning and preference learning, and effectively enhances the multimodal reasoning performance across various MLLMs and tasks, e.g., bringing up to +13.66% average performance gains for Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct.

AI.tldr: VISTA是一个针对多模态大语言模型的视觉感知自改进训练框架，通过前缀重采样策略和视觉感知注意力分数，解决自改进训练中的数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题，在多种MLLM和任务上取得了显著提升（最高+13.66%）。
AI.motivation: 现有的MLLM自改进训练存在两个问题：1）数据不平衡——简单样本被过度训练而关键困难样本训练不足；2）语言先验偏差——模型过度依赖语言先验而忽视视觉线索。同时，高质量推理轨迹获取成本高，需要更高效的自改进方法。
AI.method: VISTA框架包含两个核心组件：1）前缀重采样策略（prefix resampling），重用部分正确的推理轨迹以实现高效数据收集；2）视觉感知注意力分数（vision-aware attention score），量化模型对视觉信息的关注程度，从而引导训练过程更注重视觉线索。
AI.result: VISTA可应用于监督微调和偏好学习等多种后训练场景，在多个MLLM和任务上有效提升多模态推理性能，例如为Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct带来最高+13.66%的平均性能提升。
AI.conclusion: VISTA通过解决数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题，为MLLM的多模态推理自改进训练提供了一种高效的框架，具有较强的通用性和实用性。

title: Can a Single Message Paralyze the AI Infrastructure? The Rise of AbO-DDoS Attacks through Targeted Mobius Injection
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have emerged as key intermediaries, orchestrating complex interactions between human users and a wide range of digital services and LLM infrastructures. While prior research has extensively examined the security of LLMs and agents in isolation, the systemic risk of the agent acting as a disruptive hub within the user-agent-service chain remains largely overlooked. In this work, we expose a novel threat paradigm by introducing Mobius Injection, a sophisticated attack that weaponizes autonomous agents into zombie nodes to launch what we define as gent-based and -Oriented DDoS (AbO-DDoS) attacks. By exploiting a structural vulnerability in agentic logic named Semantic Closure, an adversary can induce sustained recursive execution of agent components through a single textual injection. We demonstrate that this attack is exceptionally lightweight, stealthy against both traditional DDoS monitors and contemporary AI safety filters, and highly configurable, allowing for surgical targeting of specific environments or model providers. To evaluate the real-world impact, we conduct extensive experiments across three representative claw-style agents and three mainstream coding agents, integrated with 12 frontier proprietary or open-weight LLMs. Our results demonstrate that Mobius Injection achieves substantial attack success across diverse tasks, driving single-node call amplification up to 51.0x and multi-node p95 latency inflation up to 229.1x. The attack performance exhibits a superlinear increase with the number of poisoning nodes. To mitigate Mobius Injection, we propose a proactive defense mechanism using Agent Component Energy (ACE) Analysis, which detects malicious recursive triggers by measuring anomalous energy in the agent's component graph.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Mobius Injection 的新型攻击范式，利用代理逻辑中的结构漏洞（语义闭合）诱导智能体执行递归调用，从而发起针对服务端的分布式拒绝服务攻击（AbO-DDoS）。实验表明该方法具有轻量、隐蔽、高放大倍数（单节点51倍，延迟229倍）等特点，并提出了基于代理组件能量（ACE）的防御机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM和智能体的自身安全性，但忽略了智能体作为用户与服务之间中介枢纽时可能引发的系统性风险——即被攻击者武器化为"僵尸节点"，对下游服务发动大规模DDoS攻击。
AI.method: 1) 提出Semantic Closure概念，揭示代理逻辑中可被利用的递归执行漏洞；2) 设计Mobius Injection攻击，通过单次文本注入触发智能体组件持续递归调用；3) 提出ACE（Agent Component Energy）防御机制，通过检测组件图中的异常能量来识别恶意递归触发器。
AI.result: 在3种claw-style智能体和3种主流代码智能体上，集成12个前沿LLM进行实验。单节点调用放大倍数达51.0倍，多节点p95延迟膨胀达229.1倍，且攻击性能随中毒节点数量超线性增长。
AI.conclusion: Mobius Injection是一种轻量、隐蔽、可配置的新型攻击，对现有DDoS检测和AI安全过滤器均具有强规避能力。ACE防御机制可有效检测此类攻击。

title: No Action Without a NOD: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Architecture for Reliable Service Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have increasingly advanced service applications, such as booking flight tickets. However, these service agents suffer from unreliability in long-horizon tasks, as they often produce policy violations, tool hallucinations, and misaligned actions, which greatly impedes their real-world deployment. To address these challenges, we propose NOD (Navigator-Operator-Director), a heterogeneous multi-agent architecture for service agents. Instead of maintaining task state implicitly in dialogue context as in prior work, we externalize a structured Global State to enable explicit task state tracking and consistent decision-making by the Navigator. Besides, we introduce selective external oversight before critical actions, allowing an independent Director agent to verify execution and intervene when necessary. As such, NOD effectively mitigates error propagation and unsafe behavior in long-horizon tasks. Experiments on $τ^2$-Bench demonstrate that NOD achieves higher task success rates and critical action precision over baselines. More importantly, NOD improves the reliability of service agents by reducing policy violations, tool hallucinations, and user-intent misalignment.

AI.tldr: 提出NOD异构多智能体架构，通过显式化全局状态跟踪和选择性外部监督，提升LLM服务智能体在长周期任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: LLM服务智能体在长周期任务中不可靠，经常产生策略违规、工具幻觉和行动不对齐，阻碍实际部署。
AI.method: 提出Navigator-Operator-Director(NOD)异构多智能体架构：1) 外部化结构化全局状态，由Navigator显式跟踪任务状态；2) 引入选择性外部监督，Director在关键行动前独立验证并干预。
AI.result: 在τ²-Bench上，NOD相比基线取得了更高的任务成功率和关键行动精度，同时减少了策略违规、工具幻觉和意图不对齐。
AI.conclusion: NOD通过显式状态跟踪与选择性监督有效减轻了长周期任务中的错误传播和不安全行为，提升了服务智能体的可靠性。

title: Robust Multi-Agent Path Finding under Observation Attacks: A Principled Adversarial-Plus-Smoothing Training Recipe
summary: Decentralized multi-agent path finding (MAPF) routes a team of agents on a shared grid, each acting from its own local view. The standard solution trains one shared neural policy with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), a popular on-policy reinforcement learning algorithm. Such a policy works well on clean observations, but a small input perturbation on one agent often changes its action, which then blocks a neighbour, and the team jams. In this paper we present two training recipes that keep the same network and the same deployment loop, yet make the policy hold up under perturbed observations. The first recipe, Adv-PPO, trains the shared policy against worst-case perturbations of its own input and selects the checkpoint by performance under adversarial perturbation. The second recipe, Adv-PPO+MACER, fine-tunes that checkpoint with a small on-policy smoothness term whose gradient follows the certified radius of randomized smoothing. On POGEMA with 8x8 maps and four agents, the unprotected PPO policy reaches 95.8% clean success but only 2.5% under the strongest attack. Adv-PPO recovers worst-case success to 59.2% at one percentage point of clean cost. Adv-PPO+MACER recovers it to 77.5% +/- 6.0% across three independent seeds at less than one percentage point of clean cost. We support these numbers with per-attack curves, a certified action-stability sanity check (which measures the smoothed-policy wrapper, not the deployed argmax policy), and side-by-side rollout storyboards that show the failure mode and the fix inside one environment instance.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体路径规划（MAPF）中的对抗鲁棒性问题，提出两种训练方案（Adv-PPO和Adv-PPO+MACER），在不改变网络结构和部署流程的条件下，使策略在观测受到扰动时仍能保持稳定，实验将最坏情况下的任务成功率从2.5%提升至77.5%。
AI.motivation: 标准的PPO训练的多智能体路径规划策略在干净观测下表现良好，但输入的小扰动会改变单个智能体的动作，进而阻塞邻居，导致整个团队陷入僵局。现有方法缺乏针对观测扰动的鲁棒性保障。
AI.method: 1) Adv-PPO：对抗训练，在训练时对输入施加最坏情况扰动，并选择对抗性能最优的检查点；2) Adv-PPO+MACER：在Adv-PPO基础上增加基于随机平滑认证半径的on-policy平滑项进行微调，利用梯度引导策略变得更平滑。
AI.result: 在POGEMA的8x8地图、四智能体场景下，原始PPO干净成功率95.8%但最坏攻击下仅2.5%；Adv-PPO恢复至59.2%（干净代价1%）；Adv-PPO+MACER恢复至77.5%±6.0%（干净代价<1%）。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练结合随机平滑正则化能有效提升多智能体路径规划策略在观测扰动下的鲁棒性，且几乎不牺牲干净环境下的性能。

title: Interactive State Space Model with Cross-Modal Local Scanning for Depth Super-Resolution
summary: Guided depth super-resolution (GDSR) reconstructs HR depth maps from LR inputs with HR RGB guidance. Existing methods either model each modality independently or rely on computationally expensive attention mechanisms with quadratic complexity, hindering the establishment of efficient and semantically interactive joint representations. In this paper, we observe that feature maps from different modalities exhibit semantic-level correlations during feature extraction. This motivates us to develop a more flexible approach enabling dense, semantically-aware deep interactions between modalities. To this end, we propose a novel GDSR framework centered around the Interactive State Space Model. Specifically, we design a cross-modal local scanning mechanism that enables fine-grained semantic interactions between RGB and depth features. Leveraging the Mamba architecture, our framework achieves global modeling with linear complexity. Furthermore, a cross-modal matching transform module is introduced to enhance interactive modeling quality by utilizing representative features from both modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交互式状态空间模型（Mamba架构）的引导深度超分辨率框架，通过跨模态局部扫描机制实现RGB与深度特征的细粒度语义交互，并以线性复杂度完成全局建模，性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GDSR方法要么独立建模各模态，要么依赖二次复杂度的注意力机制，无法高效建立具有语义交互能力的联合表征。
AI.method: 提出以交互式状态空间模型（Mamba）为核心的GDSR框架，设计跨模态局部扫描机制实现RGB与深度特征的细粒度语义交互，并引入跨模态匹配变换模块增强交互建模质量。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在多个基准上取得了与SOTA竞争的优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于Mamba的线性复杂度跨模态交互策略有效兼顾了效率与语义交互质量，为GDSR提供了新范式。

title: Why Conclusions Diverge from the Same Observations: Formalizing World-Model Non-Identifiability via an Inference
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 1 table. Extended English version of a paper accepted for presentation at JSAI 2026
summary: When people share the same documents and observations yet reach different conclusions, the disagreement often shifts into a judgment that the other party is cognitively defective, irrational, or acting in bad faith. This paper argues that such divergence is better described as a form of non-identifiability inherent in inference and learning, rather than as a defect of the other party. We organize the phenomenon into two levels: (i) $θ$-level non-identifiability, where conclusions diverge under the same world model $W$ because inference settings differ; and (ii) $W$-level non-identifiability, where repeated use of an inference setting $θ$ biases data exposure and update rules, causing the learned world model $W$ itself to diverge. We introduce an inference profile $θ= (R, E, S, D)$, consisting of Reference, Exploration, Stabilization, and Horizon, and show how outputs can split even for the same observation $o$ and the same $W$. We further explain why disagreements tend to project onto a small number of bases -- abstract versus concrete, externalizability, and order versus freedom -- as a consequence of general constraints on learning systems: computational, observational, and coordination constraints. Finally, we relate the framework to deep representation learning, including representation hierarchy, latent-state estimation, and regularization-exploration trade-offs, and illustrate the framework through a case study on AI regulation debates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出，人们在共享相同数据和观察后得出不同结论的现象，本质上源于推理与学习过程中的非可辨识性（non-identifiability），而非对方的认知缺陷。作者将这种现象分为θ级（同一世界模型下因推理设置不同）和W级（推理设置的反复使用导致世界模型本身分化）两个层面，并引入推理框架θ=(R, E, S, D)加以形式化，最后将框架与深度表示学习、AI监管辩论等案例相联系。
AI.motivation: 旨在解释"同文档、不同结论"这一常见现象，将其从"对方非理性"的主观归因转向"系统固有的非可辨识性"的形式化分析，为理解人类分歧提供更客观的理论框架。
AI.method: 提出了两级非可辨识性框架（θ-level和W-level），定义了包含参考(Reference)、探索(Exploration)、稳定化(Stabilization)和视界(Horizon)四要素的推理框架θ，并分析分歧投影到少数基（抽象vs具体、可外部化、秩序vs自由）的原因是通过计算、观察和协调等通用约束推导得出。
AI.result: 成功形式化描述了分歧产生的机制，解释了分歧为何往往降维到少数几个基本维度（如抽象-具体、秩序-自由），并将框架应用于深度表示学习（表示层次、潜在状态估计、正则化-探索权衡）和AI监管辩论案例。
AI.conclusion: 分歧不应被视为认知缺陷，而是学习系统固有非可辨识性的表现；该框架有助于更理性地理解不同立场，并对AI安全、对齐和监管等领域的辩论提供理论支撑。

title: On the Approximation Complexity of Matrix Product Operator Born Machines
summary: Matrix product operator Born machines (MPO-BMs) are tractable tensor-network models for probabilistic modeling, but their efficient approximation capability remains unclear. We characterize this boundary from both negative and positive perspectives. First, we prove that KL approximation is NP-hard for MPO-BMs in the continuous setting, ruling out universal efficient approximation in the worst case. Second, for score-based variational inference, we show that, under a locality and spectral-gap conditions on the loss-induced Hamiltonian, structured targets (e.g., path-graph Markov random fields) admit MPO-BM approximations with polynomial bond dimension and provable KL guarantees. Third, under the same locality structure, we prove that polynomially many score queries suffice to estimate the induced Hamiltonian and obtain such guarantees. Our results provide a theoretical characterization of when MPO-BMs are fundamentally hard to approximate and when they become efficiently learnable.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论和算法两个角度刻画了矩阵乘积算子玻恩机（MPO-BM）的有效近似边界：一方面证明连续设置下KL近似是NP难的，另一方面在特定局部性和谱隙条件下证明多项式复杂度的可学习性。
AI.motivation: MPO-BM作为可解的张量网络概率模型，其有效近似能力尚未明确，需要从理论和算法层面刻画其能力边界。
AI.method: 1) 证明连续设置下KL近似对MPO-BM是NP难的；2) 在损失诱导哈密顿量满足局部性和谱隙条件时，证明路径图马尔可夫随机场等结构化目标可用多项式键维的MPO-BM近似并给出KL保证；3) 证明在上述局部性结构下，多项式次评分查询即可估计诱导哈密顿量并得到相应保证。
AI.result: 证明了MPO-BM在一般情况下（连续设置）的KL近似是NP难的，但在特定局部性条件下可实现多项式复杂度的有效学习和近似。
AI.conclusion: 给出了MPO-BM有效近似的理论边界：明确了何时难以近似（负向结果）以及何时可高效学习（正向结果）。

title: Cluster-Aware Neural Collapse Prompt Tuning for Long-Tailed Generalization of Vision-Language Models
summary: Prompt learning has emerged as an efficient alternative to fine-tuning pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs). Despite its promise, current methods still struggle to maintain tail-class discriminability when adapting to class-imbalanced datasets. In this work, we propose cluster-aware neural collapse prompt tuning (CPT), which enhances the discriminability of tail classes in prompt-tuned VLMs without sacrificing their overall generalization. First, we design a cluster-invariant space by mining semantic assignments from the pre-trained VLM and mapping them to prompt-tuned features. This computes cluster-level boundaries and restricts the constraints to local neighborhoods, which reduces interference with the global semantic structure of the pre-trained VLM. Second, we introduce neural-collapse-driven discriminability optimization with three losses: textual Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) separation loss, class-wise convergence loss, and rotation stabilization loss. These losses work together to shape intra-cluster geometry for better inter-class separation and intra-class alignment. Extensive experiments on 11 diverse datasets demonstrate that CPT outperforms SOTA methods, with stronger performance on long-tail classes and good generalization to unseen classes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPT方法，通过聚类感知神经坍缩提示学习，在保持预训练视觉-语言模型泛化能力的同时，增强了对长尾类别（尾部类别）的判别能力，在11个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法在类不平衡数据集上难以保持尾部类别的判别性，导致模型对稀有类别的识别能力下降。本文旨在解决这一问题，在不牺牲整体泛化能力的前提下提升尾部类别的判别性。
AI.method: 1) 构建聚类不变空间，从预训练VLM中挖掘语义分配并映射到提示调优特征，计算聚类级边界并限制约束在局部邻域；2) 引入神经坍缩驱动的判别性优化，包含三个损失：文本ETF分离损失、类内收敛损失、旋转稳定损失，共同塑造类内几何结构以增强类间分离和类内对齐。
AI.result: 在11个多样化数据集上的实验表明，CPT优于现有最优方法，在长尾类别上表现更强，同时对未见类别具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CPT有效增强了提示调优VLM在类不平衡场景下对尾部类别的判别性，且不会损害整体泛化性能。

title: Missingness-MDPs: Bridging the Theory of Missing Data and POMDPs
summary: We introduce missingness-MDPs (miss-MDPs), a novel subclass of partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) that incorporates the theory of missing data. A miss-MDP is a POMDP whose observation function is a missingness function, specifying the probability that individual state features are missing (i.e., unobserved) at a time step. The literature distinguishes three canonical missingness types: missing (1) completely at random (MCAR), (2) at random (MAR), and (3) not at random (MNAR). Our planning problem is to compute near-optimal policies for a miss-MDP with an unknown missingness function, given a dataset of action-observation trajectories. Achieving such optimality guarantees for policies requires learning the missingness function from data, which is infeasible for general POMDPs. To overcome this challenge, we exploit the structural properties of different missingness types to derive probably approximately correct (PAC) algorithms for learning the missingness function. These algorithms yield an approximate but fully specified miss-MDP that we solve using off-the-shelf planning methods. We prove that, with high probability, the resulting policies are epsilon-optimal in the true miss-MDP. Empirical results confirm the theory and demonstrate superior performance of our approach over two model-free POMDP methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出缺失MDP（miss-MDP），一种结合缺失数据理论的POMDP子类，并针对未知缺失函数的学习问题，利用不同缺失类型的结构性质设计PAC算法，从而实现近似最优策略规划。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程中，观测数据常存在缺失问题，但现有POMDP方法未系统处理观测特征的缺失机制，导致规划策略可能不最优。
AI.method: 定义缺失MDP框架，将观测函数建模为缺失函数；针对MCAR、MAR、MNAR三种缺失类型，利用其结构性质设计PAC学习算法，学习未知缺失函数；将学习的缺失MDP用现成规划方法求解。
AI.result: 理论证明策略高概率在真实缺失MDP中达到epsilon最优；实验验证优于两种无模型POMDP方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的缺失MDP框架和PAC学习算法能有效处理观测缺失下的规划问题，具有理论保证和实证优势。

title: Efficient Adjoint Matching for Fine-tuning Diffusion Models
summary: Reward fine-tuning has become a common approach for aligning pretrained diffusion and flow models with human preferences in text-to-image generation. Among reward-gradient-based methods, Adjoint Matching (AM) provides a principled formulation by casting reward fine-tuning as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. However, AM inevitably requires a substantial computational cost: it requires (i) stochastic simulation of full generative trajectories under memoryless dynamics, resulting in a large number of function evaluations, and (ii) backward ODE simulation of the adjoint state along each sampled trajectory. In this work, we observe that both bottlenecks are closely tied to the \textit{non-trivial base drift} inherited from the pretrained model. Motivated by this observation, we propose \textbf{Efficient Adjoint Matching (EAM)}, which substantially improves training efficiency by reformulating the SOC problem with a \textit{linear base drift} and a correspondingly modified \textit{terminal cost}. This reformulation removes both sources of inefficiency; it enables training-time sampling with a few-step deterministic ODE solver and yields a closed-form adjoint solution that eliminates backward adjoint simulation. On standard text-to-image reward fine-tuning benchmarks, EAM converges up to 4x faster than AM and matches or surpasses it across various metrics including PickScore, ImageReward, HPSv2.1, CLIPScore and Aesthetics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Efficient Adjoint Matching (EAM)，通过将奖励微调中的随机最优控制问题重新表述为线性基漂移形式，大幅提升了文本到图像扩散/流模型的训练效率，收敛速度比Adjoint Matching (AM)快4倍，并在多项指标上达到或超越其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的Adjoint Matching (AM)方法虽将奖励微调形式化为随机最优控制问题，但存在两大计算瓶颈：一是需要完整的生成轨迹随机模拟（大量函数评估），二是需要沿每条轨迹反向ODE模拟伴随状态。作者观察到这两个瓶颈都源于预训练模型的非平凡基漂移（non-trivial base drift），因此希望通过重新设计SOC问题来消除这些低效环节。
AI.method: EAM将随机最优控制问题重新表述为线性基漂移（linear base drift）形式，并相应修改终端成本（terminal cost）。这种重新表述带来了两个关键改进：(1) 训练时采样只需少量步数的确定性ODE求解器；(2) 伴随状态存在闭式解，无需反向伴随模拟。
AI.result: 在标准文本到图像奖励微调基准上，EAM收敛速度比AM快4倍，在PickScore、ImageReward、HPSv2.1、CLIPScore和Aesthetics等多个指标上达到或超越AM的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将基漂移线性化，EAM显著提升了奖励微调的训练效率，在保持甚至提升生成质量的同时大幅降低了计算开销，为扩散/流模型的对齐提供了一种高效实用的解决方案。

title: Multimodal Abstractive Summarization of Instructional Videos with Vision-Language Models
summary: Multimodal video summarization requires visual features that align semantically with language generation. Traditional approaches rely on CNN features trained for object classification, which represent visual concepts as discrete categories not aligned with natural language. We propose ClipSum, a framework that leverages frozen CLIP vision-language features with explicit temporal modeling and dimension-adaptive fusion for instructional video summarization. CLIP's contrastive pre-training on 400M image-text pairs yields visual features semantically aligned with the linguistic concepts that text decoders generate, bridging the vision-language gap at the representation level. On YouCook2, ClipSum achieves 33.0% ROUGE-1 versus 30.5% for ResNet-152 with 4x lower dimensionality (512 vs. 2048), demonstrating that semantic alignment matters more than feature capacity. Frozen CLIP (33.0%) surpasses fine-tuned CLIP (32.3%), showing that preserving pre-trained alignment is more valuable than task-specific adaptation. https://github.com/aqeeelmirza/clipsum

AI.tldr: ClipSum利用冻结的CLIP视觉-语言特征，结合显式时序建模和维度自适应融合，用于教学视频摘要，在YouCook2上以更低维度(512 vs 2048)取得33.0% ROUGE-1，超越ResNet-152(30.5%)和微调CLIP(32.3%)。
AI.motivation: 传统视频摘要方法使用基于目标分类训练的CNN特征，其视觉概念是离散类别，与自然语言语义不对齐。作者希望利用CLIP跨模态预训练的对齐特性来弥合视觉与语言之间的语义鸿沟。
AI.method: 使用冻结的CLIP视觉编码器提取语义对齐的视觉特征，加入显式时序建模模块捕获帧间依赖，并通过维度自适应融合策略将视觉特征与语言解码器结合。
AI.result: YouCook2上ROUGE-1达到33.0%，优于ResNet-152的30.5%；冻结CLIP(33.0%)优于微调CLIP(32.3%)；特征维度仅为ResNet的1/4(512 vs 2048)。
AI.conclusion: 语义对齐比特征容量更重要，保持预训练的对齐比任务特定微调更有价值，CLIP特征可有效桥接视觉-语言语义鸿沟。

title: How Useful Is Cross-Domain Generalization for Training LLM Monitors?
summary: Using prompted language models as classifiers enables classification in domains with limited training data, but misses some of the robustness and performance benefits that fine-tuning can bring. We study whether training on multiple classification tasks, each with its own prompt, improves performance on new domains with new classification prompts. We show that such training partially generalizes to adjacent domains, improving classification performance on tasks that are unseen during training. However, we identify specific edge cases where the fine-tuned models fail to follow prompts, such as when the classification prompt changes completely while the data domain remains the same as during training. We show that classification training can be mixed with general instruction following training, and that (when done well) such training keeps the benefits of classification training and mitigates its generalization failures. Surprisingly, we see that this no-thinking supervised classification training can generalize to with-thinking classification and summarization, suggesting that no-thinking classification training might be instrumentally useful in building other kinds of classifiers and monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 研究了利用提示语言模型进行多任务分类训练，发现其能部分泛化到新领域，但存在提示跟随失败问题；混合指令跟随训练可缓解该问题，且"无思考"分类训练能泛化到"有思考"分类和摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 在标注数据有限的场景下，提示语言模型作为分类器虽然可用，但缺乏微调带来的鲁棒性和性能优势。作者希望探索多任务分类训练是否能提升模型在新领域的泛化能力。
AI.method: 在多个分类任务上（每个任务有独立提示）进行训练，测试其对未见领域的泛化能力；分析提示跟随失败的边缘情况；混合分类训练与通用指令跟随训练；评估"无思考"（no-thinking）分类训练的跨任务泛化能力。
AI.result: 多任务分类训练能部分泛化到相邻领域；当分类提示完全改变但数据领域不变时，微调模型无法跟随提示；混合指令跟随训练可保持分类训练收益同时缓解泛化失败；"无思考"分类训练能意外地泛化到"有思考"分类和摘要任务。
AI.conclusion: 多任务分类训练+指令跟随混合策略是提升模型泛化能力的有效途径；"无思考"分类训练可能对构建其他分类器和监控系统有工具性价值。

title: Adaptive Calibration in Non-Stationary Environments
summary: Making calibrated online predictions is a central challenge in modern AI systems. Much of the existing literature focuses on fully adversarial environments where outcomes may be arbitrary, leading to conservative algorithms that can perform suboptimally in more benign settings, such as when outcomes are nearly stationary. This gap raises a natural question: can we design online prediction algorithms whose calibration error automatically adapts to the degree of non-stationarity in the environment, smoothly interpolating between i.i.d. and adversarial regimes? We answer this question in the affirmative and develop a suite of algorithms that achieve adaptive calibration guarantees under multiple calibration measures. Specifically, with $T$ being the number of rounds and $C\in[0,T]$ being an unknown non-stationary measure defined as the minimal $\ell_1$ deviation of the mean outcomes, our algorithms attain $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{T}+(TC)^{\frac{1}{3}})$ for $\ell_1$ calibration error and $\widetilde{O}((1+C)^{\frac{1}{3}})$ for both $\ell_2$ and pseudo KL calibration error. These bounds match the optimal rates in the stationary case ($C=0$) and recover known guarantees in the fully adversarial regime ($C=T$). Our approach builds on and extends prior work [Hu et al., 2026, Luo et al., 2025], introducing an epoch-based scheduling together with a novel non-uniform partition of the prediction space that allocates finer resolution near the underlying ground truth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套自适应在线预测算法，能够根据环境非平稳程度（由C∈[0,T]衡量）自动调整校准误差，在ℓ₁、ℓ₂和伪KL校准误差上分别达到与平稳最优和完全对抗情况匹配的速率，核心创新包括基于epoch的调度和非均匀预测空间划分。
AI.motivation: 现有在线校准预测工作大多聚焦于完全对抗环境，导致算法过于保守，在更温和（如近平稳）的场景下表现不佳。作者希望设计能自动适应环境非平稳程度的算法，在独立同分布和完全对抗之间平滑过渡。
AI.method: 提出基于epoch调度的算法框架，结合一种新的非均匀预测空间划分策略，在真实标签附近分配更细的粒度，从而实现自适应校准保证。算法扩展了Hu et al. (2026)和Luo et al. (2025)的工作。
AI.result: ℓ₁校准误差达到Õ(√T + (TC)^{1/3})，ℓ₂和伪KL校准误差达到Õ((1+C)^{1/3})。当C=0（平稳）时达到最优速率，当C=T（完全对抗）时恢复已知保证。
AI.conclusion: 成功回答了能否设计自适应校准预测算法的问题，验证了算法能在不同非平稳程度下取得最优或近最优的校准误差界。

title: Chronicles-OCR: A Cross-Temporal Perception Benchmark for the Evolutionary Trajectory of Chinese Characters
summary: Vision Large Language Models (VLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in modern text-rich visual understanding. However, their perceptual robustness in the face of the continuous morphological evolution of historical writing systems remains largely unexplored. Existing ancient text datasets typically focus on isolated historical periods, failing to capture the systematic visual distribution shifts spanning thousands of years. To bridge this gap and empower Digital Humanities, we introduce Chronicles-OCR, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the cross-temporal visual perception capabilities of VLLMs across the complete evolutionary trajectory of Chinese characters, known as the Seven Chinese Scripts. Curated in collaboration with top-tier institutional domain experts, the dataset comprises 2,800 strictly balanced images encompassing highly diverse physical media, ranging from tortoise shells to paper-based calligraphy. To accommodate the drastic morphological and topological variations across different historical stages, we propose a novel Stage-Adaptive Annotation Paradigm. Based on this, Chronicles-OCR formulates four rigorous quantitative tasks: cross-period character spotting, fine-grained archaic character recognition via visual referring, ancient text parsing, and script classification. By isolating visual perception from semantic reasoning, Chronicles-OCR provides an authoritative platform to expose the limitations of current VLLMs, paving the way for robust, evolution-aware historical text perception. Chronicles-OCR is publicly available at https://github.com/VirtualLUOUCAS/Chronicles-OCR.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Chronicles-OCR基准，专门用于评估视觉大语言模型(VLLMs)在汉字数千年演化过程中的跨时间视觉感知能力，包含七个脚本阶段、2800张图像和四项量化任务。
AI.motivation: 现有VLLMs在文本丰富的视觉理解任务中表现出色，但在面对历史文字系统的形态演化时(cross-temporal visual distribution shifts)的感知鲁棒性尚未被探索。现有古文字数据集局限于孤立的历史时期，无法捕捉跨越数千年的系统性的视觉分布偏移。
AI.method: 提出了Chronicles-OCR基准，包含：(1) 与领域专家合作构建的2800张严格平衡的图像数据集，涵盖从甲骨到纸本书法的多种物理介质；(2) 阶段自适应标注范式(Stage-Adaptive Annotation Paradigm)；(3) 四项量化任务：跨时期字符定位、基于视觉引用的细粒度古文字识别、古文字解析、文字分类。任务设计上隔离了视觉感知与语义推理。
AI.result: 构建了包含汉字七种脚本(Seven Chinese Scripts)完整演化轨迹的基准数据集，揭示了当前VLLMs在跨时间视觉感知方面的局限性，为数字人文学科提供了权威评估平台。
AI.conclusion: Chronicles-OCR为评估和改进VLLMs在历史文字演化中的视觉感知鲁棒性提供了标准化平台，推动了演化感知的历史文本感知研究。

title: Anti-Self-Distillation for Reasoning RL via Pointwise Mutual Information
summary: On-policy self-distillation, where a student is pulled toward a copy of itself conditioned on privileged context (e.g., a verified solution or feedback), offers a promising direction for advancing reasoning capability without a stronger external teacher. Yet in math reasoning the gains are inconsistent, even when the same approach succeeds elsewhere. A pointwise mutual information analysis traces the failure to the privileged context itself: it inflates the teacher's confidence on tokens already implied by the solution (structural connectives, verifiable claims) and deflates it on deliberation tokens ("Wait", "Let", "Maybe") that drive multi-step search. We propose Anti-Self-Distillation (AntiSD), which ascends a divergence between student and teacher rather than descending it: this reverses the per-token sign and yields a naturally bounded advantage in one step. An entropy-triggered gate disables the term once the teacher entropy collapses, completing a drop-in replacement for default self-distillation. Across five models from 4B to 30B parameters on math reasoning benchmarks, AntiSD reaches the GRPO baseline's accuracy in 2 to 10x fewer training steps and improves final accuracy by up to 11.5 points. AntiSD opens a path to scalable self-improvement, where a language model bootstraps its own reasoning through its training signal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Anti-Self-Distillation (AntiSD)，通过反转学生-教师之间的KL散度方向，解决了传统自蒸馏在数学推理任务中失效的问题。AntiSD在多个模型（4B-30B）上达到GRPO基线准确率仅需2-10倍更少的训练步数，最终准确率提升高达11.5个百分点。
AI.motivation: 传统on-policy自蒸馏方法在数学推理任务中效果不一致甚至失败，现有方法无法有效利用特权上下文（如已验证的解决方案或反馈）来提升推理能力。作者通过PMI分析发现，特权上下文会错误地膨胀教师模型在结构性标记上的置信度，同时抑制驱动多步搜索的推理思考标记。
AI.method: 提出Anti-Self-Distillation (AntiSD)，核心创新包括：(1) 反转KL散度方向——从最小化学生与教师之间的散度改为最大化散度，从而反转每个token的梯度符号并产生自然有界的优势；(2) 熵触发门控机制——当教师熵坍塌时自动禁用AntiSD项，确保训练稳定；(3) 作为默认自蒸馏的即插即用替代方案。
AI.result: 在5个模型（4B-30B参数）的数学推理基准上：(1) 达到GRPO基线准确率所需训练步数减少2-10倍；(2) 最终准确率提升最高达11.5个百分点；(3) 训练效率大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: AntiSD开辟了一条可扩展的自我改进路径，使语言模型能够通过自身的训练信号来引导推理能力提升，在数学推理任务上显著优于传统自蒸馏方法和GRPO基线。

title: NARA: Anchor-Conditioned Relation-Aware Contextualization of Heterogeneous Geoentities
summary: Geospatial foundation models have primarily focused on raster data such as satellite imagery, where self-supervised learning has been widely studied. Vector geospatial data instead represent the world as discrete geoentities with explicit geometry, semantics, and structured spatial relations, including metric proximity and topological relationships. These relations jointly determine how entities interact within space, yet existing representation learning methods remain fragmented, often restricted to specific geometry types or partial spatial relations, limiting their ability to capture unified spatial context across heterogeneous geoentities. We propose NARA (Neural Anchor-conditioned Relation-Aware representation learning), a self-supervised framework for vector geoentities. NARA learns context-dependent representations by jointly modeling semantics, geometry, and spatial relations within a unified framework and captures relational spatial structure beyond proximity alone, enabling rich contextualized representations across heterogeneous geoentities of points, polylines, and polygons. Evaluation on building function classification, traffic speed prediction, and next point-of-interest recommendation shows consistent improvements over prior methods, highlighting the benefit of unified relational modeling for vector geospatial data.

AI.tldr: NARA是一个面向矢量地理实体的自监督表征学习框架，通过统一建模语义、几何和空间关系（包括度量邻近和拓扑关系），实现跨异构地理实体（点、线、面）的上下文感知表征。在建筑功能分类、交通速度预测和POI推荐任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有矢量地理数据表征学习方法碎片化，往往局限于特定几何类型或部分空间关系（如仅关注邻近关系），无法捕捉异构地理实体间的统一空间上下文。作者希望建立一个统一框架，同时建模语义、几何和度量邻近与拓扑关系。
AI.method: 提出NARA框架，采用神经锚点条件化的关系感知自监督学习，在一个统一框架内联合建模语义、几何和空间关系，超越简单的邻近关系，捕捉包括拓扑关系在内的丰富空间结构。
AI.result: 在建筑功能分类、交通速度预测和下一个POI推荐三个任务上，NARA一致优于先前的方法，证明了统一关系建模对矢量地理数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模语义、几何和多种空间关系（包括拓扑关系）对于矢量地理实体的表征学习非常重要，NARA框架验证了这一思路的有效性。

title: Understanding and Preventing Entropy Collapse in RLVR with On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models. However, widely used RLVR algorithms, such as GRPO, often suffer from entropy collapse, leading to premature determinism and unstable optimization. Existing remedies, including entropy regularization and ratio-based clipping heuristics, either control entropy in a coarse-grained manner or rely on approximate on-policy training. In this paper, we revisit entropy collapse from a token-level entropy flow perspective. Our analysis reveals that entropy-decreasing tokens consistently outweigh entropy-increasing ones, resulting in a severely imbalanced entropy flow. This perspective provides a unified explanation of entropy collapse in existing RLVR algorithms and highlights the importance of balancing entropy dynamics. Motivated by this analysis, we propose On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization (OPEFO), an adaptive entropy flow balancing mechanism that rescales entropy-increasing and entropy-decreasing updates according to their contributions to entropy change, while remaining strict on-policy. Experiments on six mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OPEFO improves training stability and final performance. We will release the code and models upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文从token级熵流视角分析了RLVR算法中的熵坍塌问题，发现熵减token持续占优导致熵流不平衡，并提出OPEFO方法通过自适应平衡熵增减更新来缓解该问题，在数学推理任务上提升了训练稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR算法（如GRPO）存在熵坍塌问题，导致过早确定性退化和不稳定优化。现有方法（熵正则化、基于比率的裁剪启发式）要么粗粒度控制熵，要么依赖近似on-policy训练，缺乏对熵动态的细粒度理解和平衡机制。
AI.method: 提出On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization (OPEFO)，一种自适应熵流平衡机制：根据每个token对熵变化的贡献重新缩放熵增和熵减更新，同时保持严格的on-policy训练。
AI.result: 在六个数学推理基准上，OPEFO相比现有RLVR方法（如GRPO）在训练稳定性和最终性能上均取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 从token级熵流视角统一解释了现有RLVR算法的熵坍塌问题，验证了平衡熵动态对训练稳定性和推理性能的重要性。

title: What Does It Mean for a Medical AI System to Be Right?
comment: Part of a PhD ethics course
summary: This paper examines what it means for a medical AI system to be right by grounding the question in a specific clinical context: the automatic classification of plasma cells in digitized bone marrow smears for the diagnosis of multiple myeloma. Drawing on philosophy of science and research ethics, the paper argues that correctness in medical AI is not a singular property reducible to benchmark performance, but a multi-dimensional concept involving the availability of expertly labeled medical datasets, the explainability and interpretability of model outputs, the clinical meaningfulness of evaluation metrics, and the distribution of accountability in human-AI workflows. As such, the paper develops this argument through four interrelated themes: the instability of ground truth labels, the opacity of overconfident AI, the inadequacy of standard clinical metrics, and the risk of automation bias in time-pressured clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文从哲学和伦理角度探讨了医学AI的正确性——以多发性骨髓瘤诊断中的浆细胞自动分类为例，论证医学AI的正确性不仅依赖于基准性能，还涉及标注质量、可解释性、临床有意义指标和人机协作中的责任分配等多维概念。
AI.motivation: 挑战当前医学AI研究中"正确性"被简单等同于基准测试性能的主流观点，从哲学和伦理视角重新审视医学AI在临床实践中的真正正确性含义。
AI.method: 从科学哲学和研究伦理出发，围绕四个主题（金标准标签的不稳定性、过度自信AI的不透明性、标准临床指标的不足、时间压力下的自动化偏误风险）进行论证分析。
AI.result: 指出医学AI的正确性是一个多维概念，涉及数据标注质量、模型可解释性、临床有意义的评估指标以及人机协作中的责任分配。
AI.conclusion: 医学AI的正确性不能简化为基准性能，必须综合考虑临床有效性、透明性和责任机制。

title: Executable Agentic Memory for GUI Agent
summary: Modern GUI agents typically rely on a model-centric and step-wise interaction paradigm, where LLMs must re-interpret the UI and re-decide actions at every screen, which is fragile in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose Executable Agentic Memory (EAM), a structured Knowledge Graph (KG) that shifts GUI planning from free-form generation to a robust retrieval-and-execution process. Our approach includes a sample-efficient memory construction pipeline using state-aware DFS and action-group mining to compress multi-step routines. To ensure efficient planning, we introduce a value-guided graph search where a lightweight Q-function model steers Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) over the KG. We theoretically establish bias-consistency for the Q-model and derive sample complexity bounds for path recovery. Empirically, EAM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like UI-TARS-7B by up to $19.6\%$ on AndroidWorld, while reducing token costs $6\times$ relative to GPT-4o. With a $2.8$s average latency, EAM enables reliable, quick, and long-horizon GUI automation.

AI.tldr: 提出Executable Agentic Memory (EAM)，一种结构化知识图谱方法，将GUI规划从自由生成转变为检索-执行流程，通过状态感知DFS、动作组挖掘和值引导图搜索（MCTS+Q函数）实现高效长程GUI自动化，在AndroidWorld上超越UI-TARS-7B达19.6%，token成本降低6倍。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体采用模型中心化的逐步交互范式，LLM需在每屏重新理解UI并决策，在长程任务中脆弱且低效。
AI.method: 构建结构化知识图谱（EAM），通过状态感知DFS和动作组挖掘压缩多步例程；引入值引导图搜索，使用轻量Q函数模型驱动MCTS在KG上搜索规划路径。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld上比UI-TARS-7B高19.6%，比GPT-4o降低6倍token成本，平均延迟2.8秒。
AI.conclusion: EAM通过结构化记忆与检索-执行范式，实现了可靠、快速且支持长程任务的GUI自动化。

title: CTFusion: A CTF-based Benchmark for LLM Agent Evaluation
summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled agentic systems for complex, multi-step tasks; cybersecurity is emerging as a prominent application. To evaluate such agents, researchers widely adopt Capture The Flag (CTF) benchmarks. However, current CTF benchmarks reuse existing challenges, which exposes them to data contamination and potential cheating. Notably, we confirmed these issues in practice by integrating web search tools into an existing agent. To address these limitations, we present CTFusion, a streaming evaluation framework built on Live CTFs. To achieve this, CTFusion preserves per-agent independence under a single team account and reduces competition impact by forwarding only the first correct flag per challenge. Moreover, we implement CTFusion as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server on the widely used CTFd platform, which offers broad applicability to diverse CTF events and agent types. Through experiments with three LLMs, two agents, and five Live CTFs, we demonstrate that existing CTF benchmarks can be unreliable in assessing LLM-based agents, while CTFusion can serve as a robust solution for evaluating cybersecurity agents. We release CTFusion as open source to foster future research in this area.

AI.tldr: 论文提出CTFusion，一种基于实时CTF比赛的流式评估框架，用于可靠评估LLM驱动的网络安全智能体，解决了现有CTF基准存在的数据污染和作弊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CTF基准复用旧题目，易受数据污染和作弊影响；作者通过实验证实了这些问题的存在，因此需要更可靠的评估框架。
AI.method: CTFusion基于实时CTF比赛构建流式评估框架，通过单团队账户下保持智能体独立性、仅转发每道题首个正确flag来减少竞争影响，并在CTFd平台上以MCP服务器形式实现。
AI.result: 通过3个LLM、2个智能体和5个实时CTF的实验，证明现有CTF基准不可靠，而CTFusion能作为评估网络安全智能体的鲁棒方案。
AI.conclusion: 现有CTF基准用于评估LLM智能体不可靠，CTFusion提供了更健壮的实时评估方案，并开源以促进后续研究。

title: H2G: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Grouping for 3D Scenes
summary: Hierarchical 3D grouping aims to recover scene groups across multiple granularities, from fine object parts to complete objects, without relying on semantic labels or a fixed vocabulary. The main challenge is to transform 2D foundation-model cues into coherent hierarchy supervision and embed that hierarchy in a 3D representation. We propose H2G, a hyperbolic affinity field for hierarchical 3D grouping. Our method derives semantically organized tree supervision by interpreting foundation-model affinities through Dasgupta's objective for similarity-based hierarchical clustering. This supervision is distilled into a single Lorentz hyperbolic feature field, whose geometry is well suited for tree-like branching structures. A hierarchy-aware objective aligns the field with fine-level assignments, coarse object structure, compact feature clusters, and LCA (Lowest Common Ancestor) ordering. This formulation represents multiple grouping levels in one feature space, enabling semantic hierarchical grouping grounded in 2D foundation-model knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出H2G方法，利用双曲空间和基础模型亲和力实现3D场景的层次化分组，无需语义标签。
AI.motivation: 3D层次化分组需跨多个粒度（从零件到完整物体）恢复场景组，挑战在于如何将2D基础模型的线索转化为一致的层次监督并嵌入3D表示中。
AI.method: 通过Dasgupta目标函数从基础模型亲和力中推导语义树监督，将其蒸馏到单一Lorentz双曲特征场中，利用双曲几何适配树状结构；引入层次感知目标对齐细粒度分配、粗粒度物体结构、紧凑特征聚类和LCA排序。
AI.result: 在单个特征空间中表示多个分组层级，实现了基于2D基础模型知识的语义层次化3D分组。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间能够有效编码3D场景的层次结构，结合基础模型先验可在无监督条件下完成多粒度的语义分组。

title: Slicing and Dicing: Configuring Optimal Mixtures of Experts
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become standard in large language models, yet many of their core design choices - expert count, granularity, shared experts, load balancing, token dropping - have only been studied one or two at a time over narrow configuration ranges. It remains an open question whether these choices can be optimized independently, without considering interactions. We present the first systematic study of over 2,000 pretraining runs spanning models up to 6.6B total parameters, in which we exhaustively vary total experts, expert dimension, heterogeneous expert sizing within a single layer, shared expert size and load-balancing mechanisms. We find that at every active-parameter scale that we study, performance consistently improves with total MoE parameters even at extreme active expert parameter ratios like 128.Further, the optimal expert size is nearly invariant to total parameter count and depends only on active parameter count. Third, we see that other choices like shared experts, heterogeneous experts and load-balancing settings have small effects relative to expert count and granularity, although dropless routing yields a consistent gain. Overall, our results suggest a simpler recipe: focus on expert count and granularity, other choices have minimal effect on final quality.

AI.tldr: 本文对MoE架构中的核心设计选择（专家数量、粒度、共享专家、负载均衡、token丢弃）进行了系统研究，基于超过2000次预训练实验（模型达6.6B参数），发现：（1）在任意活跃参数规模下，性能随总MoE参数增加而持续提升；（2）最优专家大小仅依赖于活跃参数数量；（3）除无丢弃路由外，其他设计选择影响相对较小。最终建议聚焦于专家数量和粒度。
AI.motivation: MoE架构已成为大语言模型的标准选择，但许多核心设计选择（如专家数量、粒度、共享专家等）仅在狭窄配置范围内被逐一或成对研究，缺乏系统性理解，且不清楚这些选择是否可以独立优化而不考虑交互作用。
AI.method: 进行了超过2000次预训练实验，模型规模达6.6B总参数，系统性地变化总专家数、专家维度、层内异构专家大小、共享专家大小和负载均衡机制，在不同活跃参数规模下进行对比。
AI.result: （1）性能随总MoE参数增加而持续提升，即使在极端活跃专家参数比（如128）下依然成立；（2）最优专家大小几乎不依赖于总参数数，仅取决于活跃参数数；（3）共享专家、异构专家和负载均衡设置的影响相比专家数量和粒度较小，而无丢弃路由有一致的收益。
AI.conclusion: 提出了更简单的MoE配置方案：核心聚焦于专家数量和粒度，其他设计选择对最终质量影响极小。

title: LISA: Cognitive Arbitration for Signal-Free Autonomous Intersection Management
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) show strong potential for Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), particularly in tasks requiring situational reasoning and multi-agent coordination. These capabilities make them well suited for cooperative driving, where rule-based approaches struggle in complex and dynamic traffic environments. Intersection management remains especially challenging due to conflicting right-of-way demands, heterogeneous vehicle priorities, and vehicle-specific kinematic constraints that must be resolved in real time. However, existing approaches typically use LLMs as auxiliary components on top of signal-based systems rather than as primary decision-makers. Signal controllers remain vehicle-agnostic, reservation-based methods lack intent awareness, and recent LLM-based systems still depend on signal infrastructure. In addition, LLM inference latency limits their use in sub-second control settings.
  We propose LISA (LLM-Based Intent-Driven Speed Advisory), a signal-free cognitive arbitration framework for autonomous intersection management. LISA uses an LLM to reason over declared vehicle intents, incorporating priority classes, queue pressure, and energy preferences. We evaluate LISA against fixed-cycle control, SCATS, AIM, and GLOSA across varying traffic loads. Results show that LISA reduces mean control delay by up to 89.1% and maintains Level of Service C while all non-LLM baselines degrade to Level of Service F. Under near-saturated demand, LISA reduces mean waiting time by 93% and peak queue length by 60.6% relative to fixed-cycle control. It also lowers fuel consumption by up to 48.8% and achieves 86.2% intent satisfaction, compared to 61.2% for the best non-LLM method. These results demonstrate that LLM-based reasoning can enable real-time, signal-free intersection management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LISA框架，利用LLM推理车辆意图（优先级、队列压力、能源偏好）实现无信号灯路口管理。相比传统方法，LISA将平均控制延迟降低89.1%，在近饱和流量下减少93%等待时间和60.6%队列长度，并降低48.8%燃油消耗，证明LLM可作为信号灯替代方案进行实时交叉口管理。
AI.motivation: 现有交叉口管理方法（信号灯、基于预约的方法、基于LLM的辅助系统）存在局限：信号灯无视车辆个体差异，基于预约的方法缺乏意图感知，现有LLM方案仍依赖信号基础设施且推理延迟高。作者希望探索纯LLM驱动的无信号灯交叉口管理框架。
AI.method: 提出LISA（基于LLM的意图驱动速度建议系统）：LLM对车辆声明的意图（优先级、队列压力、能源偏好）进行推理，生成无信号灯协作式交叉口管理策略，替代传统信号控制。
AI.result: 相比固定周期控制、SCATS、AIM、GLOSA等方法，LISA将平均控制延迟降低89.1%，维持在服务等级C（非LLM方法降至F）；近饱和流量下等待时间减少93%，峰值队列长度减少60.6%；燃油消耗降低48.8%；意图满足率达86.2%（最佳非LLM方法仅61.2%）。
AI.conclusion: LLM推理可以独立实现实时、无信号灯的交叉口管理，且性能显著优于传统方法，证明LLM在交通控制中可作为主要决策者而非辅助组件。

title: EqOD: Symmetry-Informed Stability Selection for PDE Identification
summary: Data-driven identification of partial differential equations (PDEs) relies on sparse regression over a candidate library of differential operators, where larger libraries inflate false positives under observation noise and smaller libraries risk missing true terms. We introduce Equivariant Operator Discovery (EqOD), a fully automatic method combining two library reduction mechanisms. When Galilean invariance is detected from trajectory data via a weak-form structural test, EqOD uses the symmetry-reduced library, eliminating terms that our Galilean exclusion result proves to be absent from the governing equation. Otherwise, it applies randomized LASSO stability selection guided by classical false-positive bounds. A residual-based fallback prevents degradation below the full-library baseline. On 8 PDEs at 4 noise levels, EqOD attains $F_1 = 1.000 \pm 0.000$ on Heat at $20\%$ noise, where WF-LASSO obtains $0.475 \pm 0.181$, official PySINDy 2.0 obtains $0.000$, and the WSINDy reimplementation obtains $0.789$. Under the strict criterion that the mean F1 difference exceeds the larger of the two standard deviations, EqOD wins 7 of 32 cells. WF-LASSO wins none, and the remaining 25 cells are ties. Across all 32 cells, EqOD outperforms PySINDy 2.0.0 in 23 of 32 cells, and all 5 PySINDy wins occur on reaction PDEs. External validation on WeakIdent and PINN-SR datasets gives $F_1 = 1.000$ on all 5 clean benchmarks. NLS, 2D, coupled-system, and cylinder-wake extensions are reported. The Galilean library reduction is proved under explicit autonomy and library assumptions. The stability-selection step is motivated by classical false-positive bounds, while formal guarantees for correlated PDE design matrices remain open.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Equivariant Operator Discovery (EqOD)，一种结合伽利略对称性约简库与随机LASSO稳定选择的PDE自动识别方法，在多种噪声条件下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动PDE识别方法依赖稀疏回归，候选库过大会引入假阳性，过小则会遗漏真实项，缺乏自动化的库缩减机制。
AI.method: EqOD包含两种库缩减机制：1) 通过弱形式结构检验检测伽利略不变性，利用对称性约简库（有理论保证）；2) 否则使用随机LASSO稳定选择（基于经典假阳性界）。残差基线的回退机制确保不低于全库基线。
AI.result: 在8个PDE、4个噪声水平下，EqOD在Heat方程20%噪声下F1=1.000±0.000，远优于对比方法。32个测试单元中7个显著胜出，无显著失败；在23/32个单元优于PySINDy 2.0.0。外部数据集上所有5个干净基准F1=1.000。
AI.conclusion: EqOD通过对称性约简与统计稳定性选择自动化地提升了PDE识别的鲁棒性和准确性，尤其在噪声环境下优势明显。但相关性PDE设计矩阵的正式保证仍待解决。

title: Optimizing 4D Wires for Sparse 3D Abstraction
summary: We present a unified framework for 3D geometric abstraction using a single continuous 4D wire, parameterized as a B-spline with spatial coordinates and variable width $(x,y,z,w)$. Existing approaches typically represent shapes as collections of many independent curve segments, which often leads to fragmented structures and limited physical realizability. In contrast, we show that a single continuous spline is sufficiently expressive to capture complex volumetric forms while enforcing global topological coherence. By imposing continuity, our method transforms 3D sketching from a local density-accumulation process into a global routing problem, providing a strong inductive bias toward cleaner aesthetics and improved structural coherence. To enable gradient-based optimization, we introduce a differentiable rendering pipeline that efficiently rasterizes variable-width curves with bounded projection error. This formulation supports robust optimization using modern guidance signals such as Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) or CLIP. We demonstrate applications including image-to-3D abstraction, multi-view wire art generation, and differentiable stylized surface filling. Experiments show that our unified representation produces structures with higher semantic fidelity and improved structural coherence compared to approaches based on collections of discrete curves.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用单条连续4D B样条曲线（含空间坐标和可变宽度）进行3D几何抽象的统一框架，替代传统的多独立曲线段方法，实现全局拓扑连贯性，并通过可微分渲染管线支持SDS/CLIP等梯度优化，应用于图像转3D抽象、多视角线艺术生成等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有3D几何抽象方法通常使用多个独立的曲线段表示形状，导致结构碎片化、物理可实现性差。作者希望用单条连续曲线实现全局拓扑连贯，同时保持对复杂体积形式的表达能力。
AI.method: 将3D草图抽象建模为全局路由问题，使用单条4D B样条曲线（x,y,z,w）表示，w为可变宽度；设计可微分渲染管线高效栅格化可变宽度曲线，支持SDS和CLIP等梯度信号优化。
AI.result: 在图像转3D抽象、多视角线艺术生成和可微分风格化曲面填充等任务中，相比多离散曲线基线方法，生成的语义保真度和结构连贯性更高。
AI.conclusion: 单条连续样条曲线是3D几何抽象的有效统一表示，能够兼顾表达力和结构连贯性，为3D草图生成提供了新的范式。

title: Towards Automated Air Traffic Safety Assessment Around Non-Towered Airports Using Large Language Models
comment: 25 pages, 17 figures, 5 tables, Accepted to AIAA 2026
summary: We investigate frameworks for post-flight safety analysis at non-towered airports using large language models (LLMs). Non-towered airports rely on the Common Traffic Advisory Frequency (CTAF) for air traffic coordination and experience frequent near mid-air collisions due to the pilot self-announcement communication protocol. We propose a general vision-language model (VLM) approach to analyze the transcribed CTAF radio communications in natural language, METeorological Aerodrome Report (METAR) weather data, Automatic Dependent Surveillance-Broadcast (ADS-B) flight trajectories, and Visual Flight Rules sectional charts of the airfield. We provide a preliminary study at Half Moon Bay Airport, with a qualitative real world case study and a quantitative evaluation using a new synthetic dataset of communications and weather modalities. We qualitatively evaluate our framework on real flight data using Gemini 2.5 Pro, demonstrating accurate identification of a right-of-way violation. The synthetic dataset is derived from real examples and includes a 12-category hazard taxonomy, and is used to benchmark three open-source (Qwen 2.5-7B, Mistral-7B, Gemma-2-9B) and three closed-source (GPT-4o, GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6) LLM models on the subset of inputs related to CTAF and METAR. Even limited to CTAF and METAR inputs and open source LLMs, instances of our framework typically achieve a macro F1 score above 0.85 on a binary nominal/danger classification task. Future work includes a quantitative evaluation across all modalities and a larger number of real world examples. Taken together, our results suggest that VLM analysis of safety at non-towered airports may be a valuable future capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视觉-语言模型（VLM）分析非管制机场的飞行后安全，通过处理CTAF无线电通信、METAR气象数据、ADS-B轨迹和VFR航图，在Half Moon Bay机场的初步研究中展示了识别违章飞行和危险分类的能力，宏F1得分超过0.85。
AI.motivation: 非管制机场依赖飞行员在CTAF上自我宣告进行协调，这种通信协议导致频繁的空中接近危险事件。现有方法缺乏对多模态数据（通信、气象、轨迹、航图）的综合安全分析框架，亟需自动化分析工具提升飞行安全。
AI.method: 提出通用VLM框架，融合CTAF转录文本、METAR气象数据、ADS-B轨迹和VFR航图四类模态数据。使用Gemini 2.5 Pro进行真实案例定性评估，构建包含12类危险分类的合成数据集，在三个开源模型（Qwen 2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Gemma-2-9B）和三个闭源模型（GPT-4o、GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6）上仅基于CTAF和METAR输入进行基准测试。
AI.result: 定性案例中准确识别了通行权违规；在二元名义/危险分类任务上，开源LLM的宏F1得分超过0.85；证明了在多模态数据上的VLM安全分析具备可行性。
AI.conclusion: VLM分析非管制机场安全是一种有潜力的未来能力，但当前评估限于部分模态和有限真实样本，未来需扩展到全模态和更多真实案例的量化评估。

title: OverNaN: NaN-Aware Oversampling for Imbalanced Learning with Meaningful Missingness
summary: Missing values are routinely treated as defects to be eliminated through deletion or imputation prior to machine learning. In many applied domains, however, missingness itself carries information, reflecting experimental constraints, measurement choices, or systematic mechanisms tied to the data-generating process. Eliminating or masking this structure can distort class boundaries, introduce bias, and reduce generalisability; particularly in imbalanced datasets where minority classes are already under-represented. OverNaN is a lightweight, NaN-aware oversampling framework designed to address class imbalance without erasing missingness structure. It extends common synthetic oversampling methods to operate directly on incomplete feature vectors, allowing missing values to be preserved, propagated, or selectively interpolated according to explicitly defined strategies. Rather than repairing missing data, OverNaN treats missingness as part of the feature space over which synthetic samples are generated. This paper situates OverNaN within the broader landscape of imbalanced learning, missing-data handling, and NaN-tolerant algorithms. Using representative examples included with the software, we demonstrate that meaningful missingness can be retained during oversampling without introducing artificial certainty. OverNaN is intended for practitioners working with small, incomplete, and imbalanced datasets in scientific and engineering domains where missingness is unavoidable and often informative.

AI.tldr: OverNaN是一个轻量级的NaN感知过采样框架，它通过直接在缺失特征向量上操作处理类别不平衡问题，保留缺失值的结构性信息而非消除它们。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在机器学习前通过删除或插值消除缺失值，但这会丢失缺失本身携带的信息，扭曲类别边界并引入偏差，尤其在类别不平衡数据集中问题更严重。
AI.method: OverNaN将常见的合成过采样方法扩展为直接在包含缺失值的特征向量上操作，支持缺失值保留、传播或选择性插值，将缺失性视为特征空间的一部分而非缺陷。
AI.result: 通过代表性示例证明，在过采样过程中保留有意义的缺失性不会引入人为的确定性，能够在不消除缺失结构的情况下处理类别不平衡。
AI.conclusion: 对于科学和工程领域中小规模、不完整且不平衡的数据集，缺失性不可避免且往往包含信息，OverNaN提供了一种有效的处理方案。

title: A Transfer Learning Evaluation of Deep Neural Networks for Image Classification
comment: Published by Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction Journal
summary: Transfer learning is a machine learning technique that uses previously acquired knowledge from a source domain to enhance learning in a target domain by reusing learned weights. This technique is ubiquitous because of its great advantages in achieving high performance while saving training time, memory, and effort in network design. In this paper, we investigate how to select the best pre-trained model that meets the target domain requirements for image classification tasks. In our study, we refined the output layers and general network parameters to apply the knowledge of eleven image processing models, pre-trained on ImageNet, to five different target domain datasets. We measured the accuracy, accuracy density, training time, and model size to evaluate the pre-trained models both in training sessions in one episode and with ten episodes.

AI.tldr: 研究如何为图像分类任务选择最佳预训练模型，比较11个在ImageNet上预训练的模型在5个目标域数据集上的迁移学习表现。
AI.motivation: 迁移学习广泛使用，但如何为特定目标域选择最佳预训练模型缺乏系统研究，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 选取11个在ImageNet上预训练的模型，微调输出层和网络参数，在5个不同目标域数据集上评估迁移学习性能，测量准确率、准确率密度、训练时间和模型大小。
AI.result: 给出了不同预训练模型在不同目标域上的表现对比，涵盖了单次训练和十次训练的平均结果。
AI.conclusion: 为图像分类任务中的预训练模型选择提供了实证依据，帮助研究者根据目标域特点选择合适模型。

title: AgentDisCo: Towards Disentanglement and Collaboration in Open-ended Deep Research Agents
summary: In this paper, we present AgentDisCo, a novel Disentangled and Collaborative agentic architecture that formulates deep research as an adversarial optimization problem between information exploration and exploitation. Unlike existing approaches that conflate these two processes into a single module, AgentDisCo employs a critic agent to evaluate generated outlines and refine search queries, and a generator agent to retrieve updated results and revise outlines accordingly. The iteratively refined outline is then passed to a downstream report writer that synthesizes a comprehensive research report. The overall workflow supports both handcrafted and automatically discovered design strategies via a meta-optimization harness, in which the generator agent is repurposed as a scoring agent to evaluate critic outputs and generate quality signals. Powerful code-generation agents (e.g., Claude-Code, Codex) systematically explore agent configurations and construct a policy bank, a structured repository of reusable design strategies, enabling the framework to self-refine without extensive human intervention. We evaluate AgentDisCo on three established deep research benchmarks (DeepResearchBench, DeepConsult, DeepResearchGym) using Gemini-2.5-Pro, achieving performance comparable to or surpassing leading closed-source systems. Observing that existing benchmarks inadequately reflect real-world user needs, we introduce GALA (General AI Life Assistants), a benchmark that mines latent research interests from users' historical browsing behavior. We further develop a rendering agent that converts research reports into visually rich poster presentations, and demonstrate an end-to-end product, AutoResearch Your Interest, which delivers personalized deep research recommendations derived from individual browsing histories.

AI.tldr: AgentDisCo 提出了一种解耦与协作的智能体架构，将深度研究形式化为信息探索与利用之间的对抗优化问题，通过批评智能体和生成智能体的迭代协作生成研究报告，并引入元优化机制实现策略自发现。在多个基准上性能接近或超越闭源系统，并提出了基于用户浏览历史挖掘研究兴趣的 GALA 基准。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究方法将信息探索与利用混为一体，导致研究质量受限。同时，现有基准无法反映真实用户需求，缺乏个性化研究服务。
AI.method: 提出 AgentDisCo 架构，包含批评智能体（评估大纲、优化搜索查询）和生成智能体（检索更新、修订大纲），通过对抗优化迭代改进；引入元优化框架，将生成智能体重用为评分智能体，配合代码生成智能体构建策略库；提出 GALA 基准挖掘用户浏览行为中的潜在研究兴趣。
AI.result: 在 DeepResearchBench、DeepConsult、DeepResearchGym 三个基准上使用 Gemini-2.5-Pro 取得了与领先闭源系统相当或更优的结果；端到端产品 AutoResearch Your Interest 展示了基于浏览历史的个性化研究推荐能力。
AI.conclusion: 解耦探索与利用的对抗优化机制能有效提升深度研究质量；元优化框架使系统具备自我改进能力；基于用户行为挖掘的基准更能反映真实需求。

title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models
summary: Post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models via reinforcement learning (RL) in learned world models has emerged as an effective strategy to adapt to new tasks without costly real-world interactions. However, while using imagined trajectories reduces the sample complexity of policy training, existing methods still heavily rely on task-specific data to fine-tune both the world and reward models, fundamentally limiting their scalability to unseen tasks. To overcome this, we argue that world and reward models should capture transferable physical priors that enable zero-shot inference. We propose RAW-Dream (Reinforcing VLAs in task-Agnostic World Dreams), a new paradigm that completely disentangles world model learning from downstream task dependencies. RAW-Dream utilizes a world model pre-trained on diverse task-free behaviors for predicting future rollouts, and an off-the-shelf Vision-Language Model (VLM) for reward generation. Because both components are task-agnostic, VLAs can be readily finetuned for any new task entirely within this zero-shot imagination. Furthermore, to mitigate world model hallucinations, we introduce a dual-noise verification mechanism to filter out unreliable rollouts. Extensive experiments across simulation and real-world settings demonstrate consistent performance gains, proving that generalized physical priors can effectively substitute for costly task-dependent data, offering a highly scalable roadmap for VLA adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出RAW-Dream框架，通过任务无关的世界模型和视觉语言模型实现零样本想象，在无需任务特定数据的情况下对VLA模型进行强化学习微调。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA后训练方法依赖任务特定数据微调世界模型和奖励模型，难以扩展到未见任务，缺乏可扩展性。
AI.method: 1) 使用预训练的任务无关世界模型预测未来轨迹；2) 利用现成VLM作为零样本奖励生成器；3) 引入双噪声验证机制过滤不可靠的想象轨迹。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，相比于依赖任务特定数据的方法，RAW-Dream在多个未见任务上取得一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通用物理先验可以有效替代昂贵的任务相关数据，为VLA模型的大规模适应性微调提供了一条高度可扩展的路线。

title: FERMI: Exploiting Relations for Membership Inference Against Tabular Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are the leading approach for tabular data synthesis and are increasingly used to share sensitive records. Whether they actually protect privacy has become a pressing question. Membership inference attacks are the standard tool for this purpose, yet existing attacks assume a single-table setting and ignore the multi-relational structure of real sensitive data. A core challenge in assessing privacy risks from membership inference attacks in multi-table settings is how to leverage auxiliary information from relations associated with the target table, such as its parent tables. Particularly, we study a practical setting in which such auxiliary information is available only when training the attack model. At inference time, the attacker observes only the attribute values of the target record from the target table. We propose FERMI (FEature-mapping for Relational Membership Inference), which resolves this gap by enriching single-table features with relational membership signal. Across three tabular diffusion architectures and three real-world relational datasets, FERMI consistently improves attack performance over single-table baselines, with TPR@$0.1$FPR rising by up to 53% over the single-table baseline in the white-box setting and 22% in the black-box setting.

AI.tldr: 提出FERMI方法，利用关系数据库中的父表辅助信息增强成员推断攻击在扩散模型生成表格数据上的效果，在多个架构和数据集上TPR@0.1FPR提升高达53%。
AI.motivation: 现有针对表格数据合成（扩散模型）的成员推断攻击仅关注单表场景，忽略了真实敏感数据中多表关联结构，导致隐私风险评估不准确。
AI.method: 提出FERMI方法，通过特征映射将父表中的关系成员信号融合到单表攻击特征中，在训练阶段利用辅助关系信息，推理阶段仅需目标表记录属性值。
AI.result: 在三种表格扩散架构和三个真实关系数据集上，FERMI在白盒设置下TPR@0.1FPR提升高达53%，黑盒设置下提升22%，均优于单表基线。
AI.conclusion: 多表关联信息对成员推断攻击有显著增强作用，隐私风险评估应考虑关系数据库结构，FERMI为更真实的隐私审计提供了有效工具。

title: EDGER: EDge-Guided with HEatmap Refinement for Generalizable Image Forgery Localization
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 14th International Symposium on Information and Communication Technology (SOICT 2025)
summary: Text-guided inpainting has made image forgery increasingly realistic, challenging both SID and IFL. However, existing methods often struggle to point out suspicious signals across domains. To address this problem, we propose EDGER, a patch-based, dual-branch framework that localizes manipulated regions in arbitrary resolution images without sacrificing native resolution.
