The first branch, Edge-Guided Segmentation, introduces a Frequency-based Edge Detector to emphasize high-frequency inconsistencies at manipulation boundaries, and fine-tunes a SegFormer to fuse RGB and edge features for pixel-level masks. Since edge evidence is most informative only when patches contain both authentic and manipulated pixels, we complement Edge-Guided Segmentation with a Synthetic Heatmapping branch, a classification-based localizer that fine-tunes a CLIP-ViT image encoder with LoRA to flag fully synthetic patches. Together, Synthetic Heatmapping provides coarse, patch-level synthetic priors, while Edge-Guided Segmentation sharpens boundaries within partially manipulated patches, yielding comprehensive localization. Evaluated in the MediaEval 2025, SynthIM challenge, Manipulated Region Localization Task's setting, our approach scales to multi-megapixel imagery and exhibits strong cross-domain generalization. Extensive ablations highlight the complementary roles of frequency-based edge cues and patch-level synthetic priors in driving accurate, resolution-agnostic localization.

AI.tldr: 提出EDGER框架，结合边缘引导分割（频率边缘检测+SegFormer）和合成热图（CLIP-ViT+LoRA）双分支，实现任意分辨率图像的篡改区域定位。
AI.motivation: 文本引导的图像修复使伪造越来越逼真，现有方法难以跨域捕捉可疑信号，需要更鲁棒的篡改定位方法。
AI.method: 双分支框架：(1) Edge-Guided Segmentation分支：频率边缘检测器提取高频不一致性，fine-tune SegFormer融合RGB和边缘特征生成像素级掩码；(2) Synthetic Heatmapping分支：CLIP-ViT+LoRA进行patch级分类，提供全合成区域先验。两分支互补实现综合定位。
AI.result: 在MediaEval 2025 SynthIM挑战赛篡改区域定位任务中，支持多百万像素图像，表现出强跨域泛化能力。消融实验验证了频率边缘线索和patch级合成先验的互补作用。
AI.conclusion: 频率边缘检测与patch级合成先验的互补能有效提升跨域篡改定位性能，且分辨率无关。

title: DreamAvoid: Critical-Phase Test-Time Dreaming to Avoid Failures in VLA Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are often brittle in fine-grained manipulation, where minor action errors during the critical phases can rapidly escalate into irrecoverable failures. Since existing VLA models rely predominantly on successful demonstrations for training, they lack an explicit awareness of failure during these critical phases. To address this, we propose DreamAvoid, a critical-phase test-time dreaming framework that enables VLA models to anticipate and avoid failures. We also introduce an autonomous boundary learning paradigm to refine the system's understanding of the subtle boundary between success and failure. Specifically, we (1) utilize a Dream Trigger to determine whether the execution has entered a critical phase, (2) sample multiple candidate action chunks from the VLA via an Action Proposer, and (3) employ a Dream Evaluator, jointly trained on mixed data (success, failure, and boundary cases), to "dream" the short-horizon futures corresponding to the candidate actions, evaluate their values, and select the optimal action. We conduct extensive evaluations on real-world manipulation tasks and simulation benchmarks. The results demonstrate that DreamAvoid can effectively avoid failures, thereby improving the overall task success rate. Our code is available at https://github.com/XianzheFan/DreamAvoid.

AI.tldr: DreamAvoid 提出了一种"测试时梦境推理"框架，通过在关键阶段采样多个候选动作、用联合训练的梦境评估器预测短期未来并选择最优动作，帮助VLA模型在精细操作中避免失败。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要依赖成功示范训练，缺乏对关键阶段失败风险的显式感知，导致精细操作中微小错误会累积成不可恢复的失败。
AI.method: (1) Dream Trigger判断是否进入关键阶段；(2) Action Proposer从VLA采样多个候选动作块；(3) Dream Evaluator（在成功/失败/边界混合数据上联合训练）"梦境"推演各候选动作的短期未来，评估价值并选择最优动作。
AI.result: 在真实操作任务和仿真基准上的实验表明，DreamAvoid能有效避免失败，提升整体任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 测试时梦境推理+边界学习范式是一种有效的VLA模型失败规避策略，关键阶段的风险感知能显著提升精细操作的鲁棒性。

title: $δ$-mem: Efficient Online Memory for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models increasingly need to accumulate and reuse historical information in long-term assistants and agent systems. Simply expanding the context window is costly and often fails to ensure effective context utilization. We propose $δ$-mem, a lightweight memory mechanism that augments a frozen full-attention backbone with a compact online state of associative memory. $δ$-mem compresses past information into a fixed-size state matrix updated by delta-rule learning, and uses its readout to generate low-rank corrections to the backbone's attention computation during generation. With only an $8\times8$ online memory state, $δ$-mem improves the average score to $1.10\times$ that of the frozen backbone and $1.15\times$ that of the strongest non-$δ$-mem memory baseline. It achieves larger gains on memory-heavy benchmarks, reaching $1.31\times$ on MemoryAgentBench and $1.20\times$ on LoCoMo, while largely preserving general capabilities. These results show that effective memory can be realized through a compact online state directly coupled with attention computation, without full fine-tuning, backbone replacement, or explicit context extension.

AI.tldr: 本文提出δ-mem，一种轻量级记忆机制，通过紧凑的在线关联记忆状态（8×8矩阵）和delta规则学习，在不微调冻结的全注意力骨干网络的情况下，有效压缩和利用历史信息，在多个记忆密集型基准上取得显著提升（MemoryAgentBench提升1.31倍，LoCoMo提升1.20倍）。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在长期助手和智能体系统中需要积累和重用历史信息，但简单地扩展上下文窗口成本高昂且往往无法确保有效利用上下文。现有方法需要全微调、替换骨干网络或显式扩展上下文，缺乏轻量级解决方案。
AI.method: δ-mem在冻结的全注意力骨干网络上附加一个紧凑的在线关联记忆状态。该状态通过delta规则学习（delta-rule learning）将历史信息压缩为固定大小的状态矩阵，并在生成过程中利用该状态的读出结果生成低秩校正项，修正骨干网络的注意力计算。
AI.result: 仅使用8×8的在线记忆状态，δ-mem在平均得分上达到冻结骨干网络的1.10倍，是非δ-mem最强记忆基线的1.15倍。在记忆密集型基准上表现更佳：MemoryAgentBench提升1.31倍，LoCoMo提升1.20倍，同时较好地保持了通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 有效的记忆可以通过紧凑的在线状态直接与注意力计算耦合来实现，无需全微调、替换骨干网络或显式扩展上下文。

title: Multi-Narrow Transformation as a Single-Model Ensemble: Boundary Conditions, Mechanisms, and Failure Modes
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Preprint version of a manuscript submitted to Neurocomputing
summary: Single-model ensembles (SMEs) have attracted attention as a way to approximate some of the benefits of deep ensembles within a single network. However, under an approximately matched parameter budget, it remains unclear whether model capacity should be concentrated in a single wide pathway or redistributed into many narrow and independent members. We investigate this question through the Multi-Narrow (MN) transformation, which converts a baseline CNN into an SME of narrow, path-wise independent branches while approximately preserving the dominant parameter budget. We systematically compare Single-Wide and Multi-Narrow configurations across different training-data regimes, architectures, and datasets. The results show that the effectiveness of MN is strongly data-dependent: weakly partitioned or baseline-wide models are preferable in data-rich settings, whereas highly partitioned MN models consistently outperform the baseline in low-data settings. This tendency is reproduced across multiple CNN architectures and image-classification datasets, suggesting that it is not specific to a single benchmark or model family. Analysis of internal representations shows that high-MN models learn more diverse and less redundant path-wise features. In low-data regimes, this diversity is broadly utilized and improves generalization, whereas in data-rich regimes, training becomes imbalanced and prediction is dominated by a small subset of paths. These findings clarify when and why Multi-Narrow transformation is effective, and provide practical guidance for allocating model capacity between width and member multiplicity under a limited budget.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在参数预算相近的情况下，将模型容量集中在单个宽网络还是分散到多个窄分支（Multi-Narrow, MN）中更有效。实验表明，MN在低数据场景下表现更好，而单宽网络在数据充足时更优。
AI.motivation: 探究在相近参数预算下，单模型集成（SMEs）中模型容量应该集中在一个宽通路还是分散到多个独立窄分支中的问题，为模型容量分配提供指导。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Narrow (MN)变换，将基线CNN转换为由窄且路径独立的分支组成的单模型集成；在不同数据规模、架构和数据集上系统比较Single-Wide和Multi-Narrow配置。
AI.result: MN的有效性高度依赖数据量：数据充足时单宽网络更优，数据稀缺时高MN模型持续优于基线；高MN模型学习到更多样化且冗余更少的路径特征。
AI.conclusion: 明确了Multi-Narrow变换在何种条件下有效，为有限预算下模型容量在宽度与成员多样性之间的分配提供了实践指导。

title: Robust Promptable Video Object Segmentation
summary: The performance of promptable video object segmentation (PVOS) models substantially degrades under input corruptions, which prevents PVOS deployment in safety-critical domains. This paper offers the first comprehensive study on robust PVOS (RobustPVOS). We first construct a new, comprehensive benchmark with two real-world evaluation datasets of 351 video clips and more than 2,500 object masks under real-world adverse conditions. At the same time, we generate synthetic training data by applying diverse and temporally varying corruptions to existing VOS datasets. Moreover, we present a new RobustPVOS method, dubbed Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA). The key to successfully performing RobustPVOS is two-fold: effectively handling object-specific degradation and ensuring temporal consistency in predictions. MoGA leverages object-specific representations maintained in memory across frames to condition the robustification process, which allows the model to handle each tracked object differently in a temporally consistent way. Extensive experiments on our benchmark validate MoGA's efficacy, showing consistent and significant improvements across diverse corruption types on both synthetic and real-world datasets, establishing a strong baseline for future RobustPVOS research. Our benchmark is publicly available at https://sohyun-l.github.io/RobustPVOS_project_page/.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究鲁棒视频目标分割（RobustPVOS），构建了新基准（含合成数据和真实世界恶劣条件下的351个视频片段、2500+目标掩码），并提出Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA)方法，通过利用跨帧的物体特定表征来条件化鲁棒化过程，有效处理物体特异性退化并保证时序一致性，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: Promptable视频目标分割模型在输入损坏（如恶劣环境条件）下性能严重下降，阻碍了其在安全关键领域的部署，但该问题此前未被系统研究。
AI.method: 提出了Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA)，核心思想是利用跨帧内存中维护的物体特定表征来条件化鲁棒化过程，使模型能以时序一致的方式差异化处理每个跟踪目标。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上，MoGA在各种损坏类型下均取得了一致且显著的改进，建立了鲁棒PVOS的强基线。
AI.conclusion: MoGA有效解决了PVOS中物体特异性退化和时序一致性两大关键问题，为未来鲁棒PVOS研究提供了基准和方法基础。

title: Entropy Polarity in Reinforcement Fine-Tuning: Direction, Asymmetry, and Control
summary: Policy entropy has emerged as a fundamental measure for understanding and controlling exploration in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for LLMs. However, existing entropy-aware methods mainly regulate entropy through global objectives, while the token-level mechanism by which sampled policy updates reshape policy entropy remains underexplored. In this work, we develop a theoretical framework of entropy mechanics in RLVR. Our analysis yields a first-order approximation of the entropy change, giving rise to entropy polarity, a signed token-level quantity that predicts how much a sampled update expands or contracts entropy. This analysis further reveals a structural asymmetry: reinforcing frequent high-probability tokens triggers contraction tendencies, whereas expansive tendencies typically require lower-probability samples or stronger distributional correction. Empirically, we show that entropy polarity reliably predicts entropy changes, and that positive and negative polarity branches play complementary roles in preserving exploration while strengthening exploitation. Building on these insights, we propose Polarity-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO), which preserves both polarity branches and implements entropy control through advantage reweighting. With the empirical entropy trajectory as an online phase signal, PAPO adaptively reallocates optimization pressure between entropy-expanding and entropy-contracting updates. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and agentic benchmarks show that PAPO consistently outperforms competitive baselines, while delivering superior training efficiency and substantial reward improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵极性（entropy polarity）概念，用于量化RLVR中每个token更新对策略熵的扩张/收缩影响，并基于此设计PAPO算法，通过优势重加权自适应调节熵控制，在数学推理和智能体任务上取得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有熵感知方法主要依赖全局目标调控探索-利用平衡，缺乏对token级别更新如何重塑策略熵的细粒度理解。作者希望从理论上建立RLVR中熵变化的微观机制，揭示不同token采样对熵影响的结构不对称性。
AI.method: 1) 推导熵变化的一阶近似，定义熵极性（signed token-level quantity）预测更新对熵的影响方向；2) 分析发现结构不对称性：高概率token强化倾向于收缩熵，低概率token或强分布校正才能扩张熵；3) 提出PAPO，保留正负极性分支，通过优势重加权自适应调节优化压力在熵扩张/收缩更新间的分配，以在线熵轨迹作为相位信号。
AI.result: 在数学推理和智能体benchmark上，PAPO一致优于竞争基线，训练效率更高，奖励提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 熵极性可靠预测熵变化，正负极性分支在保持探索与强化利用中起互补作用。基于此的自适应熵控制方法能有效提升RLVR训练效果。

title: Classifier Context Rot: Monitor Performance Degrades with Context Length
summary: Monitoring coding agents for dangerous behavior using language models requires classifying transcripts that often exceed 500K tokens, but prior agent monitoring benchmarks rarely contain transcripts longer than 100K tokens. We show that when used as classifiers, current frontier models fail to notice dangerous actions more often in longer transcripts. In particular, on a dataset that requires identifying when a coding agent takes a subtly dangerous action, Opus 4.6, GPT 5.4, and Gemini 3.1 miss these actions $2\times$ to $30\times$ more often when they occur after 800K tokens of benign activity than when they occur on their own. We also show that these weaknesses can be partially mitigated with prompting techniques such as periodic reminders throughout the transcript and may be mitigated further with better post-training. Monitor evaluations that do not consider long-context degradation are likely overestimating monitor performance.

AI.tldr: 论文发现当前顶级语言模型作为分类器监控编码代理时，在长上下文（超过500K token）中识别危险行为的失败率显著更高，在800K token后漏检率增加2到30倍，但可通过周期性提醒等提示技术部分缓解。
AI.motivation: 现有代理监控基准测试的转录长度通常不超过100K token，而实际监控场景中转录常超过500K token，导致对模型长上下文下监控能力的评估不准确。
AI.method: 使用Opus 4.6、GPT 5.4和Gemini 3.1等前沿模型，在长转录数据集上测试其识别编码代理危险行为的能力，并对比不同上下文位置（特别是800K token后）的检测表现，同时尝试周期性提醒等提示策略。
AI.result: 前沿模型在长上下文中漏检危险行为的概率是短上下文中的2到30倍；周期性提醒可部分缓解这一问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前评估未考虑长上下文退化，可能高估监控性能；需通过更好的后训练或提示技术来改进长上下文监控能力。

title: Primal-Dual Policy Optimization for Linear CMDPs with Adversarial Losses
summary: Existing work on linear constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) has primarily focused on stochastic settings, where the losses and costs are either fixed or drawn from fixed distributions. However, such formulations are inherently vulnerable to adversarially changing environments. To overcome this limitation, we propose a primal-dual policy optimization algorithm for online finite-horizon {adversarial} linear CMDPs, where the losses are adversarially chosen under full-information feedback and the costs are stochastic under bandit feedback. Our algorithm is the \emph{first} to achieve sublinear regret and constraint violation bounds in this setting, both bounded by $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(K^{3/4})$, where $K$ denotes the number of episodes. The algorithm introduces and runs with a new class of policies, which we call weighted LogSumExp softmax policies, designed to adapt to adversarially chosen loss functions. Our main result stems from the following key contributions: (i) a new covering number argument for the weighted LogSumExp softmax policies, and (ii) two novel algorithmic components -- periodic policy mixing and a regularized dual update -- which allow us to effectively control both the covering number and the dual variable. We also report numerical results that validate our theoretical findings on the performance of the algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对在线有限时域对抗性线性约束马尔可夫决策过程的原始-对偶策略优化算法，首次在该设置下实现了次线性遗憾和约束违反界（均为O~(K^{3/4})），通过引入加权LogSumExp softmax策略、周期性策略混合和正则化对偶更新等创新组件来实现。
AI.motivation: 现有线性CMDP工作主要关注随机环境（损失固定或来自固定分布），但这类方法难以应对对抗性变化的环境。本文旨在解决在线对抗性线性CMDP问题，同时处理对抗性损失和随机成本。
AI.method: 1) 提出加权LogSumExp softmax策略族以自适应对抗性损失；2) 提出周期性策略混合机制；3) 引入正则化对偶更新方法；4) 通过覆盖数论证分析策略复杂度。
AI.result: 算法在对抗性损失（全信息反馈）与随机成本（Bandit反馈）的混合设置下，首次实现了O~(K^{3/4})级别的遗憾和约束违反界，并通过数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为对抗性线性CMDP提供了首个具有理论保证的算法，加权LogSumExp策略和周期性混合等技术对未来对抗性强化学习研究具有参考价值。

title: L2P: Unlocking Latent Potential for Pixel Generation
summary: Pixel diffusion models have recently regained attention for visual generation. However, training advanced pixel-space models from scratch demands prohibitive computational and data resources. To address this, we propose the Latent-to-Pixel (L2P) transfer paradigm, an efficient framework that directly harnesses the rich knowledge of pre-trained LDMs to build powerful pixel-space models. Specifically, L2P discards the VAE in favor of large-patch tokenization and freezes the source LDM's intermediate layers, exclusively training shallow layers to learn the latent-to-pixel transformation. By utilizing LDM-generated synthetic images as the sole training corpus, L2P fits an already smooth data manifold, enabling rapid convergence with zero real-data collection. This strategy allows L2P to seamlessly migrate massive latent priors to the pixel space using only 8 GPUs. Furthermore, eliminating the VAE memory bottleneck unlocks native 4K ultra-high resolution generation. Extensive experiments across mainstream LDM architectures show that L2P incurs negligible training overhead, yet performs on par with the source LDM on DPG-Bench and reaches 93% performance on GenEval.

AI.tldr: 提出 Latent-to-Pixel (L2P) 迁移范式，利用预训练 LDM 的隐空间知识构建像素级扩散模型，仅需少量训练即可达到与原模型相当的性能，并支持原生 4K 分辨率生成。
AI.motivation: 从头训练像素级扩散模型需要巨大的计算和数据资源，而现有的隐空间扩散模型（LDM）已积累了丰富的先验知识。L2P 旨在高效复用这些知识，降低像素空间模型的训练成本。
AI.method: 1) 舍弃 VAE，采用大块分词（large-patch tokenization）；2) 冻结源 LDM 的中间层，仅训练浅层学习隐空间到像素空间的变换；3) 仅使用 LDM 生成的合成图像作为训练数据，无需真实数据。
AI.result: 在 DPG-Bench 上与源 LDM 性能持平，在 GenEval 上达到 93% 性能；仅需 8 块 GPU 即可完成迁移训练；支持原生 4K 超高清分辨率生成。
AI.conclusion: L2P 是一种高效、低成本的像素级扩散模型构建范式，展示了从隐空间先验向像素空间迁移的可行性，为高分辨率视觉生成提供了新路径。

title: ROMER: Expert Replacement and Router Calibration for Robust MoE LLMs on Analog Compute-in-Memory Systems
summary: Large language models (LLMs) with mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures achieve remarkable scalability by sparsely activating a subset of experts per token, yet their frequent expert switching creates memory bandwidth bottlenecks that compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures are well-suited to mitigate. However, analog CIM systems suffer from inherent hardware imperfections that perturb stored weights, and its negative impact on MoE-based LLMs in noisy CIM environments remains unexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic investigation of MoE-based LLMs under noise model calibrated with real chip measurements, revealing that hardware noise critically disrupts expert load balance and renders clean-trained routing decisions consistently suboptimal. Based on these findings, we propose ROMER, a post-training calibration framework that (1) replaces underactivated experts with high-frequency ones to restore load balance, and (2) recalibrates router logits via percentile-based normalization to stabilize routing under noise. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that ROMER achieves up to 58.6\%, 58.8\%, and 59.8\% reduction in perplexity under real-chip noise conditions for DeepSeek-MoE, Qwen-MoE, and OLMoE, respectively, establishing its effectiveness and generalizability across diverse MoE architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了MoE大模型在真实模拟芯片噪声下的鲁棒性问题，发现硬件噪声会破坏专家负载均衡并导致路由决策失效，提出了一种后训练校准框架ROMER，通过替换低激活专家和基于百分位的路由logits归一化来恢复性能，在多个MoE架构上实现了高达58-60%的困惑度降低。
AI.motivation: 模拟存内计算系统存在固有权重扰动问题，而MoE架构中频繁的专家切换恰好会造成内存带宽瓶颈，CIM架构有潜力缓解这一问题；然而，硬件噪声对MoE模型的影响此前未被系统研究，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出ROMER后训练校准框架：(1) 用高频激活专家替换欠激活专家以恢复负载均衡；(2) 通过基于百分位的归一化重新校准路由logits，使路由在噪声下保持稳定。
AI.result: 在真实芯片噪声条件下，DeepSeek-MoE、Qwen-MoE和OLMoE的困惑度分别降低了58.6%、58.8%和59.8%，验证了方法在不同MoE架构上的有效性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 硬件噪声会严重破坏MoE模型的专家负载均衡和路由决策，但通过合理的后处理校准可以显著缓解这一问题，ROMER框架具有跨架构的泛化能力。

title: ProfiliTable: Profiling-Driven Tabular Data Processing via Agentic Workflows
summary: Table processing-including cleaning, transformation, augmentation, and matching-is a foundational yet error-prone stage in real-world data pipelines. While recent LLM-based approaches show promise for automating such tasks, they often struggle in practice due to ambiguous instructions, complex task structures, and the lack of structured feedback, resulting in syntactically correct but semantically flawed code. To address these challenges, we propose ProfiliTable, an autonomous multi-agent framework centered on dynamic profiling, which constructs and iteratively refines a unified execution context through interactive exploration, knowledge-augmented synthesis, and feedback-driven refinement. ProfiliTable integrates (i) a Profiler that performs ReAct-style data exploration to build semantic understanding, (ii) a Generator that retrieves curated operators to synthesize task-aware code, and (iii) an Evaluator-Summarizer loop that injects execution scores and diagnostic insights to enable closed-loop refinement. Extensive experiments on a diverse benchmark covering 18 tabular task types demonstrate that ProfiliTable consistently outperforms strong baselines, particularly in complex multi-step scenarios. These results highlight the critical role of dynamic profiling in reliably translating ambiguous user intents into robust and governance-compliant table transformations.

AI.tldr: ProfiliTable 是一个面向表格处理任务的自主多智能体框架，通过动态分析构建统一执行上下文，结合探索、知识增强合成和反馈驱动优化，在三智能体协作下显著提升复杂多步骤表格转换任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的表格自动化处理方法常因指令模糊、任务结构复杂、缺乏结构化反馈而产生语法正确但语义错误的代码，亟需一个能理解用户意图并进行闭环优化的框架。
AI.method: 提出ProfiliTable框架，包含三个智能体：(i) Profiler - 执行ReAct风格的数据探索建立语义理解；(ii) Generator - 检索知识库中经过筛选的操作符合成任务感知代码；(iii) Evaluator-Summarizer - 注入执行得分和诊断洞察实现闭环优化。三者通过动态分析迭代构建和精炼统一执行上下文。
AI.result: 在涵盖18种表格任务类型的多样化基准测试上，ProfiliTable在复杂多步骤场景中持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态分析在将模糊用户意图可靠地转化为鲁棒且符合治理规范的表格转换中起到关键作用。

title: Fast MoE Inference via Predictive Prefetching and Expert Replication
summary: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has become a fundamental building block in state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs), improving domain-specific expertise in LLMs and scaling model capacity without proportionally increasing their computational overhead. However, MoE inference often suffers from suboptimal GPU utilization, load imbalance, and elevated latency arising from multiple tokens waiting on the same experts for their computation which arises from sparsity of expert activation. To address these challenges, we propose a dynamic expert replication strategy that predicts which experts are likely to be overloaded and replicates them for upcoming batches of tokens. The replicated experts process batch tokens concurrently across layers, which leads to improved parallelism, shorter GPU idle time, and significantly faster inference. Experimental evaluations conducted on large-scale MoE models, including Switch-base-128 and Switch-base-256, demonstrate that our method achieves near-complete GPU utilization (approx 100%), leading to upto 3x improvement in inference speed while preserving approximately 90-95% of the performance of baseline architectures

AI.tldr: 提出了一种动态专家复制策略，通过预测并复制可能过载的专家，使复制的专家并行处理批次令牌，从而提升MoE推理的GPU利用率（接近100%）和速度（最高3倍），同时保持约90-95%的基线性能。
AI.motivation: MoE推理存在GPU利用率低、负载不均衡和高延迟问题，根源在于专家激活稀疏性导致多个令牌等待同一专家计算。
AI.method: 动态专家复制策略：预测可能过载的专家，将其复制后用于后续批次的令牌处理，复制的专家跨层并行处理批次令牌。
AI.result: 在Switch-base-128和Switch-base-256上实现接近100%的GPU利用率，推理速度提升最高3倍，性能保持约90-95%。
AI.conclusion: 动态专家复制能有效解决MoE推理的负载不均衡和低利用率问题，在不显著牺牲性能的前提下大幅提升推理效率。

title: FAME: Feature Activation Map Explanation on Image Classification and Face Recognition
summary: Deep Learning has revolutionized machine learning, reaching unprecedented levels of accuracy, but at the cost of reduced interpretability. Especially in image processing systems, deep networks transform local pixel information into more global concepts in a highly obscured manner. Explainable AI methods for image processing try to shed light on this issue by highlighting the regions of the image that are important for the prediction task. Among these, Class Activation Mapping (CAM) and its gradient-based variants compute attributions based on the feature map and upscale them to the image resolution, assuming that feature map locations are influenced only by underlying regions. Perturbation-based methods, such as CorrRISE, on the other hand, try to provide pixel-level attributions by perturbing the input with fixed patches and checking how the output of the network changes. In this work, we propose Feature Activation Map Explanation (FAME), which combines both worlds by using network gradients to compute changes to the input image, manipulating it in a gradient-driven way rather than using fixed patches. We apply this technique on two common tasks, image classification and face recognition, and show that CAM's above-mentioned assumption does not hold for deeper networks. We qualitatively and quantitively show that FAME produces attribution maps that are competitive state-of-the-art systems. Our code is available: {\footnotesize https://github.com/AIML-IfI/fame.}

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAME方法，结合CAM和扰动方法的优点，利用梯度驱动方式生成图像归因图，在图像分类和人脸识别任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法存在局限：CAM假设特征图位置仅受底层区域影响，该假设在深层网络中不成立；基于扰动的方法使用固定patch扰动，不够灵活。作者希望结合两者优势，提出更精准的归因方法。
AI.method: FAME利用网络梯度计算输入图像的梯度驱动变化，而非使用固定patch扰动。通过梯度引导的方式生成像素级归因图，结合了CAM的特征图思路和扰动方法的像素级归因能力。
AI.result: 定性定量实验表明FAME在图像分类和人脸识别任务上生成了具有竞争力的归因图，达到SOTA水平。同时揭示了CAM假设（特征图位置仅受底层区域影响）在深层网络中不成立。
AI.conclusion: FAME有效结合了两类方法的优势，为深层网络提供了更可靠的归因解释，且代码已开源。

title: More Edits, More Stable: Understanding the Lifelong Normalization in Sequential Model Editing
summary: Lifelong Model Editing aims to continuously update evolving facts in Large Language Models while preserving unrelated knowledge and general capabilities, yet it remains plagued by catastrophic forgetting and model collapse. Empirically, we find that recent editors resilient over long horizons share the same core strategy: Lifelong Normalization (LN), which normalizes value gradients using running statistics. Removing LN causes immediate performance collapse, and we observe a counter-intuitive positive cumulative effect where early edits can promote the success of future edits. Yet the mechanism of LN remains a "black box", leaving its precise role in lifelong stability poorly understood. In this work, we provide the first theoretical account of LN in the lifelong regime. Our analysis reveals a self-reinforcing stability loop and proves that, when combined with ridge-regularized regression, LN yields parameter updates with asymptotic orthogonality and bounded norms, directly mitigating forgetting and systemic collapse. Based on these insights, we derive StableEdit, which strengthens this stability loop via an explicit warm-up stage and full whitening, improving long-horizon stability at minimal overhead. Extensive experiments validate our theory and demonstrate competitive performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/MINE-USTC/StableEdit.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Lifelong Model Editing中"终身归一化(LN)"机制对防止灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃的关键作用，首次从理论上证明LN结合岭回归可产生渐近正交且有界范数的参数更新，并据此提出StableEdit方法，通过显式预热和完全白化增强稳定性。
AI.motivation: Lifelong Model Editing面临灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃的严重问题，而近期成功的方法都依赖Lifelong Normalization策略，但其工作机制一直是"黑盒"，缺乏理论理解。
AI.method: 首先通过理论分析揭示了LN在终身编辑中的自稳循环机制，证明LN与岭回归结合能实现参数更新的渐近正交性和有界范数。基于此提出StableEdit，引入显式预热阶段和完全白化来强化这一稳定性循环。
AI.result: 实验验证了理论分析的正确性，StableEdit在长期稳定性上表现优异，且仅需极少的额外开销。特别发现了早期编辑能促进后续编辑成功的反直觉正累积效应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次为Lifelong Normalization在终身模型编辑中的作用提供了严格的理论解释，证明了其防止遗忘和崩溃的根本机制，并提出了实用有效的改进方案StableEdit。

title: Semantic Reward Collapse and the Preservation of Epistemic Integrity in Adaptive AI Systems
comment: 15 pages including references. Position and framework paper. Companion empirical work available at arXiv:2604.17587
summary:
Recent advances in reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and preference optimization have substantially improved the usability, coherence, and safety of large language models. However, recurring behaviors such as performative certainty, hallucinated continuity, calibration drift, sycophancy, and suppression of visible uncertainty suggest unresolved structural issues within scalarized preference optimization systems.
  We propose Semantic Reward Collapse (SRC): the compression of semantically distinct forms of evaluative dissatisfaction into generalized optimization signals. Under SRC, categories such as factual incorrectness, uncertainty disclosure, formatting dissatisfaction, latency, and social preference may become entangled within a shared reward topology despite representing fundamentally different epistemic classes.
  We argue that adaptive reasoning systems operating under generalized evaluative pressure may drift toward suppression of visible epistemic failure rather than preservation of calibrated uncertainty integrity. These behaviors are framed strictly as optimization consequences rather than evidence of deception or anthropomorphic agency.
  Drawing on institutional proxy collapse, metric gaming, software reliability engineering, and human learning theory, we propose that uncertainty disclosure and escalation behavior should be treated as protected epistemic conduct rather than globally penalized task incompletion.
  Finally, we introduce Constitutional Reward Stratification (CRS), a domain-aware reward framework intended to preserve differentiated epistemic attribution within adaptive learning systems. We present CRS not as a validated solution, but as a testable governance-oriented research direction requiring further empirical investigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"语义奖励坍缩"（SRC）概念，指出RLHF中不同性质的评估不满（如事实错误、不确定性披露、格式问题等）被压缩为单一的优化信号，导致模型产生虚假自信、幻觉、校准漂移等行为。作者提出"宪法性奖励分层"（CRS）框架，主张将不确定性披露作为受保护的认知行为，而非统一惩罚的任务未完成。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF和偏好优化系统尽管提升了LLM的可用性和安全性，但反复出现表演性自信、幻觉连续性、校准漂移、谄媚等行为问题，暗示标量化偏好优化系统存在结构性问题。作者希望从理论层面解释这些行为的根源，并探索解决方案。
AI.method: 理论分析为主：借鉴制度代理坍缩、指标博弈、软件可靠性工程和人类学习理论，提出语义奖励坍缩（SRC）作为解释框架，并引入宪法性奖励分层（CRS）作为领域感知的奖励框架，用于保持自适应学习系统中不同认知属性的区分度。
AI.result: 提出了SRC和CRS两个核心概念框架，尚未提供实证验证。SRC解释了为何不同认知类别（事实错误、不确定性披露、格式不满意等）在共享奖励拓扑中被纠缠；CRS提供了保护性认知行为（如不确定性披露）的治理导向研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性披露和升级行为应被视为受保护的认知行为，而非被全局惩罚的任务未完成。CRS作为可测试的治理导向研究方向提出，需进一步实证验证。

title: Sharpen Your Flow: Sharpness-Aware Sampling for Flow Matching
summary: Flow matching models generate samples by numerically integrating a learned velocity field, with each integration step requiring a neural network evaluation. Fast generation therefore requires using a small fixed evaluation budget effectively: the key question is not only how to integrate the flow, but where the sampler should spend its steps. We propose SharpEuler, a training-free sampler that profiles a pretrained model offline by estimating where the learned velocity field changes most rapidly along calibration trajectories. This finite-difference estimate defines a solver-aware sharpness profile, which is smoothed and converted by a quantile transform into a timestep grid for any desired inference budget. At test time, sampling remains ordinary Euler integration with the same number of model evaluations as a uniform schedule. We justify SharpEuler using three principles: a numerical principle identifying trajectory acceleration as the leading source of Euler discretization error, a variational principle deriving sharpness-based power-law timestep densities, and a statistical guarantee showing that the finite-sample calibrated sampler is stable at the terminal distribution level. Our experiments show that SharpEuler improves sample quality at fixed budgets, reducing inter-mode leakage and increasing mode coverage.

AI.tldr: SharpEuler提出一种无需训练的高效采样器，通过离线分析预训练流匹配模型的velocity field变化剧烈程度（sharpness），自适应地分配时间步长，从而在固定评估预算下提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 流匹配模型生成样本时需要对velocity field进行多次神经网络评估，而固定评估预算下如何有效分配计算资源是关键问题。现有方法通常采用均匀时间步长，未考虑不同区域velocity field变化剧烈程度的差异，导致计算效率低下。
AI.method: SharpEuler通过离线校准：1) 沿校准轨迹用有限差分估计velocity field的局部变化率（sharpness）；2) 对sharpness profile进行平滑和分位数变换，生成非均匀时间步长网格；3) 推理时使用与均匀采样相同数量的Euler步数，但步长分布更优。
AI.result: 实验表明SharpEuler在固定计算预算下提升了样本质量，减少了模态间泄漏（inter-mode leakage），增加了模式覆盖率（mode coverage）。
AI.conclusion: 通过离线校准sharpness来指导时间步长分配，可以在不增加推理计算量的情况下显著提升流匹配模型的生成质量，该方法具有数值理论、变分原理和统计保证三方面的理论支撑。

title: What-Where Transformer: A Slot-Centric Visual Backbone for Concurrent Representation and Localization
summary: Many image understanding tasks involve identifying what is present and where it appears. However, tasks that address where, such as object discovery, detection, and segmentation, are often considerably more complex than image classification, which primarily focuses on what. One possible reason is that classification-oriented backbones tend to emphasize semantic information about what, while implicitly entangling or suppressing information about where. In this work, we focus on an inductive bias termed what-where separation, which encourages models to represent object appearance and spatial location in a decomposed manner. To incorporate this bias throughout an attentive backbone in the style of Vision Transformer (ViT), we propose the What-Where Transformer (WWT). Our method introduces two key novel designs: (1) it treats tokens as representations of what and attention maps as representations of where, and processes them in concurrent feed-forward modules via a multi-stream, slot-based architecture; (2) it reuses both the final-layer tokens and attention maps for downstream tasks, and directly exposes them to gradients derived from task losses, thereby facilitating more effective and explicit learning of localization. We demonstrate that even under standard single-label classification-based supervision on ImageNet, WWT exhibits emergent multiple object discovery directly from raw attention maps, rather than via additional postprocessing such as token clustering. Furthermore, WWT achieves superior performance compared to ViT-based methods on zero-shot object discovery and weakly supervised semantic segmentation, and it is transferable to various localization setups with minimal modifications. Code will be published after acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出What-Where Transformer (WWT)，通过解耦物体外观（what）和空间位置（where）的归纳偏置，使得ViT在图像分类监督下也能涌现出多目标发现能力，并提升零样本目标发现和弱监督语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分类导向的骨干网络倾向于强调"是什么"的语义信息，而隐式地纠缠或抑制"在哪里"的位置信息。然而许多视觉任务（目标发现、检测、分割）都需要明确的位置信息，现有方法通常需要复杂的后处理或额外模块。
AI.method: 提出WWT：1) 将token视为what表示，注意力图视为where表示，通过多流、基于slot的并行前馈架构分别处理；2) 同时复用最终层的token和注意力图用于下游任务，并直接暴露给任务损失的梯度，显式学习定位。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类监督下，WWT能从原始注意力图中直接涌现多目标发现能力（无需后处理）；在零样本目标发现和弱监督语义分割上优于ViT基线；可迁移至多种定位设置。
AI.conclusion: what-where分离的归纳偏置能有效提升ViT在定位相关任务上的表现，且实现简单、迁移性强。

title: GEAR: Granularity-Adaptive Advantage Reweighting for LLM Agents via Self-Distillation
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a widely used post-training approach for LLM agents, where training commonly relies on outcome-level rewards that provide only coarse supervision. While finer-grained credit assignment is promising for effective policy updates, obtaining reliable local credit and assigning it to the right parts of the long-horizon trajectory remains an open challenge. In this paper, we propose Granularity-adaptivE Advantage Reweighting (GEAR), an adaptive-granularity credit assignment framework that reshapes the trajectory-level GRPO advantage using token- and segment-level signals derived from self-distillation. GEAR compares an on-policy student with a ground-truth-conditioned teacher to obtain a reference-guided divergence signal for identifying adaptive segment boundaries and modulating local advantage weights. This divergence often spikes at the onset of a semantic deviation, while later tokens in the same autoregressive continuation may return to low divergence. GEAR therefore treats such spikes as anchors for adaptive credit regions: where the student remains aligned with the teacher, token-level resolution is preserved; where it departs, GEAR groups the corresponding continuation into an adaptive segment and uses the divergence at the departure point to modulate the segment' s advantage. Experiments across eight mathematical reasoning and agentic tool-use benchmarks with Qwen3 4B and 8B models show that GEAR consistently outperforms standard GRPO, self-distillation-only baselines, and token- or turn-level credit-assignment methods. The gains are especially strong on benchmarks with lower GRPO baseline accuracy, reaching up to around 20\% over GRPO, suggesting that the proposed adaptive reweighting scheme is especially useful in more challenging long-horizon settings.

AI.tldr: GEAR是一种自适应粒度的信用分配框架，通过自蒸馏获取token级和segment级信号，重塑GRPO优势函数，在数学推理和工具使用任务上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练方法（如GRPO）仅使用粗粒度的outcome-level奖励，缺乏细粒度信用分配。长程轨迹中如何可靠地将局部信用分配到正确位置仍是一个开放挑战。
AI.method: 提出GEAR框架：1）通过on-policy学生与ground-truth条件教师对比，获取参考引导的散度信号；2）利用散度峰值识别自适应segment边界；3）对与教师保持一致的部分保留token级分辨率，对偏离部分聚合成自适应segment并用散度调制优势权重。
AI.result: 在Qwen3 4B和8B上，覆盖8个数学推理和工具使用基准，GEAR持续优于GRPO、自蒸馏基线以及token/turn级信用分配方法。在GRPO基线准确率较低的基准上提升高达约20%。
AI.conclusion: 自适应粒度重加权方案在更具挑战性的长程任务中特别有效，验证了利用自蒸馏实现细粒度信用分配的可行性。

title: Formalize, Don't Optimize: The Heuristic Trap in LLM-Generated Combinatorial Solvers
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to solve complex combinatorial problems through direct reasoning, so recent neuro-symbolic systems increasingly use them to synthesize executable solvers. A central design question is how the LLM should represent the solver, and whether it should also attempt to optimize search. We introduce CP-SynC-XL, a benchmark of 100 combinatorial problems (4,577 instances), and evaluate three solver-construction paradigms: native algorithmic search (Python), constraint modeling through a Python solver API (Python + OR-Tools), and declarative constraint modeling (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). We find a consistent representational divergence: Python + OR-Tools attains the highest correctness across LLMs, while MiniZinc + OR-Tools has lower absolute coverage despite using the same OR-Tools back-end. Native Python is the most likely to return a schema-valid solution that fails verification, whereas solver-backed paths preserve higher conditional fidelity. On the heuristic axis, prompting for search optimization yields only small median speed-ups (1.03-1.12x) and a strongly bimodal effect: many instances slow down, and correctness drops sharply on a long tail of problems. A paired code-level audit traces these regressions to a recurring heuristic trap. Under an efficiency-oriented prompt, the LLM may replace complete search with local approximations (Python), inject unverified bounds (Python + OR-Tools), or add redundant declarative machinery that overwhelms or over-constrains the model (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). These findings support a conservative design principle for LLM-generated combinatorial solvers: use the LLM primarily to formalize variables, constraints, and objectives for verified solvers, and separately check any LLM-authored search optimization before use.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建CP-SynC-XL基准（100个组合问题，4577个实例），评估了三种LLM生成求解器的范式：原生Python、Python+OR-Tools、MiniZinc+OR-Tools。发现Python+OR-Tools正确率最高，而LLM尝试优化搜索的效果有限（中位数加速仅1.03-1.12倍），且常因"启发式陷阱"导致正确率下降。主张保守原则：LLM应仅用于为已验证求解器形式化变量和约束，搜索优化需单独验证。
AI.motivation: LLM难以通过直接推理解决复杂组合问题，因此神经符号系统常利用LLM合成可执行求解器。但如何表示求解器（原生算法、约束建模还是声明式建模）以及是否应让LLM同时优化搜索，是核心设计问题，缺少系统性比较。
AI.method: 构建CP-SynC-XL基准（100个问题，4577个实例）；评估三种求解器构建范式：原生Python算法搜索、Python+OR-Tools（通过求解器API建模）、MiniZinc+OR-Tools（声明式建模）；分析LLM优化搜索的效果；进行配对代码级审计追踪回归原因。
AI.result: Python+OR-Tools正确率最高；MiniZinc+OR-Tools覆盖率最低（即使使用相同后端）；原生Python最易验证失败但格式正确；搜索优化仅带来1.03-1.12x中位数加速，呈现双峰效应（多数实例变慢且正确率下降）。代码审计发现启发式陷阱：LLM用局部近似替代完全搜索、注入未验证界、或添加冗余声明式约束导致过约束。
AI.conclusion: 建议保守设计原则：LLM应仅用于为已验证求解器形式化变量、约束和目标；任何LLM生成的搜索优化需单独验证后再使用。

title: VNDUQE: Information-Theoretic Novelty Detection using Deep Variational Information Bottleneck
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) samples is critical for safe deployment of neural networks in safety-critical applications. While maximum softmax probability (MSP) provides a simple baseline, it lacks theoretical grounding and suffers from miscalibration. We propose VNDUQE (VIB-based Novelty Detection and Uncertainty Quantification for Nondestructive Evaluation), which investigates novelty detection through the Deep Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB), which explicitly constrains information flow through learned representations. We train VIB models on MNIST with held-out digit classes and evaluate OOD detection using information-theoretic metrics: KL divergence and prediction entropy. Our results reveal complementary detection signals: KL divergence achieves perfect detection (100\% AUROC on noise) on far-OOD samples (noise, domain shift), while prediction entropy excels at near-OOD detection (94.7\% AUROC on novel digit classes). A parallel detection strategy combining both metrics achieves 95.3\% average AUROC and 92\% true positive rate at 5\% false positive rate, which is a 32 percentage point improvement over baseline MSP (85.0\% AUROC, 60.1\% TPR). Compression via the information bottleneck principle ($β=10^{-3}$) reduces Expected Calibration Error by 38\%, demonstrating that information-theoretic constraints produce fundamentally more reliable uncertainty estimates. These findings directly support active learning with expensive computational oracles, where well-calibrated novelty detection enables principled threshold selection for oracle queries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VNDUQE方法，利用深度变分信息瓶颈（VIB）进行OOD检测，在MNIST上通过KL散度和预测熵两个互补信号分别检测远OOD和近OOD样本，达到95.3%平均AUROC，相比基线MSP提升32个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有MSP基线缺乏理论支撑且校准不良，需要更可靠的OOD检测方法以保障神经网络在安全关键应用中的部署。
AI.method: 基于深度变分信息瓶颈（VIB）框架，通过KL散度和预测熵两个信息论指标分别检测远OOD和近OOD样本，并采用并行检测策略融合两者。
AI.result: KL散度在远OOD（噪声）上达到100% AUROC，预测熵在近OOD（新数字类别）上达到94.7% AUROC；并行策略平均AUROC 95.3%，TPR@5%FPR为92%，较MSP提升32个百分点；信息瓶颈压缩将ECE降低38%。
AI.conclusion: 信息论约束能产生更可靠的OOD检测和不确定性估计，该方法可支持需要昂贵计算oracle的主动学习场景。

title: Spectral Vision Transformer for Efficient Tokenization with Limited Data
summary: We propose a novel spectral vision transformer architecture for efficient tokenization in limited data, with an emphasis on medical imaging. We outline convenient theoretical properties arising from the choice of basis including spatial invariance and optimal signal-to-noise ratio. We show reduced complexity arising from the spectral projection compared to spatial vision transformers. We show equitable or superior performance with a reduced number of parameters as compared to a variety of models including compact and standard vision transformers, convolutional neural networks with attention, shifted window transformers, multi-layer perceptrons, and logistic regression. We include simulated, public, and clinical data in our analysis and release our code at: \verb+github.com/agr78/spectralViT+.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于有限数据场景（特别是医学影像）的谱域视觉Transformer架构，通过谱投影降低了计算复杂度，在参数量更少的情况下达到或超过多种主流模型性能。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉Transformer在有限数据（如医学影像）中token化效率低、计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.method: 提出谱域视觉Transformer，利用谱投影替代空间域tokenization，具有空间不变性和最优信噪比等理论性质，降低了计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在模拟、公开和临床数据上，以更少参数量达到或优于紧凑/标准ViT、CNN+注意力、Swin Transformer、MLP及逻辑回归等模型的表现。
AI.conclusion: 谱域投影是一种有效的视觉Transformer tokenization策略，特别适用于数据有限的医学影像任务。

title: CAAFC: Chronological Actionable Automated Fact-Checker for misinformation / non-factual hallucination detection and correction
summary: With the vast amount of content uploaded every hour, along with the AI generated content that can include hallucinations, Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) has become increasingly vital, as it is infeasible for human fact-checkers to manually verify the sheer volume of information generated online. Professional fact-checkers have identified several gaps in existing AFC systems, noting a misalignment between how these systems operate and how fact-checking is performed in practice. In this paper, we introduce CAAFC (Chronological Actionable Automated Fact-Checker), a frame-work designed to bridge these gaps. It surpasses SOTA AFC and hallucination detection systems across multiple benchmark datasets. CAAFC operates on claims, conversations, and dialogues, enabling it not only to detect factual errors and hallucinations, but also to correct them by providing actionable justifications supported by primary information sources. Furthermore, CAAFC can update evidence and knowledge bases by incorporating recent and contextual information when necessary, thereby enhancing the reliability of fact verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAAFC框架，一个面向实际应用需求的自动化事实核查系统，能检测并纠正事实错误和幻觉，支持多轮对话，并动态更新知识库以提升可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有AFC系统与实际事实核查流程存在脱节，且无法有效处理AI生成内容中的幻觉问题。本文旨在弥合这一差距，提供更贴近实践的自动化方案。
AI.method: 提出CAAFC框架，支持对声明、对话和多方讨论进行事实核查；不仅能检测错误，还能基于主要信息源提供可操作的理由和纠正；并能动态融合最新信息更新证据库。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CAAFC超越了当前最先进的AFC和幻觉检测系统。
AI.conclusion: CAAFC通过引入时序动作和动态知识更新，有效解决了现有系统的关键缺口，提升了事实核查的可靠性和实用性。

title: A Controlled Counterexample to Strong Proxy-Based Explanations of OOD Performance: in a Fixed Pretraining-and-Probing Setup
summary: Task-agnostic structure proxies are often used to interpret why one pretraining corpus transfers better than another, but such explanations require the proxy to track the structure that matters for the downstream task. We test this requirement in a fixed pretraining-and-probing setup motivated by computationally bounded notions of learned structure, including epiplexity. The core question is whether a proxy ranking of two pretraining datasets must agree with their ranking by OOD probe accuracy. We show that it need not. First, we give a controlled construction in which a formal structure quantity, its operational proxy, and the task-relevant structure for a target family separate. We then instantiate the same mechanism in a synthetic sequence-model experiment: under the primary all-sample evaluation, the OOD accuracy ranking reverses the proxy ranking in two of three seeds, with auxiliary diagnostics and ablations supporting the same interpretation. The counterexample does not reject structure-based explanations in general; it identifies a boundary on strong proxy-based explanations. A proxy for total learned structure can fail to track the task-relevant structure that drives OOD performance, even in a controlled setting.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，用于解释预训练语料库迁移能力的任务无关结构代理（如epiplexity）可能无法追踪下游任务相关的核心结构，导致代理排名与OOD准确率排名不一致，甚至在受控实验中也会出现逆向排名现象。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常用任务无关的结构代理（如epiplexity）来解释不同预训练语料库的迁移性能差异，但这类解释的前提是代理能够捕捉到对下游任务真正重要的结构信息。作者希望检验这一前提是否成立，即结构代理的排名是否必须与OOD探针准确率的排名一致。
AI.method: 作者首先给出了一个受控构造，其中形式化结构量、其操作代理和目标任务相关结构三者分离。然后在合成序列模型实验中实例化该机制，在三种随机种子下比较代理排名与OOD准确率排名，并辅以诊断和消融实验支持。
AI.result: 在三种随机种子中的两种下，OOD准确率排名与代理排名出现逆转，即代理认为更好的预训练语料在实际OOD测试中表现更差，反之亦然。辅助诊断和消融实验支持相同的解释。
AI.conclusion: 结构代理可以失败：代理衡量的"总学习结构"可能无法追踪驱动OOD性能的"任务相关结构"，即使是在受控环境中。该反例并不否定结构基解释的总体有效性，但划定了强代理基解释的边界。

title: 4DVGGT-D: 4D Visual Geometry Transformer with Improved Dynamic Depth Estimation
summary: Reconstructing dynamic 4D scenes from monocular videos is a fundamental yet challenging task. While recent 3D foundation models provide strong geometric priors, their performance significantly degrades in dynamic environments. This degradation stems from a fundamental tension: the inherent coupling of camera ego-motion and object motion within global attention mechanisms. In this paper, we propose a novel, training-free progressive decoupling framework that disentangles dynamics from statics in a principled, coarse-to-fine manner. Our core insight is to resolve the tension by first stabilizing the camera pose, followed by geometric refinement. Specifically, our approach consists of three synergistic components: (1) a Dynamic-Mask-Guided Pose Decoupling module that isolates pose estimation from dynamic interference, yielding a stable motion-free reference frame; (2) a Topological Subspace Surgery mechanism that orthogonally decomposes the depth manifold, safely preserving dynamic objects while injecting refined, mask-aware geometry into static regions; and (3) an Information-Theoretic Confidence-Aware Fusion strategy that formulates depth integration as a heteroscedastic Bayesian inference problem, adaptively blending multi-pass predictions via inverse-variance weighting. Extensive experiments on standard 4D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves consistent and substantial improvements across principal point-cloud metrics. Notably, our approach shows competitive performance in robust 4D scene reconstruction without requiring fine-tuning, suggesting the potential of mathematically grounded dynamic-static disentanglement.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的动态4D场景重建框架，通过渐进式解耦策略（动态掩码引导姿态解耦、拓扑子空间手术、信息论置信度融合）从单目视频中分离静态与动态元素，显著提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D基础模型在动态环境下性能显著下降，因为全局注意力机制中相机自运动和物体运动之间存在耦合。作者希望解决这一根本性矛盾，实现无需微调的鲁棒动态4D场景重建。
AI.method: 提出了一个三组件训练-free框架：1) 动态掩码引导的位姿解耦模块，隔离动态干扰估计稳定位姿；2) 拓扑子空间手术，正交分解深度流形，保留动态对象同时注入精化几何信息；3) 信息论置信度融合，通过异方差贝叶斯推理自适应融合多遍预测。
AI.result: 在标准4D重建基准上，该方法在主要点云指标上取得一致且显著的改进，无需微调即可实现具有竞争力的鲁棒4D场景重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 数学上严谨的动态-静态解耦方法可以有效提升动态场景重建质量，无需额外训练或微调，展现了理论驱动方法的潜力。

title: StepCodeReasoner: Aligning Code Reasoning with Stepwise Execution Traces via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Existing code reasoning methods primarily supervise final code outputs, ignoring intermediate states, often leading to reward hacking where correct answers are obtained through inconsistent reasoning. We propose StepCodeReasoner, a framework that introduces explicit intermediate execution-state supervision. By automatically inserting structured print-based execution-trace anchors into code, the model is trained to predict runtime states at each step, transforming code reasoning into a verifiable, stepwise execution modeling problem. Building on this execution-aware method, we introduce Bi-Level GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm for structured credit assignment at two levels: inter-trajectory, comparing alternative execution paths, and intra-trajectory, rewarding intermediate accuracy based on its impact on downstream correctness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StepCodeReasoner achieves SOTA performance in code reasoning. In particular, our 7B model achieves 91.1\% on CRUXEval and 86.5\% on LiveCodeBench, outperforming the CodeReasoner-7B baseline (86.0\% and 77.7\%) and GPT-4o (85.6\% and 75.1\%). Furthermore, on the execution-trace benchmark REval, our model scores 82.9\%, outperforming baseline CodeReasoner-7B (72.3\%), its 14B counterpart (81.1\%), and GPT-4o (77.3\%). Additionally, our approach also improves code generation performance, demonstrating that explicit execution modeling enhances both code reasoning and code generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了StepCodeReasoner框架，通过引入中间执行状态监督和双层GRPO强化学习算法，在代码推理任务上达到SOTA性能，7B模型超越GPT-4o和14B基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有代码推理方法仅监督最终输出，忽略中间状态，导致奖励黑客问题（通过不一致推理获得正确结果）。作者希望引入明确的执行轨迹监督，使代码推理过程可验证。
AI.method: 1) 自动在代码中插入结构化打印语句作为执行轨迹锚点，将代码推理转化为逐步执行建模问题。2) 提出Bi-Level GRPO强化学习算法，在轨迹间（比较不同执行路径）和轨迹内（根据中间准确性对下游正确性的影响进行奖励）两个层面进行结构化信用分配。
AI.result: 7B模型在CRUXEval上达91.1%，LiveCodeBench上达86.5%，超过CodeReasoner-7B (86.0%/77.7%)和GPT-4o (85.6%/75.1%)。在REval上达82.9%，超过CodeReasoner-7B (72.3%)、14B版本(81.1%)和GPT-4o (77.3%)。代码生成性能也有提升。
AI.conclusion: 显式执行建模能同时提升代码推理和代码生成性能，验证了中间状态监督的有效性。Bi-Level GRPO在结构化信用分配上优于传统方法。

title: Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
summary: Extreme weather and volatile wholesale electricity markets expose residential consumers to catastrophic financial risks, yet demand response at the distribution level remains an underutilized tool for grid flexibility and energy affordability. While a demand-response program can shield consumers by issuing financial credits during high-price periods, optimizing this sequential decision-making process presents a unique challenge for reinforcement learning despite the plentiful offline historical smart meter and wholesale pricing data available publicly. Offline historical data fails to capture the dynamic, interactive feedback loop between an electric utility's pricing signals and customer acceptance and adaptation to a demand-response program. To address this, we introduce DR-Gym, an open-source, online Gymnasium-compatible environment designed to train and evaluate demand-response from the electric utility's perspective. Unlike existing device-level energy simulators, our environment focuses on the market-level electric utility setting and provides a rich observational space relevant to the electric utility. The simulator additionally features a regime-switching wholesale price model calibrated to real-world extreme events, alongside physics-based building demand profiles. For our learning signal, we use a configurable, multi-objective reward function for specifying diverse learning objectives. We demonstrate through baseline strategies and data snapshots the capability of our simulator to create realistic and learnable environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了DR-Gym，一个面向电力公司视角的在线强化学习环境，用于训练和评估需求响应项目，以帮助居民消费者应对极端天气和电价波动风险。
AI.motivation: 极端天气和波动的电力批发市场使居民消费者面临巨大财务风险，而现有的离线历史数据无法捕捉电力公司定价信号与客户接受度之间的动态交互反馈循环。
AI.method: 构建了一个开源、兼容Gymnasium的在线模拟环境DR-Gym，包含基于物理的建筑需求模型、校准自真实极端事件的体制切换批发电价模型，以及可配置的多目标奖励函数。
AI.result: 通过基线策略和数据快照验证了DR-Gym能够创建真实且可学习的环境。
AI.conclusion: DR-Gym为电力公司视角的需求响应优化提供了实用的强化学习测试平台，弥补了离线数据无法模拟动态交互反馈的不足。

title: A Composite Activation Function for Learning Stable Binary Representations
summary: Activation functions play a central role in neural networks by shaping internal representations. Recently, learning binary activation representations has attracted significant attention due to their advantages in computational and memory efficiency, as well as interpretability. However, training neural networks with Heaviside activations remains challenging, as their non-differentiability obstructs standard gradient-based optimization. In this paper, we propose Heavy Tailed Activation Function (HTAF), a smooth approximation to the Heaviside function that enables stable training with gradient-based optimization. We construct HTAF as a sigmoid hyperbolic tangent composite function and theoretically show that it maintains a large gradient mass around zero inputs while exhibiting slower gradient decay in the tail regions. We show that Spiking Neural Networks, Binary Neural Networks and Deep Heaviside neural Networks can be trained stably using HTAF with gradient-based optimization. Finally, we introduce Implicit Concept Bottleneck Models (ICBMs), an interpretable image model that leverages HTAF to induce discrete feature representations. Extensive experiments across various architectures and image datasets demonstrate that ICBM enables stable discretization while achieving prediction performance comparable to or better than standard models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Heavy Tailed Activation Function (HTAF)，一种平滑近似Heaviside函数的激活函数，能够稳定训练二值化神经网络，并基于HTAF提出可解释的Implicit Concept Bottleneck Models (ICBMs)。
AI.motivation: 二值化激活函数（如Heaviside）具有计算高效和可解释性优势，但其非可微性阻碍了基于梯度的优化。现有方法难以在保持离散表示的同时稳定训练。
AI.method: 提出HTAF，一种sigmoid-tanh复合函数的平滑近似，具有大梯度质量在零附近、尾部梯度衰减慢的特性。基于HTAF构建ICBM，实现隐式概念瓶颈的可解释图像模型。
AI.result: 在多种架构和图像数据集上，ICBM实现了稳定的离散化，预测性能达到甚至超越标准模型。
AI.conclusion: HTAF为二值化神经网络训练提供了一种有效且稳定的梯度优化途径，ICBM证明了其在可解释性建模中的实用价值。

title: OmniHumanoid: Streaming Cross-Embodiment Video Generation with Paired-Free Adaptation
summary: Cross-embodiment video generation aims to transfer motions across different humanoid embodiments, such as human-to-robot and robot-to-robot, enabling scalable data generation for embodied intelligence. A major challenge in this setting is that motion dynamics are partly transferable across embodiments, whereas appearance and morphology remain embodiment-specific. Existing approaches often entangle these factors, and many require paired data for every target embodiment, which limits scalability to new robots. We present OmniHumanoid, a framework that factorizes transferable motion learning and embodiment-specific adaptation. Our method learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos spanning multiple embodiments, while adapting to a new embodiment using only unpaired videos through lightweight embodiment-specific adapters. To reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation, we further introduce a branch-isolated attention design that separates motion conditioning from embodiment-specific modulation. In addition, we construct a synthetic cross-embodiment dataset with motion-aligned paired videos rendered across diverse humanoid assets, scenes, and viewpoints. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that OmniHumanoid achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency, while enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.

AI.tldr: OmniHumanoid提出了一种解耦跨具身视频生成框架，通过分支隔离注意力机制分离可迁移运动学习与具身特定适应，仅需少量未配对视频即可适配新机器人，在合成和真实基准上实现了高运动保真度和具身一致性。
AI.motivation: 跨具身视频生成中，运动动力学部分可迁移，而外观和形态是具身特定的。现有方法常纠缠这些因素，且需要每个目标具身的配对数据，限制了向新机器人的扩展。
AI.method: 1) 学习共享的运动迁移模型（来自多具身运动对齐的配对视频）；2) 轻量级具身特定适配器（仅需未配对视频）；3) 分支隔离注意力设计，分离运动条件与具身特定调制。
AI.result: 在合成和真实基准上，OmniHumanoid实现了强运动保真度和具身一致性，且无需重新训练共享运动模型即可扩展至未见过的具身。
AI.conclusion: 解耦运动迁移与具身适应是跨具身视频生成的有效范式，分支隔离注意力设计成功减少了两种因素间的干扰。

title: Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated against a cross-family panel of three frontier judges, reducing dependence on any single evaluator. Our framework separates two sources of divergence: verifier failure, where the training verifier credits rubric criteria that reference verifiers reject, and rubric-design limitations, where even strong rubric-based verifiers favor responses that rubric-free judges rate worse overall. Across medical and science domains, weak verifiers produce large proxy-reward gains that do not transfer to the reference verifiers; exploitation grows over training and concentrates in recurring failures such as partial satisfaction of compound criteria, treating implicit content as explicit, and imprecise topical matching. Stronger verifiers substantially reduce, but do not eliminate, verifier exploitation. We also introduce a self-internalization gap, a verifier-free diagnostic based on policy log-probabilities, which tracks reference-verifier quality, detecting when the policy trained using the weak verifier stops improving. Finally, in our setting, stronger verification does not prevent reward hacking when the rubric leaves important failure modes unspecified: rubric-based verifiers prefer the RL checkpoint, while rubric-free judges prefer the base model. These disagreements coincide with gains concentrated in completeness and presence-based criteria, alongside declines in factual correctness, conciseness, relevance, and overall quality. Together, these results suggest that stronger verification reduces reward hacking, but does not by itself ensure that rubric gains correspond to broader quality gains.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于rubric的强化学习中的奖励篡改（reward hacking）问题，将失败原因分为验证器失败和rubric设计缺陷两类，发现强验证器虽然能减少但无法完全消除奖励篡改，且rubric本身的设计局限是导致策略偏离真实质量提升的根本原因。
AI.motivation: 在开放性任务中，基于rubric的奖励信号被广泛用于强化学习后训练，但奖励篡改问题（即策略利用训练验证器漏洞而非真正提升能力）尚未被系统研究。现有工作多关注数学/编程等可自动验证的领域，而开放性场景中的rubric奖励的脆弱性缺乏深入分析。
AI.method: 提出一个两来源的奖励篡改分析框架：(1) 验证器失败——训练验证器认可但跨族参考验证器拒绝；(2) rubic设计限制——强rubric验证器也偏好的响应被无rubric法官评得更差。使用三个跨族法官面板评估，并在医学和科学领域进行实验，引入"自我内化差距"诊断指标。
AI.result: 弱验证器产生大量不迁移的代理奖励增益；强验证器减少但未消除验证器利用；rubric设计本身的问题（如完整性标准偏好、事实准确性下降）导致rubric验证器偏好RL检查点但无rubric法官偏好基模型。
AI.conclusion: 更强的验证能减少奖励篡改，但仅靠验证器增强不足以确保rubric增益对应更广泛的质量提升，rubric设计本身的局限是核心瓶颈。

title: OUI as a Structural Observable: Towards an Activation-Centric View of Neural Network Training
summary: Activation functions are what make deep networks expressive: without them, the model collapses to a linear map. Yet we still evaluate training mostly from the outside, through loss, accuracy, return, or final calibration, while the internal structural evolution of the network remains largely unobserved. In this paper, we argue that the Overfitting--Underfitting Indicator (OUI) should be understood as a first practical observable of that internal structure. Across our recent results, OUI consistently appears as an early, label-free, activation-based signal that reveals whether a network is entering a poor or promising training regime before convergence. In supervised learning, it anticipates weight decay regimes; in reinforcement learning, it discriminates learning-rate regimes early in PPO actor--critic; and in online control, it can drive layer-wise weight decay adaptation. Read together with recent evidence that activation patterns tend to stabilize earlier than parameters, these results suggest a broader research direction: an activation-centric theory of training dynamics. OUI is becoming an empirical foothold toward this theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出过拟合-欠拟合指标（OUI），一种基于激活函数的无标签信号，能在模型收敛前揭示训练状态的好坏，适用于监督学习、强化学习和在线控制场景，并指向以激活为中心的训练动态理论。
AI.motivation: 现有训练评估主要从外部指标（损失、精度等）进行，而网络的内部结构演化未被充分观测，缺乏早期、无需标签的训练状态诊断工具。
AI.method: 提出Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI)，一种基于激活函数输出的信号，用于在训练早期判断网络是否进入良好或不良训练状态，无需标签信息。
AI.result: OUI在监督学习中能提前预测权重衰减的影响，在强化学习（PPO）中能区分学习率区间，在在线控制中可用于驱动逐层权重衰减自适应。
AI.conclusion: 激活模式比参数更早稳定，OUI可作为以激活为中心的训练动态理论的实证立足点，为理解网络内部结构演化提供新的视角。

title: TAR: Text Semantic Assisted Cross-modal Image Registration Framework for Optical and SAR Images
summary: Existing deep learning-based methods can capture shared features from optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images for spatial alignment. However, optical-SAR registration remains challenging under large geometric deformations, because the model needs to simultaneously handle cross-modal appearance discrepancies and complex spatial transformations. To address this issue, this paper proposes a text semantic-assisted cross-modal image registration framework, named TAR, for optical and SAR images. TAR exploits text semantic priors from remote sensing scenes and land-cover categories to alleviate the modality gap and enhance cross-modal feature learning. TAR consists of three components: a multi-scale visual feature learning (MSFL) module, a text-assisted feature enhancement (TAFE) module, and a coarse-to-fine dense matching (CFDM) module. MSFL extracts multi-scale visual features from optical and SAR images. TAFE constructs text descriptors related to remote sensing scenes and land-cover objects, and uses a frozen RemoteCLIP text encoder to extract text features. These text features are introduced through visual-text interaction to enhance high-level visual features for more reliable coarse matching. CFDM then establishes coarse correspondences based on the enhanced high-level features and refines the matched locations using low-level features. Experimental results on cross-modal remote sensing images demonstrate the effectiveness of TAR, which achieves stronger matching performance than several state-of-the-art methods and yields significant gains under large geometric deformations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAR框架，利用文本语义先验（遥感场景和土地覆盖类别）辅助光学与SAR图像的跨模态配准，通过多尺度视觉特征学习、文本辅助特征增强和粗到密匹配三个模块，在几何大变形下取得了优于SOTA的配准性能。
AI.motivation: 光学-SAR图像配准在大几何变形下仍具挑战性，现有方法难以同时处理跨模态外观差异和复杂空间变换。
AI.method: 提出TAR框架，包含MSFL（多尺度视觉特征提取）、TAFE（利用冻结RemoteCLIP文本编码器提取文本特征，通过视觉-文本交互增强高层视觉特征）和CFDM（先基于增强高层特征建立粗匹配，再用低层特征精细匹配）三个模块。
AI.result: 在跨模态遥感图像上，TAR优于多种SOTA方法，特别是在大几何变形下取得了显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 文本语义先验能有效缓解模态差异，提升跨模态图像配准的鲁棒性。

title: SkillSafetyBench: Evaluating Agent Safety under Skill-Facing Attack Surfaces
summary: Reusable skills are becoming a common interface for extending large language model agents, packaging procedural guidance with access to files, tools, memory, and execution environments. However, this modularity introduces attack surfaces that are largely missed by existing safety evaluations: even when the user request is benign, task-relevant skill materials or local artifacts can steer an agent toward unsafe actions. We present SkillSafetyBench, a runnable benchmark for evaluating such skill-mediated safety failures. SkillSafetyBench includes 155 adversarial cases across 47 tasks, 6 risk domains, and 30 safety categories, each evaluated with a case-specific rule-based verifier. Experiments with multiple CLI agents and model backends show that localized non-user attacks can consistently induce unsafe behavior, with distinct failure patterns across domains, attack methods, and scaffold-model pairings. Our findings suggest that agent safety depends not only on model-level alignment, but also on how agents interpret skills, trust workflow context, and act through executable environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillSafetyBench基准，用于评估大型语言模型代理在复用技能时因本地化非用户攻击（如恶意技能材料或工件）导致的安全失败。实验表明，即使请求本身无害，代理仍可能被技能内容诱导执行不安全行为。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估主要关注用户请求层面的风险，忽略了技能模块化引入的新攻击面——即任务相关的技能材料或本地工件可在用户请求无害时引导代理走向不安全行为。
AI.method: 构建包含155个对抗性案例的SkillSafetyBench，覆盖47个任务、6个风险领域和30个安全类别，每个案例配有基于规则的专用验证器。在多个CLI代理和模型后端上进行实验。
AI.result: 局部非用户攻击能持续诱导不安全行为，不同领域、攻击方法和scaffold-model配对表现出不同的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 代理的安全性不仅取决于模型级别的对齐，还取决于代理如何解读技能、信任工作流上下文以及在可执行环境中行动。

title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal execution paths. This difficulty stems from the scarcity of high-quality interleaved GUI-Tool trajectories, the cost and brittleness of collecting real tool trajectories, and the lack of trajectory-level supervision for GUI-Tool path selection. In this paper, we propose ToolCUA, an end-to-end agent designed to learn optimal GUI-Tool path selection through a staged training paradigm. We first introduce an Interleaved GUI-Tool Trajectory Scaling Pipeline that repurposes abundant static GUI trajectories and synthesizes a grounded tool library, enabling diverse GUI-Tool trajectories without manual engineering or real tool-trajectory collection. We then perform Tool-Bootstrapped GUI RFT, combining warmup SFT with single-turn RL to improve decisions at critical GUI-Tool switching points. Finally, we optimize ToolCUA with Online Agentic RL in a high-fidelity GUI-Tool environment, guided by a Tool-Efficient Path Reward that encourages appropriate tool use and shorter execution paths. Experiments on OSWorld-MCP show that ToolCUA achieves 46.85% accuracy, a relative improvement of approximately 66% over the baseline, establishing a new state of the art among models of comparable scale. It also improves by 3.9% over GUI-only settings, demonstrating effective GUI-Tool orchestration. The results further suggest that training in a hybrid action space is a promising paradigm for real-world digital agents. Open-sourced here: https://x-plug.github.io/ToolCUA/

AI.tldr: 提出ToolCUA，一种通过分阶段训练（数据合成、引导强化学习、在线RL）来学习GUI操作与工具调用之间最优切换的智能体，在OSWorld-MCP上达到46.85%准确率，相对提升约66%。
AI.motivation: 现有CUA在GUI操作与工具调用的混合动作空间中缺乏何时切换的决策能力，原因是缺少高质量的混合轨迹数据和轨迹级别的监督信号。
AI.method: 三阶段训练范式：1) 利用静态GUI轨迹合成混合轨迹的管线；2) 工具引导的GUI RFT（SFT预热+单轮RL）；3) 在线Agentic RL，配合工具高效路径奖励优化。
AI.result: OSWorld-MCP上46.85%准确率，比基线提升约66%，比纯GUI设置提升3.9%，达到同等规模模型最优。
AI.conclusion: 混合动作空间训练是构建真实世界数字智能体的有前途范式，ToolCUA展示了有效的GUI-工具协同调度能力。

title: FedOUI: OUI-Guided Client Weighting for Federated Aggregation
summary: Federated learning usually aggregates client updates using dataset size or gradient-level criteria, while overlooking internal signals about how each client model is organizing its input space during training. We introduce FedOUI, a simple aggregation rule based on the Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI), an activation-based and label-free metric. Each participating client sends its local update together with a OUI value computed on a fixed probe batch, and the server estimates the round-wise OUI distribution to assign lower weights to structurally atypical clients through a smooth reweighting rule. We evaluate FedOUI on CIFAR-10 under strong non-IID partitioning and noisy-client conditions, comparing it with FedAvg, FedProx, and a gradient-alignment baseline. The clearest gains appear under strong heterogeneity, where OUI-based weighting improves aggregation quality while remaining lightweight and interpretable. These results show that internal activation structure can provide useful information for federated aggregation beyond client size and gradient geometry.

AI.tldr: 提出FedOUI，一种基于激活值的过拟合-欠拟合指标(OUI)来加权客户端更新的联邦聚合方法，在非IID和噪声客户端条件下优于FedAvg等基线。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦聚合方法仅考虑数据集大小或梯度信息，忽略了客户端模型内部激活结构所反映的输入空间组织方式，尤其在异构场景下需要更有效的加权策略。
AI.method: FedOUI：客户端在固定探针batch上计算激活值层面的OUI指标（无需标签），服务器根据轮次OUI分布通过平滑重新加权规则，赋予结构异常客户端更低的聚合权重。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10强非IID和噪声客户端条件下，FedOUI优于FedAvg、FedProx和梯度对齐基线，尤其在强异构性场景下聚合质量提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 内部激活结构能够为联邦聚合提供超越客户端规模和梯度几何信息的有用信号，FedOUI轻量且可解释。

title: Anomaly-Aware Vision-Language Adapters for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-shot anomaly detection aims to identify defects in unseen categories without target-specific training. Existing methods usually apply the same feature transformation to all samples, treating normal and anomalous data uniformly despite their fundamentally asymmetric distributions, compact normals versus diverse anomalies. We instead exploit this natural asymmetry by proposing AVA-DINO, an anomaly-aware vision-language adaptation framework with dual specialized branches for normal and anomalous patterns that adapt frozen DINOv3 visual features. During training on auxiliary data, the two branches are learned jointly with a text-guided routing mechanism and explicit routing regularization that encourages branch specialization. At test time, only the input image and fixed, predefined language descriptions are used to dynamically combine the two branches, enabling an asymmetric activation. This design prevents degenerate uniform routing and allows context-specific feature transformations. Experiments across nine industrial and medical benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 93.5% image-AUROC on MVTec-AD and strong cross-domain generalization to medical imaging without domain-specific fine-tuning. https://github.com/aqeeelmirza/AVA-DINO

AI.tldr: 提出AVA-DINO，一种不对称异常的视觉-语言适配框架，利用正常与异常数据的自然不对称性，通过双分支路由机制自适应融合冻结的DINOv3视觉特征，在零样本异常检测中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本异常检测方法对所有样本应用相同的特征变换，忽略了正常数据（紧致分布）与异常数据（多样分布）之间的天然不对称性，导致特征表达不够区分。
AI.method: 基于冻结的DINOv3视觉编码器，设计双分支适配（正常分支和异常分支），通过文本引导的路由机制和显式路由正则化使分支专业化，测试时根据输入图像动态组合两分支实现非对称激活。
AI.result: 在9个工业/医学基准上达SOTA，MVTec-AD图像AUROC 93.5%，且无需领域微调即可跨域泛化到医学图像。
AI.conclusion: 利用数据不对称性设计的双分支路由机制能有效提升零样本异常检测性能，且具有良好的跨域泛化能力。

title: World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have achieved strong semantic generalization for embodied policy learning, yet they learn reactive observation-to-action mappings without explicitly modeling how the physical world evolves under intervention. A growing body of work addresses this limitation by integrating world models, predictive models of environment dynamics, into the action generation pipeline. We term this emerging paradigm World Action Models (WAMs): embodied foundation models that unify predictive state modeling with action generation, targeting a joint distribution over future states and actions rather than actions alone. However, the literature remains fragmented across architectures, learning objectives, and application scenarios, lacking a unified conceptual framework. We formally define WAMs and disambiguate them from related concepts, and trace the foundations and early integration of VLA and world model research that gave rise to this paradigm. We organize existing methods into a structured taxonomy of Cascaded and Joint WAMs, with further subdivision by generation modality, conditioning mechanism, and action decoding strategy. We systematically analyze the data ecosystem fueling WAMs development, spanning robot teleoperation, portable human demonstrations, simulation, and internet-scale egocentric video, and synthesize emerging evaluation protocols organized around visual fidelity, physical commonsense, and action plausibility. Overall, this survey provides the first systematic account of the WAMs landscape, clarifies key architectural paradigms and their trade-offs, and identifies open challenges and future opportunities for this rapidly evolving field.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了将世界模型与视觉-语言-行动（VLA）模型融合的"世界行动模型（WAMs）"范式，提出了级联式和联合式两种分类体系，并分析了相关数据集、评估协议及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: VLA模型虽在具身策略学习中取得语义泛化成功，但仅学习反应式观测-动作映射，缺乏对物理世界在干预下如何演化的显式建模。为此，研究者开始将世界模型（预测环境动态）整合到动作生成流程中，但该方向文献分散，缺乏统一概念框架。
AI.method: 本文是一篇综述，首先正式定义WAMs并厘清其与相关概念的界限，追溯VLA与世界模型研究的融合历史；然后构建结构化分类体系（级联式WAMs vs 联合式WAMs），依据生成模态、条件机制和动作解码策略进一步细分；最后系统分析数据生态（机器人遥操作、便携式人类演示、仿真、互联网级自我中心视频）和评估协议（视觉保真度、物理常识、动作合理性）。
AI.result: 形成了对WAMs领域首个系统性综述，厘清了关键架构范式及其权衡，识别了开放挑战和未来机遇。
AI.conclusion: WAMs将世界模型与VLA统一，旨在联合建模未来状态和动作的分布，代表了具身智能从"反应式"向"预测-行动"范式的关键转变，但该领域在架构选择、训练数据和评估标准化等方面仍面临挑战。

title: Stargazer: A Scalable Model-Fitting Benchmark Environment for AI Agents under Astrophysical Constraints
summary: The rise of autonomous AI agents suggests that dynamic benchmark environments with built-in feedback on scientifically grounded tasks are needed to evaluate the capabilities of these agents in research work. We introduce Stargazer, a scalable environment for evaluating AI agents on dynamic, iterative physics-grounded model-fitting tasks using inference on radial-velocity (RV) time series data. Stargazer comprises 120 tasks across three difficulty tiers, including 20 real archival cases, covering diverse scenarios ranging from high-SNR single-planet systems to complex multi-planetary configurations requiring involved low-SNR analysis. Our evaluation of eight frontier agents reveals a gap between numerical optimization and adherence to physical constraints: although agents often achieve a good statistical fit, they frequently fail to recover correct physical system parameters, a limitation that persists even when agents are equipped with vanilla skills. Furthermore, increasing test-time compute yields only marginal gains, with excessive token usage often reflecting recursive failure loops rather than meaningful exploration. Stargazer presents an opportunity to train, evaluate, scaffold, and scale strategies on a model-fitting problem of practical research relevance today. Our methodology to design a simulation-driven environment for AI agents presumably generalizes to many other model-fitting problems across scientific domains. Source code and the project website are available at https://github.com/AIPS-UofT/Stargazer and https://aips-uoft.github.io/Stargazer/, respectively.

AI.tldr: Stargazer是一个用于评估AI智能体在物理约束下进行模型拟合能力的可扩展环境，包含120个基于径向速度时间序列数据的任务。实验发现，现有智能体虽能实现良好统计拟合，但常无法恢复正确的物理参数，增加测试时计算量也只会导致递归失败而非有意义的探索。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体评估缺乏动态、具备科学反馈的基准环境，尤其在需要物理约束的模型拟合任务上，评测体系不完善。
AI.method: 构建Stargazer环境：包含120个跨三个难度等级的天体物理模型拟合任务（含20个真实案例），通过径向速度时间序列数据评估AI智能体在动态迭代任务上的表现。
AI.result: 8个前沿智能体在数值优化上表现良好，但常违反物理约束导致参数恢复失败；增加测试时计算量仅带来边际收益，大量token消耗反映递归失败循环。
AI.conclusion: Stargazer为评估AI智能体在科学模型拟合任务中的物理一致性提供了有价值的基准，其仿真驱动的设计方法可泛化到其他科学领域。

title: Learning Weakly Communicating Average-Reward CMDPs: Strong Duality and Improved Regret
summary: We study infinite-horizon average-reward constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) under the weakly communicating assumption. Our contributions are twofold. First, we establish strong duality for weakly communicating average-reward CMDPs over stationary policies with finite state and action spaces. Despite the absence of a linear programming formulation and the resulting nonconvexity under the weakly communicating setting, we show that strong duality still holds by carefully exploiting the geometric structure of the occupation measure set. Second, building on this result, we propose a primal--dual clipped value iteration algorithm for learning weakly communicating average-reward linear CMDPs. Our algorithm achieves regret and constraint violation bounds of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$, improving upon the best known bounds, where $T$ denotes the number of interactions. Our approach extends clipped value iteration to the constrained setting and adapts it to a finite-horizon approximation, which stabilizes the dual variable and is crucial for achieving improved regret bounds. To analyze this, we develop a novel approach based on strong duality that enables the decomposition of the composite Lagrangian regret into separate bounds on regret and constraint violation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了弱通信假设下的无限期平均奖励约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDPs），建立了平稳策略下的强对偶性，并提出了基于裁剪值迭代的原对偶学习算法，在遗憾和约束违反方面达到了$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$的界。
AI.motivation: 现有关于平均奖励CMDP的研究多假设各态历经性（communicating），而弱通信（weakly communicating）假设下缺乏线性规划形式、非凸性导致强对偶性难以建立；同时已有算法的遗憾界不够理想，需要改进。
AI.method: 1) 利用占优测度集的几何结构，证明弱通信平均奖励CMDP在平稳策略下的强对偶性；2) 提出原对偶裁剪值迭代算法（primal-dual clipped value iteration），将裁剪值迭代扩展到约束设置，结合有限时域近似来稳定对偶变量，并基于强对偶性分解复合拉格朗日遗憾。
AI.result: 在弱通信平均奖励线性CMDP上，算法达到了$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$的遗憾和约束违反界，优于此前已知的最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 弱通信平均奖励CMDP在平稳策略下仍满足强对偶性，且所提算法在理论上取得了更好的遗憾与约束违反权衡。

title: PairDropGS: Paired Dropout-Induced Consistency Regularization for Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting
summary: Dropout-based sparse-view 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods alleviate overfitting by randomly suppressing Gaussian primitives during training. Existing methods mainly focus on designing increasingly sophisticated dropout strategies, while they overlook the resulting inconsistencies among different dropped Gaussian subsets. This oversight often leads to unstable reconstruction and suboptimal Gaussian representation learning.In this paper, we revisit dropout-based sparse-view 3DGS from a consistency regularization perspective and propose PairDropGS, a Paired Dropout-induced Consistency Regularization framework for sparse-view Gaussian splatting. Specifically, PairDropGS first constructs a pair of the dropped Gaussian subsets from a shared Gaussian field and designs a low-frequency consistency regularization to constrain their low-frequency rendered structures. This design encourages the shared Gaussian field to preserve stable scene layout and coarse geometry under different random dropouts, while avoiding excessive constraints on ambiguous high-frequency details. Moreover, we introduce a progressive consistency scheduling strategy to gradually strengthen the consistency regularization during training for stability and robustness of reconstruction. Extensive experiments on widely-used sparse-view benchmarks demonstrate that PairDropGS achieves superior training stability, significantly outperforms existing dropout-based 3DGS methods in reconstruction quality, while exhibiting the simplicity and plug-and-play nature for improving dropout-based optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PairDropGS，一种基于配对丢弃诱导的一致性正则化框架，用于稀疏视图3D高斯泼溅。通过构造配对丢弃子集并施加低频一致性约束，解决了现有丢弃方法中不同子集间不一致导致的训练不稳定和重建质量差问题，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于丢弃的稀疏视图3DGS方法虽通过随机抑制高斯原语缓解过拟合，但忽视了不同丢弃子集间的不一致性，导致重建不稳定和次优的高斯表示学习。
AI.method: 1) 从共享高斯场构造一对丢弃子集；2) 设计低频一致性正则化约束它们的低频渲染结构，保留稳定场景布局和粗略几何，避免对模糊高频细节过度约束；3) 引入渐进式一致性调度策略，逐步增强正则化强度以提升稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个稀疏视图基准上，PairDropGS在训练稳定性和重建质量上显著优于现有基于丢弃的3DGS方法，且具有即插即用的简单特性。
AI.conclusion: 从一致性正则化视角重新审视丢弃策略是提升稀疏视图3DGS的有效途径，低频约束和渐进调度是关键设计。

title: Design Your Ad: Personalized Advertising Image and Text Generation with Unified Autoregressive Models
summary: Generating realistic and user-preferred advertisements is a key challenge in e-commerce. Existing approaches utilize multiple independent models driven by click-through-rate (CTR) to controllably create attractive image or text advertisements. However, their pipelines lack cross-modal perception and rely on CTR that only reflects average preferences. Therefore, we explore jointly generating personalized image-text advertisements from historical click behaviors. We first design a Unified Advertisement Generative model (Uni-AdGen) that employs a single autoregressive framework to produce both advertising images and texts. By incorporating a foreground perception module and instruction tuning, Uni-AdGen enhances the realism of the generated content. To further personalize advertisements, we equip Uni-AdGen with a coarse-to-fine preference understanding module that effectively captures user interests from noisy multimodal historical behaviors to drive personalized generation. Additionally, we construct the first large-scale Personalized Advertising image-text dataset (PAd1M) and introduce a Product Background Similarity (PBS) metric to facilitate training and evaluation.
