Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms baselines in general and personalized advertisement generation. Our project is available at https://github.com/JD-GenX/Uni-AdGen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Uni-AdGen，一个统一的自回归框架，用于联合生成个性化的图像-文本广告。通过前景感知模块、指令微调以及粗到细的用户偏好理解模块，从历史点击行为中捕捉用户兴趣，生成更真实、个性化的广告。此外，构建了首个大规模个性化广告图像-文本数据集PAd1M，并引入Product Background Similarity (PBS)评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有广告生成方法使用多个独立模型，缺乏跨模态感知，且仅依赖点击率（CTR）反映平均偏好，无法实现个性化。因此，本文探索从历史点击行为中联合生成个性化的图像-文本广告。
AI.method: 1) 设计Uni-AdGen，采用单一自回归框架联合生成广告图像和文本；2) 引入前景感知模块和指令微调增强生成内容的真实感；3) 提出粗到细的偏好理解模块，从多模态历史行为中捕获用户兴趣；4) 构建PAd1M数据集并提出PBS评估指标。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Uni-AdGen在通用和个性化广告生成任务上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一的自回归框架加上有效的偏好建模可以显著提升广告生成的个性化和真实感，为电商广告生成提供了新的方向。

title: Measuring Accuracy and Energy-to-Solution of Quantum Fine-Tuning of Foundational AI Models
summary: We present an experimental study of energy-to-solution (ETS) of hybrid quantum-classical applications, enabled by direct instrumentation of power consumption of a Forte Enterprise trapped-ion quantum processor. We apply this methodology to a hybrid quantum-classical pipeline for quantum fine-tuning of foundational AI models, and validate the approach end-to-end on quantum hardware. Despite noise and limited qubit counts, the resulting models achieve accuracy competitive with and exceeding classical baselines such as logistic regression and support vector classifiers. Our results show that QPU energy consumption scales approximately linearly with qubit number for shallow circuits, while classical simulation exhibits exponential scaling, indicating a break-even for ETS around 34 qubits. The classification error improvement of the best quantum fine-tuned model over the best classical fine-tuned model considered in this study is around 24%. We further contextualize these findings with comparisons to tensor network methods. This work establishes energy-to-solution as a measurable and scalable metric for evaluating quantum applications and provides experimental evidence of favorable energy-accuracy trade-offs.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验测量离子阱量子处理器的能耗，研究了混合量子-经典应用的能量-解决方案（ETS）指标，并在量子微调基础AI模型的任务中验证了该方法，发现在约34量子比特时量子方法在能耗上优于经典仿真。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对量子-经典混合应用在实际硬件上的能耗量化评估，作者希望建立可测量的ETS指标，并探索量子计算在能耗效率方面是否具有优势。
AI.method: 直接对Forte Enterprise离子阱量子处理器进行功耗测量，构建混合量子-经典管线用于微调基础AI模型，在真实量子硬件上端到端验证，并与逻辑回归、支持向量机等经典基线及张量网络方法进行对比。
AI.result: QPU能耗随量子比特数近似线性增长，而经典仿真呈指数增长，ETS约在34量子比特时达到平衡；最佳量子微调模型相比最佳经典微调模型分类错误率降低约24%。
AI.conclusion: ETS可作为评估量子应用的可测量、可扩展指标；实验证据表明量子-经典混合方法在能效-准确率权衡上具有优势。

title: SoK: Unlearnability and Unlearning for Model Dememorization
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
summary: Advanced model dememorization methods, including availability poisoning (unlearnability) and machine unlearning, are emerging as key safeguards against data misuse in machine learning (ML). At the training stage, unlearnability embeds imperceptible perturbations into data before release to reduce learnability. At the post-training stage, unlearning removes previously acquired information from models to prevent unauthorized disclosure or use. While both defenses aim to preserve the right to withhold knowledge, their vulnerabilities and shared foundations remain unclear. Specifically, both unlearnability and unlearning suffer from issues such as shallow dememorization, leading to falsely claimed data learnability reduction or forgetting in the presence of weight perturbations. Moreover, input perturbations may affect the effectiveness of downstream unlearning, while unlearning may inadvertently recover domain knowledge hidden by unlearnability. This interplay calls for deeper investigation. Finally, there is a lack of formal guarantees to provide theoretical insights into current defenses against shallow dememorization. In this Systematization of Knowledge, we present the first integrated analysis of model dememorization approaches leveraging unlearnability and unlearning. Our contributions are threefold: (i) a unified taxonomy of unlearnability and scalable unlearning methods; (ii) an empirical evaluation revealing the robustness, interplay, and shallow dememorization of leading methods; and (iii) the first theoretical guarantee on dememorization depth for models processed through certified unlearning. These results lay the foundation for unifying dememorization mechanisms across the ML lifecycle to achieve a deeper immemor state for sensitive knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性整合分析了机器学习中的两种去记忆化方法——可用性中毒（训练阶段的不可学习性）和机器遗忘（训练后的遗忘），揭示了它们存在浅层去记忆化（在权重扰动下失效）、相互影响（输入扰动影响遗忘效果、遗忘可能恢复被隐藏的知识）等问题，并提出了统一分类法、实证评估和首个关于去记忆深度的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有去记忆化方法（不可学习性和遗忘）各自存在漏洞且相互影响，缺乏统一的理论分析和形式化保证，导致对敏感知识的去记忆效果不可靠。
AI.method: (i) 提出了不可学习性和可扩展遗忘方法的统一分类体系；(ii) 对主流方法进行了实证评估，分析其鲁棒性、交互作用和浅层去记忆问题；(iii) 首次为通过认证遗忘处理的模型提供了去记忆深度的理论保证。
AI.result: 发现两类方法都存在浅层去记忆问题（权重扰动下失效），输入扰动会影响下游遗忘效果，而遗忘可能意外恢复被隐藏的知识；同时给出了首个去记忆深度的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 为在ML生命周期中统一去记忆化机制、实现更深的敏感知识不可记忆状态奠定了理论基础。

title: BARISTA: A Multi-Task Egocentric Benchmark for Compositional Visual Understanding
summary: Scene understanding is central to general physical intelligence, and video is a primary modality for capturing both state and temporal dynamics of a scene. Yet understanding physical processes remains difficult, as models must combine object localization, hand-object interactions, relational parsing, temporal reasoning, and step-level procedural inference. Existing benchmarks usually evaluate these capabilities separately, limiting diagnosis of why models fail on procedural tasks. We introduce BARISTA, a densely annotated egocentric dataset and benchmark of 185 real-world coffee-preparation videos covering fully automatic, portafilter-based, and capsule-based workflows. BARISTA provides verified per-frame scene graphs linking persistent object identities to masks, tracks, boxes, attributes, typed relations, hand-object interactions, activities, and process steps. From these graphs, we derive zero-shot language-based tasks spanning phrase grounding, hand-object interaction recognition, referring, activity recognition, relation extraction, and temporal visual question answering. Experiments reveal strong variation across task families and no consistently dominant model family, positioning BARISTA as a challenging diagnostic benchmark for procedural video understanding. Code and dataset available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ramblr/BARISTA.

AI.tldr: BARISTA是一个密集标注的185个咖啡制作视频数据集，提供逐帧场景图，支持零样本语言任务（短语定位、手物交互、活动识别等），实验表明不同模型家族在不同任务上表现各异，缺乏一致优势模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基准通常分别评估物体定位、手物交互、时序推理等能力，难以诊断模型在程序性任务上失败的原因，缺乏一个能综合评估这些能力的诊断性基准。
AI.method: 构建185个真实咖啡制作视频的密集标注数据集BARISTA，提供逐帧场景图（含物体身份、掩码、轨迹、属性、关系、手物交互、活动、流程步骤），并从中派生出短语定位、手物交互识别、指代、活动识别、关系抽取、时序VQA等多个零样本语言任务。
AI.result: 不同模型家族在不同任务家族上表现差异大，没有一致占优的模型，表明BARISTA是一个具有挑战性的诊断性基准。
AI.conclusion: BARISTA可作为程序性视频理解的多维度诊断基准，揭示了现有模型在综合场景理解上的不足。

title: EpiCastBench: Datasets and Benchmarks for Multivariate Epidemic Forecasting
summary: The increasing adoption of data-driven decision-making in public health has established epidemic forecasting as a critical area of research. Recent advances in multivariate forecasting models better capture complex temporal dependencies than conventional univariate approaches, which model individual series independently. Despite this potential, the development of robust epidemic forecasting methods is constrained by the lack of high-quality benchmarks comprising diverse multivariate datasets across infectious diseases and geographical regions. To address this gap, we present EpiCastBench, a large-scale benchmarking framework featuring 40 curated (correlated) multivariate epidemic datasets. These publicly available datasets span a wide range of infectious diseases and exhibit diverse characteristics in terms of temporal granularity, series length, and sparsity. We analyze these datasets to identify their global features and structural patterns. To ensure reproducibility and fair comparison, we establish standardized evaluation settings, including a unified forecasting horizon, consistent preprocessing pipelines, diverse performance metrics, and statistical significance testing. By leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 15 multivariate forecasting models spanning statistical baselines to state-of-the-art deep learning and foundation models. All datasets and code are publicly available on Kaggle (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aimltsf/epicastbench) and GitHub (https://github.com/aimltsf/EpiCastBench).

AI.tldr: 本文提出EpiCastBench，一个大规模流行病预测基准框架，包含40个多元时间序列数据集，系统评估了15种多元预测模型（从统计基线到深度学习/基础模型）。
AI.motivation: 流行病预测领域缺乏高质量、多元化的基准数据集和标准化评估框架，导致方法难以公平比较和复现。
AI.method: 构建40个多元流行病时间序列数据集，提供统一评估设置（预测长度、预处理、指标、显著性检验），并对15种模型进行综合评估。
AI.result: 建立了包含40个数据集、15种模型的全面评估基准，所有数据和代码开源。
AI.conclusion: EpiCastBench为流行病预测领域提供了标准化基准，有助于推动多元时序预测方法的公平比较与发展。

title: The Missing GAP: From Solving Square Jigsaw Puzzles to Handling Real World Archaeological Fragments
summary: Jigsaw puzzle solving has been an increasingly popular task in the computer vision research community. Recent works have utilized cutting-edge architectures and computational approaches to reassemble groups of pieces into a coherent image, while achieving increasingly good results on well established datasets. However, most of these approaches share a common, restricting setting: operating solely on strictly square puzzle pieces. In this work, we introduce GAP, a set of novel jigsaw puzzles datasets containing synthetic, heavily eroded pieces of unrestricted shapes, generated by a learned distribution of real-world archaeological fragments. We also introduce PuzzleFlow, a novel ViT and Flow-Matching based framework for jigsaw puzzle solving, capable of handling complex puzzle pieces and demonstrating superior performance on GAP when compared to both classic and recent prominent works in this domain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GAP数据集（包含非规则形状的拼图碎片）和PuzzleFlow框架（基于ViT和Flow-Matching），用于解决非方形拼图的重组问题，在考古碎片等场景中展现出优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有拼图求解方法大多局限于严格方形的拼图块，无法处理真实世界中（如考古碎片）的非规则形状碎片，缺乏适用于不规则形状拼图的数据集和求解框架。
AI.method: 提出了GAP数据集（包含由学习到的真实考古碎片分布生成的合成侵蚀碎片）和PuzzleFlow框架（基于Vision Transformer和Flow-Matching的生成式方法），能够处理复杂形状的拼图碎片。
AI.result: PuzzleFlow在GAP数据集上表现优于经典的以及近期著名的拼图求解方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于ViT和Flow-Matching的方法可以有效解决非规则形状拼图问题，为考古碎片等真实场景的拼图重建提供了新的方向。

title: Not How Many, But Which: Parameter Placement in Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: We study the \textit{parameter placement problem}: given a fixed budget of $k$ trainable entries within the B matrix of a LoRA adapter (A frozen), does the choice of which $k$ matter? Under supervised fine-tuning, random and informed subsets achieve comparable performance. Under GRPO on base models, random placement fails to improve over the base model, while gradient-informed placement recovers standard LoRA accuracy. This regime dependence traces to gradient structure: SFT gradients are low-rank and directionally stable, so any subset accumulates coherent updates; GRPO gradients are high-rank and near-orthogonal across steps, so only elements with consistently signed gradients retain the learning signal. Our scoring procedure identifies these critical parameters in under 10 seconds at less than 0.5% of training cost. Selected parameters concentrate on residual-stream-writing projections (V, O, Down), stable across model families and scales (1.5B - 8B).

AI.tldr: 研究LoRA中B矩阵参数放置问题：在固定训练参数预算下，参数选择方式对SFT影响不大，但对GRPO至关重要，梯度结构差异是根本原因。
AI.motivation: LoRA微调中B矩阵通常随机初始化，但参数放置位置（选择哪些k个可训练条目）是否重要尚未系统研究，特别是在不同训练范式（SFT vs GRPO）下。
AI.method: 对比随机选择与梯度信息引导的参数选择策略，在SFT和GRPO两种训练范式下分析性能差异，并基于梯度结构（秩、方向稳定性）解释差异根源。
AI.result: SFT下随机与知情子集性能相当；GRPO下随机放置无法提升性能，梯度知情放置可恢复标准LoRA精度。关键参数集中于残差流写入投影（V, O, Down），跨模型族和规模稳定。
AI.conclusion: 参数放置问题存在训练范式依赖性，源于梯度结构差异；提出高效评分程序可在<10秒/<0.5%训练成本识别关键参数。

title: Targeted Tests for LLM Reasoning: An Audit-Constrained Protocol
summary: Fixed reasoning benchmarks evaluate canonical prompts, but semantically valid changes in presentation can still change model behavior. Studies of prompt variation can reveal such failures, but without audit they can mix genuine model errors with invalid perturbations, extraction artifacts, and unmatched search procedures. We propose an audit-constrained protocol for targeted reasoning evaluation. Prompt variants are generated from a finite component grammar, rendered deterministically, evaluated under a fixed query budget, and counted as model errors only after semantic and extraction audit. Within this protocol we instantiate Component-Adaptive Prompt Sampling (CAPS), a score-based sampler over prompt components, and compare it with equal-budget uniform component sampling under the same task bank, renderer, model interface, decoding settings, and audit procedure. Across three audited slices, the protocol identifies confirmed model-error prompt keys while excluding formatting and extraction artifacts, but matched comparisons do not show that CAPS improves audited yield or unique prompt-key discovery over uniform sampling. The contribution is methodological: targeted prompt variation can be studied under a reconstructable, reviewable, budget-matched protocol, and proxy-guided policies should be judged by audited yield rather than raw mismatch counts or selected examples alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种审计约束的协议用于目标推理评估，通过有限组件语法生成提示变体，并在语义和提取审计后确认模型错误。在该协议下实现了CAPS（组件自适应提示采样）方法，但实验表明其在审计产出和唯一提示发现上并不优于均匀采样。主要贡献在于方法论：提示变体研究应在可重构、可审查、预算匹配的协议下进行。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准使用固定提示评估模型，但语义等价的提示变体可能导致模型行为不一致；以往的提示变体研究缺乏审计，难以区分真正的模型错误与扰动无效、提取伪影等问题。
AI.method: 提出审计约束协议：(1) 从有限组件语法生成提示变体，(2) 确定性渲染，(3) 固定查询预算下评估，(4) 仅对通过语义和提取审计的样本计为模型错误。在此协议下实现了CAPS（基于分数的组件自适应采样），并与等预算的均匀组件采样对比。
AI.result: 在三个审计切片上，协议能识别出经确认的模型错误提示键，并排除格式和提取伪影；但匹配对比显示CAPS在审计产出或唯一提示发现上并不优于均匀采样。
AI.conclusion: 核心贡献是方法论层面的：提示变体研究应在可重构、可审查、预算匹配的协议下进行，代理引导策略应依据审计产出而非原始不匹配计数或挑选的示例来评判。

title: UniCustom: Unified Visual Conditioning for Multi-Reference Image Generation
summary: Multi-reference image generation aims to synthesize images from textual instructions while faithfully preserving subject identities from multiple reference images. Existing VLM-enhanced diffusion models commonly rely on decoupled visual conditioning: semantic ViT features are processed by the VLM for instruction understanding, whereas appearance-rich VAE features are injected later into the diffusion backbone. Despite its intuitive design, this separation makes it difficult for the model to associate each semantically grounded subject with visual details from the correct reference image. As a result, the model may recognize which subject is being referred to, but fail to preserve its identity and fine-grained appearance, leading to attribute leakage and cross-reference confusion in complex multi-reference settings. To address this issue, we propose UniCustom, a unified visual conditioning framework that fuses ViT and VAE features before VLM encoding. This early fusion exposes the VLM to both semantic cues and appearance-rich details, enabling its hidden states to jointly encode the referred subject and corresponding visual appearance with only a lightweight linear fusion layer. To learn such unified representations, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: reconstruction-oriented pretraining that preserves reference-specific appearance details in the fused hidden states, followed by supervised finetuning on single- and multi-reference generation tasks. We further introduce a slot-wise binding regularization that encourages each image slot to preserve low-level details of its corresponding reference, thereby reducing cross-reference entanglement. Experiments on two multi-reference generation benchmarks demonstrate that UniCustom consistently improves subject consistency, instruction following, and compositional fidelity over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出UniCustom框架，通过早期融合ViT和VAE特征来解决多参考图像生成中属性泄露和交叉参考混淆问题，采用两阶段训练和slot-wise绑定正则化，在多项基准上提升了一致性和保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM增强扩散模型采用解耦视觉条件（ViT语义特征+VAE外观特征分离），导致模型难以将语义主题与正确的视觉细节关联起来，在复杂多参考场景下出现属性泄露和交叉参考混淆。
AI.method: 提出UniCustom统一视觉条件框架：1) 在VLM编码前早期融合ViT和VAE特征（仅需轻量线性融合层）；2) 两阶段训练策略：重建预训练保留细节 + 有监督微调；3) slot-wise绑定正则化减少交叉参考纠缠。
AI.result: 在多参考图像生成基准上，UniCustom在主题一致性、指令遵循和组合保真度方面 consistently 优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 早期融合语义和外观特征能有效解决多参考图像生成中的身份保持和属性混淆问题，统一视觉条件框架是更优的设计范式。

title: Reconstruction of Personally Identifiable Information from Supervised Finetuned Models
summary: Supervised Finetuning (SFT) has become one of the primary methods for adapting a large language model (LLM) with extensive pre-trained knowledge to domain-specific, instruction-following tasks. SFT datasets, composed of instruction-response pairs, often include user-provided information that may contain sensitive data such as personally identifiable information (PII), raising privacy concerns. This paper studies the problem of PII reconstruction from SFT models for the first time. We construct multi-turn, user-centric Q&A datasets in sensitive domains, specifically medical and legal settings, that incorporate PII to enable realistic evaluation of leakage. Using these datasets, we evaluate the extent to which an adversary, with varying levels of knowledge about the fine-tuning dataset, can infer sensitive information about individuals whose data was used during SFT. In the reconstruction setting, we propose COVA, a novel decoding algorithm to reconstruct PII under prefix-based attacks, consistently outperforming existing extraction methods. Our results show that even partial attacker knowledge can significantly improve reconstruction success, while leakage varies substantially across PII types.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了监督微调（SFT）模型中个人身份信息（PII）重建问题，构建了包含敏感PII的多轮医学和法律问答数据集，并提出了一种名为COVA的新型解码算法，在基于前缀的攻击下显著优于现有提取方法。实验表明，即使攻击者仅拥有部分知识，也能大幅提升PII重建成功率，且不同PII类型的泄露程度差异显著。
AI.motivation: SFT是LLM适配领域任务的主流方法，但SFT数据集常包含用户提供的敏感信息（如PII），存在隐私泄露风险。现有研究尚未系统评估攻击者从SFT模型中重建PII的能力，因此需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建了包含PII的多轮医学和法学问答数据集，用于真实评估；提出了COVA解码算法，用于基于前缀攻击的PII重建；实验考虑攻击者不同知识水平（完全/部分/无知识）对重建效果的影响。
AI.result: COVA算法在PII重建任务上持续优于现有提取方法；攻击者即使仅有部分知识（如部分前缀信息）也能显著提高重建成功率；不同PII类型（如姓名、地址等）的泄露程度差异较大。
AI.conclusion: SFT模型存在严重的PII泄露风险，现有防御措施不足，需开发更有效的隐私保护机制；COVA可作为评估模型隐私泄露的基准工具。

title: AlphaEarth Satellite Embeddings for Modelling Climate Sensitive Diseases Towards Global Health Resilience
summary: Malaria, childhood acute respiratory infection, and child undernutrition together account for over two million deaths annually in children under five, with the burden concentrated in low and middle-income countries where climate variability modulates transmission, exposure, and nutritional outcomes. Routine health surveillance in these settings remains sparse and reactive. Satellite-derived representations of the Earth's surface offer a scalable, low-cost complement to traditional covariates, yet their utility as predictors of population health outcomes is poorly characterised. We summarise findings from three studies evaluating AlphaEarth Foundations 64-dimensional satellite embeddings as predictors of population health outcomes, focusing on vulnerable populations. The studies span infectious disease (malaria, respiratory infection) and stunting. In each study, embeddings provide predictive value at sufficient spatial granularity: (i) malaria prediction across Nigeria shows consistent per-region R^2 gains; (ii) childhood acute respiratory infection prediction across 11 DHS countries increases pooled R^2 from 0.157 to 0.206 across three tree-based estimators; (iii) stunting prediction across 35 countries is neutral at country level due to collinearity with fixed effects. The stunting case is currently limited by lack of DHS cluster-level coordinates, which is the next key experiment.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了AlphaEarth Foundations的64维卫星嵌入在预测儿童健康结果（疟疾、呼吸道感染、发育迟缓）方面的有效性。研究发现，卫星嵌入在疟疾和呼吸道感染预测中能带来显著的R²提升，但在发育迟缓预测中由于与国家固定效应共线性而效果中性。
AI.motivation: 中低收入国家中，气候变化影响疾病传播和营养状况，但常规健康监测稀疏且被动。卫星遥感数据作为传统协变量的低成本替代品，其预测人口健康结果的能力尚不明确。本文旨在评估卫星嵌入作为健康预测因子的实用性。
AI.method: 使用AlphaEarth Foundations的64维卫星嵌入作为预测因子，在三个不同的健康结果（疟疾、儿童急性呼吸道感染、发育迟缓）上进行预测建模。使用了三种基于树的估计器，并在多个国家层面进行评估。
AI.result: (i) 尼日利亚疟疾预测：各区域R²持续提升；(ii) 跨11个国家的儿童急性呼吸道感染预测：池化R²从0.157提升至0.206；(iii) 跨35个国家的发育迟缓预测：由于与国家固定效应共线性，在国家层面效果中性。
AI.conclusion: 卫星嵌入在传染性疾病（疟疾、呼吸道感染）预测中具有显著价值，但在发育迟缓预测中受限于数据粒度（缺乏DHS聚类级坐标），这是下一步关键实验方向。

title: When Policy Entropy Constraint Fails: Preserving Diversity in Flow-based RLHF via Perceptual Entropy
summary: RLHF is widely used to align flow-matching text-to-image models with human preferences, but often leads to severe diversity collapse after fine-tuning. In RL, diversity is often assumed to correlate with policy entropy, motivating entropy regularization. However, we show this intuition breaks in flow models: policy entropy remains constant, even while perceptual diversity collapses. We explain this mismatch both theoretically and empirically: the constant entropy arises from the fixed, pre-defined noise schedule, while the diversity collapse is driven by the mode-seeking nature of policy gradients. As a result, policy entropy fails to prevent the model from converging to a narrow high-reward region in the perceptual space. To this end, we introduce perceptual entropy that captures diversity in a perceptual space and maintains the property of standard entropy. Building upon this insight, we propose two entropy-regularized strategies, Perceptual Entropy Constraint and Perceptual Constraints on Generation Space, to preserve perceptual diversity and improve the quality. Experiments across two base models, neural and rule-based rewards, and three perceptual spaces demonstrate consistent gains in the quality-diversity trade-off; PEC achieves the best overall score of 0.734 (vs. baseline's 0.366); a complementary setting of PEC further reaches a diversity average of 0.989 (vs. baseline's 0.047). Our project page (https://xiaofeng-tan.github.io/projects/PEC) is publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文指出RLHF在流匹配文本到图像模型中会导致多样性崩溃，而传统的策略熵无法反映这种多样性损失。作者提出感知熵（Perceptual Entropy）概念，并基于此设计了PEC和PCGS两种正则化策略，在保持奖励质量的同时显著提升了生成多样性。
AI.motivation: RLHF在文本到图像流匹配模型中会导致严重的多样性崩溃，而传统的策略熵正则化因流模型的固定噪声调度而失效（策略熵不变但感知多样性下降），需要新的方法来保持生成多样性和质量的平衡。
AI.method: 1. 理论分析揭示流模型中策略熵恒定的原因（固定噪声调度）及多样性崩溃的机制（策略梯度的mode-seeking特性）；2. 提出感知熵（Perceptual Entropy）概念，在感知空间而非策略空间度量多样性；3. 基于感知熵设计两种正则化策略：Perceptual Entropy Constraint (PEC) 和 Perceptual Constraints on Generation Space (PCGS)。
AI.result: 在两种基础模型、神经/规则两种奖励函数、三种感知空间下，PEC和PCGS在质量-多样性权衡上持续优于基线：PEC综合得分0.734（基线0.366），PCGS在互补设置下多样性均值0.989（基线0.047）。
AI.conclusion: 感知熵是流模型中对策略熵的有效替代，能正确捕捉感知多样性；基于感知熵的正则化策略能有效缓解RLHF导致的多样性崩溃，在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升多样性。

title: Predicting Decisions of AI Agents from Limited Interaction through Text-Tabular Modeling
summary: AI agents negotiate and transact in natural language with unfamiliar counterparts: a buyer bot facing an unknown seller, or a procurement assistant negotiating with a supplier. In such interactions, the counterpart's LLM, prompts, control logic, and rule-based fallbacks are hidden, while each decision can have monetary consequences. We ask whether an agent can predict an unfamiliar counterpart's next decision from a few interactions. To avoid real-world logging confounds, we study this problem in controlled bargaining and negotiation games, formulating it as target-adaptive text-tabular prediction: each decision point is a table row combining structured game state, offer history, and dialogue, while $K$ previous games of the same target agent, i.e., the counterpart being modeled, are provided in the prompt as labeled adaptation examples. Our model is built on a tabular foundation model that represents rows using game-state features and LLM-based text representations, and adds LLM-as-Observer as an additional representation: a small frozen LLM reads the decision-time state and dialogue; its answer is discarded, and its hidden state becomes a decision-oriented feature, making the LLM an encoder rather than a direct few-shot predictor. Training on 13 frontier-LLM agents and testing on 91 held-out scaffolded agents, the full model outperforms direct LLM-as-Predictor prompting and game+text features baselines. Within this tabular model, Observer features contribute beyond the other feature schemes: at $K=16$, they improve response-prediction AUC by about 4 points across both tasks and reduce bargaining offer-prediction error by 14%. These results show that formulating counterpart prediction as a target-adaptive text-tabular task enables effective adaptation, and that hidden LLM representations expose decision-relevant signals that direct prompting does not surface.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何让AI代理在与陌生对手（如买家与卖家）谈判时，仅通过少量交互预测对手的下一步决策。作者将问题建模为目标自适应文本-表格预测，利用表格基础模型结合LLM-as-Observer（将冻结的小LLM作为编码器提取决策相关隐藏状态）来提升预测性能。在13个前沿LLM代理上训练、91个未见代理上测试，该方法优于直接LLM预测和基线方法，AUC提升约4点，谈判出价误差降低14%。
AI.motivation: 实际AI代理（如采购助手与供应商谈判）需与未知对手交互，对方LLM、提示、控制逻辑等均不可见，但每次决策有经济后果。现有模型难以从少量交互中泛化预测陌生对手行为，缺乏有效的少样本自适应方法。
AI.method: 1) 将问题形式化为目标自适应文本-表格预测：每个决策点为表格行（含游戏状态、出价历史、对话），K个对手历史游戏作为提示中的标注样本。2) 基于表格基础模型，联合使用游戏状态特征和LLM文本表示。3) 提出LLM-as-Observer：用冻结的小LLM读取决策时状态和对话，丢弃输出答案，取隐藏状态作为决策导向特征，使LLM作为编码器而非直接预测器。
AI.result: 在13个LLM代理训练、91个未见代理测试：1) 完整模型优于LLM-as-Predictor直接提示和基线。2) K=16时，Observer特征在两项任务上提升响应预测AUC约4点，降低议价出价预测误差14%。
AI.conclusion: 将对手预测建模为目标自适应文本-表格任务可实现有效自适应；LLM隐藏表征能暴露决策相关信号，而直接提示无法获取这些信号。

title: Continuous Flood Nowcasting in South Asia: A Multi-Sensor Ensemble Remote Sensing Framework for Flood Extent
summary: Pakistan experienced an unusually severe flood season between June and December 2025, with cascading impacts on population, infrastructure, and agriculture. Existing operational flood products (e.g., UNOSAT) provide valuable episode-level snapshots but rarely deliver spatially and temporally continuous inundation maps at near-real-time latency within the country. We present a multi-sensor, ensemble-based remote-sensing framework for continuous flood nowcasting in Pakistan that integrates Sentinel-1 SAR, Harmonized Landsat-Sentinel (HLS L30 and S30), MODIS, and VIIRS observations on a harmonized grid in Google Earth Engine. The framework employs a tiered nowcasting ensemble that prioritizes higher-resolution sensors (Sentinel-1 and HLS) and falls back to MODIS and VIIRS when necessary, preserving daily continuity of flood extent at each sensor's native resolution. Applied to the 2025 monsoon period, the system generates near-real-time, spatially consistent inundation maps across Pakistan. As a nowcasting case study, we track the super-flood of 26 August-7 September 2025 day by day, demonstrating the framework's ability to capture the evolving flood footprint in near real time and extend beyond the temporal limits of episodic mapping products. Validation against GloFAS discharge anomalies and precipitation datasets (CHIRPS v3.0, MSWEP) shows strong agreement with observed hydrometeorological conditions. By integrating nowcast outputs with exposure layers (WorldPop, ESA WorldCover, Giga-HOTOSM), the framework enables rapid estimation of affected populations, cropland, and critical infrastructure, supporting timely disaster response and resilience planning in South Asia.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多传感器集成框架的巴基斯坦洪水近实时预报系统，利用 Sentinel-1 SAR、HLS、MODIS 和 VIIRS 数据生成连续的高时空分辨率洪水淹没图，并在2025年季风期成功案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有洪水产品（如UNOSAT）提供事件级快照，但缺乏时空连续且近实时的全国范围淹没图，无法满足巴基斯坦2025年异常严重洪水季的实时响应需求。
AI.method: 在Google Earth Engine上构建多传感器集合框架，采用分层预报集成策略：优先使用高分传感器（Sentinel-1 SAR、HLS），必要时回退到MODIS和VIIRS，以保证每日洪水范围的连续观测。
AI.result: 成功生成2025年季风期巴基斯坦近实时、空间一致的淹没图；对8月26日至9月7日的超级洪水进行逐日跟踪；与GloFAS流量异常及降水数据（CHIRPS、MSWEP）验证一致性好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够提供超越传统事件级产品的时空连续洪水监测，结合暴露数据可实现受影响人口、农田和基础设施的快速评估，支持南亚地区的灾害响应和韧性规划。

title: From Generic Correlation to Input-Specific Credit in On-Policy Self Distillation
summary: On-policy self-distillation has emerged as a promising paradigm for post-training language models, in which the model conditions on environment feedback to serve as its own teacher, providing dense token-level rewards without external teacher models or step-level annotations. Despite its empirical success, what this reward actually measures and what kind of credit it assigns remain unclear. Under a posterior-compatibility interpretation of feedback conditioning, standard in the implicit-reward literature, we show that the self-distillation token reward is a Bayesian filtering increment whose trajectory sum is exactly the pointwise mutual information between the response and the feedback given the input. This pMI can be raised by input-specific reasoning or by input-generic shortcuts, so we further decompose the teacher log-probability along the input axis. Based on this analysis, we propose CREDIT (Contrastive REward from DIsTillation), which isolates the input-specific component with a batch-contrastive baseline. At the sequence level, CREDIT is a teacher-side surrogate for a contrastive pMI objective that also penalizes responses remaining likely under unrelated inputs. Across coding, scientific reasoning, and tool-use benchmarks on two model families, CREDIT delivers the strongest aggregate performance at negligible additional compute.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了on-policy自蒸馏中token奖励的数学本质——它是贝叶斯滤波增量，轨迹和等于响应与反馈之间的点互信息（pMI）。进一步将pMI分解为输入特定和输入通用成分，并提出CREDIT方法，通过批次对比基线分离输入特定成分，在多个基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 自蒸馏方法中token奖励的数学含义不明确，不清楚它实际衡量什么以及分配了什么类型的信用，需要从理论上揭示其本质。
AI.method: 提出CREDIT（对比蒸馏奖励），通过批次对比基线分离出输入特定的pMI成分，在序列层面是对比pMI目标的教师侧替代，同时惩罚在无关输入下仍保持高概率的响应。
AI.result: 在编程、科学推理和工具使用基准上，CREDIT在两个模型家族上以可忽略的额外计算成本取得了最强的综合性能。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏token奖励的轨迹和等于pMI，其中包含输入特定推理和输入通用捷径两种成分，CREDIT通过隔离输入特定成分显著提升性能。

title: MoCam: Unified Novel View Synthesis via Structured Denoising Dynamics
summary: Generative novel view synthesis faces a fundamental dilemma: geometric priors provide spatial alignment but become sparse and inaccurate under view changes, while appearance priors offer visual fidelity but lack geometric correspondence. Existing methods either propagate geometric errors throughout generation or suffer from signal conflicts when fusing both statically. We introduce MoCam, which employs structured denoising dynamics to orchestrate a coordinated progression from geometry to appearance within the diffusion process.MoCam first leverages geometric priors in early stages to anchor coarse structures and tolerate their incompleteness, then switches to appearance priors in later stages to actively correct geometric errors and refine details. This design naturally unifies static and dynamic view synthesis by temporally decoupling geometric alignment and appearance refinement within the diffusion process.Experiments demonstrate that MoCam significantly outperforms prior methods, particularly when point clouds contain severe holes or distortions, achieving robust geometry-appearance disentanglement.

AI.tldr: MoCam通过结构化去噪动力学，在扩散过程中实现从几何先验到外观先验的协调过渡，统一了静态和动态视图合成。
AI.motivation: 生成式新视角合成面临几何先验（空间对齐好但稀疏不准确）和外观先验（视觉保真度高但缺乏几何对应）之间的根本矛盾，现有方法要么传播几何误差，要么静态融合时产生信号冲突。
AI.method: 提出MoCam，利用结构化去噪动力学：早期阶段使用几何先验锚定粗略结构（容忍其不完整性），后期阶段切换到外观先验主动纠正几何错误并细化细节，在扩散过程中时间解耦几何对齐和外观细化。
AI.result: MoCam显著优于先前方法，尤其在点云存在严重空洞或畸变时，实现了鲁棒的几何-外观解耦。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩散过程中几何与外观的时序解耦策略，有效解决了生成式新视角合成中几何先验与外观先验的融合难题。

title: ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often produce answers with high certainty even when they are incorrect, making reliable confidence estimation essential for deployment in real-world scenarios. Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible and user-facing uncertainty signal that can be applied even when token logits are unavailable. However, existing verbalized-confidence methods often optimize answer generation and confidence generation jointly, which can cause confidence-alignment objectives to interfere with answer accuracy. In this work, we propose a decoupled and order-aware framework for verbalized confidence calibration. Our method first generates an answer and then estimates confidence conditioned on the fixed question--answer pair, allowing confidence optimization without directly perturbing the answer-generation process. To align confidence with correctness likelihood, we construct a sampling-based surrogate from multiple model completions and optimize rank-based reinforcement learning objectives that encourage responses with higher estimated correctness likelihood to receive higher verbalized confidence. Experiments on reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that our method improves calibration and failure prediction performance while largely preserving answer accuracy. These results demonstrate that verbalized confidence can be more reliably aligned by decoupling confidence estimation from answer generation and optimizing the relative ordering of confidence across responses.

AI.tldr: 提出一种解耦且顺序感知的框架用于语言模型口头置信度校准，先生成答案再基于固定问答对估计置信度，通过采样构建替代信号并优化基于排序的强化学习目标，在推理和知识密集型基准上提升校准和失败预测性能，同时保持答案准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有口头置信度方法通常联合优化答案生成和置信度，导致置信度对齐目标干扰答案准确性，需要一种解耦的置信度校准方法。
AI.method: 1) 解耦架构：先生成答案，再基于固定问答对估计置信度；2) 采样构建替代信号：从多次模型完成中获取正确率作为置信度替代；3) 基于排序的强化学习优化：优化置信度与正确似然性的相对顺序。
AI.result: 在推理和知识密集型基准上，该方法改善了校准和失败预测性能，同时基本保持了答案准确率。
AI.conclusion: 口头置信度可以通过解耦置信度估计与答案生成，并优化响应间置信度的相对排序来实现更可靠的对齐。

title: Controlled Steering-Based State Preparation for Adversarial-Robust Quantum Machine Learning
summary: Quantum machine learning (QML) provides a promising framework for leveraging quantum-mechanical effects in learning tasks. However, its vulnerability to adversarial perturbations remains a major challenge for practical deployment. In QML systems, small perturbations applied to classical inputs can propagate through the quantum encoding stage and distort the resulting quantum state, thereby degrading model performance. In this work, we propose a defense mechanism that replaces the conventional quantum encoding stage of a QML model with passive steering-based controlled state preparation, which guides the encoded state toward a controlled intermediate state. By tuning the steering strength and the number of steering iterations, the proposed method suppresses the influence of adversarial perturbations while maintaining high clean accuracy and improving adversarial accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that the passive steering-based defense consistently improves adversarial accuracy across different QML models and datasets under gradient-based adversarial attacks, achieving adversarial accuracy improvements of up to 40.19%.

AI.tldr: 本文针对量子机器学习（QML）在对抗性扰动下的脆弱性问题，提出了一种基于被动导引（passive steering）的控制态制备机制来替代传统量子编码阶段，通过调节导引强度和迭代次数抑制对抗扰动，在保持干净准确率的同时显著提升对抗准确率，最高提升40.19%。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习（QML）易受对抗性扰动攻击，微小输入扰动会通过量子编码阶段传播并扭曲量子态，导致模型性能下降，缺乏有效的防御机制。
AI.method: 提出用被动导引（passive steering）控制态制备替代传统量子编码阶段，通过调节导引强度和导引迭代次数，引导编码状态朝向受控的中间态，从而抑制对抗扰动的影响。
AI.result: 在不同QML模型和数据集上，基于梯度对抗攻击下，对抗准确率最高提升40.19%，同时保持较高的干净准确率。
AI.conclusion: 被动导引式防御能有效提升QML模型的对抗鲁棒性，是一种有前景的量子机器学习防御方法。

title: MIST: Reliable Streaming Decision Trees for Online Class-Incremental Learning via McDiarmid Bound
summary: Streaming decision trees are natural candidates for open-world continual learning, as they perform local updates, enjoy bounded memory, and static decision boundaries. Despite these, they still fail in online class-incremental learning due to two coupled miscalibrations: (i) their split criterion grows unreliable as the class count K expands, and (ii) the absence of knowledge transfer at split time. Both failures share a common root: the range of Information Gain intrinsically scales with log2 K. Consequently, any Hoeffding-style confidence radius derived from it must inevitably grow with the class count, making a K-independent split criterion structurally impossible, taking away the potential benefits of applying streaming decision trees to continual learning. To fix this issue, we present MIST (McDiarmid Incremental Streaming Tree), which resolves both failures through three integrated components: (i) a tight, K-independent McDiarmid confidence radius for Gini splitting that acts as a structural regulariser; (ii) a Bayesian inheritance protocol that projects parent statistics to child nodes via truncated-Gaussian moments, with variance reduction guarantees strongest precisely when splitting is most conservative; and (iii) per-leaf KLL quantile sketches that support both continuous threshold evaluation and geometry-adaptive leaf prediction from a single data structure. On standard and stress-test tabular streams, MIST is competitive with global parametric methods on near-Gaussian benchmarks and uniquely robust on non-Gaussian geometry where SOTA benchmarks collapse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIST（McDiarmid增量流式决策树），针对在线增量学习中传统流式决策树因信息增益随类别数K增长而失效的问题，通过K无关的McDiarmid置信半径、贝叶斯继承协议和KLL分位数草图三个组件，实现了对非高斯几何分布的鲁棒流式增量学习。
AI.motivation: 流式决策树在开放世界持续学习中具有局部更新、有界内存和静态决策边界的天然优势，但在线类增量学习场景下因两个耦合的校准失效问题表现不佳：(i) 分裂准则随类别数K增长变得不可靠；(ii) 分裂时缺乏知识迁移。两者的共同根源是信息增益的范围与log2 K成正比，导致Hoeffding风格置信半径随类别数增长，使得K无关的分裂准则在结构上不可能实现。
AI.method: MIST包含三个集成组件：(1) 基于McDiarmid不等式的K无关置信半径用于Gini分裂，作为结构正则化器；(2) 贝叶斯继承协议，通过截断高斯矩将父节点统计量投影到子节点，在分裂最保守时提供最强的方差缩减保证；(3) 每个叶节点维护KLL分位数草图，支持连续阈值评估和几何自适应的叶节点预测。
AI.result: 在标准表格流和压力测试中，MIST在近高斯基准上与全局参数化方法竞争力相当，在SOTA基准失效的非高斯几何分布上表现出独特的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MIST通过解决流式决策树在类增量学习中的根本性统计缺陷，证明了即使面对非平稳、非高斯分布的数据流，基于树的局部学习方法也能达到与全局参数方法竞争甚至超越的性能。

title: MULTI: Disentangling Camera Lens, Sensor, View, and Domain for Novel Image Generation
summary: Recent text-to-image models produce high-quality images, yet text ambiguity hinders precise control when specific styles or objects are required. There have been a number of recent works dealing with learning and composing multiple objects and patterns. However, current work focuses almost entirely on image content, overlooking imaging factors such as camera lens, sensor types, imaging viewpoints, and scenes' domain characteristics. We introduce this new challenge as Imaging Factor Disentanglement and show limitations of current approaches in the regime. We, therefore, propose the new method Multi-factor disentanglement through Textual Inversion (MULTI). It consists of two stages: in the first stage, we learn general factors, and in the second stage, we extract dataset-specific ones. This setup enables the extension of existing datasets and novel factor combinations, thereby reducing distribution gaps. It further supports modifications of specific factors and image-to-image generation via ControlNets. The evaluation on our new DF-RICO benchmark demonstrates the effectiveness of MULTI and highlights the importance of Factor Disentanglement as a new direction of research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出成像因子解缠问题，并设计MULTI方法（两阶段文本反转）来解耦图像中的镜头、传感器等成像因素，在DF-RICO基准上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型虽能生成高质量图像，但文本歧义导致对特定风格或对象的精细控制不足；同时，当前工作几乎只关注图像内容，忽略了镜头、传感器类型、视角和场景领域等成像因素。作者将其定义为"成像因子解缠"挑战，指出现有方法在此方面的局限。
AI.method: 提出MULTI（Multi-factor disentanglement through Textual Inversion），分为两阶段：第一阶段学习通用因子；第二阶段提取数据集特定的因子。该设计支持扩展现有数据集、组合新因子、修改特定因子，并通过ControlNets实现图像到图像的生成。
AI.result: 在自建DF-RICO基准上进行了评估，结果表明MULTI能有效解耦成像因子，验证了因子解缠这一新方向的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 成像因子解缠是一个有价值的新研究方向；两阶段文本反转方法能有效分离并操控图像中的成像因素，弥补了现有工作的空白。

title: TextSeal: A Localized LLM Watermark for Provenance & Distillation Protection
summary: We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling, TextSeal introduces dual-key generation to restore output diversity, along with entropy-weighted scoring and multi-region localization for improved detection. It supports serving optimizations such as speculative decoding and multi-token prediction, and does not add any inference overhead. TextSeal strictly dominates baselines like SynthID-text in detection strength and is robust to dilution, maintaining confident localized detection even in heavily mixed human/AI documents. The scheme is theoretically distortion-free, and evaluation across reasoning benchmarks confirms that it preserves downstream performance; while a multilingual human evaluation (6000 A/B comparisons, 5 languages) shows no perceptible quality difference. Beyond its use for provenance detection, TextSeal is also ``radioactive'': its watermark signal transfers through model distillation, enabling detection of unauthorized use.

AI.tldr: TextSeal是一种基于Gumbel-max采样的LLM水印技术，通过双密钥生成、熵加权评分和多区域定位实现无损检测，支持投机解码等推理优化，在检测强度上显著优于SynthID-text，且水印信号可通过模型蒸馏传递（放射性）。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM水印方法（如SynthID-text）在检测强度、输出多样性保持和推理效率方面存在不足，且缺乏对水印信号在模型蒸馏中传递性的研究。TextSeal旨在提供一种理论无损、检测更强、支持推理优化且具有"放射性"的水印方案。
AI.method: 基于Gumbel-max采样框架，提出双密钥生成机制恢复输出多样性、熵加权评分和多区域定位提升检测精度；设计支持投机解码和多token预测的推理优化，且不引入额外推理开销。
AI.result: TextSeal在检测强度上严格优于SynthID-text等基线；在混合人机文档中仍能保持高置信度局部检测；在推理基准上无损下游性能；多语言人类评估（6000次A/B比较，5种语言）未感知到质量差异；水印信号可通过蒸馏传递。
AI.conclusion: TextSeal是一种理论无损、检测能力强、支持推理优化且具有"放射性"的LLM水印方法，适用于来源追溯和未经授权使用的检测。

title: Multi-Fidelity Emulation of Atmospheric Correction Coefficients with Physics-Guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary: Atmospheric correction is a critical preprocessing step in optical remote sensing, but repeated high-fidelity radiative transfer simulations remain computationally expensive for dense look-up-table generation, sensitivity analysis, retrieval support, and operational preprocessing. This study presents a physics-aware multi-fidelity surrogate framework for emulating atmospheric correction coefficients using paired 6S and libRadtran simulations. Atmospheric and geometric states are sampled using Latin Hypercube Sampling, and both radiative transfer models are evaluated under matched conditions for Sentinel-2 bands using spectral-response-function-aware coefficient generation. The high-fidelity targets are path reflectance, total transmittance, and spherical albedo. A physics-guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Network, termed pKANrtm, receives the atmospheric state and low-fidelity 6S coefficients, predicts the residual relative to libRadtran, and reconstructs the high-fidelity coefficients. The pKANrtm model uses an Efficient-KAN architecture and is trained with a physics-consistency penalty applied in the original coefficient space. The proposed model is evaluated against state-of-the-art regression-based RTM surrogates. Across both standard and out-of-distribution evaluation settings, pKANrtm achieves the strongest overall predictive performance among the compared models. Runtime benchmarking demonstrates substantial acceleration relative to libRadtran, with GPU inference providing approximately four orders of magnitude single-sample speedup and batched inference reaching tens of thousands of samples per second. These results indicate that physics-aware multi-fidelity pKANrtm emulation provides an accurate, physically structured, and computationally efficient strategy for atmospheric correction coefficient generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理感知的多保真度代理框架pKANrtm，通过结合6S（低保真）和libRadtran（高保真）辐射传输模型，利用KAN网络预测残差来高效模拟大气校正系数，在Sentinel-2波段上实现了约四个数量级的GPU加速。
AI.motivation: 高保真辐射传输模拟计算成本高昂，难以支持密集查找表生成、敏感性分析等操作，需要更高效的替代方法。
AI.method: 使用拉丁超立方采样大气和几何状态，同时运行6S和libRadtran模型；设计pKANrtm网络，输入大气状态和低保真6S系数，预测与高保真libRadtran之间的残差；采用Efficient-KAN架构并加入物理一致性惩罚损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在标准分布和分布外评估中，pKANrtm均取得最佳预测性能；GPU推理实现单样本约四个数量级加速，批量推理达每秒数万样本。
AI.conclusion: 物理感知的多保真度pKANrtm仿真为大气校正系数生成提供了准确、物理结构化和计算高效的策略。

title: Evolutionary Task Discovery: Advancing Reasoning Frontiers via Skill Composition and Complexity Scaling
summary: The reasoning frontier of Large Language Models (LLMs) has advanced significantly through modern post-training paradigms (e.g., Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR)). However, the efficacy of these methods remains fundamentally constrained by the diversity and complexity of the training data. One practical solution is data synthesis; yet, prevalent methods relying on unstructured mutation or exploration suffer from homogeneity collapse, failing to systematically expand the reasoning frontier. To overcome this, we propose Evoutionary Task Discovery (EvoTD), a framework that treats data synthesis as a directed search over a dual-axis manifold of Algorithmic Skills and Complexity Attributes. We introduce structured evolutionary operators to navigate this space: a Crossover operator that synthesizes novel skill compositions to enhance diversity, and a Parametric Mutation operator that scales structural constraints (e.g., input size, tree depth) to drive robust generalization. Crucially, we integrate a dynamic Zone of Proximal Development filter, ensuring tasks lie within the learnable region of the model. Empirically, EvoTD delivers substantial reasoning gains that generalize consistently across model architectures, pretraining regimes, and scales, demonstrating that structured evolutionary curricula can effectively support reasoning improvement. We release our code on https://github.com/liqinye/EvoTD.

AI.tldr: 提出EvoTD框架，通过结构化进化算子（交叉+参数变异）在算法技能与复杂度双轴流形上搜索，结合最近发展区动态过滤，实现推理数据的系统性合成，显著提升LLM推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM后训练方法（如RLVR）受限于训练数据的多样性和复杂性；当前数据合成方法依赖非结构化变异或探索，导致同质性坍缩，无法系统性地拓展推理边界。
AI.method: EvoTD将数据合成建模为在"算法技能-复杂度属性"双轴流形上的有向搜索。引入结构化进化算子：交叉算子合成新技能组合以提升多样性，参数变异算子在结构化约束（如输入规模、树深度）上缩放以推动鲁棒泛化。集成动态最近发展区（Zone of Proximal Development）过滤，确保任务落在模型可学习区域内。
AI.result: EvoTD在不同模型架构、预训练方式和规模上均带来一致的推理能力提升，验证了结构化进化课程对推理改善的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化进化的数据合成策略能系统性地拓展LLM推理边界，克服了传统数据合成方法的同质性坍缩问题。

title: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
summary:
The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI agents function on message exchange formats, successively exchanging messages with users, systems, with itself (i.e. chain-of-thought) and tools in a single stream of computation. This bottleneck to a single stream in chat models leads to a number of limitations: the agent cannot act (generate output) while reading, and in reverse, cannot react to new information while writing. Similarly, the agent cannot act while thinking and cannot think while reading or acting on information.
  In this work, we show that models can be unblocked by switching from instruction-tuning for sequential message formats to instruction-tuning for multiple, parallel streams of computation, splitting each role into a separate stream. Every forward pass of the language model then simultaneously reads from multiple input streams and generates tokens in multiple output streams, all of which causally depend on earlier timesteps. We argue that this data-driven change remedies a number of usability limitations as outlined above, improves model efficiency through parallelization, improves model security through better separation of concerns and can further improve model monitorability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将语言模型从传统的单流消息交换格式转变为多流并行计算架构，通过为每个角色（用户、系统、工具、思考等）分配独立的输入/输出流，解除模型在读写、思考与行动之间的阻塞问题，提升效率、安全性和可监控性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于ChatGPT式消息交换格式的AI智能体存在单流计算瓶颈：模型无法在读的同时生成输出，无法在写的同时对新信息做出反应，也无法在思考的同时执行动作。这种串行限制严重制约了智能体的效率和能力。
AI.method: 从指令微调的角度出发，将传统的顺序消息格式指令微调转变为多流并行计算指令微调。每个角色（用户、系统、智能体自身、工具等）拥有独立的输入流和输出流，模型的每次前向传播同时从多个输入流读取并在多个输出流生成token，各流之间存在因果依赖关系。
AI.result: 通过数据驱动的多流并行架构，解决了单流模型的读写互斥、思考与行动阻塞等限制，提升了模型的计算效率（通过并行化）、安全性（通过更好的关注点分离），以及可监控性。
AI.conclusion: 从顺序消息格式转向多流并行计算是一种有前景的模型架构变革，能够从根本上突破当前AI智能体的单流瓶颈，同时带来效率、安全和可解释性方面的改进。

title: Partial Model Sharing Improves Byzantine Resilience in Federated Conformal Prediction
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, Accepted for presentation at the 34th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2026) in Bruges, Belgium
summary: We propose a Byzantine-resilient federated conformal prediction (FCP) method that leverages partial model sharing, where only a subset of model parameters is exchanged each round. Unlike existing robust FCP approaches that primarily harden the calibration stage, our method protects both the federated training and conformal calibration phases. During training, partial sharing inherently restricts the attack surface and attenuates poisoned updates while reducing communication. During calibration, clients compress their non-conformity scores into histogram-based characterization vectors, enabling the server to detect Byzantine clients via distance-based maliciousness scores and to estimate the conformal quantile using only benign contributors. Experiments across diverse Byzantine attack scenarios show that the proposed method achieves closer-to-nominal coverage with substantially tighter prediction intervals than standard FCP, establishing a robust and communication-efficient approach to federated uncertainty quantification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种拜占庭鲁棒的联邦保形预测方法，通过部分模型共享和直方图表征向量，在训练和校准阶段同时抵御恶意攻击，实现更紧致预测区间和通信效率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦保形预测方法主要加固校准阶段，但训练阶段同样易受拜占庭攻击；同时缺乏通信高效的鲁棒方案。
AI.method: 1) 训练阶段采用部分模型共享（仅交换部分参数），缩小攻击面并削减恶意更新；2) 校准阶段客户端将非一致性分数压缩为直方图表征向量，服务器基于距离计算恶意分数检测拜占庭客户端，仅用良性参与者估计保形分位数。
AI.result: 在多种拜占庭攻击场景下，相比标准FCP方法，该方法达到更接近名义覆盖率的预测区间，且区间显著更紧致。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种兼顾鲁棒性和通信效率的联邦不确定性量化方法，同时保护训练和校准两个阶段。

title: EchoTracker2: Enhancing Myocardial Point Tracking by Modeling Local Motion
summary: Myocardial point tracking (MPT) has recently emerged as a promising direction for motion estimation in echocardiography, driven by advances in general-purpose point tracking methods. However, myocardial motion fundamentally differs from motion encountered in natural videos, as it arises from physiologically constrained deformation that is spatially and temporally continuous throughout the cardiac cycle. Consequently, motion trajectories typically remain locally confined despite substantial tissue deformation. Motivated by these properties, we revisit the architectural design for MPT and find that coarse initialization in commonly used two-stage coarse-to-fine architectures may be unnecessary in this domain. In this work, we propose a fine-stage-only architecture, \textbf{EchoTracker2}, which enriches pixel-precise features with local spatiotemporal context and integrates them with long-range joint temporal reasoning for robust tracking. Experimental results across in-distribution, out-of-distribution (OOD), and public synthetic datasets show that our model improves position accuracy by $6.5\%$ and reduces median trajectory error by $12.2\%$ relative to a domain-specific state-of-the-art (SOTA) model. Compared to the best general-purpose point tracking method, the improvements are $2.0\%$ and $5.3\%$, respectively. Moreover, EchoTracker2 shows better agreement with expert-derived global longitudinal strain (GLS) and enhances test-rest reproducibility. Source code will be available at: https://github.com/riponazad/ptecho.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EchoTracker2，一种仅使用精细阶段的架构用于心肌点跟踪（MPT），通过丰富像素级特征并整合长程时间推理，在心肌运动估计任务上超越当前SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 心肌运动与自然视频中的运动存在本质差异（生理约束下的变形、轨迹局部受限），而现有粗到精两阶段架构中的粗初始化在该领域可能是不必要的冗余步骤。
AI.method: 提出仅精细阶段（fine-stage-only）架构EchoTracker2，通过局部时空上下文增强像素级特征，并与长程联合时序推理相结合实现鲁棒跟踪。
AI.result: 在分布内、分布外和公开合成数据集上，相对领域专用SOTA模型位置精度提升6.5%，中位轨迹误差降低12.2%；相比最佳通用点跟踪方法，分别提升2.0%和5.3%。同时与专家导出的全局纵向应变（GLS）具有更好一致性，测试-重测可重复性更优。
AI.conclusion: 针对心肌运动领域特性设计的精细阶段架构比通用两阶段粗到精方法更有效，EchoTracker2在该特定任务上实现了更优的精度与稳健性。

title: Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
summary: Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurrence depths. We introduce Attractor Models, in which a backbone module first proposes output embeddings, then an attractor module refines them by solving for the fixed point, with gradients obtained through implicit differentiation. Thus, training memory remains constant in effective depth, and iterations are chosen adaptively by convergence. Empirically, Attractor Models outperform existing models across two regimes, large-scale language-model pretraining and reasoning with tiny models. In language modeling, Attractor Models deliver a Pareto improvement over standard Transformers and stable looped models across sizes, improving perplexity by up to 46.6% and downstream accuracy by up to 19.7% while reducing training cost. Notably, a 770M Attractor Model outperforms a 1.3B Transformer trained on twice as many tokens. On challenging reasoning tasks, we show that our model with only 27M parameters and approximately 1000 examples achieves 91.4% accuracy on Sudoku-Extreme and 93.1% on Maze-Hard, scaling favorably where frontier models like Claude and GPT o3, fail completely, and specialized recursive reasoners collapse at larger sizes. Lastly, we show that Attractor Models exhibit a novel phenomenon, which we call equilibrium internalization: fixed-point training places the model's initial output embedding near equilibrium, allowing the solver to be removed at inference time with little degradation. Together, these results suggest that Attractor Models make iterative refinement scalable by turning recurrence into a computation the model can learn to internalize.

AI.tldr: 本文提出吸引子模型（Attractor Models），通过隐式微分求解固定点来替代传统循环神经网络，实现恒定训练内存、自适应迭代深度，在语言模型预训练和推理任务上显著优于标准Transformer和稳定循环模型，并发现固定点训练可使模型内化循环计算，推理时可移除求解器。
AI.motivation: 循环Transformer虽能迭代细化表征以提升语言建模和推理能力，但存在训练不稳定、优化部署成本高、受限于固定小深度等问题。作者旨在设计一种既能享受循环迭代优势、又避免其训练和部署缺陷的新型架构。
AI.method: 提出吸引子模型：主干模块首先生成输出嵌入，吸引子模块通过求解固定点（实现隐式微分）来细化嵌入。训练内存与有效深度无关（恒定），迭代次数由收敛条件自适应决定。
AI.result: 在大规模语言模型预训练中，吸引子模型在困惑度（提升达46.6%）和下游准确率（提升达19.7%）上实现帕累托改进，同时降低训练成本。770M参数模型超越1.3B Transformer（训练数据量翻倍）。在推理任务上，27M参数模型在Sudoku-Extreme（91.4%）和Maze-Hard（93.1%）上远超o3等前沿模型。还发现"平衡内化"现象：固定点训练使初始嵌入接近平衡，推理时可移除求解器且性能几乎无损。
AI.conclusion: 吸引子模型将循环转化为模型可内化的计算过程，实现了可扩展的迭代细化，兼具训练高效、推理灵活和性能优越的特性。

title: Two Hebrew folk meteorological proverbs tested: rainfall on Rosh Chodesh and Shabbat Mevarechim as predictors of monthly precipitation (Israel, 1950-2024)
summary:
Folk meteorological proverbs encode centuries of empirical observation by agricultural communities. Two Hebrew proverbs link lunar calendar anchor days to monthly winter rainfall: (i) "If Rosh Chodesh is rainy, the whole month is rainy" and (ii) "If it rains on Shabbat Mevarechim, the whole month is rainy." Shabbat Mevarechim is the last Saturday before each new Hebrew month, preceding Rosh Chodesh by one to seven days. The first proverb is widely known; the second circulates in Hasidic oral tradition with no identified written source. Both have never been formally tested.
  We analyse 75 years (1950-2024) of daily precipitation data from seven Israeli cities across three climatic regions, comprising 191,758 station-days and 2,422 Hebrew-month observations during the winter rainy season (Marcheshvan-Adar). A rainy Rosh Chodesh increases the probability of a rainy month from 22.2% to 38.6% (lift +16.4 percentage points; chi-square = 57.8, p = 2.9e-14; Bayes factor 1.81). A rainy Shabbat Mevarechim produces a similar effect (lift +16.5 percentage points, p = 8.0e-13), despite preceding Rosh Chodesh by up to seven days.
  The effect decays with lag and mirrors daily rainfall autocorrelation (r = 0.35-0.44 at lag 1; ~0 at lag 7), consistent with Mediterranean cyclone persistence. A bootstrap permutation test (p < 1e-4) and a 15-year rolling analysis show declining predictive power (-0.20 percentage points per year, p < 0.001), consistent with shortening precipitation events under warming climate conditions.
  Both proverbs encode real but probabilistic meteorological signals whose reliability is decreasing over time.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了两个希伯来农业谚语——"如果罗什·乔德什（月初日）下雨，整个月都会下雨"和"如果安息日米瓦雷奇姆（月末周六）下雨，整个月都会下雨"——利用以色列七座城市75年（1950-2024年）的降水数据，发现这两个谚语确实编码了真实的概率性气象信号，但随着气候变化其预测能力正在下降。
AI.motivation: 检验长期存在于口头传统中但从未经过正式科学验证的民间气象谚语的真实性，并评估其预测能力在气候变化背景下的稳定性。
AI.method: 收集七座以色列城市1950-2024年共191,758站日的日降水数据，采用卡方检验、贝叶斯因子、自相关分析、bootstrap置换检验和15年滚动分析等方法进行统计检验。
AI.result: 两个谚语均具有统计显著性：月初日下雨使整月下雨概率从22.2%提升至38.6%（提升+16.4个百分点，p=2.9e-14）；月末周六下雨效果类似（提升+16.5个百分点，p=8.0e-13）。但预测能力以每年-0.20个百分点的速度下降。
AI.conclusion: 这些谚语编码了真实但概率性的气象信号，其可靠性受地中海水汽持续性的影响，但在气候变暖背景下预测能力正在减弱。

title: Shaping Zero-Shot Coordination via State Blocking
comment: 9 technical page followed by references and appendix
summary: Zero-shot coordination (ZSC) aims to enable agents to cooperate with independently trained partners without prior interaction, a key requirement for real-world multi-agent systems and human-AI collaboration. Existing approaches have largely emphasized increasing partner diversity during training, yet such strategies often fall short of achieving reliable generalization to unseen partners. We introduce State-Blocked Coordination (SBC), a simple yet effective framework that improves ZSC by inducing diverse interaction scenarios without direct environment modification. Specifically, SBC generates a family of virtual environments through state blocking, allowing agents to experience a wide range of suboptimal partner policies. Across multiple benchmarks, SBC demonstrates superior performance in zero-shot coordination, including strong generalization to human partners.

AI.tldr: 本文提出State-Blocked Coordination (SBC)框架，通过状态阻塞生成虚拟环境来诱导多样化的交互场景，从而提升零样本协调（ZSC）中智能体对未见伙伴的泛化能力，在多项基准测试中表现优异，包括对人类伙伴的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有ZSC方法主要通过增加训练时伙伴多样性来提升泛化能力，但往往难以可靠地泛化到未见过的伙伴。本文旨在解决这一局限性，提出更有效的零样本协调方法。
AI.method: SBC通过"状态阻塞"（State-Blocking）生成一系列虚拟环境，无需直接修改原环境即可让智能体体验多样化的次优伙伴策略，从而诱导出丰富的交互场景。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，SBC在零样本协调任务上展现出优越性能，尤其是在泛化到人类合作伙伴方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SBC作为一种简单但有效的框架，通过状态阻塞生成多样化交互场景，显著提升了零样本协调的泛化能力，无需复杂的环境修改即可实现。

title: PoseCompass: Intelligent Synthetic Pose Selection for Visual Localization
summary: In visual localization, Absolute Pose Regression (APR) enables real-time 6-DoF camera pose inference from single images, yet critically depends on fine-tuning data quality and coverage. While recent methods leverage 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis-based data augmentation, random sampling generates redundant views and noisy samples from poorly reconstructed regions. To mitigate this research gap, we propose PoseCompass, an intelligent pose selection pipeline for 3DGS-based APR. PoseCompass formulates synthetic pose selection and derives a value-based pose ranking mechanism to identify informative poses. The ranking integrates three dimensions: Localization Difficulty, favoring challenging regions; Coverage Novelty, exploring under-sampled areas; and Rendering Observability, filtering artifacts and noise. PoseCompass then generates trajectory-constrained candidates, selects the top-K ranked poses, and synthesizes views using 3DGS with lightweight diffusion-based alignment. Finally, the pose regressor is fine-tuned on mixed real and synthetic data. We evaluate PoseCompass on 7-Scenes, where it reduces adaptation time from 15.2 to 5.1 minutes, a 3x speedup, while cutting median pose errors by 53.8 percent and significantly outperforming random baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出PoseCompass，一种用于3DGS增强的绝对位姿回归(APR)的智能视角选择流水线，通过价值驱动的位姿排序机制选择信息丰富的合成视角进行数据增强，实现了3倍微调速度提升和53.8%的位姿误差降低。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的APR数据增强方法采用随机采样，导致从重建质量差的区域生成冗余视角和噪声样本，缺乏对有效合成视角的智能筛选机制。
AI.method: 提出PoseCompass，包含三个维度的价值排序机制：定位难度（偏重挑战区域）、覆盖新颖性（探索欠采样区域）、渲染可观测性（过滤伪影和噪声）。通过轨迹约束生成候选视角，选择Top-K排名视角，用3DGS结合轻量扩散对齐合成视图，最后在真实与合成混合数据上微调位姿回归器。
AI.result: 在7-Scenes数据集上，微调时间从15.2分钟降至5.1分钟（3倍加速），中位姿误差降低53.8%，显著优于随机基线。
AI.conclusion: 智能视角选择能有效提升3DGS数据增强在APR任务中的效率和质量，减少冗余和噪声样本带来的负面影响。

title: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
summary: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values, and passes the enlarged cache forward; the same one-step update is applied repeatedly, analogous to foldl in functional programming. Building on the KV cache concatenation primitive introduced for latent multi-agent communication, we repurpose it as a chunk-to-chunk recurrence for long-context inference. When processing chunk t, the model attends to the KV cache carried from earlier chunks as a prefix, reusing its internal state across segments without modifying or retraining the model. Despite its simplicity, the induced recurrence is stable: per-step drift rises briefly and then saturates into a flat plateau that persists across deep chains. This plateau is insensitive to a 10,000x change in numerical precision, robust across chunk sizes, and consistent across model families. At the task level, KV-Fold preserves exact information over long distances. On a needle-in-a-haystack benchmark, it achieves 100% exact-match retrieval across 152 trials spanning contexts from 16K to 128K tokens and chain depths up to 511 on Llama-3.1-8B, while remaining within the memory limits of a single 40GB GPU. Compared to streaming methods, which trade fidelity for bounded memory, KV-Fold maintains long-range retrieval while operating as a sequence of tractable forward passes. Overall, our results show that frozen pretrained transformers already support a stable form of KV-cache recurrence, providing a practical route to long-context inference without architectural changes or training.

AI.tldr: 提出KV-Fold，一种无训练的长上下文推理协议，将KV缓存视为序列块上的左折叠累加器，通过逐块递归实现稳定长程推理，在128K上下文和511深度链条上达到100%精确检索。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文推理方法要么需要修改模型架构或进行额外训练，要么采用流式方法牺牲检索保真度。作者希望探索：预训练Transformer是否已内在地支持某种稳定的KV缓存递归形式，从而无需训练或架构改动即可实现长上下文推理。
AI.method: KV-Fold将KV缓存视为左折叠（foldl）中的累加器：处理第t个块时，模型以之前累积的KV缓存为前缀进行注意力计算，然后将新产生的键值追加到缓存中并传递给下一块。这一过程逐块递归，利用KV缓存拼接原语实现块到块的循环，不修改或重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上，在16K到128K上下文、链深度达511的152次实验中达到100%精确检索；步进漂移短暂上升后稳定在平坦平台，对10000倍数值精度变化不敏感，在不同块大小和模型家族间一致。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的预训练Transformer已经支持稳定的KV缓存递归形式，KV-Fold提供了一种无需架构修改或训练的实际长上下文推理路径，在保持长程检索能力的同时仅需单张40GB GPU。

title: MMTB: Evaluating Terminal Agents on Multimedia-File Tasks
summary: Terminals provide a powerful interface for AI agents by exposing diverse tools for automating complex workflows, yet existing terminal-agent benchmarks largely focus on tasks grounded in text, code, and structured files. However, many real-world workflows require practitioners to work directly with audio and video files. Working with such multimedia files calls for terminal agents not only to understand multimedia content, but also to convert auditory and visual evidence across related files into appropriate actions. To evaluate terminal agents on multimedia-file tasks, we introduce MultiMedia-TerminalBench (MMTB), a benchmark of 105 tasks across 5 meta-categories where terminal agents directly operate with audio and video files. Alongside MMTB, we propose Terminus-MM, a multimedia harness that extends Terminus-KIRA with audio and video perception for terminal agents. Together, MMTB and Terminus-MM support a controlled study of multimedia terminal agents, revealing how different forms of multimedia access shape task outcomes and determine which evidence agents rely on to construct executable terminal workflows. MMTB media and metadata are released at https://huggingface.co/datasets/mm-tbench/mmtb-media

AI.tldr: 提出了面向终端智能体的多媒体文件操作基准MMTB（105个任务，5大类），以及增强终端智能体音视频感知能力的工具包Terminus-MM，用于评估和研究终端智能体在多媒体文件处理任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有终端智能体基准主要关注文本、代码和结构化文件，但真实场景中大量工作流涉及音频和视频文件的直接操作（如转换、提取信息等），因此需要专门的基准来评估终端智能体处理多媒体文件的能力。
AI.method: 构建包含105个任务、覆盖5个元类别的多媒体终端操作基准MMTB；提出Terminus-MM工具包，在Terminus-KIRA基础上扩展音视频感知能力，以支持对终端智能体多媒体能力的受控实验研究。
AI.result: MMTB和Terminus-MM能够支持对多媒体终端智能体的受控实验，揭示不同形式的多媒体访问如何影响任务结果，以及智能体依赖哪些证据来构建可执行的终端工作流。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了终端智能体在多媒体文件操作评估上的空白，为未来研究提供了基准和工具支持。

title: Cross-Modal-Domain Generalization Through Semantically Aligned Discrete Representations
summary: Multimodal learning seeks to integrate information across diverse sensory sources, yet current approaches struggle to balance cross-modal generalizability with modality-specific structure. Continuous (implicit) methods preserve fine-grained priors but render generalization challenging, while discrete (explicit) approaches enforce shared prototypes at the expense of modality specificity. We introduce CoDAAR (Cross-modal Discrete Alignment And Reconstruction), a novel framework that resolves this long-standing trade-off by establishing semantic consensus across modality-specific codebooks through index-level alignment. This design uniquely allows CoDAAR to preserve modality-unique structures while achieving generalizable cross-modal representations within a unified discrete space. CoDAAR combines two complementary mechanisms: Discrete Temporal Alignment (DTA), which enables fine-grained temporal quantization, and Cascading Semantic Alignment (CSA), which promotes progressive cross-modal semantic agreement. Together, they establish a competition-free unified representation space. Trained with self-supervised reconstruction objectives on paired multimodal sequences, CoDAAR demonstrates robust cross-modal and cross-domain generalization. Across Cross-Modal Generalization benchmarks, including event classification, localization, video segmentation, and cross-dataset transfer, CoDAAR achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new paradigm for discrete and generalizable multimodal representation learning.

AI.tldr: CoDAAR是一个新的多模态学习框架，通过跨模态码本的索引级对齐，在统一离散空间中同时保留了模态特有的结构和跨模态的泛化能力，在多项基准测试中取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有连续（隐式）方法保留细粒度先验但难以泛化，离散（显式）方法强制共享原型却牺牲了模态特异性。作者旨在解决这一长期存在的权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出CoDAAR框架，包含两个互补机制：离散时间对齐（DTA）实现细粒度时间量化，级联语义对齐（CSA）促进渐进式跨模态语义一致性，通过索引级对齐在不同模态的码本间建立语义共识。
AI.result: 在事件分类、定位、视频分割和跨数据集迁移等跨模态泛化基准测试中，CoDAAR达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: CoDAAR建立了一种新的离散且可泛化的多模态表示学习范式，有效解决了模态特异性保留与跨模态泛化之间的冲突。

title: Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are formed mechanistically. First, we reveal a geometric coupling between routers and their corresponding experts. For a given token, the router weights for the selected expert and the expert weights processing it receive gradients along the same input direction, differing only in scalar coefficients. Thus, matched router--expert directions accumulate the same routed token history. This theoretical coupling also appears empirically in routing dynamics. In a $1$B SMoE trained from scratch, higher router scores predict stronger expert neuron activations, showing that routing decisions are mirrored inside the selected expert. Next, we analyze the effects of auxiliary load balancing on the router--expert geometric coupling, showing that such losses break this structure by spreading input-directed gradients across router weights, making distinct router directions nearly three times more similar to each other. Last, we demonstrate the centrality of geometric coupling for effective routing with a parameter-free online K-Means router, in which each expert maintains a running average of the hidden states routed to it and tokens are assigned based on cosine similarity. Compared with auxiliary-loss and loss-free balancing, this router achieves the lowest load imbalance with only a modest perplexity increase, indicating that geometric coupling captures a substantial part of what the router learns. Overall, our results explain how routers form assignment geometry that supports an effective division of labor.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了稀疏混合专家（SMoE）模型中路由与专家之间的几何耦合机制：路由器权重与被选专家的权重沿相同输入方向累积梯度。作者通过实验证明此耦合关系，并发现辅助负载均衡损失会破坏该结构。最后提出基于在线K-Means的无参数路由方法，仅以轻微困惑度增加换取了最优负载均衡。
AI.motivation: SMoE模型训练面临路由崩溃和辅助负载均衡损失降低专家专业化的问题，作者希望从机制层面理解路由决策的形成过程，以改善SMoE训练。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实证研究揭示路由-专家几何耦合；对比分析辅助负载均衡损失对耦合结构的破坏；提出基于在线K-Means的无参数路由方法作为耦合重要性的验证。
AI.result: 1) 发现路由器与对应专家之间存在几何耦合；2) 辅助负载均衡损失使不同路由方向相似度增加近3倍；3) 在线K-Means路由在负载均衡上优于辅助损失和无损失方法，仅以轻微困惑度增加为代价。
AI.conclusion: 几何耦合是SMoE有效路由的核心机制，路由器的分配几何支持了专家之间的有效分工。

title: Context-Gated Associative Retrieval: From Theory to Transformers
summary: Hopfield networks and their generalizations have established deep connections among biological associative memories, statistical physics, and transformers. Yet most models treat retrieval as a fixed query-to-memory mapping, ignoring the role of external context in recall. In this work, we propose a two-stage associative memory architecture, wherein a context-gate subcircuit reshapes the retrieval energy landscape before and during recall. We show theoretically that context gating increases inter-memory separation while inducing sparsity, translating into exponential improvements in retrieval. Crucially, we prove that the system admits a unique self-consistent fixed point, revealing that the resulting retrieval state is driven by both a direct contextual bias and a second-order retrieval-gate feedback loop. We then bridge this theory to transformers; specifically, we evaluate a first-order approximation on Llama-3, confirming that in-context learning acts as context-gated retrieval. Native dynamics mirror our theory: context localizes a memory subspace, enabling the zero-shot query to cleanly discriminate. Ultimately, this framework provides a mechanistic link between associative memory theory and LLM phenomenology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段联想记忆架构，通过上下文门控子电路重塑检索能量景观，理论上证明了能指数级提升检索效果，并在Llama-3上验证了上下文学习实际上是上下文门控检索。
AI.motivation: 现有Hopfield网络及其推广将检索视为固定的查询到记忆的映射，忽略了外部上下文在回忆中的作用。作者希望建立一种能利用上下文信息的联想记忆模型，并借此打通联想记忆理论与LLM现象学之间的机械论联系。
AI.method: 提出两阶段联想记忆架构，包含一个上下文门控子电路，在检索前和检索过程中重塑能量景观。理论上证明上下文门控能增大记忆间距离并引入稀疏性，带来指数级检索提升。然后将理论桥接到Transformer，在Llama-3上评估一阶近似，验证上下文学习即上下文门控检索。
AI.result: 理论证明上下文门控能实现指数级检索改进；系统存在唯一自洽不动点，检索状态由直接上下文偏差和二阶检索门控反馈共同驱动；在Llama-3上的实验证实了上下文学习对应上下文门控检索机制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架建立了联想记忆理论与LLM现象学之间的机械论联系，揭示了上下文学习本质上是上下文门控的记忆检索过程，为理解Transformer的内在机制提供了新的理论视角。

title: Compositional Neural Operators for Multi-Dimensional Fluid Dynamics
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Partial differential equations (PDEs) govern diverse physical phenomena, yet high-fidelity numerical solutions are computationally expensive and Machine Learning approaches lack generalization. While Scientific Foundation Models (SFMs) aim to provide universal surrogates, typical encoding-decoding approaches suffer from high pretraining costs and limited interpretability. In this paper, we propose Compositional Neural Operators (CompNO) for 2D systems, a framework that decomposes complex PDEs into a library of Foundation Blocks. Each block is a specialized Neural Operator pretrained on elementary physics. This modular library contains convection, diffusion, and nonlinear convection blocks as well as a Poisson Solver, enabling the framework to address the pressure-velocity coupling. These experts are assembled via an Adaptation Block featuring an Aggregator. This aggregator learns nonlinear interactions by minimizing data loss and physics-based residuals driven from governing equations. The proposed approach has been evaluated on the Convection-Diffusion equation, the Burgers' equation, and the Incompressible Navier-Stokes equation. Our results demonstrate that learning from elementary operators significantly improves adaptability, enhances model interpretability and facilitates the reuse of pretrained blocks when adapting to new physical systems.

AI.tldr: CompNO将复杂PDE分解为预训练的基元物理模块（对流、扩散、非线性对流和泊松求解器），通过自适应聚合模块组合，在多个方程上展示了更好的泛化性、可解释性和模块复用能力。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解PDE计算昂贵，ML方法泛化性差，现有的科学基础模型（SFM）采用编解码方式预训练成本高且可解释性有限。作者希望构建模块化、可复用的神经算子框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出Compositional Neural Operators (CompNO)，构建包含对流、扩散、非线性对流和泊松求解器四个基础模块的库，每个模块是在基元物理上预训练的神经算子；通过Adaptation Block中的Aggregator学习非线性组合，优化目标结合数据损失和物理残差约束。
AI.result: 在对流扩散方程、Burgers方程和不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程上验证，表明从基元算子学习能显著提升适应性、增强可解释性，并促进预训练模块在新物理系统中的重用。
AI.conclusion: 模块化的科学基础模型范式可行，通过组合预训练的基元物理模块可以有效降低预训练成本、提升泛化能力和可解释性。

title: Self-Consistent Latent Reasoning: Long Latent Sequence Reasoning for Vision-Language Model
summary: In language reasoning, longer chains of thought consistently yield better performance, which naturally suggests that visual latent reasoning may likewise benefit from longer latent sequences. However, we discover a counterintuitive phenomenon: the performance of existing latent visual reasoning methods systematically degrades as the latent sequence grows longer. We reveal the root cause: Information Gain Collapse -- autoregressive generation makes each step highly dependent on prior outputs, so subsequent tokens can barely introduce new information. We further identify that heavily pooled ($\geq 128\times$) image embeddings used as supervision targets provide no more signal than meaningless placeholders. Motivated by these insights, we propose SCOLAR (Self-COnsistent LAtent Reasoning), which introduces a lightweight detransformer that leverages the LLM's full-sequence hidden states to generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot, with each token independently anchored to the original visual space. Combined with three-stage SFT and ALPO reinforcement learning, SCOLAR extends acceptable latent CoT length by over $30\times$, achieves state-of-the-art among open-source models on real-world reasoning benchmarks (+14.12% over backbone), and demonstrates strong out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: 论文发现视觉潜在推理中，更长的潜在序列反而导致性能下降，原因是信息增益崩溃（后续token几乎不引入新信息）。提出SCOLAR方法，通过轻量级detransformer利用LLM全序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，结合三阶段SFT和ALPO强化学习，将可接受的潜在CoT长度提升30倍以上，在推理基准上超越主干模型14.12%。
AI.motivation: 借鉴语言推理中长思维链提升性能的经验，探索视觉潜在推理是否也能从更长序列中受益。但发现现有方法存在反直觉现象：序列越长性能越差，因此需要揭示原因并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 提出轻量级detransformer，利用LLM完整序列的隐藏状态一次性（单步）生成辅助视觉token，每个token独立锚定到原始视觉空间。2) 三阶段SFT（监督微调）。3) ALPO强化学习。
AI.result: 可接受的潜在CoT长度提升30倍以上；在真实世界推理基准上达到开源模型最优（超越主干模型14.12%）；展现出强大的分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 视觉潜在推理中通过精心设计的架构（解耦token依赖）+ 强化学习训练策略，可以有效克服信息增益崩溃，实现长序列推理性能提升。

title: MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes, including three not scored by prior work: Cascade and Absence (dependency reasoning) and Deletion (post-removal state). Evaluating six memory systems spanning three memory paradigms on 100 controlled episodes, we find that all systems collapse on dependency reasoning under the default configuration (Cascade: 3%, Absence: 1% in average accuracy) despite adequate static retrieval performance. Prompt optimization, deeper retrieval, reduced filler noise, and most stronger LLMs fail to close this gap. Only a file-based agent paired with Claude Opus 4.7 as its internal LLM partially closes the gap, but at ~70x the baseline cost, indicating closure currently depends on configurations that are not practical at scale. Code and data are available on the project page: https://seokwonjung-jay.github.io/meme-eval/.

AI.tldr: MEME是一个评估LLM驱动智能体在持久环境中多实体、演化信息管理能力的基准。包含6个任务，其中3个（Cascade、Absence、Deletion）是现有基准未覆盖的。实验发现所有记忆系统在依赖推理任务上几乎完全失效（Cascade 3%、Absence 1%平均准确率），提示优化、更强LLM等都无法解决，仅Claude Opus 4.7+文件型智能体可部分改善但成本高约70倍。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅评估单实体更新场景，缺乏对多实体、动态演化信息环境中智能体记忆与推理能力的全面评估，尤其是依赖推理（如级联影响、删除后的状态推理）等复杂任务。
AI.method: 提出MEME基准，定义多实体×动态演化的任务空间（6个任务），涵盖3种记忆范式（6个具体记忆系统），在100个受控episode上进行系统评估。分析提示优化、检索深度、噪声过滤、不同LLM骨干等对性能的影响。
AI.result: 所有记忆系统在依赖推理任务上几乎失效（Cascade 3%、Absence 1%）；提示优化、更强LLM等都不能弥补该差距；仅Claude Opus 4.7+文件型智能体可部分改善，但成本增加约70倍，不具备可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 当前记忆系统的依赖推理能力存在根本性缺陷，高效且可扩展的解决方案尚未出现，亟需新的架构或方法来解决LLM智能体在动态环境中的信息演化推理问题。

title: Augmented Lagrangian Method for Last-Iterate Convergence for Constrained MDPs
summary: We study policy optimization for infinite-horizon, discounted constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs). While existing theoretical guarantees typically hold for the mixture policy, deploying such a policy is computationally and memory intensive. This leads to a practical mismatch where a single (last-iterate) policy must be deployed. Recent theoretical works have thus focused on proving last-iterate convergence, but are largely limited to the tabular setting or to algorithmic variants that are rarely used in practice. To address this, we use the classic inexact augmented Lagrangian ($\texttt{AL}$) method from constrained optimization, and propose a general framework with provable last-iterate convergence for CMDPs. We first focus on the tabular setting and propose to solve the $\texttt{AL}$ sub-problem with projected Q-ascent ($\texttt{PQA}$). Combining the theoretical guarantees of $\texttt{PQA}$ and the standard $\texttt{AL}$ analysis enables us to establish global last-iterate convergence. We generalize these results to handle log-linear policies, and demonstrate that an efficient, projected variant of $\texttt{PQA}$ can achieve last-iterate convergence with comparable guarantees as prior work. Finally, we demonstrate that our framework scales to complex non-linear policies, and evaluate it on continuous control tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不精确增广拉格朗日方法（AL）的通用框架，用于约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）的策略优化，并证明了在表格设置和对数线性策略下的全局最后迭代收敛性，且能扩展到复杂的非线性策略。
AI.motivation: 现有CMDP的理论保证通常针对混合策略，但实际部署中需要单一（最后迭代）策略，而现有最后迭代收敛理论多限于表格设置或不常用的算法变体，存在理论与实践的鸿沟。
AI.method: 使用经典的不精确增广拉格朗日方法（AL）作为框架，在表格设置中结合投影Q上升（PQA）求解AL子问题；然后推广到对数线性策略，提出投影变体的PQA；最后扩展到非线性策略并在连续控制任务上验证。
AI.result: 在表格设置下建立了全局最后迭代收敛性；在对数线性策略下实现了与先前工作相当的最后迭代收敛保证；在连续控制任务上验证了框架对复杂非线性策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于AL方法的框架能够弥合CMDP理论（混合策略）与实践（最后迭代策略）之间的差距，为实际部署提供了理论保证。

title: UniFixer: A Universal Reference-Guided Fixer for Diffusion-Based View Synthesis
summary: With the recent surge of generative models, diffusion-based approaches have become mainstream for view synthesis tasks, either in an explicit depth-warp-inpaint or in an implicit end-to-end manner. Despite their success, both paradigms often suffer from noticeable quality degradation, e.g., blurred details and distorted structures, caused by pixel-to-latent compression and diffusion hallucination. In this paper, we investigate diffusion degradation from three key dimensions (i.e., spatial, temporal, and backbone-related) and propose UniFixer, a universal reference-guided framework that fixes diverse degradation artifacts via a coarse-to-fine strategy. Specifically, a reference pre-alignment module is first designed to perform coarse alignment between the reference view and the degraded novel view. A global structure anchoring mechanism then rectifies geometric distortions to ensure structural fidelity, followed by a local detail injection module that recovers fine-grained texture details for high-quality view synthesis. Our UniFixer serves as a plug-and-play refiner that achieves zero-shot fixing across different types of diffusion degradation, and extensive experiments verify our state-of-the-art performance on novel view synthesis and stereo conversion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniFixer，一个即插即用的参考引导框架，通过粗到细的策略（参考预对齐、全局结构锚定、局部细节注入）修复扩散模型在视图合成中的质量退化问题（模糊细节、结构扭曲），在零样本设定下取得SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的视图合成方法存在明显的质量退化（模糊细节、结构扭曲），这些退化源于像素到潜在空间的压缩以及扩散模型的幻觉现象。作者从空间、时间、骨干网络三个维度系统研究了扩散退化问题，并希望提出一个通用的修复框架。
AI.method: UniFixer采用粗到细策略：(1) 参考预对齐模块，将参考视图与退化新视图进行粗略对齐；(2) 全局结构锚定机制，修正几何扭曲保证结构保真度；(3) 局部细节注入模块，恢复细粒度纹理细节。整体作为即插即用的精炼器，零样本修复多种扩散退化。
AI.result: 在视图合成和立体转换任务上取得SOTA性能，能够零样本修复不同类型的扩散退化。
AI.conclusion: UniFixer作为通用修复框架，有效解决了扩散模型在视图合成中的质量退化问题，具有良好的零样本泛化能力和即插即用特性。

title: GRAFT: Graph-Tokenized LLMs for Tool Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to complete complex tasks by selecting and coordinating external tools across multiple steps. This requires aligning tool choices with subtask intent while satisfying directional execution dependencies among tools. To do this, existing methods model these dependencies as tool graphs and incorporate the graphs with LLMs through retrieval, serialization, or prompt-level injection.
