Our ablation study shows that preserving byte-level temporal resolution is critical, that early downsampling through striding is consistently harmful, and that moderate state sizes are sufficient for robust generalization.
  We further show that Mamba-2, despite its more constrained transition structure relative to Mamba-1, remains highly effective for packet-byte modeling while providing clear efficiency advantages, particularly in training speed. Overall, our results demonstrate that direct **undiluted** byte-to-classification learning with compact selective state space models is a practical, effective and novel direction for efficient, deployable traffic analysis that bypasses the complexity of pre-training pipelines even over highly optimized linear attention architectures.

AI.tldr: MambaNetBurst 是一个基于 Mamba-2 的紧凑型字节级序列分类器，直接对原始网络数据包字节进行分类，无需分词、预处理或自监督预训练，在多个网络流量分类基准上以轻量级模型取得与重型预训练方法相当或更优的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有网络流量分类和入侵检测方法依赖复杂的特征工程、分词、预训练或多模态表示，导致模型臃肿且部署成本高。作者希望探索一种直接对原始字节进行端到端分类的轻量级方案，绕过预训练流水线的复杂性。
AI.method: 从数据包流中构建固定长度"突发序列"，嵌入原始字节并附加可学习的 CLS 令牌，通过堆叠的残差预归一化 Mamba-2 块进行监督分类。模型为 tokenizer-free 的纯字节级序列分类器，无需自监督预训练。
AI.result: 在加密移动应用识别、VPN/Tor 流量分类、恶意软件流量分类和 IoT 攻击流量等六个公共基准上，MambaNetBurst 以更轻量的模型与更重且常经过预训练的基线方法竞争或超越。消融实验表明保留字节级时间分辨率至关重要，早期下采样有害，中等状态大小足以稳健泛化。
AI.conclusion: 直接"未稀释"的字节到分类学习，结合紧凑的选择性状态空间模型，是一种实用、有效且有前景的网络流量分析新方向，可绕过预训练流水线的复杂性，且 Mamba-2 在保持高效的同时对字节级建模效果优异。

title: Stochastic Minimum-Cost Reach-Avoid Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at the Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: We study stochastic minimum-cost reach-avoid reinforcement learning, where an agent must satisfy a reach-avoid specification with probability at least $p$ while minimizing expected cumulative costs in stochastic environments. Existing safe and constrained reinforcement learning methods typically fail to jointly enforce probabilistic reach-avoid constraints and optimize cost in the learning setting in stochastic environments. To address this challenge, we introduce reach-avoid probability certificates (RAPCs), which identify states from which stochastic reach-avoid constraints are satisfiable. Building on RAPCs, we develop a contraction-based Bellman formulation that serves as a principled surrogate for integrating reach-avoid considerations into reinforcement learning, enabling cost optimization under probabilistic constraints. We establish almost sure convergence of the proposed algorithms to locally optimal policies with respect to the resulting objective. Experiments in the MuJoCo simulator demonstrate improved cost performance and consistently higher reach-avoid satisfaction rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于到达避免概率证书的随机最小代价到达避免强化学习方法，通过收缩式贝尔曼公式实现概率约束下的代价优化，并证明了算法几乎必然收敛到局部最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的安全约束强化学习方法在随机环境中难以同时满足概率性的到达避免约束并优化代价，亟需一种能有效整合这两者的学习框架。
AI.method: 提出到达避免概率证书(RAPCs)识别可满足随机到达避免约束的状态，并基于此开发收缩式贝尔曼公式作为代理目标，将到达避免考量集成到强化学习中。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo模拟器上的实验表明，该方法在代价性能上优于现有方法，并且具有更高的到达避免满足率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在理论上几乎必然收敛到局部最优策略，在实践上能有效平衡概率约束满足与代价优化。

title: Covering Human Action Space for Computer Use: Data Synthesis and Benchmark
summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) automate on-screen work, as illustrated by GPT-5.4 and Claude. Yet their reliability on complex, low-frequency interactions is still poor, limiting user trust. Our analysis of failure cases from advanced models suggests a long-tail pattern in GUI operations, where a relatively small fraction of complex and diverse interactions accounts for a disproportionate share of task failures. We hypothesize that this issue largely stems from the scarcity of data for complex interactions. To address this problem, we propose a new benchmark CUActSpot for evaluating models' capabilities on complex interactions across five modalities: GUI, text, table, canvas, and natural image, as well as a variety of actions (click, drag, draw, etc.), covering a broader range of interaction types than prior click-centric benchmarks that focus mainly on GUI widgets. We also design a renderer-based data-synthesis pipeline: scenes are automatically generated for each modality, screenshots and element coordinates are recorded, and an LLM produces matching instructions and action traces. After training on this corpus, our Phi-Ground-Any-4B outperforms open-source models with fewer than 32B parameters. We will release our benchmark, data, code, and models at https://github.com/microsoft/Phi-Ground.git

AI.tldr: 本文针对计算机使用代理（CUA）在复杂、低频交互中可靠性差的问题，提出新基准CUActSpot，涵盖GUI、文本、表格、画布和自然图像五种模态及多种操作类型，并设计基于渲染器的数据合成流程。基于合成数据训练的Phi-Ground-Any-4B模型在<32B参数开源模型中表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有CUA在复杂、低频交互任务中可靠性差（长尾问题），主要源于这类复杂交互的训练数据稀缺。
AI.method: 1) 提出CUActSpot基准，覆盖5种模态（GUI、文本、表格、画布、自然图像）和多种操作（点击、拖拽、绘制等）；2) 设计基于渲染器的数据合成流程，自动生成场景、截图、坐标，并由LLM生成指令和动作轨迹。
AI.result: 基于合成数据训练的Phi-Ground-Any-4B模型在<32B参数开源模型中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 通过覆盖更多交互模态和类型的数据合成方法，可以有效提升CUA在复杂交互任务上的表现。

title: Sequential Behavioral Watermarking for LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents act through sequences of executable decisions, but their trajectories provide little evidence of which agent or policy produced them, making provenance, ownership, and unauthorized reuse difficult to establish from observed behavior alone. This motivates watermarking signals embedded directly into agent behavior rather than only into generated text, since text watermarking cannot capture the action-level decisions that define agent execution. Recent agent watermarking methods address this gap by moving the watermark from generated text to behavioral choices. However, by treating each action step as an independent trial, they overlook trajectory structure and become fragile when trajectories are perturbed, truncated, or observed without reliable alignment. We propose SeqWM, a sequential behavioral watermarking framework that embeds signals into history-conditioned transition patterns and verifies trajectories position-agnostically against random-key baselines. Experiments across diverse agent benchmarks and LLM backbones show that SeqWM consistently achieves reliable detection while preserving agent utility, and remains robust under trajectory corruption where round-indexed behavioral watermarks collapse.

AI.tldr: 提出SeqWM，一种将水印信号嵌入到序列化的历史条件转移模式中的框架，能够在不依赖轨迹对齐的情况下验证智能体行为来源，并对轨迹扰动具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体的行为轨迹难以溯源和验证所有权，现有文本水印无法捕捉动作级决策，而已有的行为水印方法将每一步视为独立试验，忽略了轨迹结构，在轨迹被扰动、截断或无法对齐时表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出SeqWM（序列行为水印框架），将水印信号嵌入到历史条件化的转移模式中，并设计了一种与位置无关的验证方法，通过随机密钥基线进行对比检测。
AI.result: 在多种智能体基准和LLM骨干网络上，SeqWM实现了可靠的检测性能，同时保持智能体的实用性；在轨迹破坏下（轮次索引行为水印方法失效时），SeqWM依然保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SeqWM通过利用轨迹的序列结构实现更鲁棒的行为水印，有效解决了现有方法在轨迹扰动下的脆弱性问题。

title: QDSB: Quantized Diffusion Schrödinger Bridges
summary: Learning generative models in settings where the source and target distributions are only specified through unpaired samples is gaining in importance. Here, one frequently-used model are Schrödinger bridges (SB), which represent the most likely evolution between both endpoint distributions. To accelerate training, simulation-free SBs avoid the path simulation of the original SB models. However, learning simulation-free SBs requires paired data; a coupling of the source and target samples is obtained as the solution of the entropic optimal transport (OT) problem. As obtaining the optimal global coupling is infeasible in many practical cases, the entropic OT problem is iteratively solved on minibatches instead. Still, the repeated cost remains substantial and the locality can distort the global transport geometry. We propose quantized diffusion Schrödinger bridges (QDSB), which compute the endpoint coupling on anchor-quantized endpoint distributions and lift the resulting plan back to original data points through cell-wise sampling. We show that the regularized optimal coupling is stable w.r.t. anchor quantization, with an error controlled by the quality of the anchor approximation. In real-world experiments, QDSB matches the sample quality of existing baselines, requiring substantially less time. Code and data are available at github.com/mathefuchs/qdsb.

AI.tldr: 提出量化扩散薛定谔桥（QDSB），通过锚点量化压缩端点分布后计算最优传输耦合，再通过逐单元采样将计划提升回原始数据点，大幅减少训练时间并保持样本质量。
AI.motivation: 现有无模拟SB训练需要成对数据，通过熵最优传输迭代求解耦合，但计算成本高昂且小批量局部性会扭曲全局传输几何。作者希望降低计算开销同时保持传输的全局保真度。
AI.method: 1) 对源和目标分布进行锚点量化（anchor quantization）；2) 在量化后的分布上计算熵最优传输耦合；3) 通过逐单元采样将量化耦合提升回原始数据点，实现训练数据的配对。
AI.result: 在真实世界实验中，QDSB匹配了现有基线的样本质量，但所需训练时间大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: 正则化最优耦合对锚点量化具有稳定性，误差由锚点近似质量控制。QDSB为无模拟SB训练提供了一种高效且可扩展的替代方案。

title: The Granularity Mismatch in Agent Security: Argument-Level Provenance Solves Enforcement and Isolates the LLM Reasoning Bottleneck
summary: Tool-using LLM agents must act on untrusted webpages, emails, files, and API outputs while issuing privileged tool calls. Existing defenses often mediate trust at the granularity of an entire tool invocation, forcing a brittle choice in mixed-trust workflows: allow external content to influence a call and risk hijacked destinations or commands, or quarantine the call and block benign retrieval-then-act behavior. The key observation behind this paper is that indirect prompt injection becomes dangerous not when untrusted content appears in context, but when it determines an authority-bearing argument. We present \textsc{PACT} (\emph{Provenance-Aware Capability Contracts}), a runtime monitor that assigns semantic roles to tool arguments, tracks value provenance across replanning steps, and checks whether each argument's origin satisfies its role-specific trust contract. Under oracle provenance, \textsc{PACT} achieves 100\% utility and 100\% security on mixed-trust diagnostic suites, while flat invocation-level monitors incur false positives or false negatives. In full AgentDojo deployments across five models, \textsc{PACT} reaches 100\% security on the three strongest models while recovering 38.1--46.4\% utility, 8--16 percentage points above CaMeL at the same security level. Ablations show that both semantic roles and cross-step provenance are necessary. \textsc{PACT} reframes agent security as authority binding, and isolates the remaining deployment bottleneck to provenance inference and contract synthesis.

AI.tldr: PACT是一个运行时监控器，通过为工具参数分配语义角色并追踪跨步骤的值来源，检查每个参数来源是否满足其角色特定的信任契约，从而解决LLM Agent在混合信任工作流中的间接提示注入问题。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制在混合信任工作流中只能做粗粒度的工具调用级信任决策，导致要么允许外部内容影响调用（存在被劫持风险），要么隔离调用（阻断良性检索-执行行为）。需要更细粒度的安全机制。
AI.method: PACT提出"来源感知能力契约"机制：1) 为工具参数分配语义角色；2) 跨重规划步骤追踪值的来源（provenance）；3) 检查每个参数的来源是否满足其角色特定的信任契约。核心洞察是间接提示注入的危险不在于不受信任内容出现在上下文中，而在于它控制了权威承载参数。
AI.result: 在oracle provenance下，PACT实现100%效用和100%安全；在完整AgentDojo部署中，对三个最强模型达到100%安全，同时恢复38.1-46.4%效用，比CaMeL在同一安全级别高出8-16个百分点。
AI.conclusion: PACT将Agent安全重新定义为"权威绑定"问题，隔离了剩余部署瓶颈到provenance推断和契约合成。消融实验表明语义角色和跨步骤provenance都是必要的。

title: Split the Differences, Pool the Rest: Provably Efficient Multi-Objective Imitation
summary: This work investigates multi-objective imitation learning: the problem of recovering policies that lie on the Pareto front given demonstrations from multiple Pareto-optimal experts in a Multi-Objective Markov Decision Process (MOMDP). Standard imitation approaches are ill-equipped for this regime, as naively aggregating conflicting expert trajectories can result in dominated policies. To address this, we introduce Multi-Output Augmented Behavioral Cloning (MA-BC), an algorithm that systematically partitions divergent expert data while pooling state-action pairs where no behavior conflict is observed. Theoretically, we prove that MA-BC converges to Pareto-optimal policies at a faster statistical rate than any learner that considers each expert dataset independently. Furthermore, we establish a novel lower bound for multi-objective imitation learning, demonstrating that MA-BC is minimax optimal. Finally, we empirically validate our algorithm across diverse discrete environments and, guided by our theoretical insights, extend and evaluate MA-BC on a continuous Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) control task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多输出增强行为克隆（MA-BC）算法，用于多目标模仿学习，能从多个帕累托最优专家的演示中恢复帕累托前沿策略，理论证明其收敛速度更快且达到极小化最优，并在离散环境和连续LQR控制任务中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法无法有效处理多目标场景中多个专家的冲突演示，直接聚合会导致被支配策略，因此需要一种能系统处理冲突数据并恢复帕累托最优策略的方法。
AI.method: 提出MA-BC算法，系统性地划分存在分歧的专家数据，同时聚合无行为冲突的状态-动作对；提供理论收敛性分析和极小化最优下界证明。
AI.result: 理论证明MA-BC比独立处理每个专家数据集的方法收敛速度更快，且达到极小化最优；在离散环境和连续LQR控制任务中实验验证有效。
AI.conclusion: MA-BC能有效解决多目标模仿学习中的冲突数据问题，具有更好的统计效率和理论最优性。

title: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation of Pre-Trained Vision Foundation Models for Active and Passive Seismic Data Denoising
comment: 34 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to Geophysics for publication consideration
summary: The demand for high-resolution subsurface imaging and continuous Earth monitoring has driven rapid growth in active and passive seismic data from dense geophone deployments, distributed acoustic sensing (DAS) arrays, and large-scale 2D and 3D surveys. This expansion makes complex noise suppression increasingly challenging, especially when signal fidelity must be preserved. Conventional supervised deep learning methods are often task-specific, require large paired datasets, and can suffer from domain shift under new acquisition conditions. Foundation models offer a promising alternative, but pre-training seismic foundation models from scratch requires massive domain-specific data and substantial computation. We propose an efficient framework that repurposes general-purpose Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) for geophysical tasks through Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning. The architecture uses a pre-trained VFM, a DINOv3 encoder, adapted with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to enable effective feature adaptation with few additional parameters. To improve robustness under unseen field conditions without ground truth, we introduce a kurtosis-guided unsupervised test-time adaptation module that updates only LoRA parameters during inference. This module self-calibrates the model to site-specific noise by identifying information-rich regions via kurtosis and performing self-training without labeled data. Experiments on public exploration seismic images and DAS vertical seismic profiling data from the Utah FORGE site show that the framework matches or outperforms domain-specific models. Tests on unseen cross-site data from a land survey in China and the Groß Schönebeck geothermal site in Germany further demonstrate strong generalization and effective signal-noise separation. These results highlight the potential of adapting pre-trained VFMs to data-intensive problems in exploration seismology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用预训练视觉基础模型（VFM）结合LoRA微调和无监督测试时自适应模块，高效解决地震数据噪声压制任务的方法，在多个数据集上表现优于或媲美专用模型，并展现出良好的跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统监督深度学习在地震噪声压制中面临任务特异性强、依赖大规模配对数据、域迁移泛化差等局限，而从头训练地震基础模型需要大量领域数据和计算资源。因此，希望探索如何高效复用通用视觉基础模型解决地球物理任务。
AI.method: 使用预训练的DINOv3作为视觉基础模型编码器，通过LoRA进行参数高效微调；同时引入基于峰度（kurtosis）的无监督测试时自适应模块，在推理阶段仅更新LoRA参数，自校准模型以适应未见过的现场噪声特征。
AI.result: 在公开勘探地震图像和DAS VSP数据上，该方法匹配或优于领域专用模型；在跨站点未见数据（中国陆地勘探和德国地热站点）上展现出强泛化能力和有效的信号-噪声分离。
AI.conclusion: 证明了将通用视觉基础模型通过参数高效微调适配到勘探地震学数据密集型问题是可行的，为地震噪声压制提供了一种高效、泛化性强的解决方案。

title: Towards Model-Free Learning in Dynamic Population Games: An Application to Karma Economies
summary: Dynamic Population Games (DPGs) provide a tractable framework for modeling strategic interactions in large populations of self-interested agents, and have been successfully applied to the design of Karma economies, a class of fair non-monetary resource allocation mechanisms. Despite their appealing theoretical properties, existing computational tools for DPGs assume full knowledge of the game model and operate in a centralized fashion, limiting their applicability in realistic settings where agents have access only to their own private experience. This paper takes a step towards addressing this gap by studying model-free equilibrium learning in Karma DPGs. First, we analyze the setting in which a novel agent joins a Karma DPG already at its Stationary Nash Equilibrium (SNE) and learns a policy via Deep Q-Networks (DQN) without knowledge of the game model. Leveraging recent convergence results for DQN, we establish a suboptimality bound consisting of a DQN approximation error of order $O(1/\sqrt{N_s})$ and a mean field perturbation error of order $O(1/N)$, where $N_s$ is the replay buffer size and $N$ is the population size. Second, we consider the challenging problem of learning the SNE from scratch. We show empirically that combining deep RL with fictitious play and smoothed policy iteration allows agents to converge, in a model-free fashion, to a configuration close to the centrally computed SNE. Together, these contributions support the vision of Karma economies as practical tools for fair resource allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Karma动态人口博弈中的无模型均衡学习，分析了新加入代理在已知均衡下通过DQN学习的次优性边界（O(1/√N_s) + O(1/N)），并提出了结合深度强化学习、虚拟博弈和平滑策略迭代的从零开始学习方法，实证表明能接近中心化计算的平稳纳什均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有动态人口博弈的计算工具假设完全了解博弈模型并以集中式方式运作，限制了其在现实场景中的应用。本文旨在解决这一差距，研究Karma动态人口博弈中的无模型均衡学习问题。
AI.method: 1) 分析新加入代理在已知SNE下通过DQN学习的理论界；2) 结合深度强化学习、虚拟博弈（fictitious play）和平滑策略迭代，提出从零开始学习SNE的无模型方法。
AI.result: 建立了次优性边界：DQN近似误差O(1/√N_s) + 平均场扰动误差O(1/N)；实证表明从零开始学习的方法能收敛到接近中心化计算的SNE。
AI.conclusion: 这些贡献支持了Karma经济作为公平资源分配实用工具的愿景。

title: Estimating Subgraph Importance with Structural Prior Domain Knowledge
summary: We propose a subgraph importance estimation method for pretrained Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) on graph-level tasks, formulated as a linear Group Lasso regression problem in the embedding space. Our method effectively leverages prior domain knowledge of graph substructures, while remaining independent of the specific form of the output layer or readout function used in the GNN architecture, and it does not require access to ground-truth target labels. Experiments on real-world graph datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing baselines in subgraph importance estimation. Furthermore, we extend our method to identify important nodes within the graph.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于预训练图神经网络（GNN）的子图重要性估计方法，通过在线性嵌入空间中的Group Lasso回归问题来估计子图重要性，无需访问真实标签。
AI.motivation: 现有的子图重要性估计方法往往依赖输出层或读出函数的特定形式，且需要真实标签，缺乏灵活性和通用性。本文旨在提出一种不依赖特定GNN架构、无需标签的子图重要性估计方法。
AI.method: 将子图重要性估计建模为嵌入空间中的线性Group Lasso回归问题，利用先验领域知识对图子结构进行约束，不依赖于GNN输出层或读出函数的具体形式。
AI.result: 在真实图数据集上，该方法在子图重要性估计任务中一致优于现有基线方法，并能扩展用于识别图中重要节点。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用、无监督的子图重要性估计框架，兼具灵活性和可扩展性，可以扩展到节点级别的解释。

title: Read, Extract, Classify: A Tool for Smarter Requirements Engineering
summary: This paper presents the ReXCL tool, which automates the extraction and classification processes in requirements engineering, enhancing the software development life-cycle. The tool features two main modules: Extraction, which processes raw requirement documents into a predefined schema using heuristics and predictive modeling, and Classification, which assigns class labels to requirements using adaptive fine-tuning of encoder-based models. The final output can be exported to external requirement engineering tools. Performance evaluations indicate that ReXCL significantly improves efficiency and accuracy in managing requirements, marking a novel approach to automating the schematization of semi-structured requirement documents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ReXCL工具，自动化需求工程中的提取与分类流程，通过启发式方法和预测模型处理半结构化需求文档，并利用自适应微调编码器模型进行分类，显著提升了效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 需求工程中，从半结构化文档中提取和分类需求通常依赖人工，耗时且容易出错，缺乏自动化的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: ReXCL包含两个核心模块：1) Extraction模块：利用启发式规则和预测建模，将原始需求文档处理为预定义模式；2) Classification模块：采用自适应微调（adaptive fine-tuning）的编码器模型（encoder-based models）对需求进行类别标签分配。
AI.result: 性能评估表明，ReXCL在管理需求的效率和准确率上均有显著提升，能够自动化地将半结构化需求文档进行模式化处理。
AI.conclusion: ReXCL是自动化需求工程中提取与分类流程的一种新颖方法，可以有效改善软件开发生命周期中的需求管理环节。

title: Limits of Learning Linear Dynamics from Experiments
summary: Learning governing dynamics from data is a common goal across the sciences, yet it is only well-posed when the underlying mechanisms are identifiable. In practice, many data-driven methods implicitly assume identifiability; when this assumption fails, estimated models can yield spurious predictions and invalid mechanistic conclusions. Classical identifiability guarantees for controlled linear time-invariant (LTI) systems provide sufficient conditions -- controllability and persistent excitation -- but leave open whether identifiability holds when these conditions fail, and which parts of the system remain identifiable without full identifiability. We show that the experimental setup, i.e., the realized initial state and control input, dictates a fundamental limit on the information recoverable from the observed trajectory. We develop a geometric characterization of this limit and derive a closed-form description of all systems consistent with the experimental setup. Crucially, we prove that even when the full system is not identifiable, the restricted dynamics on the subspace reachable by the experiment remain uniquely determined.

AI.tldr: 本文研究控制系统中的可辨识性问题，证明即使系统不完全可辨识，实验可达子空间上的受限动力学仍可唯一确定，并给出几何刻画与闭式描述。
AI.motivation: 现有方法隐式假设可辨识性，但当假设不成立时会导致虚假预测和无效结论。经典理论只给出充分条件，未解决条件不满足时的可辨识性问题。
AI.method: 通过几何方法刻画实验设置（初始状态与控制输入）对可恢复信息的基本限制，推导所有与实验一致的系统的闭式描述。
AI.result: 证明了即使全系统不可辨识，实验可达子空间上的受限动力学仍可唯一确定。
AI.conclusion: 为不完全可辨识场景下的动力学学习提供了理论基础，明确了哪些部分可被可靠恢复。

title: Streaming of rendered content with adaptive frame rate and resolution
summary: Streaming rendered content is an attractive way to bring high-quality graphics to billions of mobile devices that do not have sufficient rendering power. Existing solutions render content on a server at a fixed frame rate, typically 30 or 60 frames per second, and reduce resolution when bandwidth is restricted. However, this strategy leads to suboptimal rendering quality under the bandwidth constraints. In this work, we exploit the spatio-temporal limits of the human visual system to improve perceived quality while reducing rendering costs by adaptively adjusting both frame rate and resolution based on scene content and motion. Our approach is codec-agnostic and requires only minimal modifications to existing rendering infrastructure. We propose a system in which a lightweight neural network predicts the optimal combination of frame rate and resolution for a given transmission bandwidth, content, and motion velocity. This prediction significantly enhances perceptual quality while minimizing computational cost under bandwidth constraints. The network is trained on a large dataset of rendered content labeled with a perceptual video quality metric. The dataset and further information can be found at the project web page: https://www.cl.cam.ac.uk/research/rainbow/projects/adaptive_streaming/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对流媒体渲染内容的自适应帧率与分辨率调整系统，利用轻量级神经网络根据带宽、场景内容和运动速度预测最优（帧率，分辨率）组合，在带宽受限条件下提升感知质量并降低计算成本，且与编码器无关。
AI.motivation: 现有流媒体渲染方案固定帧率（30/60 fps），带宽受限时仅降低分辨率，未充分利用人类视觉系统的时空感知特性，导致渲染质量次优。
AI.method: 构建轻量级神经网络，以带宽、场景内容和运动速度为输入，预测最优帧率与分辨率组合；网络使用包含感知视频质量指标标注的大规模渲染数据集进行训练；系统与具体编码器无关，仅需对现有渲染基础设施做最小修改。
AI.result: 在带宽约束下，自适应调整帧率和分辨率相比固定帧率策略显著提升了感知质量，同时降低了渲染计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 利用人类视觉系统的时空限制自适应调整渲染参数是提升流媒体渲染感知质量的有效途径，且方案轻量、兼容现有架构。

title: Red-Teaming Agent Execution Contexts: Open-World Security Evaluation on OpenClaw
summary: Agentic language-model systems increasingly rely on mutable execution contexts, including files, memory, tools, skills, and auxiliary artifacts, creating security risks beyond explicit user prompts. This paper presents DeepTrap, an automated framework for discovering contextual vulnerabilities in OpenClaw. DeepTrap formulates adversarial context manipulation as a black-box trajectory-level optimization problem that balances risk realization, benign-task preservation, and stealth. It combines risk-conditioned evaluation, multi-objective trajectory scoring, reward-guided beam search, and reflection-based deep probing to identify high-value compromised contexts. We construct a 42-case benchmark spanning six vulnerability classes and seven operational scenarios, and evaluate nine target models using attack and utility grading scores. Results show that contextual compromise can induce substantial unsafe behavior while preserving user-facing task completion, demonstrating that final-response evaluation is insufficient. The findings highlight the need for execution-centric security evaluation of agentic AI systems. Our code is released at: https://github.com/ZJUICSR/DeepTrap

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepTrap框架，用于自动发现基于智能体语言模型系统中的上下文漏洞。通过将对抗性上下文操纵建模为黑盒轨迹级优化问题，结合风险条件评估、多目标轨迹评分、奖励引导束搜索和反思深度探测，在42个案例基准上评估了9个目标模型，发现上下文妥协能引发大量不安全行为，表明仅评估最终响应是不够的。
AI.motivation: 智能体语言模型系统越来越多地依赖可变执行上下文（文件、内存、工具、技能等），这些上下文带来的安全风险超越了显式用户提示本身，现有安全评估方法主要关注最终响应的安全性，忽视了执行上下文被恶意操纵的风险。
AI.method: DeepTrap将对抗性上下文操纵形式化为黑盒轨迹级优化问题，平衡风险实现、良性任务保持和隐蔽性三个目标。方法包含：风险条件评估、多目标轨迹评分、奖励引导束搜索和反思深度探测四个组件，用于自动识别高价值的被妥协上下文。
AI.result: 构建了包含42个案例的基准，覆盖6种漏洞类别和7种操作场景，评估了9个目标模型。实验表明上下文妥协能诱导大量不安全行为，同时保持用户可见任务的完成度，证明仅依赖最终响应评估是不充分的。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了智能体AI系统需要执行中心的安全评估，而不仅仅是最终响应评估。

title: Efficient and Adaptive Human Activity Recognition via LLM Backbones
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is a core task in pervasive computing systems, where models must operate under strict computational constraints while remaining robust to heterogeneous and evolving deployment conditions. Recent advances based on Transformer architectures have significantly improved recognition performance, but typically rely on task-specific models trained from scratch, resulting in high training cost, large data requirements, and limited adaptability to domain shifts. In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift that reuses large pretrained language models (LLMs) as generic temporal backbones for sensor-based HAR, instead of designing domain-specific Transformers. To bridge the modality gap between inertial time series and language models, we introduce a structured convolutional projection that maps multivariate accelerometer and gyroscope signals into the latent space of the LLM. The pretrained backbone is kept frozen and adapted using parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), drastically reducing the number of trainable parameters and the overall training cost. Through extensive experiments on standard HAR benchmarks, we show that this approach enables rapid convergence, strong data efficiency, and robust cross-dataset transfer, particularly in low-data and few-shot settings. At the same time, our results highlight the complementary roles of convolutional frontends and LLMs, where local invariances are handled at the signal level while long-range temporal dependencies are captured by the pretrained backbone. Overall, this work demonstrates that LLMs can serve as a practical, frugal, and scalable foundation for adaptive HAR systems, opening new directions for reusing foundation models beyond their original language domain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将预训练大语言模型（LLM）作为传感器人体活动识别（HAR）的通用时序骨干网络，通过结构化卷积投影将惯性信号映射到LLM隐空间，并采用LoRA进行参数高效微调，实现了在低资源场景下的快速收敛、高数据效率和鲁棒跨数据集迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的HAR模型通常是任务特定、从头训练的，存在训练成本高、数据需求大、领域迁移适应性差等问题。作者希望利用预训练LLM作为通用时序骨干，降低训练成本并提升HAR系统在异构部署条件下的适应性。
AI.method: 提出结构化卷积投影（structured convolutional projection）将多轴加速度计和陀螺仪信号映射到LLM的隐空间；使用冻结的预训练LLM作为骨干网络，仅通过LoRA（Low-Rank Adaptation）进行参数高效微调，大幅减少可训练参数量。
AI.result: 在标准HAR基准上实现了快速收敛、高数据效率和鲁棒跨数据集迁移，尤其在低数据和少样本场景下表现优异。实验表明卷积前端处理局部不变性，LLM骨干捕获长程时间依赖，两者互补。
AI.conclusion: LLM可以作为实用、节约且可扩展的HAR系统基础，展示了将基础模型复用到原始语言领域之外的新方向。

title: SplitFed-CL: A Split Federated Co-Learning Framework for Medical Image Segmentation with Inaccurate Labels
summary: Split Federated Learning (SplitFed) combines federated and split learning to preserve privacy while reducing client-side computation. However, in medical image segmentation, heterogeneous label quality across clients can significantly degrade performance. We propose SplitFed-CL, a co-learning framework where a global teacher guides local students to detect and refine unreliable annotations. Reliable labels supervise training directly, while unreliable labels are corrected via weighted student--teacher refinement. SplitFed-CL further incorporates consistency regularization for robustness to input perturbations and a trainable weighting module to balance loss terms adaptively. We also introduce a novel difficulty guided strategy to simulate human like boundary centric annotation errors, where the degree of perturbation is governed by shape complexity and the associated annotation difficulty. Experiments on two multiclass segmentation datasets with controlled synthetic noise, together with a binary segmentation dataset containing real-world annotation errors, demonstrate that SplitFed-CL consistently outperforms seven state-of-the-art baselines, yielding improved segmentation quality and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出了SplitFed-CL框架，在分割联邦学习中通过全局教师指导学生网络检测和纠正不可靠标签，并结合一致性正则化和自适应损失加权，在医学图像分割任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: Split Federated Learning在医学图像分割中面临客户端标签质量异质性导致性能下降的问题，现有方法缺乏对不可靠标签的检测与纠正机制。
AI.method: 提出SplitFed-CL协同学习框架：1)全局教师指导学生检测不可靠标注；2)可靠标签直接训练，不可靠标签通过加权师生精炼纠正；3)一致性正则化增强鲁棒性；4)可训练权重模块自适应平衡损失；5)提出基于形状复杂度的边界中心化注释错误模拟策略。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像分割数据集上（含合成噪声和真实标注错误），SplitFed-CL一致优于7个SOTA基线方法，分割质量和鲁棒性均有提升。
AI.conclusion: SplitFed-CL通过协同学习框架有效解决了联邦分割学习中标签质量异质性问题，为隐私保护的医学图像分割提供了更鲁棒的方案。

title: ForceFlow: Learning to Feel and Act via Contact-Driven Flow Matching
summary: Existing imitation learning methods enable robots to interact autonomously with the physical environment. However, contact-rich manipulation tasks remain a significant challenge due to complex contact dynamics that demand high-precision force feedback and control. Although recent efforts have attempted to integrate force/torque sensing into policies, how to build a simple yet effective framework that achieves robust generalization under multimodal observations remains an open question. In this paper, we propose ForceFlow, a force-aware reactive framework built upon flow matching. For contact-stage policy design, we investigate force signal fusion mechanisms and adopt an asymmetric multimodal fusion architecture that treats force as a global regulatory signal, combined with a joint prediction paradigm that enhances the policy's understanding of instantaneous force and historical information, thereby achieving deep coupling between force and motion. For task-level hierarchical decomposition, we divide manipulation into a vision-dominant approach stage (VLM-based pointing for target localization) and a touch-dominant interaction stage (force-driven contact execution), with a Vision-to-Force (V2F) handover mechanism that explicitly decouples spatial generalization from contact regulation. Experimental results across six real-world contact-rich tasks demonstrate that ForceFlow achieves a 37% success rate improvement over the strong baseline ForceVLA while maintaining significantly lower cost. Moreover, ForceFlow exhibits accurate force signal prediction and demonstrates superior performance in contact force self-regulation and zero-shot out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了ForceFlow，一种基于流匹配(flow matching)的力感知机器人操作框架，通过非对称多模态融合架构和视觉到力的交接机制，在接触密集型操作任务中实现了37%的成功率提升和出色的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 接触密集型操作任务因复杂的接触动力学需要高精度力反馈和控制而极具挑战性，现有方法难以在 multimodal 观测下实现鲁棒泛化，因此需要一个简单而有效的力感知框架。
AI.method: 1) 非对称多模态融合架构：将力信号作为全局调控信号，结合联合预测机制实现力与运动的深度耦合；2) 任务级层次分解：将操作分为视觉主导的接近阶段(VLM-based pointing)和触觉主导的交互阶段，通过Vision-to-Force (V2F)交接机制显式解耦空间泛化与接触调控；3) 基于flow matching的力感知反应式框架。
AI.result: 在6项真实世界接触密集型操作任务中，ForceFlow比强基线ForceVLA提升37%的成功率，同时保持更低的成本；展现出精确的力信号预测、接触力自调节能力和零样本分布外(OOD)泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将力信号作为全局调控信号的非对称融合架构，以及V2F交接机制，能够有效解耦空间泛化与接触调控，是实现鲁棒接触操作的有效范式。

title: Approximation Theory of Laplacian-Based Neural Operators for Reaction-Diffusion System
summary: Neural operators provide a framework for learning solution operators of partial differential equations (PDEs), enabling efficient surrogate modeling for complex systems. While universal approximation results are now well understood, approximation analysis specific to nonlinear reaction-diffusion systems remains limited. In this paper, we study neural operators applied to the solution mapping from initial conditions to time-dependent solutions of a generalized Gierer-Meinhardt reaction-diffusion system, a prototypical model of nonlinear pattern formation. Our main results establish explicit approximation error bounds in terms of network depth, width, and spectral rank by exploiting the Laplacian spectral representation of the Green's function underlying the PDE. We show that the required parameter complexity grows at most polynomially with respect to the target accuracy, demonstrating that Laplacian eigenfunction-based neural operator architectures alleviate the curse of parametric complexity encountered in generic operator learning. Numerical experiments on the Gierer-Meinhardt system support the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经算子对非线性反应扩散系统（Gierer-Meinhardt模型）的近似能力，建立了基于网络深度、宽度和谱秩的显式逼近误差界，证明拉普拉斯特征函数基的神经算子架构可避免参数复杂度灾难。
AI.motivation: 虽然神经算子的通用逼近性已被广泛研究，但针对非线性反应扩散系统（如Gierer-Meinhardt模型）的特定逼近分析仍然匮乏，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 利用PDE背后格林函数的拉普拉斯谱表示，建立神经算子逼近误差界（与网络深度、宽度、谱秩的关系），理论上证明了参数复杂度随目标精度呈多项式增长。
AI.result: 建立了显式的逼近误差界，证明拉普拉斯特征函数基的神经算子架构可缓解通用算子学习中的参数复杂度灾难，数值实验支持理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 拉普拉斯特征函数基的神经算子对Gierer-Meinhardt反应扩散系统具有高效逼近能力，参数复杂度可控。

title: Deploying Self-Supervised Learning for Real Seismic Data Denoising
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a promising approach to seismic data denoising as it does not require clean reference data. In this work, the deployment of the Noisy-as-Clean (NaC) method was evaluated for real seismic data denoising under controlled conditions. Two independent seismic acquisitions, each comprising noisy and filtered data, were organized into four real datasets. The NaC SSL method was adapted to add real noise to the noisy input, controlled by a parameter. An experimental protocol with ten experiments was designed to compare different strategies for deploying the NaC SSL method with the supervised learning baseline, using identical network topology and hyperparameters. The models were evaluated in terms of denoising performance, computational cost, and generalization capability. The results show that the synthetic additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) is inadequate for the denoising of seismic data within the NaC method, and performance strongly depends on the compatibility between the injected and actual noise characteristics. Furthermore, both the characteristics of the seismic data and the noise level influence the performance of the model. Self-supervised fine-tuning on test data has improved SSL performance, whereas no such gain was observed for fine-tuning of supervised models. Finally, NaC has shown to be a simple, effective, and model-independent method that offers a feasible solution for the denoising of real seismic data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Noisy-as-Clean (NaC)自监督学习方法在真实地震数据去噪中的应用，通过控制实验比较了不同部署策略，发现合成高斯白噪声不适用于地震数据去噪，而NaC方法是一种简单有效的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统地震数据去噪依赖干净参考数据，但实际中难以获得。自监督学习(SSL)无需干净数据，但NaC方法在地震数据上的适用性尚不清楚，因此需要系统评估。
AI.method: 基于两个独立地震采集构建四个真实数据集，将NaC SSL方法适配为向含噪输入添加真实噪声（由参数控制），设计10组实验对比不同SSL部署策略与监督学习基线，使用相同网络拓扑和超参数。
AI.result: 1) 合成AWGN噪声不适用于NaC地震去噪；2) 模型性能高度依赖注入噪声与实际噪声的匹配度；3) 数据和噪声水平均影响性能；4) 在测试数据上进行自监督微调可提升SSL性能，但对监督模型无此效果。
AI.conclusion: NaC是一种简单、有效且模型无关的自监督去噪方法，为真实地震数据去噪提供了可行方案。

title: Resilient Vision-Tabular Multimodal Learning under Modality Missingness
summary: Multimodal deep learning has shown strong potential in medical applications by integrating heterogeneous data sources such as medical images and structured clinical variables. However, most existing approaches implicitly assume complete modality availability, an assumption that rarely holds in real-world clinical settings where entire modalities and individual features are frequently missing. In this work, we propose a multimodal transformer framework for joint vision-tabular learning explicitly designed to operate under pervasive modality missingness, without relying on imputation or heuristic model switching. The architecture integrates three components: a vision, a tabular, and a multimodal fusion encoder. Unimodal representations are weighted through learnable modality tokens and fused via intermediate fusion with masked self-attention, which excludes missing tokens and modalities from information aggregation and gradient propagation. To further enhance resilience, we introduce a modality-dropout regularization strategy that stochastically removes available modalities during training, encouraging the model to exploit complementary information under partial data availability. We evaluate our approach on the MIMIC-CXR dataset paired with structured clinical data from MIMIC-IV for multilabel classification of 14 diagnostic findings with incomplete annotations. Two parallel systematic stress-test protocols progressively increase training and inference missingness in each modality separately, spanning fully multimodal to fully unimodal scenarios. Across all missingness regimes, the proposed method consistently outperforms representative baselines, showing smoother performance degradation and improved robustness. Ablation studies further demonstrate that attention-level masking and intermediate fusion with joint fine-tuning are key to resilient multimodal inference.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多模态transformer框架，通过可学习的模态token、掩码自注意力和模态dropout正则化，实现在模态缺失条件下（不依赖插补或启发式模型切换）的视觉-表格联合学习，在MIMIC数据集上表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态医学方法隐式假设所有模态完整可用，但实际临床中常出现模态缺失和特征缺失，缺乏专门设计来处理这种"普遍性模态缺失"的通用框架。
AI.method: 构建三编码器架构（视觉、表格、多模态融合），引入可学习的模态token加权单模态表示，通过掩码自注意力的中间融合排除缺失模态的信息聚合与梯度传播，并设计模态dropout正则化策略在训练时随机丢弃可用模态以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR+IV数据集的多标签分类任务上，通过系统性压力测试（逐步增加训练和推理缺失率），所提方法在所有缺失场景下一致优于基线，性能退化更平滑，鲁棒性更强。
AI.conclusion: 注意力层掩码和中间融合联合微调是实现鲁棒多模态推理的关键，该框架无需插补即可有效应对模态缺失问题。

title: MCPShield: Content-Aware Attack Detection for LLM Agent Tool-Call Traffic
summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a widely adopted interface for LLM agents to invoke external tools, yet learned monitoring of MCP tool-call traffic remains underexplored. In this article, MCPShield is presented as an attack detection framework for MCP tool-call traffic that encodes each agent session as a graph (tool calls as nodes, sequential and data-flow links as edges), enriches nodes with sentence-embedding features over arguments and responses, and classifies sessions as benign or attacked. Three GNN architectures (GAT, GCN, GraphSAGE), a no-graph MLP, and classical baselines (XGBoost, random forest, logistic regression, linear SVM) are evaluated, with the full architecture comparison conducted on RAS-Eval (task-stratified splits) and GraphSAGE retained as the GNN baseline on ATBench and a combined-source variant (both label-stratified). Three findings emerge. First, content-level features are essential: metadata-only detection plateaus around an AUROC of 0.64 regardless of architecture, while content embeddings push the AUROC above 0.89. Second, naive random-split evaluation inflates AUROC by up to 26 percentage points relative to task-disjoint splits, a memorization confound that prior agent-detection work has not addressed. Third, the detection signal resides primarily in the SBERT content embeddings: an AUROC of 0.975 was reached by tree ensembles on pooled embeddings, performing, for the most part, better than the neural architectures in the primary RAS-Eval setting including GNNs (0.917) and the MLP (0.896), and self-supervised pre-training does not deliver a label-efficiency advantage on this task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCPShield，一个针对LLM agent的MCP工具调用流量攻击检测框架。它将agent会话编码为图结构，使用GNN（GAT、GCN、GraphSAGE）及多种基线方法进行分类。关键发现：内容级特征至关重要（AUROC从0.64提升至0.89+）；随机划分评估会高估性能（最多26个百分点）；集成方法在池化嵌入上表现最好（AUROC 0.975），优于GNN和MLP。
AI.motivation: MCP已成为LLM agent调用外部工具的广泛接口，但对MCP工具调用流量的监控检测尚未被充分研究，亟需专门的攻击检测框架。
AI.method: 将agent会话编码为图（工具调用为节点，时序和数据流为边），用SBERT句子嵌入增强节点特征，采用GAT、GCN、GraphSAGE等GNN架构以及MLP、XGBoost等基线进行分类，在RAS-Eval、ATBench等数据集上评估。
AI.result: 内容嵌入将AUROC提升至0.89+（元数据仅0.64）；随机划分相比任务分离划分高估26个百分点AUROC；树集成（XGBoost等）在池化嵌入上达到0.975 AUROC，优于GNN（0.917）和MLP（0.896）；自监督预训练无标签效率优势。
AI.conclusion: MCPShield有效检测MCP工具调用攻击，内容级特征和严谨的评估划分至关重要，简单集成方法在该任务上优于复杂神经架构。

title: Scaling Laws and Tradeoffs in Recurrent Networks of Expressive Neurons
comment: 25 pages, 21 figures, 3 tables, including derivations. Submitted for peer review
summary: Cortical neurons are complex, multi-timescale processors wired into recurrent circuits, shaped by long evolutionary pressure under stringent biological constraints. Mainstream machine learning, by contrast, predominantly builds models from extremely simple units, a default inherited from early neural-network theory. We treat this as a normative architectural question. How should one split a fixed parameter budget $P$ between the number of units $N$, per-unit effective complexity $k_e$, and per-unit connectivity $k_c$? What controls the optimal allocation? This calls for a model in which per-unit complexity can be tuned independently of width and connectivity. Accordingly, we introduce the ELM Network, whose recurrent layer is built from Expressive Leaky Memory (ELM) neurons, chosen to mirror functional components of cortical neurons. The architecture allows for individually adjusting $N$, $k_e$, and $k_c$ and trains stably across orders of magnitude in scale. We evaluate the model on two qualitatively different sequence benchmarks: the neuromorphic SHD-Adding task and Enwik8 character-level language modeling. Performance improves monotonically along each of the three axes individually. Under a fixed budget, a clear non-trivial optimum emerges in their tradeoff, and larger budgets favor both more and more complex neurons. A closed-form information-theoretic model captures these tradeoffs and attributes the diminishing returns at two ends to: per-neuron signal-to-noise saturation and across-neuron redundancy. A hyperparameter sweep spanning three orders of magnitude in trainable parameters traces a near-Pareto-frontier scaling law consistent with the framework. This suggests that the simple-unit default in ML is not obviously optimal once this tradeoff surface is probed, and offers a normative lens on cortex's reliance on complex spatio-temporal integrators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELM网络，通过引入可调节复杂度的神经元单元（Expressive Leaky Memory神经元），研究在固定参数量预算下，神经元数量、单元内部复杂度与连接复杂度之间的最优分配。实验发现存在非平凡的最优折中点，且更大预算倾向于更多且更复杂的神经元，并提出了一个信息论模型来解释收益递减现象。
AI.motivation: 挑战机器学习中默认使用极其简单单元（如人工神经元）的架构设计范式，从规范性的角度探讨：在固定参数预算下，应该如何在神经元数量、单个神经元复杂度和连接复杂度之间进行最优分配？
AI.method: 提出ELM Network，其循环层由Expressive Leaky Memory（ELM）神经元构建，可以独立调节神经元数量N、单元有效复杂度k_e和连接复杂度k_c。在SHD-Adding和Enwik8两个序列基准上进行了评估，并通过信息论模型分析参数量分配中的收益递减现象。
AI.result: 三个维度各自单独增加都能提升性能；在固定预算下存在非平凡的最优折中点；更大预算偏向于更多且更复杂的神经元；信息论模型揭示了收益递减来自两端：单个神经元的信噪比饱和与神经元间的冗余。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习中默认使用简单单元并非显然最优，皮层对复杂时空积分器的依赖提供了一种规范性视角。

title: ExploitGym: Can AI Agents Turn Security Vulnerabilities into Real Attacks?
summary: AI agents are rapidly gaining capabilities that could significantly reshape cybersecurity, making rigorous evaluation urgent. A critical capability is exploitation: turning a vulnerability, which is not yet an attack, into a concrete security impact, such as unauthorized file access or code execution. Exploitation is a particularly challenging task because it requires low-level program reasoning (e.g., about memory layout), runtime adaptation, and sustained progress over long horizons. Meanwhile, it is inherently dual-use, supporting defensive workflows while lowering the barrier for offense. Despite its importance and diagnostic value, exploitation remains under-evaluated. To address this gap, we introduce ExploitGym, a large-scale, diverse, realistic benchmark on the exploitation capabilities of AI agents. Given a program input that triggers a vulnerability, ExploitGym tasks agents with progressively extending it into a working exploit. The benchmark comprises 898 instances sourced from real-world vulnerabilities across three domains, including userspace programs, Google's V8 JavaScript engine, and the Linux kernel. We vary the security protections applied to each instance, isolating their impact on agent performance. All configurations are packaged in reproducible containerized environments. Our evaluation shows that while exploitation remains challenging, frontier models can successfully exploit a non-trivial fraction of vulnerabilities. For example, the strongest configurations are Anthropic's latest model Claude Mythos Preview and OpenAI's GPT-5.5, which produce working exploits for 157 and 120 instances, respectively. Notably, even with widely used defenses enabled, models retain non-trivial success rates. These results establish ExploitGym as an effective testbed for exploitation and highlight the growing cybersecurity risks posed by increasingly capable AI agents.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了ExploitGym，一个用于评估AI Agent漏洞利用能力的基准测试，包含898个源自真实世界漏洞的实例，覆盖用户空间程序、V8 JavaScript引擎和Linux内核三个领域。评估表明前沿模型（如Claude Mythos Preview和GPT-5.5）能够成功利用其中一部分漏洞，即使在启用常见防御措施时仍保持一定成功率，凸显了AI Agent带来的网络安全风险。
AI.motivation: AI Agent能力迅速增长，可能显著重塑网络安全格局。漏洞利用（exploitation）是一个关键但被低估的能力，它既是防御性工作流的基础，也降低了攻击门槛。目前缺乏大规模、多样化、真实的基准来评估AI Agent在这一领域的能力。
AI.method: 构建ExploitGym基准测试：从真实世界漏洞中提取898个实例（覆盖用户空间程序、V8引擎、Linux内核），为每个实例配置不同的安全保护机制，封装在可复现的容器化环境中。Agent的任务是给定触发漏洞的程序输入，逐步将其扩展为可工作的利用代码。
AI.result: 漏洞利用仍然具有挑战性，但前沿模型已展现出非平凡的成功率：Claude Mythos Preview成功利用157个实例，GPT-5.5成功利用120个实例。即使启用广泛使用的防御措施，模型仍能保持一定的成功率。
AI.conclusion: ExploitGym是评估漏洞利用能力的有效测试平台，同时突显了日益强大的AI Agent所带来的网络安全风险。

title: Learning plug-in surrogate endpoints for randomized experiments
summary: Surrogate endpoints are used in place of long-term outcomes in randomized experiments when observing the real outcome for a large enough cohort is prohibitively expensive or impractical. A short-term surrogate is good if the result of an experiment using the surrogate is predictive of the result of a hypothetical study using the real outcome. Much attention has been paid to formalizing this property in causal terms, but most criteria are unidentifiable and cannot be turned into practical algorithms for learning surrogate endpoints from data. To address this, we study plug-in composite surrogates, functions of post-treatment variables that may be substituted directly for the primary outcome in a randomized experiment. We propose two methods for learning plug-in surrogates that maximize effect predictiveness, and characterize the possibility of finding endpoints that yield unbiased effect estimates in representative scenarios. Finally, in both synthetic experiments with known effects and in data from a real-world experiment, we find that our method, based on directly modeling the surrogate effect, returns plug-in endpoints more predictive of the primary effect than established methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何在随机实验中学习可替代长期结果的“插件式复合替代终点”，提出了两种最大化效应可预测性的方法，并在合成和真实数据实验中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 长期结果难以观测时，需要寻找可替代的短期替代终点。现有因果形式化标准大多不可识别，难以转化为实用算法。本文旨在提出可学习的、能直接替代主要结果的插件式复合替代终点。
AI.method: 提出两种学习插件式复合替代终点的方法，通过直接建模替代效应来最大化效应可预测性，并在代表性场景中刻画获得无偏效应估计的可能性。
AI.result: 在合成实验和真实实验中，所提方法（基于直接建模替代效应）相比已有方法，返回的插件式端点对主要效应具有更强的预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 插件式复合替代终点是可学习的实用替代方案，所提方法能有效提升替代终点的预测能力。

title: Hölder Policy Optimisation
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) enhances large language models by estimating advantages across a group of sampled trajectories. However, mapping these trajectory-level advantages to policy updates requires aggregating token-level probabilities within each sequence. Relying on a fixed aggregation mechanism for this step fundamentally limits the algorithm's adaptability. Empirically, we observe a critical trade-off: certain fixed aggregations frequently suffer from training collapse, while others fail to yield satisfactory performance. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{HölderPO}, a generalised policy optimisation framework unifying token-level probability aggregation via the Hölder mean. By explicitly modulating the parameter $p$, our framework provides continuous control over the trade-off between gradient concentration and variance bounds. Theoretically, we prove that a larger $p$ concentrates the gradient to amplify sparse learning signals, whereas a smaller $p$ strictly bounds gradient variance. Because no static configuration can universally resolve this concentration-stability trade-off, we instantiate the framework with a dynamic annealing algorithm that progressively schedules $p$ across the training lifecycle. Extensive evaluations demonstrate superior stability and convergence over existing baselines. Specifically, our approach achieves a state-of-the-art average accuracy of $54.9\%$ across multiple mathematical benchmarks, yielding a substantial $7.2\%$ relative gain over standard GRPO and secures an exceptional $93.8\%$ success rate on ALFWorld.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HölderPO，通过Hölder均值统一token级概率聚合，并引入动态退火算法调整参数p，解决GRPO中固定聚合机制导致的训练崩溃与性能权衡问题，在数学推理和具身任务上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: GRPO使用固定聚合机制将轨迹级优势映射到策略更新，但不同固定聚合方式存在训练崩溃或性能不佳的根本性权衡，限制了算法的适应性。
AI.method: 提出HölderPO框架，用Hölder均值统一token级概率聚合，通过参数p连续控制梯度集中度与方差界限的权衡；并设计动态退火算法在训练过程中逐步调度p值。
AI.result: 数学基准平均准确率54.9%（相对提升7.2%），ALFWorld成功率93.8%，训练稳定性和收敛性均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态调节聚合机制能有效解决固定聚合的固有权衡，为RLHF中的策略优化提供了更灵活、稳定的框架。

title: Missing Old Logits in Asynchronous Agentic RL: Semantic Mismatch and Repair Methods for Off-Policy Correction
summary: Asynchronous reinforcement learning improves rollout throughput for large language model agents by decoupling sample generation from policy optimization, but it also introduces a critical failure mode for PPO-style off-policy correction. In heterogeneous training systems, the total importance ratio should ideally be decomposed into two semantically distinct factors: a \emph{training--inference discrepancy term} that aligns inference-side and training-side distributions at the same behavior-policy version, and a \emph{policy-staleness term} that constrains the update from the historical policy to the current policy. We show that practical asynchronous pipelines with delayed updates and partial rollouts often lose the required historical training-side logits, or old logits. This missing-old-logit problem entangles discrepancy repair with staleness correction, breaks the intended semantics of decoupled correction, and makes clipping and masking thresholds interact undesirably. To address this issue, we study both exact and approximate correction routes. We propose three exact old-logit acquisition strategies: snapshot-based version tracking, a dedicated old-logit model, and synchronization via partial rollout interruption, and compare their system trade-offs. From the perspective of approximate correction, we focus on preserving the benefits of decoupled correction through a more appropriate approximate policy when exact old logits cannot be recovered at low cost, without incurring extra system overhead. Following this analysis, we adopt a revised PPO-EWMA method, which achieves significant gains in both training speed and optimization performance. Code at https://github.com/millioniron/ROLL.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了异步强化学习中PPO风格离策略修正的失效模式，指出总重要性比率应分解为训练-推理差异项和策略过时项，并揭示了实际异步流水线中"缺失旧logits"问题导致修正语义混乱。提出了精确获取旧logits的三种策略和基于PPO-EWMA的近似修正方法，在训练速度和优化性能上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 异步强化学习通过解耦样本生成与策略优化提升了大语言模型智能体的吞吐量，但PPO风格的离策略修正存在关键失效模式。现有方法未正确分解重要性比率中的训练-推理差异和策略过时两个因子，且实际异步流水线中历史训练端logits缺失导致修正语义混乱，亟需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将总重要性比率分解为训练-推理差异项（对齐推理端和训练端分布）和策略过时项（约束历史策略到当前策略的更新）。针对缺失旧logits问题，提出三种精确获取策略：快照版本追踪、专用旧logits模型、部分rollout中断同步；以及基于PPO-EWMA的近似修正方法。
AI.result: 提出的PPO-EWMA修正方法在训练速度和优化性能上均取得了显著提升，有效解决了异步流水线中旧logits缺失导致的修正语义混乱问题。
AI.conclusion: 异步PPO训练中应明确区分训练-推理差异和策略过时两个修正因子，缺失旧logits会导致二者纠缠。当无法低成本获取精确旧logits时，PPO-EWMA是一种有效的近似方案，能在不增加系统开销的情况下保持解耦修正的优势。

title: Overcoming Dynamics-Blindness: Training-Free Pace-and-Path Correction for VLA Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve remarkable flexibility and generalization beyond classical control paradigms. However, most prevailing VLAs are trained under a single-frame observation paradigm, which leaves them structurally blind to temporal dynamics. Consequently, these models degrade severely in non-stationary scenarios, even when trained or finetuned on dynamic datasets. Existing approaches either require expensive retraining or suffer from latency bottlenecks and poor temporal consistency across action chunks. We propose Pace-and-Path Correction, a training-free, closed-form inference-time operator that wraps any chunked-action VLA. From a single quadratic cost, joint minimization yields a unified solution that decomposes orthogonally into two distinct channels. The pace channel compresses execution along the planned direction, while the path channel applies an orthogonal spatial offset, jointly absorbing the perceived dynamics within the chunk window. We evaluate our approach on a comprehensive diagnostic benchmark MoveBench designed to isolate motion as the sole controlled variable. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art training-free wrappers and dynamic-adaptive methods and improves success rates by up to 28.8% and 25.9% in absolute terms over foundational VLA models in dynamic-only and static-dynamic mixed environments, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出Pace-and-Path Correction，一种无需训练、闭式推理时操作符，通过正交分解为速度通道和路径通道，在单帧观测的VLA模型中有效处理时序动态，在动态环境中提升成功率最高28.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型大多基于单帧观测训练，对时序动态结构性地"盲视"，在非平稳场景下性能严重退化。现有方法要么需要昂贵重训练，要么存在延迟瓶颈和动作块间时序一致性差的问题。
AI.method: 提出Pace-and-Path Correction，一个无需训练的闭式推理时操作符。从单一二次代价函数出发，联合最小化得到正交分解的解：速度通道沿规划方向压缩执行，路径通道施加正交空间偏移，共同吸收块窗口内的感知动态。
AI.result: 在MoveBench诊断基准上，该方法在动态环境超越SOTA训练无关包装器和动态自适应方法，在纯动态环境提升成功率28.8%，在静态-动态混合环境提升25.9%。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种轻量级、无需训练的推理时校正方法，有效解决了VLA模型在动态场景下的时序盲视问题，显著提升了鲁棒性。

title: Elicitation-Augmented Bayesian Optimization
summary: Human-in-the-loop Bayesian optimization (HITL BO) methods utilize human expertise to improve the sample-efficiency of BO. Most HITL BO methods assume that a domain expert can quantify their knowledge, for instance by pinpointing query locations or specifying their prior beliefs about the location of the maximum as a probability distribution. However, since human expertise is often tacit and cannot be explicitly quantified, we consider a setting where domain knowledge of an expert is elicited via pairwise comparisons of designs. We interpret the expert's pairwise judgements as noisy evidence about the values of the observable objective function and develop a principled method for combining the information obtained via direct observations and pairwise queries. Specifically, we derive a cost-aware value-of-information acquisition function that balances direct observations against pairwise queries. The proposed method approaches the convex hull of the trajectories of the individual information sources: when pairwise queries are cheap it substantially improves sample-efficiency over observation-only BO, and when pairwise queries are costly or noisy, it recovers the performance of standard BO by relying on direct observations alone.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种人机协同贝叶斯优化的方法，通过成对比较（而非量化评估）来利用人类专家知识，并设计了成本感知的信息价值采集函数来平衡直接观测和成对查询，在成对查询廉价时提升样本效率，昂贵时恢复标准BO性能。
AI.motivation: 现有HITL BO方法假设专家能量化其知识（如指定查询位置或先验分布），但人类知识往往是隐性的、难以量化的。因此需要一种能通过更自然的成对比较方式来获取专家知识的方法。
AI.method: 1) 将专家的成对比较解释为关于目标函数值的噪声证据；2) 提出成本感知的价值信息采集函数（cost-aware value-of-information acquisition function），在直接观测和成对查询之间动态平衡。
AI.result: 该方法能收敛到两种信息源各自轨迹的凸包：当成对查询廉价时显著提升样本效率；当成对查询昂贵或噪声大时，恢复标准BO的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过成对比较隐式利用人类知识是可行的，且成本感知的采集策略能有效平衡不同信息源，具有实用价值。

title: 3DGS$^3$: Joint Super Sampling and Frame Interpolation for Real-Time Large-Scale 3DGS Rendering
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time 3D rendering but faces challenges in efficiently scaling to ultra-dense scenes and high-resolution due to computational bottlenecks that limit its use in latency-sensitive applications. Instead of optimizing the splatting pipeline itself, we propose \textbf{3DGS$^3$}, a unified post-rendering framework that jointly performs super sampling and frame interpolation through differentiable processing of low-resolution outputs to achieve both high-resolution and high-frame-rate rendering. Our \textbf{Gradient\- \-Aware Super Sampling (GASS)} module leverages the continuous differentiability of 3DGS to extract image gradients that guide a GRU-based refinement network to enable high-fidelity super sampling. Furthermore, a \textbf{Lightweight Temporal Frame Interpolation (LTFI)} module based on a compact U-Net-like backbone fuses temporal and differentiable spatial cues from consecutive frames to synthesize temporally coherent intermediate frames. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate that 3DGS$^3$ achieves superior rendering efficiency and visual quality when compared with state-of-the-art methods and remains compatible with existing 3DGS acceleration techniques. The code will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出3DGS$^3$，一种后渲染框架，通过可微的超采样（GASS）和轻量级帧插值（LTFI）模块，在低分辨率输出基础上实现高分辨率、高帧率渲染，兼顾效率与质量。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在超密集场景和高分辨率下计算瓶颈严重，难以用于延迟敏感应用。现有方法主要优化泼溅管线本身，但本文思路不同，从后渲染角度解决。
AI.method: 提出3DGS$^3$框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) GASS（梯度感知超采样），利用3DGS的可微性提取图像梯度，引导GRU网络进行高保真超采样；(2) LTFI（轻量级时间帧插值），基于紧凑U-Net骨干融合时序和可微空间线索，合成帧间中间帧。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，3DGS$^3$在渲染效率和视觉质量上均优于现有方法，且兼容已有的3DGS加速技术。
AI.conclusion: 3DGS$^3$是一种统一的后渲染框架，通过可微超采样和帧插值有效解决了3DGS在高分辨率、高帧率场景下的效率问题。

title: Disentangled Sparse Representations for Concept-Separated Diffusion Unlearning
summary: Unlearning specific concepts in text-to-image diffusion models has become increasingly important for preventing undesirable content generation. Among prior approaches, sparse autoencoder (SAE)-based methods have attracted attention due to their ability to suppress target concepts through lightweight manipulation of latent features, without modifying model parameters. However, SAEs trained with sparse reconstruction objectives do not explicitly enforce concept-wise separation, resulting in shared latent features across concepts. To address this, we propose SAEParate, which organizes latent representations into concept-specific clusters via a concept-aware contrastive objective, enabling more precise concept suppression while reducing unintended interference during unlearning. In addition, we enhance the encoder with a GeLU-based nonlinear transformation to increase its expressive capacity under this separation objective, enabling a more discriminative and disentangled latent space. Experiments on UnlearnCanvas demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong gains in joint style-object unlearning, a challenging setting where existing methods suffer from severe interference between target and non-target concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAEParate，通过概念感知对比学习目标来组织稀疏自编码器的潜在特征为概念特定聚类，并引入GeLU非线性变换增强编码器表达能力，实现更精确的概念去除，在UnlearnCanvas上达到SOTA，尤其在风格-对象联合遗忘任务中表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的文本到图像扩散模型遗忘方法存在一个问题：由于SAE训练时使用稀疏重建目标，未明确促进概念间分离，导致不同概念的潜在特征共享，从而在抑制目标概念时意外干扰非目标概念。本文旨在解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 提出SAEParate方法：1) 引入概念感知的对比学习目标，将潜在表示组织为概念特定的聚类，实现概念间分离；2) 在编码器中加入基于GeLU的非线性变换，提高表达能力，在分离目标下形成更具判别性和解耦性的潜在空间。遗忘时仅需操纵特定概念对应的潜在特征，无需修改模型参数。
AI.result: 在UnlearnCanvas基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在联合风格-对象遗忘任务中显著优于现有方法，有效减少了目标概念与非目标概念之间的干扰。
AI.conclusion: SAEParate通过显式促进概念间分离，克服了传统SAE在概念遗忘中特征共享的问题，实现了更精确、干扰更小的概念抑制，为扩散模型的安全可控生成提供了有效方案。

title: Fused Gromov-Wasserstein Distance with Feature Selection
summary: Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) distances provide a principled framework for comparing objects by jointly aligning structure and node features. However, existing FGW formulations treat all features uniformly, which limits interpretability and robustness in high-dimensional settings where many features may be irrelevant or noisy. We introduce FGW distances with feature selection, which incorporate adaptive feature suppression weights into the FGW objective to selectively downweight or suppress differentiating features during alignment. We propose two approaches: (1) regularized FGW with Lasso and Ridge penalties, and (2) FGW with simplex-constrained weights, including groupwise extensions. We analyze the resulting models and establish their key theoretical properties, including bounds relative to classical FGW and Gromov-Wasserstein distances, and metric behavior. An efficient alternating minimization algorithm is developed. Experiments illustrate how feature suppression enhances interpretability and reveals task-relevant structure, with a special application to computational redistricting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出带特征选择的Fused Gromov-Wasserstein距离，通过引入自适应特征抑制权重（Lasso/Ridge惩罚或单纯形约束）来增强高维场景下的可解释性和鲁棒性，并开发了高效的交替最小化算法。
AI.motivation: 现有FGW距离将所有特征统一处理，在高维场景中面对大量无关或噪声特征时缺乏可解释性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在FGW目标函数中引入自适应特征抑制权重，提出两种方法：(1) 带Lasso/Ridge惩罚的正则化FGW；(2) 带单纯形约束权重的FGW（含分组扩展）。开发了交替最小化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明特征抑制增强了可解释性并揭示了任务相关结构，在计算区域重划（redistricting）中有特殊应用。
AI.conclusion: 带特征选择的FGW距离在保持理论性质（有界性、度量行为）的同时，显著提升了对高维数据的可解释性和鲁棒性。

title: SEVO: Semantic-Enhanced Virtual Observation for Robust VLA Manipulation via Active Illumination and Data-Centric Collection
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) and imitation-learning policies trained via community toolchains on low-cost hardware frequently fail when deployed outside the training environment. Existing evaluations, including the original ACT and SmolVLA benchmarks, demonstrate high success rates under controlled, fixed backgrounds, yet community practitioners report near-zero transfer to new environments. We present SEVO (Semantic-Enhanced Virtual Observation), a data-centric approach that improves cross-environment manipulation robustness without modifying the policy architecture. SEVO transforms the raw RGB camera stream through three mechanisms: (1) body-fixed cameras whose combined fields of view cover the full manipulation workspace, (2) active red-spectrum illumination that physically normalizes object appearance, and (3) real-time YOLO segmentation overlay that provides a background-invariant semantic cue. Critically, we show that a diversified data collection protocol (systematically varying lighting, backgrounds, and distractors during teleoperation) is the single most important factor for generalization. We target transparent water bottles, objects that visually blend with their surroundings, and select a simple pick-and-place task to enable hundreds of controlled real-robot trials across two mobile platforms. The full pipeline achieves 95% grasp success with ACT and 83% with SmolVLA in the training environment, transferring to novel environments at 85% and 75%. Without SEVO, the same policies achieve only 75%/70% in training and collapse to 30-35% in novel environments. Our results demonstrate that principled observation design and environmental diversity during data collection, not model scaling, enable low-cost robots to operate reliably in everyday household environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEVO方法，通过改进数据采集（多样化背景/光照/干扰物）和视觉观测设计（固定相机+红光谱照明+实时YOLO分割覆盖），在不修改模型架构的情况下，将VLA策略在新环境中的抓取成功率从30-35%提升至75-85%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA策略（如ACT、SmolVLA）在固定实验室环境下表现良好，但部署到新环境时成功率急剧下降（从~70%降至~30%），社区实践者报告近零迁移能力。现有工作过分关注模型扩展，忽视了数据多样性和观测设计对泛化能力的关键影响。
AI.method: 三种机制：1) 身体固定相机覆盖全操作空间；2) 红色光谱主动照明归一化物体外观；3) 实时YOLO分割覆盖提供背景不变的语义线索。同时采用系统化多样化数据采集（变化光照、背景、干扰物）。
AI.result: 训练环境：ACT抓取成功率95%，SmolVLA 83%；新环境：ACT 85%，SmolVLA 75%。对比无SEVO：训练环境仅75%/70%，新环境骤降至30-35%。
AI.conclusion: 原则性的观测设计和数据采集多样性（而非模型规模扩展）是低成本机器人在日常家庭环境中可靠运行的关键。

title: On What We Can Learn from Low-Resolution Data
summary: Artificial intelligence systems typically rely on large, centrally collected datasets, a premise that does not hold in many real-world domains such as healthcare and public institutions. In these settings, data sharing is often constrained by storage, privacy, or resource limitations. For example, small wearable devices may lack the bandwidth or energy capacity needed to store and transmit high-resolution data, leading to aggregation during data collection and thus a loss of information. As a result, datasets collected from different sources may consist of a mixture of high- and low-resolution samples. Despite the prevalence of this setting, it remains unclear how informative low-resolution data is when models are ultimately evaluated on high-resolution inputs. We provide a theoretical analysis based on the Kullback-Leibler divergence that characterises how the influence of a datapoint changes with resolution, and derive bounds that relate the relative contribution of high- and low-resolution observations to the information lost under downsampling. To support this analysis, we empirically demonstrate, using both a vision transformer and a convolutional neural network, that adding low-resolution data to the training set consistently improves performance when high-resolution data is scarce.

AI.tldr: 本文理论分析了低分辨率数据对高分辨率模型训练的贡献，证明在数据稀缺时添加低分辨率数据可提升性能，并基于KL散度推导了数据分辨率影响的信息论界限。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中数据共享受存储、隐私或资源限制，许多场景下收集的数据包含高低分辨率混合样本，但低分辨率数据对高分辨率模型训练的价值尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于KL散度进行理论分析，推导数据点分辨率变化对模型影响的界限，并通过视觉Transformer和CNN实验验证。
AI.result: 低分辨率数据始终能提升高分辨率数据稀缺时的模型性能；理论推导了分辨率变化对数据贡献影响的信息论界限。
AI.conclusion: 在数据受限场景下，混合分辨率数据训练是有效的策略，低分辨率数据包含对高分辨率任务有用的信息。

title: NexOP: Joint Optimization of NEX-Aware k-space Sampling and Image Reconstruction for Low-Field MRI
summary: Modern low-field magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) technology offers a compelling alternative to standard high-field MRI, with portable, low-cost systems. However, its clinical utility is limited by a low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), which hampers diagnostic image quality. A common approach to increase SNR is through repetitive signal acquisitions, known as NEX, but this results in excessively long scan durations. Although recent work has introduced methods to accelerate MRI scans through k-space sampling optimization, the NEX dimension remains unexploited; typically, a single sampling mask is used across all repetitions. Here we introduce NexOP, a deep-learning framework for joint optimization of the sampling and reconstruction in multi-NEX acquisitions, tailored for low-SNR settings. NexOP enables optimizing the sampling density probabilities across the extended k-space-NEX domain, under a fixed sampling-budget constraint, and introduces a new deep-learning architecture for reconstructing a single high-SNR image from multiple low-SNR measurements. Experiments with raw low-field (0.3T) brain data demonstrate that NexOP consistently outperforms competing methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively, across diverse acceleration factors and tissue contrasts. The results also demonstrate that NexOP yields non-uniform sampling strategies, with progressively decreasing sampling across repetitions, hence exploiting the NEX dimension efficiently. Moreover, we present a theoretical analysis supporting these numerical observations. Overall, this work proposes a sampling-reconstruction optimization framework highly suitable for low-field MRI, which can enable faster, higher-quality imaging with low-cost systems and contribute to advancing affordable and accessible healthcare.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NexOP，一种针对低场MRI中多NEX采集的深度学习框架，联合优化k空间-NEX域的采样概率和重建网络，在低信噪比条件下实现更快、更高质量的成像。
AI.motivation: 低场MRI虽然成本低、便携，但信噪比低。传统通过重复采集（NEX）提升信噪比会导致扫描时间过长，且现有方法未优化NEX维度的采样策略，通常所有重复使用同一采样模板。
AI.method: 提出NexOP框架：(1) 在k空间-NEX扩展域上优化采样密度概率，受固定采样预算约束；(2) 设计新的深度学习架构，从多个低SNR测量中重建单个高SNR图像。
AI.result: 在0.3T低场脑部数据上，NexOP在多种加速因子和组织对比度下，定量和定性指标均优于对比方法；产生了非均匀采样策略，重复次数越多采样密度递减，有效利用NEX维度。
AI.conclusion: NexOP为低场MRI提供了一种有效的采样-重建联合优化框架，可在低成本系统中实现更快、更高质量的成像，推动可负担、可及的医疗保健发展。

title: Lower bounds for one-layer transformers that compute parity
summary: This note shows that no self-attention layer post-processed by a rational function can sign-represent the parity function unless the product of the number of heads and the degree of the post-processing function grows linearly with the input length. Combining this lower bound with rational approximation of ReLU networks yields a margin-dependent extension for self-attention layers post-processed by ReLU networks.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了自注意力层后接有理函数无法以符号方式表示奇偶函数，除非头数与后处理函数度数的乘积与输入长度线性增长，并进一步将此下界推广到ReLU网络后处理的自注意力层。
AI.motivation: 理解自注意力机制的表达能力边界，特别是其在处理需要全局依赖的复杂函数（如奇偶函数）时的局限性。
AI.method: 通过有理函数近似理论，结合下界分析，证明自注意力层后处理为有理函数时无法符号表示奇偶函数；再利用ReLU网络的有理近似，将结果扩展至ReLU后处理场景。
AI.result: 自注意力层后接有理函数时，头数与后处理函数度数的乘积需与输入长度线性增长才能表示奇偶函数；对于ReLU后处理，类似下界在特定间隔下成立。
AI.conclusion: 自注意力机制在表示某些全局函数（如奇偶函数）时存在固有的表达能力限制，这为理解Transformer在需要全局推理任务上的局限性提供了理论依据。

title: Expected Batch Optimal Transport Plans and Consequences for Flow Matching
summary: Solving optimal transport (OT) on random minibatches is a common surrogate for exact OT in large-scale learning. In flow matching (FM), this surrogate is used to obtain OT-like couplings that can straighten probability paths and reduce numerical integration cost. Yet, the population-level coupling induced by repeated minibatch OT remains only partially understood. We formalize this coupling as the expected batch OT plan $\overlineπ_{k}$, obtained by averaging empirical OT plans over independent minibatches of size $k$. We then establish its large-batch consistency and, in the semidiscrete case relevant to generative modeling, derive rates for both the transport-cost bias and the convergence of $\overlineπ_{k}$ to the OT plan. For FM, this yields a population coupling whose induced velocity field is regular enough to define a unique flow from the source to the discrete target. We finally quantify how OT batch size interacts with numerical integration in a tractable two-atom model and in synthetic and image experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了流匹配中基于随机小批量的最优传输（OT）耦合，证明了其大 batch 一致性，并在半离散情形下推导了传输成本偏差和耦合收敛速率，同时量化了 OT batch size 与数值积分之间的交互作用。
AI.motivation: 在流匹配（Flow Matching）中，常用随机小批量的最优传输来近似全局OT，以获得更直的路径并减少数值积分成本。然而，这种重复小批量OT在总体水平上诱导的耦合性质尚未被充分理解。本文旨在形式化并分析该耦合的统计特性。
AI.method: 将期望小批量OT计划定义为\overline{π}_k（对独立k大小批量的经验OT计划取平均）；建立大batch一致性；在半离散情形下推导传输成本偏差和收敛速率；通过两原子模型、合成数据和图像实验量化OT batch size与数值积分的交互。
AI.result: 证明了期望小批量OT计划的一致性和收敛速率；在流匹配中，该耦合产生的速度场足够正则，可定义从源到离散目标的唯一流；实验表明batch size影响数值积分成本与耦合质量之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 小批量OT耦合在流匹配中是一种有效的代理，其理论性质（一致性、收敛速率、正则性）得到了严格刻画，并为实际中batch size的选择提供了理论指导。

title: Control Charts for Multi-agent Systems
summary: Generative agents have proven to be powerful assistants in a wide variety of contexts. Given this success, users are now deploying agents with minimal restrictions in open ended, multi-agent environments. Current methods for monitoring the dynamics of open-ended multi-agent systems are limited to qualitative inspection. In this paper, we extend the process-theoretic notion of adaptive control charts to multi-agent systems to enable automated monitoring. Using simulation, we demonstrate that adaptive control charts are necessary for monitoring multi-agent systems that can learn from their environment. We further demonstrate, both empirically and theoretically, that adaptive control charts are susceptible to adversarial agents that defect sufficiently slowly. These results illustrate a fundamental tradeoff in multi-agent system control: either agents in a system cannot learn or the system is susceptible to adversaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将自适应控制图方法扩展到多智能体系统以实现自动监控，通过仿真证明自适应控制图对于监控能持续学习的环境是必要的，同时发现这些方法易受缓慢叛变的对抗智能体攻击，揭示了多智能体系统中学习能力与对抗鲁棒性之间的根本性权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前开放环境下的多智能体系统缺乏自动监控方法，仅依赖定性观察，无法有效追踪系统动态变化。
AI.method: 将过程控制理论中的自适应控制图扩展到多智能体系统，通过仿真实验验证其有效性，并结合理论分析揭示其局限性。
AI.result: 自适应控制图对学习型多智能体系统监控是必要的；但这类方法易受缓慢叛变的对抗智能体攻击。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统存在根本性权衡：要么系统中的智能体不能学习（从而可被监控），要么系统易受对手攻击。

title: Multi-Task Representation Learning for Conservative Linear Bandits
summary: This paper presents the Constrained Multi-Task Representation Learning (CMTRL) framework for linear bandits. We consider T linear bandit tasks in a d dimensional space, which share a common low-dimensional representation of dimension r, where r is much smaller than the minimum of d and T. Furthermore, tasks are constrained so that only actions meeting specific safety or performance requirements are allowed, referred to as conservative (safe) bandits. We introduce a novel algorithm, Safe-Alternating projected Gradient Descent and minimization (Safe-AltGDmin), to recover a low-rank feature matrix while satisfying the given constraints. Building on this algorithm, we propose a multi-task representation learning framework for conservative linear bandits and establish theoretical guarantees for its regret and sample complexity bounds. We presented experiments and compared the performance of our algorithm with benchmark algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CMTRL框架，用于带约束（保守/安全）的线性多臂赌博机任务中的多任务表示学习，通过Safe-AltGDmin算法在低维共享表示下满足安全约束，并给出了理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有线性bandit多任务表示学习未考虑安全/性能约束，而实际应用中（如医疗、推荐系统）动作选择需满足特定安全要求。
AI.method: 提出Safe-AltGDmin算法，在交替投影梯度下降中引入约束条件，联合学习低秩特征矩阵并保证动作安全。
AI.result: 在理论层面给出了遗憾界和样本复杂度界，实验上对比基准算法展示了更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 成功将安全约束引入多任务线性bandit的表示学习中，为实际安全敏感场景提供了理论基础和可行算法。

title: DriftXpress: Faster Drifting Models via Projected RKHS Fields
summary: Drifting Models have emerged as a new paradigm for one-step generative modeling, achieving strong image quality without iterative inference. The premise is to replace the iterative denoising process in diffusion models with a single evaluation of a generator. However, this creates a different trade-off: drifting reduces inference cost by moving much of the computation into training. We introduce DriftXpress, an accelerated formulation of drifting models based on projected RKHS fields. DriftXpress approximates the drifting kernel in a low-rank feature space. This preserves the attraction-repulsion structure of the original drifting field while reducing the cost of field evaluation. Across image-generation benchmarks, DriftXpress achieves comparable FID to standard drifting while reducing wall-clock training cost. These results show that the training-inference trade-off of drifting models can be pushed further without giving up their one-step inference advantage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DriftXpress，一种加速的漂移模型公式，通过投影RKHS场在低秩特征空间中近似漂移核，在保持吸引-排斥结构的同时降低训练成本，实现与标准漂移模型相当的FID分数。
AI.motivation: 漂移模型虽然实现了一步生成，但将大量计算从推理转移到了训练中，导致训练成本高昂。本文旨在通过低秩近似方法进一步优化训练-推理权衡，在保持一步推理优势的同时降低训练开销。
AI.method: 提出基于投影RKHS（再生核希尔伯特空间）场的DriftXpress方法，在低秩特征空间中近似漂移核，保留原始漂移场的吸引-排斥结构，从而降低场评估的计算成本。
AI.result: 在图像生成基准测试中，DriftXpress在达到与标准漂移模型相当的FID分数（即不牺牲生成质量）的同时，显著减少了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 漂移模型的训练-推理权衡可以进一步优化，DriftXpress证明了在不放弃一步推理优势的前提下，有效降低训练成本是可行的。

title: Quantifying the Reconstructability of Astrophysical Methods with Large Language Models and Information Theory: A Case Study in Spectral Reconstruction
summary: Modern astrophysical studies rely heavily on complex data analysis pipelines; however, published descriptions often lack the detail required for computational reproducibility. In this work, we present an information-theoretic framework to quantify how effectively a method can be reconstructed from its written description. By treating algorithmic reconstruction as a probability distribution generated by Large Language Models (LLMs), we utilize Shannon entropy and Jensen-Shannon divergence to measure how strongly text constrains the hypothesis space of valid implementations. We demonstrate this approach through a case study of Trans-Neptunian Object (TNO) spectral reconstruction from sparse photometry. By prompting frontier LLMs with varying levels of manuscript text (Title, Abstract, and Methods), we find that while increasing text successfully clarifies the overall algorithmic structure, it fails to eliminate variance at the implementation level. This persistent variance establishes an "entropy floor," demonstrating that multiple divergent implementations remain consistent with explicit instructions. To evaluate practical reproducibility, we convert these reconstructed algorithms into executable pipelines. Our results reveal that, while LLMs easily recover core functional methodologies, they systematically fail to infer the tacit expert knowledge required for strict scientific calibration. This pilot study demonstrates that LLMs can be repurposed as a zero-shot diagnostic tool to audit methodological transparency, helping authors identify missing structural constraints and preserve scientific integrity in an era of automated research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用LLM和香农熵、JS散度等工具，量化学术论文中算法描述的可复现性。以TNO光谱重建为案例，发现即使增加文本描述，实现层面的熵仍无法归零，存在"熵基底"，且LLM难以捕捉隐性专家知识。
AI.motivation: 当前天体物理研究依赖复杂数据分析管道，但论文描述往往缺乏足够细节，导致计算可复现性差。作者希望构建一个自动化、零样本的诊断工具来量化方法描述的信息完整性。
AI.method: 将算法重建视为LLM生成的概率分布，利用香农熵和JS散度衡量文本对有效实现假设空间的约束强度。通过向前沿LLM输入不同粒度的论文文本（标题、摘要、方法），重建TNO光谱重建算法并评估实现一致性。
AI.result: 增加文本能澄清算法整体结构，但无法消除实现层面的方差，存在"熵基底"；LLM能恢复核心方法学，但系统性地无法推断严格的科学校准所需的隐性专家知识。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为零样本可复现性审计工具，帮助作者识别缺失的结构性约束，在自动化研究时代维护科学完整性。

title: Fair Conformal Classification via Learning Representation-Based Groups
summary: Conformal prediction methods provide statistically rigorous marginal coverage guarantees for machine learning models, but such guarantees fail to account for algorithmic biases, thereby undermining fairness and trust. This paper introduces a fair conformal inference framework for classification tasks. The proposed method constructs prediction sets that guarantee conditional coverage on adaptively identified subgroups, which can be implicitly defined through nonlinear feature combinations. By balancing effectiveness and efficiency in producing compact, informative prediction sets and ensuring adaptive equalized coverage across unfairly treated subgroups, our approach paves a practical pathway toward trustworthy machine learning. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种公平的共形推断框架，通过构建在自适应识别的子组上保证条件覆盖的预测集，解决分类任务中机器学习模型的算法偏见问题，从而增强公平性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 传统共形预测方法提供统计上严格的边际覆盖保证，但无法处理算法偏见，损害了公平性和信任度。
AI.method: 提出公平共形推断框架：为分类任务构建预测集，在通过非线性特征组合隐式定义的自适应识别子组上保证条件覆盖，平衡预测集的紧凑性和信息性，同时确保不公平处理子组上的自适应等覆盖。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验证明了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为走向可信机器学习提供了实用路径，在保证统计保证的同时兼顾了公平性。

title: DiffSegLung: Diffusion Radiomic Distillation for Unsupervised Lung Pathology Segmentation
summary: Unsupervised segmentation of pulmonary pathologies in CT remains an open challenge due to the absence of annotated multi pathology cohorts and the failure of existing diffusion-based methods to exploit the quantitative Hounsfield Unit (HU) signal that physically distinguishes tissue classes. To address this, we propose DiffSegLung,a framework that introduces Diffusion Radiomic Distillation, in which handcrafted radiomic descriptors serve as a physics grounded teacher to shape the bottleneck of a 3D diffusion U-Net via a contrastive objective, transferring pathology discriminative structure into the learned representation without any annotations. At inference, the teacher is discarded and multitimestep bottleneck features are clustered by a Gaussian Mixture Model with HU-guided label assignment, followed by Sobel Diffusion Fusion for boundary refinement. Evaluated on 190 expert annotated axial slices drawn from four heterogeneous CT cohorts, Diff-SegLung improves segmentation across all four pathology classes over unsupervised baselines and improves generation fidelity over prior CT diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 提出DiffSegLung框架，通过扩散放射组学蒸馏将手工放射组学描述符作为物理引导教师，在无标注情况下实现CT图像中肺部病理的无监督分割。
AI.motivation: CT中肺部病理的无监督分割因缺乏多病理标注数据且现有扩散方法未能利用定量HU信号而面临挑战。
AI.method: DiffSegLung框架：1) 扩散放射组学蒸馏——手工放射组学描述符作为教师通过对比目标塑造3D扩散U-Net瓶颈；2) 推理时用GMM聚类多时间步瓶颈特征，结合HU引导标签分配；3) Sobel扩散融合进行边界细化。
AI.result: 在190张来自四个异质CT队列的专家标注切片上，DiffSegLung在所有四个病理类别上优于无监督基线，并提高了生成保真度。
AI.conclusion: 通过将物理先验(放射组学、HU值)引入扩散模型瓶颈，实现了无需标注的CT病理分割，为医学图像无监督分割提供了新范式。

title: The Price of Proportional Representation in Temporal Voting
comment: Appears in the 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI), 2026
summary: We study proportional representation in the temporal voting model, where collective decisions are made repeatedly over time over a fixed horizon. Prior work has extensively investigated how proportional representation axioms from multiwinner voting (e.g., justified representation (JR) and its variants) can be adapted, satisfied, and verified in this setting. However, much less is understood about their interaction with social welfare. In this work, we quantify the efficiency cost of enforcing proportionality.
