We introduce MetaColloc. It is an optimization-free and data-free framework that removes this bottleneck completely. We decouple basis discovery from the solving process. We meta-train a dual-branch neural network on diverse Gaussian Random Fields. This offline process creates a universal dictionary of neural basis functions. At test time, we freeze the network. We solve the PDE by assembling a collocation matrix. We find the solution through a single linear least squares step. For non-linear PDEs, we apply the Newton-Raphson method to achieve fast quadratic convergence. Our experiments across six 2D and 3D PDEs show massive improvements. MetaColloc reaches state-of-the-art accuracy on smooth and non-linear problems. It also reduces test-time computation by several orders of magnitude. Finally, we provide a detailed frequency sweep analysis. This analysis reveals a critical mismatch between function approximation and operator stability at extremely high frequencies. This profound finding opens a clear path toward future operator-aware meta-learning.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaColloc框架，通过元训练构建通用神经基函数字典，将PDE求解转化为线性最小二乘问题，实现无需优化、无需数据的快速求解，在6个2D/3D PDE上达到SOTA精度并降低几个数量级的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统ML求解PDE需为每个新方程重新训练神经网络，优化过程缓慢。本文旨在消除这一瓶颈，实现无需优化和数据的新PDE快速求解。
AI.method: 元训练双分支神经网络，在多样化高斯随机场上离线学习通用神经基函数字典；测试时冻结网络，通过组装配置矩阵执行线性最小二乘求解；对非线性PDE使用Newton-Raphson方法实现二次收敛。
AI.result: 在6个2D/3D PDE实验上达到SOTA精度，测试时计算量减少数个数量级；频率扫描分析揭示了函数逼近与算子稳定性在高频下的关键失配问题。
AI.conclusion: MetaColloc有效解耦了基函数发现与求解过程，为高效PDE求解提供了新范式；高频失配发现为未来算子感知元学习指明了方向。

title: Agent-Based Post-Hoc Correction of Agricultural Yield Forecasts
summary: Accurate crop yield forecasting in commercial soft fruit production is constrained by the data available in typical commercial farm records, which lack the sensor networks, satellite imagery, and high-resolution meteorological inputs that most state-of-the-art approaches assume. We propose a structured LLM agent framework that performs post-hoc correction of existing model predictions, encoding agricultural domain knowledge across tools for phase detection, bias learning, and range validation. Evaluated on a proprietary strawberry yield dataset and a public USDA corn harvest dataset, agent refinement of XGBoost reduced MAE by 20% and MASE by 56% on strawberry, with consistent improvements across Moirai2 (MAE 24%, MASE 22%) and Random Forest (MAE 28%, MASE 66%) baselines. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the agent produced the strongest corrections across all configurations; LLaVA 13B showed inconsistent gains, highlighting sensitivity to the choice of refinement model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结构化LLM智能体框架，用于对现有作物产量预测模型进行后验修正，在草莓和玉米数据集上显著降低了预测误差。
AI.motivation: 商业软水果生产中的产量预测受限于数据条件（缺乏传感器网络、卫星图像和高分辨率气象数据），而现有最先进方法依赖于这些数据，因此需要一种能在数据受限情况下提升预测准确性的方法。
AI.method: 提出结构化LLM智能体框架，通过后验修正方式改进已有模型（如XGBoost、Moirai2、Random Forest）的预测结果。框架包含多个工具模块：物候期检测、偏差学习、范围验证，编码了农业领域知识，以Llama 3.1 8B等LLM作为智能体核心驱动修正过程。
AI.result: 在私有草莓产量数据集和公开USDA玉米收获数据集上，智能体修正XGBoost使MAE降低20%、MASE降低56%；Moirai2（MAE 24%、MASE 22%）和Random Forest（MAE 28%、MASE 66%）也有持续改进。Llama 3.1 8B表现最佳，LLaVA 13B改进不稳定。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体框架能有效提升数据受限场景下的作物产量预测精度，但修正效果高度依赖于所选LLM模型的质量。

title: Discrete Flow Matching for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
summary: Many reinforcement learning (RL) tasks have discrete action spaces, but most generative policy methods based on diffusion and flow matching are designed for continuous control. Meanwhile, generative policies usually rely heavily on offline datasets and offline-to-online RL is itself challenging, as the policy must improve from new interaction without losing useful behavior learned from static data. To address those challenges, we introduce DRIFT, an online fine-tuning method that updates an offline pretrained continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) policy with an advantage-weighted discrete flow matching loss. To preserve useful pretrained knowledge, we add a path-space penalty that regularizes the full CTMC trajectory distribution, rather than only the final action distribution. For large discrete action spaces, we introduce a candidate-set approximation that updates the actor over a small subset of actions sampled from reference-policy rollouts and uniform exploration. Our theoretical analysis shows that the candidate-set error is controlled by missing target probability mass, and the induced CTMC generator error decreases as the candidate set covers more high-probability actions. Experiments on prevailing discrete action RL task show that our method provides stable offline-to-online improvement across all tasks, achieving the highest average score on Jericho with a simple GRU encoder while outperforming methods that use pretrained language models. Controlled experiments further confirm that the path-space penalty remains bounded during fine-tuning and that the CTMC generator adapts to shifted rewards faster than deterministic baselines. The candidate-set mechanism is supported by a stability analysis showing that the generator error decreases exponentially with candidate coverage.

AI.tldr: DRIFT 是一种基于离散流匹配的在线微调方法，利用连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）策略和路径空间正则化，实现对离线预训练策略的稳定在线改进，并引入候选集近似处理大规模离散动作空间，在 Jericho 等离散动作 RL 任务上取得领先效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式策略方法（如扩散/流匹配）主要面向连续控制，而在离散动作 RL 任务中应用不足；同时，从离线到在线的微调面临知识遗忘和训练不稳定等挑战。
AI.method: 提出 DRIFT 框架：1) 使用 CTMC 策略建模离散动作分布；2) 引入优势加权离散流匹配损失进行在线微调；3) 添加路径空间惩罚项正则化整个 CTMC 轨迹分布以防止遗忘；4) 针对大离散动作空间提出候选集近似，从参考策略 rollout 和均匀探索中采样小动作子集更新 actor。
AI.result: 在多个离散动作 RL 任务上表现出稳定的离线到在线改进；在 Jericho 上使用简单 GRU 编码器获得最高平均分，超越使用预训练语言模型的方法；路径空间惩罚在微调过程中保持有界；CTMC 生成器适应奖励变化速度快于确定性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT 有效解决了离散动作空间下生成式策略的在线微调问题，路径空间正则化和候选集近似机制是关键创新点。

title: Natural Language based Specification and Verification
summary: Recent frontier large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance in identifying security vulnerabilities in large, mature open-source systems. As LLM-generated code becomes increasingly common, a natural goal is to prevent such models from producing vulnerable implementations in the first place. Formal verification offers a principled route to this objective, but existing verification pipelines typically require specifications written in rigid formal languages. Prior work has explored using LLMs to synthesize such specifications, with limited success. In this paper, we investigate a different approach: using LLMs both to generate specifications and to verify implementations compositionally when the specifications are expressed in natural language. Our preliminary results suggest that this approach is promising.

AI.tldr: 探索使用大语言模型通过自然语言规范进行形式化验证，以防止代码生成中的安全漏洞。
AI.motivation: LLM生成的代码越来越多，需要防止模型产出存在安全漏洞的代码。传统形式化验证需要严格的规范语言，而现有用LLM合成规范的方法效果有限。
AI.method: 使用LLM同时完成两件事：(1) 生成自然语言形式的安全规范；(2) 基于这些自然语言规范对代码实现进行组合式验证。
AI.result: 初步结果表明，这种基于自然语言规范的方法是有前景的。
AI.conclusion: 用自然语言代替形式化语言作为验证规范，结合LLM的能力，可能是实现代码安全验证的可行路径。

title: Trust the Batch, On- or Off-Policy: Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
summary: Reinforcement learning is structurally harder than supervised learning because the policy changes the data distribution it learns from. The resulting fragility is especially visible in large-model training, where the training and rollout systems differ in numerical precision, sampling, and other implementation details. Existing methods manage this fragility by adding hyper-parameters to the training objective, which makes the algorithm more sensitive to its configuration and requires retuning whenever the task, model scale, or distribution mismatch changes. This fragility traces to two concerns that current objectives entangle through hyper-parameters set before training begins: a trust-region concern, that updates should not move the policy too far from its current value, and an off-policy concern, that data from older or different behavior policies should influence the update only to the extent that it remains reliable. Neither concern is a constant to set in advance, and their severity is reflected in the policy-ratio distribution of the current batch. We present a simple yet effective batch-adaptive objective that replaces fixed clipping with the normalized effective sample size of the policy ratios. The same statistic caps the score-function weight and sets the strength of an off-policy regularizer, so the update stays close to the usual on-policy score-function update when ratios are nearly uniform, and tightens automatically when stale or mismatched data cause ratio concentration, while retaining a nonzero learning signal on high-ratio tokens. Experiments across a wide range of settings show that our method matches or exceeds tuned baselines, introducing no new objective hyper-parameters and removing several existing ones. The code is available at https://github.com/FeynRL-project/FeynRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种批量自适应的强化学习目标函数，用策略比率的归一化有效样本量替代固定裁剪，自动平衡信任区域和离策略约束，无需调参即可在各种设置下匹配或超越调优后的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 强化学习因策略改变数据分布而比监督学习更难，尤其在大模型训练中，训练与 rollout 系统在数值精度、采样等实现细节上的差异导致脆弱性。现有方法通过在训练目标中添加超参数来管理这种脆弱性，但这使算法对配置更敏感，每当任务、模型规模或分布不匹配变化时都需要重新调参。这种脆弱性源于当前目标通过训练前设定的超参数纠缠了两个问题：信任区域关注（更新不应使策略偏离当前值太远）和离策略关注（旧策略或不同行为策略的数据应在可靠范围内影响更新），而两者的严重程度都无法预先设定常数。
AI.method: 提出一种批量自适应的目标函数，用策略比率的归一化有效样本量（normalized effective sample size）替代固定裁剪。该统计量同时限制得分函数权重并设定离策略正则化器的强度：当比率接近均匀分布时，更新保持接近标准在策略得分函数更新；当陈旧或不匹配数据导致比率集中时，自动收紧约束，同时在高比率词元上保留非零学习信号。
AI.result: 在广泛的实验设置下，该方法匹配或超越了调优后的基线方法，且没有引入新的目标超参数，同时移除了一些已有的超参数。
AI.conclusion: 批量自适应的目标函数能够有效解耦并自动平衡信任区域与离策略问题，简化了RL训练的调参负担，在不同任务和模型规模下表现稳健。

title: Detecting overfitting in Neural Networks during long-horizon grokking using Random Matrix Theory
summary: Training Neural Networks (NNs) without overfitting is difficult; detecting that overfitting is difficult as well. We present a novel Random Matrix Theory method that detects the onset of overfitting in deep learning models without access to train or test data. For each model layer, we randomize each weight matrix element-wise, $\mathbf{W} \to \mathbf{W}_{\mathrm{rand}}$, fit the randomized empirical spectral distribution with a Marchenko-Pastur distribution, and identify large outliers that violate self-averaging. We call these outliers Correlation Traps. During the onset of overfitting, which we call the "anti-grokking" phase in long-horizon grokking, Correlation Traps form and grow in number and scale as test accuracy decreases while train accuracy remains high. Traps may be benign or may harm generalization; we provide an empirical approach to distinguish between them by passing random data through the trained model and evaluating the JS divergence of output logits. Our findings show that anti-grokking is an additional grokking phase with high train accuracy and decreasing test accuracy, structurally distinct from pre-grokking through its Correlation Traps. More broadly, we find that some foundation-scale LLMs exhibit the same Correlation Traps, indicating potentially harmful overfitting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机矩阵理论的方法，通过检测神经网络权重矩阵随机化后的谱分布异常值（Correlation Traps）来识别过拟合 onset，无需访问训练或测试数据。发现了一个称为"anti-grokking"的新阶段（高训练精度但测试精度下降），并在大规模LLM中观察到类似现象。
AI.motivation: 训练神经网络时过拟合难以检测，尤其在无法访问训练/测试数据的情况下（如隐私、监管等场景）。现有方法缺乏一个无需数据标签、能在训练过程中早期预警过拟合的手段。
AI.method: 对每层权重矩阵进行元素级随机化，拟合随机化后的经验谱分布与Marchenko-Pastur分布，检测违背自平均性的大离群值（Correlation Traps）。通过随机数据通过模型后输出logits的JS散度区分良性与有害陷阱。
AI.result: 发现过拟合onset阶段（anti-grokking）Correlation Traps会形成并增长（数量和规模），此时训练精度高但测试精度下降。该方法在基础规模LLM中也检测到类似Correlation Traps，暗示潜在的有害过拟合。
AI.conclusion: Correlation Traps是过拟合早期阶段的可靠指标，无需数据即可检测。anti-grokking是grokking现象中一个结构不同的新阶段。该方法可用于大型模型过拟合监控与可信AI。

title: Beyond Similarity Search: Tenure and the Case for Structured Belief State in LLM Memory
summary:
Why do we need another AI to help the AI? We argue you don't. Stateless LLM sessions impose re-orientation costs on iterative, session-heavy workflows. Prior work addresses cross-session memory through retrieval-augmented approaches: store history, embed it, retrieve by semantic similarity. Cross-session memory is a state management problem, not a search problem. Similarity search fails for named entity resolution within bounded vocabulary contexts because beliefs about a shared technical domain are semantically proximate by construction. A single user is the simplest bounded vocabulary context; engineering teams converge on the same property through shared codebases and terminology.
  We present Tenure, a local-first proxy that maintains a typed belief store with epistemic status, versioned supersession, and scope isolation, injecting curated context into every LLM session through precision-first retrieval. Hard scope isolation provides a structural guarantee: the right beliefs surface, and only within the boundaries the user has authorized. Tenure's typed schema converts extracted facts into imperative instructions via a why it matters field, making injected beliefs directly actionable rather than raw material for the model to re-derive.
  A controlled evaluation on 72 retrieval cases demonstrates the gap. Cosine similarity over dense embeddings achieves mean precision of 0.12. Alias-weighted BM25 maintains mean precision of 1.0, passing 72/72 cases versus 8/72 for cosine similarity on the same corpus. Hybrid retrieval typically solves vocabulary mismatch between disparate authors; Tenure eliminates this structurally: query and belief authors are the same person, and an alias enrichment flywheel continuously indexes their specific vocabulary. Under multi-turn topic drift this worsens: the vector backend produces drift scores of 0.43--0.50 on noise-critical turns where BM25 maintains 0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tenure，一个本地优先的代理工具，通过维护类型化的信念存储（含认识状态、版本废弃和范围隔离），以精确检索而非相似搜索的方式，为LLM会话提供跨会话上下文管理。实验表明，别名加权BM25在72个检索案例中达到1.0的平均精确度，远超稠密嵌入的余弦相似度（0.12）。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM会话是无状态的，跨会话记忆通常采用检索增强方法（存储历史→嵌入→语义相似度检索）。但作者认为跨会话记忆本质是状态管理问题而非搜索问题，相似度搜索在有限词汇上下文中无法准确解析命名实体，因此需要更精确的信念检索机制。
AI.method: 设计Tenure，一个本地优先的代理：1）维护类型化信念存储（含认识状态、版本废弃、范围隔离）；2）通过精确优先检索向每个LLM会话注入上下文；3）硬范围隔离确保信念在授权边界内出现；4）类型化模式通过"why it matters"字段将事实转化为可执行指令。
AI.result: 72个检索案例中，别名加权BM25精确度为1.0（72/72通过），稠密嵌入余弦相似度精确度为0.12（8/72通过）。多轮话题漂移下，向量方法在噪声关键轮次上漂移得分为0.43-0.50，而BM25保持0。
AI.conclusion: 跨会话记忆应被视为状态管理问题而非搜索问题。在单一用户或团队（共享术语）的有界词汇场景下，结构化信念存储加精确检索（如BM25）远优于语义相似度搜索，且别名丰富飞轮可不断索引用户特定词汇。

title: OGLS-SD: On-Policy Self-Distillation with Outcome-Guided Logit Steering for LLM Reasoning
summary: We study {on-policy self-distillation} (OPSD), where a language model improves its reasoning ability by distilling privileged teacher distributions along its own on-policy trajectories. Despite the performance gains of OPSD, we identify a common but often overlooked mismatch between teacher and student responses: self-reflected teacher responses can be shifted by reflection-induced bias and response templates, leading to miscalibrated token-level supervision. To mitigate this issue, we propose \methodname, an outcome-guided logit-steering framework that leverages verifiable outcome rewards to contrast successful and failed on-policy trajectories and calibrate teacher logits. By combining outcome-level correctness with dense token-level guidance through logit steering, \methodname stabilizes self-distillation and improves reasoning performance over standard OPSD and other variants across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结果引导的logit-steering框架（\methodname），用于解决自蒸馏中教师与学生在策略轨迹上的分布不匹配问题，通过可验证的奖励信号对比成功与失败轨迹来校准教师logit，提升推理能力。
AI.motivation: 在on-policy self-distillation中，教师和学生响应之间存在未被充分关注的错配问题：自反思导致教师响应出现偏差，且响应模板会引入校准不良的token级监督，影响蒸馏效果。
AI.method: 提出\methodname框架，利用可验证的结果奖励对比成功与失败的on-policy轨迹，通过logit-steering来校准教师logit，将结果级正确性与密集token级指导结合。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试上，\methodname稳定了自蒸馏过程，并在推理性能上优于标准的on-policy self-distillation及其他变体。
AI.conclusion: 通过结果引导的logit-steering可以有效缓解教师-学生分布错配问题，提升自蒸馏的稳定性和推理能力。

title: Aligning Flow Map Policies with Optimal Q-Guidance
summary: Generative policies based on expressive model classes, such as diffusion and flow matching, are well-suited to complex control problems with highly multimodal action distributions. Their expressivity, however, comes at a significant inference cost: generating each action typically requires simulating many steps of the generative process, compounding latency across sequential decision-making rollouts. We introduce flow map policies, a novel class of generative policies designed for fast action generation by learning to take arbitrary-size jumps including one-step jumps-across the generative dynamics of existing flow-based policies. We instantiate flow map policies for offline-to-online reinforcement learning (RL) and formulate online adaptation as a trust-region optimization problem that improves the critic's Q-value while remaining close to the offline policy. We theoretically derive FLOW MAP Q-GUIDANCE (FMQ), a principled closed-form learning target that is optimal for adapting offline flow map policies under a critic-guided trust-region constraint. We further introduce Q-GUIDED BEAM SEARCH (QGBS), a stochastic flow-map sampler that combines renoising with beam search to enable iterative inference-time refinement. Across 12 challenging robotic manipulation and locomotion tasks from OGBench and RoboMimic, FMQ achieves state-of-the-art performance in offline-to-online RL, outperforming the previous one-step policy MVP by a relative improvement of 21.3% on the average success rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flow Map Policies，一种通过学习生成动态中的任意大小跳跃（包括一步跳跃）来实现快速动作生成的生成式策略，并用于离线到在线强化学习。结合Flow Map Q-Guidance (FMQ) 和 Q-Guided Beam Search (QGBS)，在12个机器人操作和 locomotion 任务中实现了最先进的性能，比之前的最好方法MVP平均成功率提升21.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成式策略（如扩散/流匹配策略）虽然能处理复杂的多模态动作分布，但推理成本高——生成每个动作需要多步模拟，在序列决策中会累积延迟。因此，如何在不牺牲表达力的前提下加速动作生成是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 1) Flow Map Policies：学习流匹配生成动态中的任意大小跳跃（包括一步跳跃）以实现快速推理。2) Flow Map Q-Guidance (FMQ)：基于信任区域优化的闭式最优学习目标，用于从离线策略适应到在线策略。3) Q-Guided Beam Search (QGBS)：结合再噪声和束搜索的随机采样器，实现迭代推理时精化。
AI.result: 在OGBench和RoboMimic的12个机器人操作和locomotion任务上，FMQ在离线到在线RL中达到SOTA，平均成功率比之前最好的一步策略MVP提升21.3%。
AI.conclusion: Flow Map Policies有效解决了生成式策略推理慢的问题，FMQ方法在离线到在线RL中取得了显著性能提升，验证了理论推导的闭式学习目标在实际中的有效性。

title: Learning Minimally Rigid Graphs with High Realization Counts
comment: This is an extended version of the paper accepted to IJCAI 2026
summary: For minimally rigid graphs, the same edge-length data can admit multiple realizations (up to translations and rotations). Finding graphs with exceptionally many realizations is an extremal problem in rigidity theory, but exhaustive search quickly becomes infeasible due to the super-exponential growth of the number of candidate graphs and the high cost of realization-count evaluation. We propose a reinforcement-learning approach that constructs minimally rigid graphs via 0- and 1-extensions, also known as Henneberg moves. We optimize realization-count invariants using the Deep Cross-Entropy Method with a policy parameterized by a Graph Isomorphism Network encoder and a permutation-equivariant extension-level action head. Empirically, our method matches the known optima for planar realization counts and improves the best known bounds for spherical realization counts, yielding new record graphs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用强化学习（结合深度交叉熵方法和图同构网络）搜索具有极端多实现的极小刚性图，匹配了已知平面最优解，并刷新了球面实现计数的记录。
AI.motivation: 极小刚性图在给定边长数据下可有多个实现（刚性图的多重实现问题），寻找具有异常多实现的图是刚性理论中的极值问题，但穷举搜索因候选图超指数增长且实现计数评估成本高而不可行。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，通过0-扩展和1-扩展（Henneberg moves）逐步构造极小刚性图；策略网络由图同构网络编码器和置换等变动作头组成，使用深度交叉熵方法优化实现计数不变量。
AI.result: 在平面实现计数上匹配已知最优值，在球面实现计数上改进了已知最佳界，得到了新的记录图。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习方法能有效搜索极小刚性图的多重实现极值问题，在平面和球面场景下均取得有竞争力的结果，验证了该方法在组合图论极值搜索中的潜力。

title: Environment-Adaptive Preference Optimization for Wildfire Prediction
summary: Predicting rare extreme events such as wildfires from meteorological data requires models that remain reliable under evolving environmental conditions. This problem is inherently long-tailed: wildfire events are rare but high-impact, while most observations correspond to non-fire conditions, causing standard learning objectives to underemphasize the minority class (fire) that matters most. In addition, models trained on historical distributions often fail under distribution shifts, exhibiting degraded performance in new environments. To this end, we propose Environment-Adaptive Preference Optimization (EAPO), a framework that adapts prediction to the target environment with long-tail distribution. Given a new input distribution, we first construct distribution-aligned datasets via $k$-nearest neighbor retrieval. We then perform a hybrid fine-tuning procedure on this local manifold, combining supervised learning with preference optimization, as well as emphasizing on rare extreme events. EAPO refines decision boundaries while avoiding conflicting signals from heterogeneous training data. We evaluate EAPO on a real-world wildfire prediction task with environmental shifts. EAPO achieves robust performance (ROC-AUC 0.7310) and improves detection in extreme regimes, demonstrating its effectiveness in dynamic wildfire prediction systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出环境自适应偏好优化（EAPO）框架，通过k近邻检索构建分布对齐数据集，结合监督学习和偏好优化进行混合微调，显著提升动态环境下极端野火事件的预测性能（ROC-AUC 0.7310）。
AI.motivation: 野火等极端事件预测面临两个核心挑战：1）数据天然长尾分布（火灾样本极少），标准目标函数忽略少数类；2）训练与测试环境存在分布偏移，模型在新环境下性能退化。现有方法难以同时应对这两大问题。
AI.method: EAPO框架包含两步：1）对目标分布的新输入，通过k近邻检索构建与目标分布对齐的局部数据集；2）在该局部流形上进行混合微调，融合监督学习（关注整体性能）和偏好优化（强调极少数火灾事件），精细化决策边界同时避免异质训练数据的冲突信号。
AI.result: 在真实野火预测任务中，EAPO取得ROC-AUC 0.7310，显著提升了极端事件（火灾）的检测能力，在动态环境变化下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EAPO验证了结合分布对齐检索与偏好优化微调在长尾分布+分布偏移场景下的有效性，为动态环境中的罕见事件预测提供了通用框架。

title: Human-AI Productivity Paradoxes: Modeling the Interplay of Skill, Effort, and AI Assistance
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools are rapidly adopted in the workplace and in education, yet the empirical evidence on AI's impact remains mixed. We propose a model of human-AI interaction to better understand and analyze several mechanisms by which AI affects productivity. In our setup, human agents with varying skill levels exert utility-maximizing effort to produce certain task outcomes with AI assistance. We find that incorporating either endogeneity in skill development or in AI unreliability can induce a productivity paradox: increased levels of AI assistance may degrade productivity, leading to potentially significant shortfalls. Moreover, we examine the long-term distributional effect of AI on skill, and demonstrate that skill polarization can emerge in steady state when accounting for heterogeneity in AI literacy -- the agent's capability to identify and adapt to inaccurate AI outputs. Our results elucidate several mechanisms that may explain the emergence of human-AI productivity paradoxes and skill polarization, and identify simple measures that characterize when they arise.

AI.tldr: 本文通过建模人类与AI的互动，发现AI辅助程度的增加可能导致生产力悖论（生产力下降）和技能极化现象，尤其是在考虑技能内生性或AI不可靠性时。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI工具在工作和教育中迅速普及，但关于AI对生产力的影响实证结果不一致（mixed）。作者希望从理论上阐明AI如何影响生产力，特别是解释为何会出现"AI提升反而降低生产力"的反直觉现象。
AI.method: 构建了一个人类-AI互动模型：不同技能水平的人类代理在AI辅助下，通过最大化效用决策付出努力来完成指定任务。模型引入了两个关键机制：①技能发展的内生性；②AI的不可靠性。通过理论分析考察生产力变化和长期技能分布的均衡状态。
AI.result: ①技能内生性或AI不可靠性均可导致生产力悖论——AI辅助增加反而使生产力下降。②在考虑AI素养异质性（用户识别和适应AI错误的能力不同）时，稳态下会出现技能极化现象。③给出了刻画悖论和极化何时出现的简单度量指标。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了人类-AI互动中生产力悖论和技能极化的形成机制，并指出了关键的调节因素（技能内生性、AI可靠性、AI素养异质性）。对AI在工作和教育中的部署策略有重要启示意义。

title: Options, Not Clicks: Lattice Refinement for Consent-Driven MCP Authorization
summary: As Model Context Protocol adoption grows, securing tool invocations via meaningful user consent has become a critical challenge, as existing methods, broad always allow toggles or opaque LLM-based decisions, fail to account for dangerous call arguments and often lead to consent fatigue. In this work, we present Conleash, a client-side middleware that enforces boundary-scoped authorization by utilizing a risk lattice to auto-permit safe calls within known boundaries while escalating risks, a policy engine for user-defined invariants, and a refinement loop that converts user decisions into reusable rules. Evaluated on 984 real-world traces, Conleash achieved 98.2% accuracy, caught 99.4% of escalations, and added only 8.2 ms of overhead for policy verification; furthermore, in a user study where N=16, participants significantly preferred Conleash scoped permissions over traditional methods, citing higher trust and reduced prompting.

AI.tldr: Conleash 是一种客户端中间件，利用风险格、策略引擎和用户决策精炼循环，在 MCP 工具调用中实现边界作用域授权，显著提升安全性与用户体验。
AI.motivation: MCP 协议普及后，现有工具调用授权方式（全允许/全禁止或 LLM 自主决策）无法处理危险参数，且导致用户授权疲劳，亟需更细粒度且用户友好的安全方案。
AI.method: 提出 Conleash 三层架构：(1) 风险格自动放行安全调用并上报风险；(2) 策略引擎执行用户自定义不变约束；(3) 精炼循环将用户决策转化为可复用规则。
AI.result: 在 984 条真实轨迹上准确率 98.2%，捕获 99.4% 的风险调用，策略验证仅增加 8.2ms 开销；用户研究（N=16）显示参与者显著偏好 Conleash 的权限方式。
AI.conclusion: Conleash 证明了边界作用域授权在提升安全性和用户信任方面的有效性，为 MCP 生态提供了实用且高效的授权中间件方案。

title: Search Your Block Floating Point Scales!
summary: Quantization has emerged as a standard technique for accelerating inference for generative models by enabling faster low-precision computations and reduced memory transfers. Recently, GPU accelerators have added first-class support for microscaling Block Floating Point (BFP) formats. Standard BFP algorithms use a fixed scale based on the maximum magnitude of the block. We observe that this scale choice can be suboptimal with respect to quantization errors. In this work, we propose ScaleSearch, an alternative strategy for selecting these scale factors: using a fine-grained search leveraging the mantissa bits in microscaling formats to minimize the quantization error for the given distribution. ScaleSearch can be integrated with existing quantization methods such as Post Training Quantization and low-precision attention, and is shown to improve their performance. Additionally, we introduce ScaleSearchAttention, an accelerated NVFP4-based attention algorithm, which uses ScaleSearch and adapted prior techniques to ensure near-0 performance loss for causal language modeling. Experiments show that ScaleSearch reduces quantization error by 27% for NVFP4 and improves language model PTQ by up to 15 points for MATH500 (Qwen3-8B), while ScaleSearchAttention improves Wikitext-2 PPL by upto 0.77 points for Llama 3.1 70B. The proposed methods closely match baseline performance while providing quantization accuracy improvements.

AI.tldr: 提出ScaleSearch方法，通过细粒度搜索优化微缩BFP格式中的缩放因子选择，最小化量化误差；并基于此提出ScaleSearchAttention加速注意力机制，在NVFP4格式下实现近乎无损的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准BFP算法基于块内最大绝对值固定缩放，这种缩放选择在量化误差上并非最优，存在改进空间。
AI.method: 提出ScaleSearch，利用微缩格式中的尾数位进行细粒度搜索，选择最小化量化误差的缩放因子；可集成到PTQ和低精度注意力中。进一步提出ScaleSearchAttention，基于NVFP4的加速注意力算法。
AI.result: ScaleSearch减少NVFP4量化误差27%；提升Qwen3-8B在MATH500上PTQ性能达15个点；ScaleSearchAttention提升Llama 3.1 70B在Wikitext-2上PPL达0.77。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在匹配基线性能的同时，显著提升了量化精度，证明了细粒度缩放选择的有效性。

title: High-arity Sample Compression
summary: Recently, a series of works have started studying variations of concepts from learning theory for product spaces, which can be collected under the name high-arity learning theory. In this work, we consider a high-arity variant of sample compression schemes and we prove that the existence of a high-arity sample compression scheme of non-trivial quality implies high-arity PAC learnability.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了高元学习理论中的样本压缩方案变体，并证明了非平凡质量的高元样本压缩方案的存在性意味着高元PAC可学习性。
AI.motivation: 扩展经典学习理论中的概念（如样本压缩方案）到乘积空间（高元设定），探索高元学习理论的基本性质。
AI.method: 提出了高元样本压缩方案的概念，并理论证明了其与高元PAC可学习性之间的蕴含关系。
AI.result: 证明了非平凡质量的高元样本压缩方案的存在性意味着高元PAC可学习性。
AI.conclusion: 高元样本压缩方案与高元PAC可学习性之间存在理论联系，为高元学习理论提供了新的理论基础。

title: Spatial Adapter: Structured Spatial Decomposition and Closed-Form Covariance for Frozen Predictors
comment: Preprint. 10 pages main text, with appendices
summary: We present the Spatial Adapter, a parameter-efficient post-hoc layer that equips any frozen first-stage predictor with a structured spatial representation of its residual field and an induced closed-form spatial covariance. The adapter operates as a cascade second stage on residuals, jointly learning a spatially regularized orthonormal basis and per-sample scores via a tractable mini-batch ADMM procedure, without modifying any first-stage parameter. Because the first-stage parameters are frozen, the adapter does not retrain the backbone; its role is to supply a compressed distributional summary of the residual field. Smoothness, sparsity, and orthogonality together turn a generic low-rank factorization into an identifiable spatial representation whose induced residual covariance admits a closed-form low-rank-plus-noise estimator; the effective rank is determined data-adaptively by spectral thresholding, while the nominal rank K is an optimization-side upper bound only. This covariance enables kriging-style spatial prediction at unobserved locations, with plug-in uncertainty quantification as a secondary downstream use. Across synthetic data, Weather2K for spatial-holdout prediction, and GWHD patch grids as a basis-transferability diagnostic, the adapter recovers residual spatial structure when paired with frozen first stages from linear models to deep spatiotemporal and vision backbones; the added representation uses fewer than K(N+T) parameters alongside a compact residual-trend network.

AI.tldr: 提出Spatial Adapter，一种参数高效的后期适配层，在不修改原模型参数的情况下，通过可闭形式的空间协方差为任意冻结的第一阶段预测器提供结构化空间表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理空间残差结构时通常需要重新训练整个骨干网络或缺乏可解释的空间表示，本文旨在以参数高效的方式为冻结模型补充可识别的空间结构和不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 在冻结的第一阶段预测器后级联一个二阶适配器，通过可微的mini-batch ADMM过程联合学习空间正则化的正交基和逐样本分数，通过谱阈值自适应确定有效秩，残差协方差采用闭式低秩加噪声估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据、Weather2K空间留出预测、GWHD补丁网格（基础可迁移性诊断）上，适配器成功恢复了残差空间结构，且附加参数少于K(N+T)个。
AI.conclusion: Spatial Adapter提供了一种通用、参数高效的方案，使冻结模型获得可解释的空间表示和不确定性量化能力，且不干扰原模型训练。

title: Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
summary: In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often an inefficient allocation because it overlooks a reward-density principle: sparse sequence-level reward should train models where exploration is productive, while dense token-level teacher reward should be used where the aim is to compress behavior into a smaller model. In this view, GRPO-style sparse RL and OPD-style dense teacher supervision are not separate recipes; they are different reward-density regimes. The allocation rule is simple: use scarce labeled training data upstream on the strongest model that can turn it into reward-shaped behavior, then transfer that behavior downstream as dense supervision. We evaluate this rule on verifiable math with Qwen3 and Llama models. At fixed Qwen3-1.7B deployment-student size, an RL-improved 8B teacher distilled through the dense bridge outperforms direct GRPO on the same student, while transfer from the same teacher before RL underperforms. The bridge is important: a forward-KL warmup on teacher rollouts followed by OPD on student rollouts is consistently strongest on MATH before any post-bridge student-side sparse RL, and also gives the best pre-Stage~3 AIME endpoints for the canonical 8B/14B teachers. The bridge also makes later student-side sparse RL effective: GRPO that is weak on a cold student lifts MATH from $75.4\%$ to $78.5\%$ after the bridge and outperforms a matched replay control by $2.8$ points. The operational principal is to avoid using scarce labeled data on the least prepared policy: use sparse reward for teacher-side discovery, dense transfer for student compression, and student-side sparse reward only after the bridge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于奖励密度原则的训练数据分配策略：将稀缺的带标签验证数据用于最强的教师模型进行稀疏RL探索，再通过密集监督（如OPD）蒸馏到学生模型，而非直接在学生模型上使用GRPO。实验表明，这种"教师RL→密集桥接→学生RL"的流程显著优于直接对学生进行GRPO。
AI.motivation: 在有标签验证数据稀缺的场景下，标准的做法（如直接在待部署的学生模型上运行GRPO）是一种低效的数据分配方式。作者认为这忽视了"奖励密度原则"：稀疏的序列级奖励应用于探索能力强的模型，而密集的token级教师奖励应用于压缩学生模型。因此需要重新思考数据分配策略。
AI.method: 提出"奖励密度分配原则"：将稀缺标签数据用于最强教师模型进行稀疏RL（类似GRPO）以塑造奖励行为，然后通过密集桥接（前向KL预热+OPD）将行为蒸馏到学生模型，最后可再在学生侧进行稀疏RL。在Qwen3和Llama模型上，使用8B教师蒸馏到1.7B学生，比较直接GRPO、教师蒸馏前/后等多种设置。
AI.result: 1) RL改进后的8B教师通过密集桥接蒸馏给1.7B学生，优于直接在该学生上运行GRPO；2) 桥接前（教师未RL）的蒸馏效果不佳；3) 桥接后学生侧再进行GRPO效果显著提升（MATH从75.4%到78.5%），优于无桥接的冷启动GRPO 2.8个点。
AI.conclusion: 稀缺标签数据应优先用于最强模型（教师）进行稀疏RL探索，再通过密集监督桥接压缩到学生模型，最后才在学生侧进行稀疏RL。核心原则是：不要在准备最不充分的策略上使用稀缺数据。

title: Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM parameters can cheaply and rapidly adapt to task-specific requirements (e.g., prompt optimization), but cannot by itself typically match the performance gains available through updating LLM parameters. There is no good reason for restricting learning to being in-context or in-weights. Moreover, humans also likely learn at different time scales (e.g., System 1 vs 2). To this end, we introduce a fast-slow learning framework for LLMs, with model parameters as "slow" weights and optimized context as "fast" weights. These fast "weights" can learn from textual feedback to absorb the task-specific information, while allowing slow weights to stay closer to the base model and persist general reasoning behaviors. Fast-Slow Training (FST) is up to 3x more sample-efficient than only slow learning (RL) across reasoning tasks, while consistently reaching a higher performance asymptote. Moreover, FST-trained models remain closer to the base LLM (up to 70% less KL divergence), resulting in less catastrophic forgetting than RL-training. This reduced drift also preserves plasticity: after training on one task, FST trained models adapt more effectively to a subsequent task than parameter-only trained models. In continual learning scenarios, where task domains change on the fly, FST continues to acquire each new task while parameter-only RL stalls.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种快慢学习框架（FST），将模型参数视为慢权重、优化后的上下文视为快权重，在保持模型通用推理能力的同时高效吸收任务特定信息，相比纯参数更新（RL）在样本效率、性能、抗遗忘和持续学习方面均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM通过更新参数（如RL）适应下游任务会导致灾难性遗忘和可塑性丧失；而仅靠固定参数的上下文学习（如提示优化）虽灵活但性能不如参数更新。论文旨在融合两者的优势，让LLM能同时进行快（上下文）和慢（参数）时间尺度的学习。
AI.method: 提出Fast-Slow Training (FST)：将模型参数作为慢权重（Slow Weights），通过RL等缓慢更新；同时将优化后的上下文（如文本反馈）作为快权重（Fast Weights），快速吸收任务特定信息。快权重从文本反馈中学习，慢权重保持接近基础模型以保留通用推理能力。
AI.result: FST在推理任务上相比仅使用慢学习（RL）样本效率提升高达3倍，且达到更高的性能渐近线；FST训练后的模型与基础LLM的KL散度降低高达70%，灾难性遗忘显著减少；在持续学习场景中，FST能持续学习新任务，而纯参数RL学习停滞。
AI.conclusion: 快慢学习框架有效结合了上下文学习与参数更新的优势，在保持模型可塑性和通用性的同时高效适应任务，为LLM的高效适应和持续学习提供了新思路。

title: Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
comment: Technical report v1 (30 pages, 19 figures, project page: https://spherelab.ai/pion/)
summary: We introduce Pion, a spectrum-preserving optimizer for large language model (LLM) training based on orthogonal equivalence transformation. Unlike additive optimizers such as Adam and Muon, Pion updates each weight matrix through left and right orthogonal transformations, preserving its singular values throughout training. This yields an optimization mechanism that modulates the geometry of weight matrices while keeping their spectral norm fixed. We derive the Pion update rule, systematically examine its design choices, and analyze its convergence behavior along with several key properties. Empirical results show that Pion offers a stable and competitive alternative to standard optimizers for both LLM pretraining and finetuning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于正交等价变换的谱保持优化器Pion，通过左右正交变换更新权重矩阵，在训练过程中保持奇异值不变，为LLM预训练和微调提供了稳定且具竞争力的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有优化器（如Adam、Muon）以加法方式更新权重，可能破坏权重矩阵的谱结构，导致训练不稳定。Pion旨在通过保持奇异值不变的机制来改善优化过程的几何特性。
AI.method: Pion通过对权重矩阵执行左右正交变换来实现更新，保持其奇异值（频谱范数）在训练过程中不变。推导了更新规则，系统分析了设计选择，并研究了收敛性质。
AI.result: 实验表明，Pion在LLM预训练和微调任务中表现稳定，是标准优化器（如Adam）的有竞争力替代方案。
AI.conclusion: Pion作为一种谱保持优化器，提供了一种新的优化范式，在保持权重矩阵谱结构的同时实现有效更新，具有良好的收敛性和实用性。

title: Testing General Relativity Through Gravitational Wave Classification: A Convolutional Neural Network Framework
summary: We present a machine learning framework for testing general relativity (GR) with gravitational wave signals from binary black hole mergers. Using the source parameters of 173 BBH events from the GWTC catalog as a realistic astrophysical population, we generate simulated GR waveforms and construct beyond GR (BGR) waveforms by applying controlled phase deformations. We introduce a response function formalism that provides a systematic framework for quantifying how any observable responds to modifications of GR. We train convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on two input representations: whitened waveforms and a response function type observable derived from the waveform mismatch, which isolates the effect of phase deviations from the bulk signal. Using response functions as the CNN input improves the classification sensitivity by a factor of approximately 33 compared to whitened waveforms, demonstrating that the choice of observable representation is as important as the classifier architecture. We study the fundamental limits of this classification through Bayes optimal error analysis, averaging methods that reveal coherent patterns hidden in noise, and a comparison between CNN accuracy and a single feature classifier as a proxy for human performance. At all deformation scales, the CNN outperforms the best single feature approach. We extend the framework to physically motivated theories using the parameterized post Einsteinian (ppE) formalism and apply it to massive gravity, where the classifier detects deviations for graviton masses of order $m_g \sim 10^{-23}\;\mathrm{eV}/c^2$ with aLIGO design sensitivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习（CNN）的框架，用于通过引力波信号检验广义相对论。利用GWTC目录中的173个双黑洞合并事件，生成GR和超越GR波形，通过响应函数形式量化偏差。使用响应函数作为CNN输入相比白化波形分类灵敏度提升约33倍。该方法在引力子质量约10^{-23} eV/c²尺度上可检测到偏差。
AI.motivation: 传统检验广义相对论的方法在处理大量引力波数据时效率有限，需要自动化的机器学习方法来灵敏地探测与GR的微小偏离。
AI.method: 基于CNN对引力波波形进行分类，对比两种输入表示：白化波形和基于波形失配构建的响应函数可观测量。结合贝叶斯最优误差分析、平均方法和单特征分类器对比进行系统性评估。
AI.result: 响应函数作为CNN输入比白化波形灵敏度提升约33倍；在所有变形尺度上CNN优于最佳单特征方法；在引力子质量约10^{-23} eV/c²尺度可检测到GR偏差。
AI.conclusion: 观测量的表示选择与分类器架构同等重要；该框架可扩展到多种物理动机的BGR理论，为大规模引力波数据中的GR检验提供了高效自动化方案。

title: Adversarial Effects on Expressibility and Trainability in Distributed Variational Quantum Algorithms
summary: Distributed quantum algorithms offer a promising pathway to scale variational quantum algorithms beyond the constraints of noisy intermediate-scale quantum hardware. However, existing approaches implicitly assume a trusted entanglement-sharing layer across quantum processors. We show that this assumption introduces a fundamental vulnerability: adversarial perturbations of shared entanglement induce structured gate-level noise that directly impacts quantum learning. We develop a framework that maps entanglement-level perturbations to gate-level noise via an explicit Kraus representation. To quantify their impact, we introduce Kraus expressibility, a metric that generalizes unitary expressibility to noisy quantum channels. We then establish a trade-off between Kraus expressibility and trainability of noisy quantum circuits through gradient variance analysis. Our analysis reveals that an adversary can manipulate Kraus expressibility to maintain sufficiently large cost gradients (avoiding barren plateaus) while systematically biasing optimization toward incorrect solutions. We validate these findings through numerical simulations, demonstrating adversarial degradation of expressibility and trainability.

AI.tldr: 本文发现分布式量子算法中共享纠缠层的可信假设存在安全漏洞，对手可通过扰动纠缠引入结构化的门级噪声，利用新提出的Kraus可表达性度量操纵量子学习的可训练性，导致优化偏向错误解。
AI.motivation: 揭示分布式量子算法中共享纠缠层的可信假设存在根本性安全漏洞，并量化这种对抗性扰动对量子学习的影响。
AI.method: 提出了将纠缠级扰动映射到门级噪声的Kraus表示框架；引入Kraus可表达性度量以推广酉可表达性到噪声量子信道；通过梯度方差分析建立Kraus可表达性与可训练性之间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 对抗者可通过操纵Kraus可表达性在避免贫瘠高原的同时系统地使优化偏向错误解；数值模拟验证了可表达性和可训练性的对抗性退化。
AI.conclusion: 分布式量子算法的安全性依赖于可信纠缠层这一假设必须被重新审视，需要设计对抗鲁棒的分布式量子学习协议。

title: Conditional Memory Enhanced Item Representation for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm that predicts target items by autoregressively generating their semantic identifiers (SID). Most GR methods follow a quantization-representation-generation pipeline, first assigning each item a SID, then constructing input representations from SID-token embeddings, and finally predicting the target SID through autoregressive generation. Existing item-level representation constructions mainly take two forms: directly merging SID-token embeddings into a compact vector, or enriching item-level representations with external inputs through additional networks. However, these item-level constructors still expose two practical challenges: direct merging may amplify the information loss caused by quantization and ID collision while obscuring SID code relations, whereas external-input-based methods can strengthen item semantics but cannot reliably preserve the SID-structured evidence required for token-level generation. These limitations make representation construction an underexplored bottleneck, leading to two severe problems, \ie{} the Identity-Structure Preservation Conflict and Input-Output Granularity Mismatch. To this end, we propose ComeIR, a Conditional Memory enhanced Item Representation framework that reconstructs SID-token embeddings into item-aware inputs and restores the token granularity during SID decoding. Specifically, MM-guided token scoring adaptively estimates the contribution of each code within the SID, dual-level Engram memory captures intra-item code composition and inter-item transition patterns, and a memory-restoring prediction head reuses the memories during SID decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of ComeIR, and further reveal scalable gains from enlarging conditional memory.

AI.tldr: 提出ComeIR框架，通过条件记忆增强技术改进生成式推荐中物品表示构建，解决身份-结构保持冲突和输入-输出粒度不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法在物品级表示构建上存在两个问题：直接合并SID token嵌入会放大量化损失和ID冲突，模糊SID码间关系；基于外部输入的方法虽能增强语义，但无法可靠保留SID结构化证据，导致身份-结构保持冲突和输入-输出粒度不匹配。
AI.method: 提出ComeIR框架，包含：(1) MM-guided token scoring自适应估计SID内每个码的贡献；(2) 双层次Engram记忆捕获码内组合和项目间转换模式；(3) 记忆恢复预测头在SID解码时重用记忆信息。
AI.result: 实验验证了ComeIR的有效性和灵活性，并发现扩大条件记忆可带来可扩展的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 条件记忆增强方法能有效解决生成式推荐中表示构建的瓶颈问题，且具有可扩展性。

title: Predictive Maps of Multi-Agent Reasoning: A Successor-Representation Spectrum for LLM Communication Topologies
summary: Practitioners deploying multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems must currently choose between communication topologies such as chain, star, mesh, and richer variants without any pre-inference diagnostic for which topology will amplify drift, converge to consensus, or remain robust under perturbation. Existing evaluation answers these questions only post hoc and only for the task measured. We introduce a structural diagnostic for multi-agent LLM communication graphs based on the successor representation $M = (I - γP)^{-1}$ of the row-stochastic communication operator, and we connect three of its spectral quantities, the spectral radius $ρ(M)$, the spectral gap $Δ(M)$, and the condition number $κ(M)$, to three distinct failure modes. We derive closed-form spectra for the chain, star, and mesh under row-stochastic normalization, and validate the predictions on a 12-step structured state-tracking task with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct over 100 independent trials. The condition number is a perfect rank-order predictor of empirical perturbation robustness ($r_s = 1.0$); the spectral gap partially predicts consensus dynamics ($r_s = 0.5$); and the spectral radius is perfectly \emph{inverted} with respect to cumulative error ($r_s = -1.0$). We trace this inversion to a regime in which linear spectra are blind to non-contracting bias drift, and we propose an affine-noise extension of the predictive map that recovers the empirical ordering. We read this as a first step toward representational, drift-aware structural diagnostics for multi-agent LLM systems, sitting alongside classical spectral and consensus theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于后继表示（successor representation）的多智能体LLM通信图结构诊断方法，通过计算通信算子的谱半径、谱隙和条件数三个谱量，分别预测累积误差、共识动力学和扰动鲁棒性。在链式、星型、网格三种拓扑及Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上的实验验证了条件数对鲁棒性的完美排序预测（rs=1.0），并揭示了线性谱对非收缩偏差漂移的盲区问题，提出了仿射噪声扩展模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的多智能体LLM系统在部署前无法预知不同通信拓扑（链式、星型、网格等）会如何影响漂移放大、共识收敛或鲁棒性，只能在事后通过具体任务评估，缺乏通用的预推理诊断工具。
AI.method: 基于通信算子的行随机矩阵，引入后继表示 M=(I-γP)^{-1}，提取三个谱量：谱半径ρ(M)预测累积误差，谱隙Δ(M)预测共识动力学，条件数κ(M)预测扰动鲁棒性。推导了链式、星型、网格三种拓扑在行随机归一化下的闭式谱，并在12步结构化状态追踪任务中用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行验证。
AI.result: 条件数是扰动鲁棒性的完美排序预测器（rs=1.0）；谱隙部分预测共识动力学（rs=0.5）；谱半径与累积误差呈完美逆相关（rs=-1.0）。后者是因为线性谱无法捕捉非收缩的偏差漂移，作者提出仿射噪声扩展模型后恢复了正确排序。
AI.conclusion: 该工作迈出了为多智能体LLM系统构建可表征的、对漂移敏感的拓扑诊断方法的第一步，可与经典谱理论和共识理论互补。

title: Interpretable rainfall modelling reveals rapid reorganisation of Amazonian rainfall under vegetation loss
comment: 31 pages, 5 figures in the main text, 3 figures in the supplementary text
summary: Understanding how vegetation loss alters rainfall remains a major challenge in climate and hydrological science, as deforestation modifies precipitation through heterogeneous, seasonal and nonlinear land-atmosphere feedbacks. Existing models struggle to capture these dynamics: convection is parameterised at coarse scales, tipping behaviour is poorly constrained, and rainfall-deforestation analyses are limited to multi-decadal timescales. Therefore, many approaches resolve correlations rather than causal effects, limiting our ability to anticipate hydrological disruption. Using a neural-network model for hourly rainfall prediction, combined with pathway diagnostics and sensitivity analyses, we examine how vegetation perturbations reorganise rainfall across space, intensity regimes, and timescales under deforestation. We assess whether the model captures physically consistent dependencies linking vegetation, atmospheric state, and precipitation, and whether sustained canopy loss induces threshold behaviour. The model accurately predicts rainfall occurrence and intensity (Spearman = 0.84, F1 = 0.93, ROC-AUC = 0.98) and learns temporally ordered dependencies aligned with ecohydrological theory. Sensitivity analyses reveal rapid, asymmetric responses to vegetation loss: heavy rainfall (20-50 mm/h) declines by up to 7% under sustained deforestation, while light rainfall (0.1-1 mm/h) increases by 4%. Rainfall entropy rises by 1.3%, and dry-season intensity increases by 0.3-0.5% per 0.5% forest-cover loss, with strongest impacts in the north-western Amazon and Andean foothills. Threshold analysis reveals a sharp decline in precipitating area fraction after 2-3 months of sustained vegetation change in sensitive regions. These results demonstrate that data-driven approaches uncover process-relevant land-atmosphere coupling and highlight growing hydrological vulnerability in the Amazon.

AI.tldr: 本文使用神经网络模型进行小时级降雨预测，结合路径诊断和敏感性分析，研究亚马逊地区森林砍伐如何通过植被-大气反馈改变降雨模式。模型准确预测降雨（Spearman=0.84, F1=0.93），发现持续毁林导致暴雨（20-50mm/h）下降7%，小雨增加4%，并在2-3个月后出现降雨面积急剧下降的阈值行为。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无法捕捉毁林-降雨之间复杂的非线性、季节性和异质性反馈机制，多停留在相关性分析而非因果推断，限制了对水文干扰的预测能力。
AI.method: 采用神经网络模型进行小时级降雨预测，结合路径诊断（pathway diagnostics）和敏感性分析，评估植被扰动对降雨空间分布、强度和时间尺度的影响，并进行阈值行为分析。
AI.result: 模型预测性能优秀（Spearman=0.84, F1=0.93, ROC-AUC=0.98）。持续毁林导致暴雨下降7%，小雨增加4%，降雨熵增加1.3%。敏感区域在持续植被变化2-3个月后出现降雨面积急剧下降的阈值现象。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动方法能够揭示具有物理过程意义的陆-气耦合机制，突显亚马逊地区日益加剧的水文脆弱性。

title: Offline Policy Evaluation for Manipulation Policies via Discounted Liveness Formulation
summary: Policy evaluation is a fundamental component of the development and deployment pipeline for robotic policies. In modern manipulation systems, this problem is particularly challenging: rewards are often sparse, task progression of evaluation rollouts are often non-monotonic as the policies exhibit recovery behaviors, and evaluation rollouts are necessarily of finite length. This finite length introduces truncation bias, breaking the infinite-horizon assumptions underlying standard methods relying on Bellman equations/principle of optimality. In this work, we propose a framework for offline policy evaluation from sparse rewards based on a liveness-based Bellman operator. Our formulation interprets policy evaluation as a task-completion problem and yields a conservative fixed-point value function that is robust to finite-horizon truncation. We analyze the theoretical properties of the proposed operator, including contraction guarantees, and show how it encodes task progression while mitigating truncation bias. We evaluate our method on two simulated manipulation tasks using both a Vision-Language-Action model and a diffusion policy, and a cloth folding task using human demonstrations. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach more accurately reflects task progress and substantially reduces truncation bias, outperforming classical baselines such as TD(0) and Monte Carlo policy evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于"存活"（liveness）Bellman算子的离线策略评估框架，用于从稀疏奖励中评估机器人操作策略，有效缓解了有限长度轨迹的截断偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人策略评估中，奖励稀疏、任务进展非单调、评估轨迹有限长度导致截断偏差，破坏了基于Bellman方程/最优性原则的标准方法的无限水平假设。
AI.method: 将策略评估建模为任务完成问题，提出基于liveness的Bellman算子，得到保守的不动点价值函数，对有限水平截断具有鲁棒性。给出了算子的收缩保证等理论性质。
AI.result: 在模拟操作任务（使用VLA模型和扩散策略）以及真实人类示教的布料折叠任务上，该方法比TD(0)和蒙特卡洛策略评估等基线方法更准确地反映任务进展，显著减少了截断偏差。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效解决有限长度评估轨迹带来的截断偏差问题，为稀疏奖励下的机器人策略离线评估提供了更可靠的工具。

title: Acceleration of horizontal numerical advection for atmospheric modeling through surrogate modeling with temporal coarse-graining
summary: Machine-learned surrogate modeling of advection may accelerate geoscientific models, but existing approaches have either achieved limited speedup or have sacrificed spatial resolution compared to the model they are trained to emulate. We developed a machine-learned solver that speeds up advection simulations without sacrificing spatial resolution through the use of temporal coarse-graining, where the model is trained to take larger integration steps than dictated by the Courant-Friedrich-Lewy (CFL) condition. Our solver framework includes a convolutional neural network that takes concentrations and CFL numbers as inputs and outputs mass flux. Our solvers emulate 10-day ground-level horizontal advection simulations with r$^2$ values against the baseline ranging from 0.60--0.98 with temporal coarsening factors of 4 to 32 times the baseline integration time step. Speed increases and accuracy decreases with increased coarsening, with $r^2 = 0.24$ in accuracy lost for every factor of 10 gained in speed, reaching a maximum 92$\times$ speedup while maintaining $r^2 = 0.60$. We deliberately trained our solvers only on January ground-level wind data to examine their ability to generalize across seasons and vertical heights. The 4$\times$-coarsened learned solver successfully reproduces simulations over 72 vertical levels. The 8$\times$--16$\times$ solvers (but not 32$\times$) emulate most vertical levels. The learned solvers also generalize well across seasons, except for instabilities in June and October. With additional fine-tuning, these learned solvers could be appropriate for operational use where trading accuracy for speed could be advantageous, such as in screening tools, in ensemble simulations, or with data assimilation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CNN的机器学习求解器，通过时间粗粒化（突破CFL条件限制）实现对平流模拟的加速，在保持空间分辨率的同时，可达92倍加速（r²=0.60），并测试了其在不同季节和垂直层级的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统平流模拟受CFL条件限制时间步长，现有机器学习代理模型要么加速有限，要么牺牲空间分辨率。本文旨在开发一种不牺牲空间分辨率且能大幅加速的求解器。
AI.method: 使用卷积神经网络(CNN)作为求解器，输入为浓度和CFL数，输出为质量通量。通过时间粗粒化（即采用比CFL条件允许的更大积分步长）实现加速，训练数据仅使用1月份地面风数据。
AI.result: 在10天地面水平平流模拟中，时间粗粒化因子4-32倍时r²=0.60-0.98；每10倍速度增益损失约0.24的r²精度；最大达92倍加速且r²=0.60；4倍粗粒化求解器成功泛化到72个垂直层级；8-16倍粗粒化可模拟大部分层级；32倍时不稳定；跨季节泛化较好但6月和10月出现不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该学习求解器在牺牲精度换取速度的场景（如筛选工具、集合模拟、数据同化）中有应用潜力，微调后可用于实际运行。

title: Digital Identity for Agentic Systems: Toward a Portable Authorization Standard for Autonomous Agents
summary: Enterprise AI is shifting from copilots to autonomous agents capable of executing workflows, negotiating outcomes, and making decisions with limited human oversight. As these systems extend across organizational boundaries, identity alone is insufficient: an agent's authority must also be explicit, constrained, auditable, revocable, and consistently interpretable by independent receivers. This paper analyzes representative enterprise use cases in insurance claims processing and supply chain integrity to surface structural gaps in existing identity and access models. It proposes a portable authorization model for autonomous agents based on issuer-authored authorization payloads, typed constraint algebra, decision-consistent evaluation semantics, delegation attenuation, governed semantic resolution, fail-closed processing, and pre-flight discovery. The model separates credential containers, authorization payload semantics, and enforcement engines, allowing profiles such as JWT/JWS, Verifiable Credentials, OAuth Rich Authorization Requests, or policy-engine bindings to preserve a common authorization meaning across trust boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向企业自主AI代理的便携式授权模型，通过分离凭证容器、授权载荷语义和执行引擎，解决了跨组织边界时身份认证不足的问题，支持多种协议（如JWT、可验证凭证）并保持一致的授权含义。
AI.motivation: 企业AI正从辅助工具转向自主代理，需要跨组织边界执行工作流、协商并做出决策。现有身份和访问模型仅依赖身份认证不足以满足代理的授权需求，存在结构性的安全与信任缺口。
AI.method: 提出便携式授权模型，核心组件包括：发行者授权的载荷、类型化约束代数、决策一致的评估语义、委托衰减、治理语义解析、故障关闭处理、预发现机制。模型解耦凭证容器、授权载荷语义和执行引擎，使JWT/JWS、可验证凭证、OAuth RAR等不同协议能共享统一的授权语义。
AI.result: 通过保险理赔处理和供应链完整性两个代表性企业用例，分析了现有IAM模型的结构性缺陷，并展示了所提模型如何弥补这些差距。
AI.conclusion: 自主代理的授权必须是显式、可约束、可审计、可撤销、且能被独立接收者一致解释的。所提模型为跨信任边界的代理间交互提供了可移植的授权基础设施。

title: Decaf: Improving Neural Decompilation with Automatic Feedback and Search
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. Preprint; under review. Code and models available at https://github.com/AlexShypula/decaf
summary: Decompilers are useful tools used in reverse engineering to understand compiled source code. Reconstructing source code from compiled binaries is a challenging task, because high-level syntax, identifiers, and custom data types are generally lost as the compiler translates human-readable code to low-level machine code. Deterministic decompilers are useful tools for binary analysis, but can struggle to infer idiomatic syntax and identifier names. Generative AI models are a natural fit for reconstructing high-level syntax, identifiers, and types, but they can still suffer by hallucinating improper programming constructs and semantics. Instead of attempting to improve neural decompilers with more data and more training, we argue that compiler feedback can be used to dramatically improve the semantic correctness of neural decompiler outputs via search. Our system, Decaf (DECompilation with Automated Feedback), raises the neural decompilation rate from 26.0% on ExeBench to 83.9% on the Real -O2 split without sacrificing similarity to the original source code. We also find our automatic feedback methodology is highly effective for improving weaker neural decompilation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Decaf系统，利用编译器反馈通过搜索方法提升神经反编译器的语义正确性，在ExeBench数据集上将反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有神经反编译器存在幻觉问题，生成不正确的编程结构和语义；传统确定性反编译器难以推断惯用语法和标识符名称。作者认为与其用更多数据和训练改进模型，不如利用编译器反馈来保证语义正确性。
AI.method: 提出Decaf框架，在神经反编译器输出基础上，通过编译器反馈驱动的搜索机制来筛选和优化反编译结果，确保输出代码的语义正确性。
AI.result: 在ExeBench数据集的Real -O2分割上，反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%，且不牺牲与原始源代码的相似度。该方法对弱神经反编译模型同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 编译器反馈是提升神经反编译语义正确性的有效途径，搜索策略比单纯增加数据和训练更高效。

title: Efficient and provably convergent end-to-end training of deep neural networks with linear constraints
summary: Training a deep neural network with the outputs of selected layers satisfying linear constraints is required in many contemporary data-driven applications. While this can be achieved by incorporating projection layers into the neural network, its end-to-end training remains challenging due to the lack of rigorous theory and efficient algorithms for backpropagation. A key difficulty in developing the theory and efficient algorithms for backpropagation arose from the nonsmoothness of the solution mapping of the projection layer. To address this bottleneck, we introduce an efficiently computable HS-Jacobian to the projection layer. Importantly, we prove that the HS-Jacobian is a conservative mapping for the projection operator onto the polyhedral set, enabling its seamless integration into the nonsmooth automatic differentiation framework for backpropagation. Therefore, many efficient algorithms, such as Adam, can be applied for end-to-end training of deep neural networks with linear constraints. Particularly, we establish convergence guarantees of the HS-Jacobian based Adam algorithm for training linearly constrained deep neural networks. Extensive experiment results on several important applications, including finance, computer vision, and network architecture design, demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to other existing popular methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可高效计算的HS-Jacobian方法，用于解决含线性约束投影层的深度神经网络端到端训练中的反向传播问题，证明了HS-Jacobian是投影算子的保守映射，可无缝集成到非光滑自动微分框架中，并基于Adam算法建立了收敛性保证，在金融、计算机视觉和网络架构设计等任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 在许多数据驱动应用中，需要训练深度神经网络使其某些层的输出满足线性约束，但现有方法因投影层解映射的非光滑性而缺乏严格理论和高效反向传播算法，难以进行端到端训练。
AI.method: 引入HS-Jacobian（可高效计算的次微分Jacobian）用于投影层，证明其为多面体集上投影算子的保守映射，从而可无缝集成到非光滑自动微分框架中，并结合Adam算法进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在金融、计算机视觉和网络架构设计等多个任务上，所提方法相比现有流行方法取得了更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: HS-Jacobian有效解决了投影层非光滑反向传播的理论和算法瓶颈，扩展了深度学习中对线性约束的处理能力。

title: Uniform Scaling Limits in AdamW-Trained Transformers
summary: We study the large-depth limit of transformers trained with AdamW, by modelling the hidden-state dynamics as an interacting particle system (IPS) coupled through the attention mechanism. Under appropriate scaling of the attention heads, we prove that the joint dynamics of the hidden states and backpropagated variables converge in $L^2$, uniformly over the initial condition, to the solution of a forward--backward system of ODEs at rate $\mathcal O(L^{-1}+L^{-1/3}H^{-1/2})$. Here, $L$ and $H$ denote the depth and number of heads of the transformer, respectively. The limiting system of ODEs can be identified with a McKean--Vlasov ODE (MVODE) when the attention heads do not incorporate causal masking. By using the flow maps associated with this MVODE and applying concentration of measure techniques, we obtain bounds on the difference between the discrete and continuous models that are uniform over compact sets of initial conditions. As this is achieved without resorting to a covering argument, the constants in our bounds are independent of the number of tokens. Furthermore, under a suitable adaptation to AdamW, the bounds become independent of the token embedding dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用AdamW训练的Transformer在大深度极限下的行为，通过将隐状态动力学建模为通过注意力机制耦合的相互作用粒子系统（IPS）。在注意头适当缩放下，证明了隐状态和反向传播变量的联合动力学以O(L^{-1}+L^{-1/3}H^{-1/2})的速率一致收敛于前向-反向ODE系统。该极限系统可识别为McKean-Vlasov ODE。通过流映射和测度集中技术，得到了离散与连续模型之间的差值界，该界与token数量无关，并且在适配AdamW后与嵌入维度无关。
AI.motivation: 理解和数学刻画深度Transformer的训练动力学，特别是AdamW优化器下深层Transformer的行为，为分析大模型训练提供理论依据。
AI.method: 将Transformer的隐状态动力学建模为相互作用粒子系统，在注意头适当缩放下，通过前向-反向ODE系统分析其大深度极限，并利用McKean-Vlasov ODE的流映射和测度集中技术进行理论分析。
AI.result: 证明了在适当缩放下，Transformer的离散动力学以O(L^{-1}+L^{-1/3}H^{-1/2})速率收敛到连续ODE系统，且所得误差界与token数量独立；在适配AdamW后，误差界与嵌入维度也独立。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为深度Transformer的理论分析提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了深度和注意力头数对训练动力学的影响，证明了大深度极限下的连续近似是有效的。

title: ShardTensor: Domain Parallelism for Scientific Machine Learning
summary: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) faces unique challenges for extreme-resolution data, with mitigations that often fail to scale or degrade the accuracy of trained models. While some specialized methods have achieved remarkable results in training models or performing inference on massive spatial datasets with bespoke techniques, there is no generalized framework for parallelization over input data below batch size one per device. In this work we introduce ShardTensor: a novel paradigm of domain parallelism that enables flexible scaling of input data to arbitrary sizes. By decoupling the spatial dimensionality of input data from hardware constraints, ShardTensor enables scientific machine learning workloads to reach new levels of high fidelity training and inference. We demonstrate both strong and weak scaling of workloads during training and inference, showing improved latency with strong scaling and demonstrating the capacity to process higher data sizes with weak scaling. Additionally, we demonstrate multiple dimensions of parallelization, removing barriers to SciML on extreme-scale inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShardTensor，一种新的域并行范式，用于科学机器学习中极端分辨率数据的可扩展并行化，在训练和推理中实现了良好的强扩展和弱扩展性能。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习（SciML）在处理极端分辨率数据时面临扩展性挑战，现有方法要么无法扩展，要么会降低模型精度。缺乏一种通用的、可在batch size为1的情况下对输入数据进行并行化的框架。
AI.method: 提出ShardTensor范式，通过将输入数据的空间维度与硬件约束解耦，实现域并行化（domain parallelism），支持对任意大小输入数据的灵活扩展。
AI.result: 在训练和推理中展示了强扩展（改善延迟）和弱扩展（处理更大数据量）能力，并实现了多个维度的并行化。
AI.conclusion: ShardTensor为SciML处理极端规模输入数据提供了通用的并行化框架，突破了现有扩展瓶颈。

title: FedSurrogate: Backdoor Defense in Federated Learning via Layer Criticality and Surrogate Replacement
summary: Federated Learning remains highly susceptible to backdoor attacks--malicious clients inject targeted behaviours into the global model. Existing defenses suffer from substantial false-positive rates under realistic non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) data, incorrectly flagging benign clients and degrading model accuracy even when adversaries are correctly identified. We present FedSurrogate, a novel backdoor defense that addresses this limitation by combining bidirectional gradient alignment filtering with layer-adaptive anomaly detection. FedSurrogate performs selective clustering on security-critical layers identified via directional divergence analysis, concentrating the detection signal on a low-dimensional subspace. A bidirectional soft-filtering stage screens trusted clients for residual contamination while rescuing false positives from suspects, substantially reducing misclassifications under heterogeneous conditions. Rather than removing confirmed malicious updates, FedSurrogate replaces them with downscaled surrogate updates from structurally similar benign clients, preserving gradient diversity while neutralising adversarial influence. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that FedSurrogate maintains false-positive rates below 10% across all datasets and attack types, compared to 31-32% for the nearest comparably effective baseline, while achieving superior main-task accuracy and maintaining attack success rates below 2.1% across all tested datasets and attack types under challenging non-IID settings.

AI.tldr: FedSurrogate 是一种针对联邦学习后门攻击的新型防御方法，通过双向梯度对齐过滤和层自适应异常检测，在非独立同分布数据下将假阳性率降至10%以下，攻击成功率控制在2.1%以内。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习后门防御在非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下假阳性率过高，会错误地将良性客户端标记为恶意，导致模型精度严重下降。
AI.method: 1) 通过方向发散分析识别安全关键层，在低维子空间进行选择性聚类检测；2) 双向软过滤阶段筛选可信客户端，同时从嫌疑人中"解救"被误判的良性客户端；3) 对被确认的恶意更新，不直接移除而是用结构相似良性客户端的降尺度替代更新替换，保留梯度多样性。
AI.result: 所有数据集和攻击类型下假阳性率低于10%（最接近的基线为31-32%），攻击成功率低于2.1%，主任务精度显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FedSurrogate 有效解决了非独立同分布场景下联邦学习后门防御的高假阳性率问题，同时保持低攻击成功率和良好主任务性能。

title: Debiasing Message Passing to Mitigate Popularity Bias in GNN-based Collaborative Filtering
summary: Collaborative filtering (CF) models based on graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance in recommender systems by propagating user-item signals over interaction graphs. However, they are highly susceptible to popularity bias, since skewed interaction distributions and repeated message passing across high-order neighborhoods amplify the influence of popular items while suppressing long-tail ones. Existing debiasing approaches, including re-weighting objectives, regularization, causal methods, and post-processing, are less effective in GNN-based settings because they do not directly counteract bias propagated through the aggregation process, and recent in-aggregation weighting methods often rely on static heuristics or unstable embedding estimates. We propose Debiasing Popularity Amplification in Aggregation (DPAA), a popularity debiasing framework for GNN-based CF that integrates adaptive, embedding-aware interaction weighting and layer-wise weighting directly into message passing. DPAA assigns interaction-level weights from a representation-aware popularity signal, stabilized by a smooth transition from pre-trained to evolving model embeddings during training. It further introduces a layer-wise weighting that amplifies higher-order neighborhoods, surfacing long-range interactions with diverse and underexposed items. Experiments on real-world and semi-synthetic datasets show that DPAA outperforms state-of-the-art popularity-bias correction methods for GNN-based CF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPAA，一种针对GNN协同过滤的流行度偏差去偏框架，通过在消息传递中自适应加权交互和层间权重，有效缓解流行度偏差放大问题。
AI.motivation: GNN-based CF模型因交互分布不均和图卷积的邻域聚合过程，会放大流行物品的影响、压制长尾物品。现有去偏方法（重加权、正则化、因果方法等）无法直接对抗聚合过程中传播的偏差，而聚合内加权方法依赖静态启发式或不稳定的嵌入估计。
AI.method: DPAA包含两项核心设计：(1) 自适应嵌入感知的交互级权重——利用表示敏感的流行度信号，在训练中从预训练嵌入平滑过渡到模型自身嵌入；(2) 层间权重——放大高阶邻域信号，暴露与多样化、曝光不足物品的长程交互。
AI.result: 在真实和半合成数据集上的实验表明，DPAA在GNN-based CF中优于现有最先进的流行度偏差矫正方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接在消息传递过程中引入自适应的交互级和层间加权，DPAA能够有效对抗GNN聚合导致的流行度偏差放大，提升长尾物品的推荐效果。

title: Exact Stiefel Optimization for Probabilistic PLS: Closed-Form Updates, Error Bounds, and Calibrated Uncertainty
summary: Probabilistic partial least squares (PPLS) is a central likelihood-based model for two-view learning when one needs both interpretable latent factors and calibrated uncertainty. Building on the identifiable parameterization of Bouhaddani et al.\ (2018), existing fitting pipelines still face two practical bottlenecks: noise--signal coupling under joint EM/ECM updates and nontrivial handling of orthogonality constraints. Following the fixed-noise scalar-likelihood line of Hu et al.\ (2025), we develop an end-to-end framework that combines noise pre-estimation, constrained likelihood optimization, and prediction calibration in one pipeline. Relative to Hu et al.\ (2025), we replace full-spectrum noise averaging with noise-subspace estimation and replace interior-point penalty handling with exact Stiefel-manifold optimization. The noise-subspace estimator attains a signal-strength-independent leading finite-sample rate and matches a minimax lower bound, while the full-spectrum estimator is shown to be inconsistent under the same model. We further extend the framework to sub-Gaussian settings via optional Gaussianization and provide closed-form standard errors through a block-structured Fisher analysis. Across synthetic high-noise settings and two multi-omics benchmarks (TCGA-BRCA and PBMC CITE-seq), the method achieves near-nominal coverage without post-hoc recalibration, reaches Ridge-level point accuracy on TCGA-BRCA at rank $r=3$, matches or exceeds PO2PLS on cross-view prediction while providing native calibrated uncertainty, and improves stability of parameter recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文针对概率偏最小二乘（PPLS）模型中的噪声-信号耦合和正交约束处理两大瓶颈，提出了一种端到端框架，结合噪声预估计、约束似然优化和预测校准，通过噪声子空间估计替代全谱估计、使用Stiefel流形优化替代内点法，在合成数据和多组学基准上实现了近名义覆盖率和竞争力预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PPLS拟合流程存在两个实际瓶颈：联合EM/ECM更新下的噪声-信号耦合，以及正交约束处理的非平凡性。作者旨在开发一种更高效、更稳定的端到端框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架，包含：(1) 噪声预估计，(2) 约束似然优化（使用Stiefel流形优化替代内点惩罚法），(3) 预测校准。用噪声子空间估计替代全谱估计，并扩展到次高斯设置（可选高斯化），通过分块Fisher分析提供闭合形式标准误。
AI.result: 噪声子空间估计器达到信号强度无关的有限样本最优率（匹配极小化下界），而全谱估计被证明不一致。在合成高噪声设置和两个多组学基准（TCGA-BRCA、PBMC CITE-seq）上，方法达到近名义覆盖率（无需事后校准），在TCGA-BRCA上达到Ridge级点预测精度（秩r=3），在跨视图预测上匹配或超过PO2PLS，并提供原生校准不确定性，参数恢复稳定性更好。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架有效解决了PPLS中的关键瓶颈，在保持可解释性和校准不确定性的同时，实现了具有竞争力的预测性能和更稳定的参数估计。

title: From raw data to neutrino candidates: a neural-network pipeline for Baikal-GVD
summary: We present a neural-network-based data processing pipeline for Baikal-GVD, designed to improve event reconstruction quality and accelerate neutrino candidates selection. The pipeline comprises three stages: fast suppression of extensive air shower events, suppression of noise optical modules activations, and extraction of high confidence neutrino candidates. All three networks employ a transformer architecture that exploits inter-hit correlations through the attention mechanism. Applied sequentially, the pipeline achieves orders-of-magnitude speedup over the standard reconstruction chain. Moreover, noise suppression neural network surpasses the accuracy of algorithmic noise suppression algorithms and provides estimate for time residuals of the signal hits, which is crucial for identification of track-like hits. We address the domain shift between Monte Carlo simulations and experimental data by incorporating a domain adaptation technique, demonstrating improved agreement between the two domains. The resulting framework enables near-real-time event classification, with direct applications to multi-messenger alert systems and diffuse neutrino flux measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer架构的神经网络流水线，用于Baikal-GVD中微子探测器的事件重建和候选选择，实现数量级加速并提升噪声抑制精度。
AI.motivation: 为了提升Baikal-GVD中微子探测器的数据重建质量和事件选择速度，解决传统算法计算慢、精度有限的问题，并实现近实时事件分类以支持多信使天文学。
AI.method: 设计三阶段Transformer神经网络流水线：1) 快速抑制大气簇射事件；2) 抑制噪声光学模块激活（含信号命中时间残差估计）；3) 提取高置信度中微子候选。结合域自适应技术处理模拟与实验数据之间的分布差异。
AI.result: 该流水线相比标准重建链实现数量级加速；噪声抑制网络在精度上超越传统算法；域自适应技术改善了模拟与实验数据之间的分布一致性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法可实现近实时的中微子事件分类，适用于多信使预警系统和弥散中微子通量测量。

title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Spatial Science: A Lie-Algebraic Kernel for Rotationally Anisotropic Gaussian Processes
summary:
Many three-dimensional spatial fields are anisotropic, with directions of rapid and slow variation that need not align with the coordinate axes. Standard Gaussian process kernels with Automatic Relevance Determination (ARD) capture only axis-aligned anisotropy, while generic full symmetric positive definite (SPD) metrics can represent rotated anisotropy but do not parameterise principal length-scales and directions directly. We introduce an interpretable rotationally anisotropic GP kernel that parameterises a three-dimensional SPD covariance metric using three principal length-scales and an explicit SO(3) rotation. The rotation is represented by an axis-angle vector and mapped to SO(3) via the Lie-algebra exponential map, giving unconstrained Euclidean coordinates for inference while always inducing a valid SPD metric.
  The construction spans the same family of three-dimensional SPD covariance metrics as a generic full-SPD parameterisation, but exposes the geometry differently: length-scales and orientation are explicit, interpretable, and directly available for prior specification and posterior summaries. We perform Bayesian inference on these quantities using Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), and characterise the resulting symmetries and weakly identified regimes.
  On synthetic data with rotated anisotropy, the posterior recovers the generating metric and improves prediction relative to an axis-aligned ARD baseline, while matching the predictive performance of a generic full SPD baseline. When the ground truth is axis-aligned, posterior mass concentrates near the identity rotation and predictive performance matches ARD. On a material-density dataset from a laboratory-fabricated nano-brick, the inferred metric reveals rotated anisotropy that is not captured by axis-aligned kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的旋转各向异性高斯过程核，通过显式参数化SO(3)旋转和三个主尺度来建模三维空间中的非轴对齐各向异性，并使用MCMC进行贝叶斯推断。
AI.motivation: 标准高斯过程核（如ARD）只能捕捉轴对齐的各向异性，而通用的SPD度量虽能表示旋转各向异性但不直接参数化主尺度与方向，缺乏可解释性。作者希望提出一种既能表示任意旋转各向异性、又保持参数可解释性的核方法。
AI.method: 使用三个主长度尺度和一个通过轴-角向量表示的SO(3)旋转来参数化三维SPD协方差度量，旋转通过李代数指数映射映射到SO(3)，从而获得无约束的欧几里得坐标。采用MCMC进行贝叶斯推断。
AI.result: 在合成数据上，后验能恢复生成度量，预测优于轴对齐ARD基线，与通用SPD基线性能匹配。当真实情况为轴对齐时，后验集中在单位旋转附近。在纳米砖材料密度数据集上，推断出的度量揭示了轴对齐核无法捕捉的旋转各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 该旋转各向异性GP核在保持与通用SPD度量相同表达能力的同时，提供了显式可解释的长度尺度和旋转参数，便于先验设定和后验总结。

title: Adaptive Policy Learning Under Unknown Network Interference
summary: Adaptive experimentation under unknown network interference requires solving two coupled problems: (i) learning the underlying dynamics of interference among units and (ii) using these dynamics to inform treatment allocation in order to maximize a cumulative outcome of interest (e.g. revenue). Existing adaptive experimentation methods either assume the interference network is fully known or bypass the network by operating on coarse cluster-level randomizations. We develop a Thompson sampling algorithm that jointly learns the interference network and adaptively optimizes individual-level treatment allocations via a Gibbs sampler. The algorithm returns both an optimized treatment policy and an estimate of the interference network; the latter supports downstream causal analyses such as estimation of direct, indirect, and total treatment effects. For additive spillover models, we show that total reward is linear in the treatment vector with coefficients given by an $n$-dimensional latent score. We prove a Bayesian regret bound of order $\sqrt{nT \cdot B \log(en/B)}$ for exact posterior sampling; empirically, our Gibbs-based approximate sampler achieves regret consistent with this rate and remains sublinear when the additive spillovers assumption is violated. For general Neighborhood Interference, where this reduction is unavailable, we analyze an explore-then-commit variant with $O(n^2 \log T)$ graph-discovery cost. An information-theoretic $Ω(n \log T)$ lower bound complements both results. Empirically, our method achieves more than an order-of-magnitude reduction in regret in head-to-head comparisons. On two real-world networks, the algorithm achieves sublinear regret and yields downstream effect estimates with small RMSE relative to the truth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种汤普森采样算法，能够在未知干扰网络下进行自适应实验，同时学习网络结构并优化个体层面的处理分配。算法通过吉布斯采样器联合估计网络和策略，在加性溢出模型下证明了贝叶斯遗憾界为√(nT·B log(en/B))，在一般邻域干扰下设计了探索-然后-提交变体，遗憾下界为Ω(n log T)。实验表明该方法比现有方法降低了一个数量级以上的遗憾，并在真实网络上实现了次线性遗憾和准确的效果估计。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应实验方法要么假设干扰网络完全已知，要么通过粗粒度的聚类随机化绕过网络结构问题。然而实际场景中，个体间的干扰网络通常是未知的，这导致了两个耦合问题：学习干扰网络动态和利用这些动态优化处理分配。本文旨在同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于吉布斯采样的汤普森采样算法，联合学习未知干扰网络并自适应优化个体级处理分配。在加性溢出模型下利用线性奖励结构推导遗憾界；对于一般邻域干扰，设计了探索-然后-提交变体，包含O(n² log T)的图发现代价。
AI.result: 在加性溢出模型下证明了贝叶斯遗憾界√(nT·B log(en/B))；一般邻域干扰下信息论下界为Ω(n log T)。实验表明该方法比现有方法减少一个数量级以上的遗憾，在真实网络上实现次线性遗憾，且下游处理效应估计的RMSE很小。
AI.conclusion: 本文算法能有效处理未知网络干扰下的自适应实验问题，同时提供优化策略和干扰网络估计，支持下游因果分析（直接、间接和总处理效应）。

title: Operator Spectroscopy of Trained Lattice Samplers
summary:
Trained lattice samplers are usually judged by the ensembles they generate. Here we instead analyze the trained field-space function itself: a flow-matching velocity, a diffusion score, or a normalizing-flow action residual. We project these functions onto operator bases fixed before the fit, chosen from symmetry, exact Gaussian path limits, finite-volume modes, and gauge covariance.
  For two-dimensional lattice \(φ^4\), a trained straight-flow teacher is not described by a local force basis alone. After the local transport basis, the residual separates into a zero-mode Binder component and a lowest-shell finite-\(k\) correlator component. The deflated zero-mode polynomial \(P_5(M;t)\) reduces the dominant Binder-tail component, while \(φ^\perp_{|n|^2=1}\) reduces the finite-\(k\) correlator component; wrong-parity, off-zero-mode, and random controls do not produce the same reductions.
  The same projection distinguishes other sampler classes. Diffusion follows the force-resolvent ordering predicted by the free theory, reverse-KL normalizing-flow collapse appears as a forbidden odd zero-mode residual, and gauge-equivariant teachers are resolved by Wilson-loop-force tangent directions. The operator basis is model- and symmetry-dependent, but the test is common: project the trained field-space function and retain sectors that lower held-out residuals and pass the available controls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种投影方法，将训练好的格点采样器（流匹配、扩散、归一化流）的场空间函数投影到基于对称性、高斯极限、有限体积模和规范协方差构建的算子基上，从而分析其内部结构。研究发现，二维φ⁴理论中的直流教师无法仅用局域力基描述，残差可分解为零模Binder分量和有限k关联分量，且扩散、逆KL归一化流 collapse、规范等变教师呈现出不同的投影特征。
AI.motivation: 传统上只通过生成系综来评判训练好的格点采样器，本文试图直接从训练好的场空间函数（流匹配速度、扩散分数、归一化流动作残差）本身入手，通过投影到固定算子基上来解析其内部结构和学习模式，从而更深入地理解采样器的行为。
AI.method: 将训练好的场空间函数投影到事先固定的算子基上，该基由对称性、精确高斯路径极限、有限体积模和规范协方差构建。通过分析投影后的残差分解，识别不同采样器类别的特征成分（如零模Binder分量、有限k关联分量等），并使用held-out残差和控制实验进行验证。
AI.result: 1) 二维φ⁴理论中的直流教师非局域，残差可分解为零模Binder分量和最低壳有限k关联分量；2) 零模多项式P₅(M;t)可降低Binder尾部，φ^⊥_{|n|²=1}可降低有限k关联分量；3) 扩散遵循自由理论预测的力-预解序；4) 逆KL归一化流collapse表现为被禁止的奇零模残差；5) 规范等变教师可通过Wilson环-力切向方向分解。
AI.conclusion: 算子基依赖于模型和对称性，但核心检验方法是通用的：将训练好的场空间函数投影到适当基上，保留能降低held-out残差并通过控制检验的分量，从而区分不同采样器类别的内部结构。

title: Every Bit, Everywhere, All at Once: A Binomial Multibit LLM Watermark
summary: With LLM watermarking already being deployed commercially, practical applications increasingly require multibit watermarks that encode more complex payloads, such as user IDs or timestamps, into the generated text. In this work, we propose a fundamentally new approach for multibit watermarking: introducing binomial encoding to directly encode every bit of the payload at every token position. We complement our approach with a stateful encoder that during generation dynamically redirects encoding pressure toward underencoded bits. Our evaluation against 8 baselines on up to 64-bit payloads shows that our scheme achieves superior message accuracy and robustness, with the gap to baseline methods widening in more relevant settings (i.e., large payloads and low-distortion regimes). At the same time, we challenge prior works' evaluation metrics, highlighting their lack of practical insights, and introduce per-bit confidence scoring as a practically relevant metric for evaluating multibit LLM watermarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于二项式编码的多比特LLM水印方法，通过在每个token位置直接编码负载的每一位，并配合状态编码器动态调整编码压力，在64位负载上优于8种基线方法，同时提出了每比特置信度评分作为新的评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM水印技术主要关注单比特检测（判断文本是否由AI生成），但在实际商业部署中需要多比特水印来编码更复杂的信息（如用户ID、时间戳），当前方法在大负载和低失真场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出二项式编码（Binomial Encoding），在每个token位置直接编码负载的每一位；设计状态编码器（Stateful Encoder）动态追踪各比特的编码进度，将生成压力优先分配给尚未充分编码的比特位。
AI.result: 在8个基线方法和最高64位负载的实验中，该方法在消息准确率和鲁棒性上均优于对比方法，且差距在大负载和低失真场景下更为明显。
AI.conclusion: 二项式编码是一种更有效的多比特LLM水印方案，同时指出了现有评估指标的不足，提出了每比特置信度评分这一更具实际意义的评价指标。

title: Multi-Agent System Identification with Nonlinear Sheaf Diffusion
summary: Local interaction laws governing multi-agent systems can be difficult to recover from trajectory data, even when the dynamics are observed faithfully. In systems governed by a nonlinear sheaf Laplacian -- a generalization of the graph Laplacian accommodating heterogeneous state spaces and asymmetric communication channels -- the coordination law is encoded by edge potential functions whose gradients produce the inter-agent forces. Because trajectory observations record node-state evolution, they expose only the aggregate effect of the edge forces at each node: distinct interaction laws that agree at the node level are indistinguishable from trajectory data alone. We show that the fundamental obstruction to recovery is topological, measured by sheaf cohomology, and that unique recovery from an unconstrained function class is possible if and only if this cohomology vanishes. When the obstruction is nontrivial, we show that recovery within a finite-dimensional parameterized class is possible precisely when a data-dependent information matrix is positive definite. Experiments validate the theory and illustrate that accurate trajectory reproduction need not certify recovery of the underlying interaction law.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体系统中局部交互规律的恢复问题，指出即使轨迹数据被完美观测，恢复交互规律也面临拓扑障碍（由sheaf上同调刻画），并证明了在上同调非平凡时，只有在参数化类中且信息矩阵正定时才能唯一恢复。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统的轨迹数据容易获取，但从中恢复底层的局部交互规律却存在本质困难，作者希望揭示这一困难的理论根源。
AI.method: 利用非线性sheaf Laplacian（图Laplacian的推广，可处理异构状态空间和非对称通信）来建模交互规律，通过sheaf上同调理论分析恢复问题的拓扑障碍，并引入数据相关的信息矩阵正定性条件处理参数化情况。
AI.result: 1）从无约束函数类中唯一恢复交互规律当且仅当sheaf上同调为零；2）当上同调非平凡时，有限维参数化类的唯一恢复需信息矩阵正定；3）实验表明，准确重现轨迹并不能保证恢复出正确的交互规律。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体交互规律的恢复存在根本性的拓扑不可辨识性，即使轨迹拟合完美也可能得到错误的交互律。

title: Beyond Manual Curation: Augmenting Targeted Protein Degradation Databases via Agentic Literature Extraction Workflows
summary: Predictive models in biomedicine depend on structured assay data locked in the text, tables, and supplements of primary publications.
