The dataset comprises 2,440 repositories spanning 138 programming languages and totalling 373 million lines of code, accompanied by structured per-repository metadata. Unlike existing code corpora derived from public open-source platforms, CIDR consists exclusively of proprietary production codebases contributed under formal data sharing agreements, covering application domains including enterprise web and mobile development, fintech, and custom software consultancy. All repositories were processed through a multi-stage pipeline encompassing structured partner onboarding, two-stage quality selection combining automated metadata filtering with manual code review, and a deterministic anonymization pipeline covering the full version control history. The dataset is intended to support research in code intelligence, software quality analysis, pre-training and fine-tuning of code language models, developer behaviour studies, and construction of agent evaluation benchmarks. Access is provided under a restricted commercial license; details are available at https://fermatix.ai/#Contact.

AI.tldr: CIDR是一个包含2440个工业级专有软件仓库、共3.73亿行代码的大规模数据集，涵盖138种编程语言，通过多阶段处理流程构建，可用于代码智能、语言模型训练和智能体评估等研究。
AI.motivation: 现有代码语料库主要来自公开开源平台，缺乏工业级专有生产代码数据，限制了代码语言模型在真实工业场景下的研究和应用。
AI.method: 通过与12家工业伙伴直接合作收集专有生产代码库，采用多阶段处理流程：结构化伙伴接入、两阶段质量筛选（自动化元数据过滤+人工代码审查）、确定性匿名化管道覆盖完整版本历史。
AI.result: 构建了包含2440个仓库、3.73亿行代码、138种编程语言的CIDR数据集，附带结构化元数据，以受限商业许可形式提供。
AI.conclusion: CIDR为代码智能、代码语言模型预训练/微调、开发者行为研究和智能体评估基准构建提供了宝贵的工业级数据资源。

title: Premover: Fast Vision-Language-Action Control by Acting Before Instructions Are Complete
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically evaluated as if the user had finished typing or speaking before the robot begins acting. In real deployment, however, users take several seconds to enter a request, leaving the policy idle for a substantial fraction of the interaction. We introduce Premover, a lightweight module that converts this idle window into useful precomputation. Premover keeps the VLA backbone frozen and attaches two small projection heads, one for image patches, one for language tokens, that map an intermediate layer of the backbone into a shared space. The resulting focus map is supervised by simulator-rendered target-object segmentation masks and applied as a per-patch reweighting of the next step's image tokens. A single scalar readiness threshold, trained jointly from streaming prefixes, decides when the policy should begin acting. On the LIBERO benchmark suite, Premover reduces mean wall-clock time from 34.0 to 29.4 seconds, a 13.6% reduction, while matching the full-prompt baseline's success rate (95.1% vs. 95.0%); naive premoving, by contrast, collapses to 66.4%.

AI.tldr: Premover是一种轻量级模块，通过在用户输入完成前利用空闲窗口进行预计算（基于中间层特征图重加权图像token），在不降低成功率（95.1% vs 95.0%）的情况下将VLA策略的平均墙钟时间从34.0秒降至29.4秒（降低13.6%）。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA策略假设用户输入完成后机器人再开始行动，但实际部署中用户输入需要数秒，导致策略在交互中大部分时间处于空闲状态，效率低下。
AI.method: 保持VLA骨干网络冻结，附加两个小型投影头（分别处理图像块和语言token），将骨干网络中间层映射到共享空间。通过模拟器渲染的目标分割掩码监督生成关注图，作为下一步图像token的逐块重加权。训练一个联合学习的标量就绪阈值，决定策略何时开始行动。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上，平均墙钟时间从34.0秒降至29.4秒（降低13.6%），成功率95.1% vs 95.0%（持平）。朴素预计算方法成功率暴跌至66.4%。
AI.conclusion: Premover能有效利用输入空闲窗口进行预计算，显著提升VLA策略的实时交互效率而不牺牲任务成功率。

title: A Deep Learning-based Receiver for Asynchronous Grant-Free Random Access in Control-to-Control Networks
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Communications
summary: In this paper, we study grant-free, asynchronous control-to-control (C2C) communications in an indoor scenario with a shared wireless channel. Each communication node transmits command units, each consisting of a variable-length low-density parity-check (LDPC)--coded payload preceded by a start sequence and followed by a tail sequence. Due to the asynchronous nature of the access, transmissions from different nodes are not aligned over time. As a result, each receiving controller observes the superposition of multiple command units transmitted by different nodes over a receiver-defined superframe interval. Each node transmits one or more replicas of the same command unit. We propose a receiver architecture in which the detection of command unit boundaries (start/tail sequences) is carried out by a single convolutional neural network (CNN) operating directly on the received signal. We show that, while start-sequence detection must rely only on the received waveform, tail-sequence detection can additionally exploit the soft information produced by the LDPC decoder, together with channel estimates. Finally, once commands units are successfully decoded, successive interference cancellation (SIC) can be applied. Simulation results demonstrate that the receiver we propose achieves reliable packet-boundary identification and a low end-to-end packet loss rate, even under uncoordinated and high-traffic operating conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究室内场景下无授权、异步控制到控制(C2C)通信，提出一种接收机架构，利用CNN检测命令单元边界，并结合LDPC译码软信息和信道估计进行尾部序列检测，通过连续干扰消除实现可靠通信。
AI.motivation: 解决异步、无授权接入场景下控制到控制通信的可靠性问题，尤其是多节点非对齐传输导致的包边界检测困难和高丢包率问题。
AI.method: 提出一种接收机架构：(1) 使用单一CNN直接在接收信号上检测命令单元的起始/尾部序列；(2) 尾部序列检测额外利用LDPC译码器产生的软信息和信道估计；(3) 成功译码后应用连续干扰消除(SIC)。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提接收机在无协调、高流量条件下也能实现可靠的包边界识别和低端到端丢包率。
AI.conclusion: 结合CNN检测与LDPC软信息辅助的方法能有效应对异步C2C通信中的包检测与译码挑战。

title: Keeping Score: Efficiency Improvements in Neural Likelihood Surrogate Training via Score-Augmented Loss Functions
comment: 9 pages of main text, 9 pages of appendices, 13 figures
summary: For stochastic process models, parameter inference is often severely bottlenecked by computationally expensive likelihood functions. Simulation-based inference (SBI) bypasses this restriction by constructing amortized surrogate likelihoods, but most SBI methods assume a black-box data generating process. While these surrogates are exact in the limit of infinite training data, practical scenarios force a strict tradeoff between model quality and simulation cost. In this work, we loosen the black-box assumption of SBI to improve this tradeoff for structured stochastic process models. Specifically, for neural network likelihood surrogates trained via probabilistic classification, we propose to augment the standard binary cross-entropy loss with exact score information $\nabla_θ\log p(x \mid θ)$ and adaptive weighting based on loss gradients. We evaluate our approach on case studies involving network dynamics and spatial processes, demonstrating that our method improves surrogate quality at a drastically lower computational cost than generating more training data. Notably, in some cases, our approach achieves downstream inference performance equivalent to a 10x increase in training data with less than a 1.1x increase in training time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的仿真推演推断方法，通过将精确得分信息与自适应加权引入二元交叉熵损失，在不增加训练数据量的情况下显著提升了随机过程模型似然替代的质量，实现了与10倍训练数据相当的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 随机过程模型的参数推断常受限于计算昂贵的似然函数，而现有SBI方法将数据生成过程视为黑箱，导致在有限训练数据下模型质量与仿真成本之间存在严格的权衡。
AI.method: 在基于概率分类训练的神经网络似然替代中，将精确得分信息∇θ log p(x|θ)和基于损失梯度的自适应加权融入到标准二元交叉熵损失中。
AI.result: 在网络动力学和空间过程的案例研究中，该方法以远低于生成更多训练数据的计算成本提升了替代模型质量，在某些情况下仅用1.1倍训练时间就实现了相当于10倍训练数据增长的下游推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过松绑SBI的黑箱假设，利用模型结构信息可以显著改善仿真成本与替代质量之间的权衡，为结构化随机过程模型的高效推断提供了一种新的途径。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for LLM-based Code Generation
summary: Prediction sets provide a theoretically grounded framework for quantifying uncertainty in machine learning models. Adapting them to structured generation tasks, in particular, large language model (LLM) based code generation, remains a challenging problem. An existing attempt proposes PAC prediction sets but is limited by its strong monotonicity assumption on risk and single-label classification framework, which severely limits the space of candidate programs and cannot accommodate the multiple valid outputs inherent to code generation. To address these limitations, we propose an approach RisCoSet that leverages multiple hypothesis testing to construct risk-controlling predictions for LLM-based code generation. Given a trained code generation model, we produce a prediction set represented by a partial program, which is guaranteed to contain a correct solution with high confidence. Extensive experiments on three LLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art, our method can significantly reduce the code removal by up to 24.5%, at the same level of risk.

AI.tldr: 提出RisCoSet方法，利用多重假设检验为LLM代码生成构建风险可控的预测集（部分程序），在保证高置信度包含正确解的同时显著减少代码移除量（最多24.5%）。
AI.motivation: 现有PAC预测集方法对代码生成任务存在两大限制：强单调性假设和单标签分类框架，无法容纳多个有效输出，限制了候选程序空间。
AI.method: 基于多重假设检验（multiple hypothesis testing）构建风险可控的预测集，输出表示为部分程序（partial program），而非完整的单一程序。
AI.result: 在三个LLM上的实验表明，与现有最优方法相比，在相同风险水平下，代码移除量最多减少24.5%。
AI.conclusion: RisCoSet有效克服了PAC方法的局限性，为LLM代码生成提供了更灵活、更高效的预测集构建方案。

title: STRUM: A Spectral Transcription and Rhythm Understanding Model for End-to-End Generation of Playable Rhythm-Game Charts
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Code and models: https://github.com/<your-github-username>/autocharter
summary: We present STRUM (Spectral Transcription and Rhythm Understanding Model), an audio-to-chart pipeline that converts raw recordings into playable Clone Hero / YARG charts for drums, guitar, bass, vocals, and keys without any oracle metadata. STRUM is a multi-stage hybrid: a two-stage CRNN onset detector and a six-model ensemble classifier for drums; neural onset detectors with monophonic pitch tracking for guitar and bass; word-aligned ASR for vocals; and spectral keyboard detection for keys. We evaluate on a 30-song in-envelope benchmark constructed by screening candidate songs on a single audio-quality criterion -- the median 1-second drum-stem RMS after htdemucs_6s source separation. On this benchmark STRUM achieves drums onset F1 = 0.838, bass F1 = 0.694, guitar F1 = 0.651, and vocals F1 = 0.539 at a +/- 100 ms tolerance with per-song global offset search. We report a complete ablation of seven drum-pipeline components with paired per-song Wilcoxon tests, an analysis of ground-truth-to-audio timing distributions in community Clone Hero charts, and a per-class confusion matrix for the drum classifier. Code, model weights, and the full benchmark manifest are released.

AI.tldr: STRUM是一个从原始录音生成Clone Hero/YARG游戏谱面的多阶段混合管道，涵盖鼓、吉他、贝斯、人声和键盘，在30首歌基准测试上取得鼓F1=0.838、贝斯F1=0.694、吉他F1=0.651、人声F1=0.539的成绩。
AI.motivation: 作者希望自动从原始音频中生成可玩的节奏游戏谱面（如Clone Hero/YARG），减少人工编谱的工作量，并探索多乐器音乐转录在游戏场景下的可行性。
AI.method: 多阶段混合管道：鼓使用两阶段CRNN检波器+六模型集成分类器；吉他和贝斯使用神经检波器+单音高追踪；人声采用词对齐ASR；键盘使用频谱检测。在基于音频质量筛选的30首歌基准上评估。
AI.result: 在30首歌基准上：鼓检波F1=0.838，贝斯F1=0.694，吉他F1=0.651，人声F1=0.539（±100ms容差+全局偏移搜索）。包含鼓管道7组件的完整消融实验、Wilcoxon检验、时序分布分析和分类混淆矩阵。
AI.conclusion: STRUM展示了无需先验元数据即可从原始音频生成多乐器游戏谱面的可行性，但人声和吉他性能仍有提升空间。开源了代码、模型权重和基准数据。

title: Self-Supervised Laplace Approximation for Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Approximate Bayesian inference typically revolves around computing the posterior parameter distribution. In practice, however, the main object of interest is often a model's predictions rather than its parameters. In this work, we propose to bypass the parameter posterior and focus directly on approximating the posterior predictive distribution. We achieve this by drawing inspiration from self-training within self-supervised and semi-supervised learning. Essentially, we quantify a Bayesian model's predictive uncertainty by refitting on self-predicted data. The idea is strikingly simple: If a model assigns high likelihood to self-predicted data, these predictions are of low uncertainty, and vice versa. This yields a deterministic, sampling-free approximation of the posterior predictive. The modular structure of our Self-Supervised Laplace Approximation (SSLA) further allows us to plug in different prior specifications, enabling classical Bayesian sensitivity (w.r.t. prior choice) analysis. In order to bypass expensive refitting, we further introduce an approximate version of SSLA, called ASSLA. We study (A)SSLA both theoretically and empirically in regression models ranging from Bayesian linear models to Bayesian neural networks. Across a wide array of regression tasks with simulated and real-world datasets, our methods outperform classical Laplace approximations in predictive calibration while remaining computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自监督拉普拉斯近似方法（SSLA），绕过后验参数推断，直接通过自预测数据重拟合来近似后验预测分布，实现了确定性、无采样的贝叶斯预测不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯推断关注后验参数分布，但实际应用更关注模型的预测结果及其不确定性。作者希望绕过参数后验，直接高效地近似后验预测分布。
AI.method: 借鉴自监督/半监督学习中的自训练思想，通过模型对自预测数据的重拟合来量化预测不确定性；提出了确定性、无采样的SSLA及其近似版本ASSLA，支持不同先验设定进行敏感性分析。
AI.result: 在从贝叶斯线性模型到贝叶斯神经网络的多种回归任务中（模拟和真实数据集），(A)SSLA在预测校准方面优于经典拉普拉斯近似，同时保持了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 绕过参数后验直接近似后验预测分布是一种有效且高效的方法，SSLA提供了更好的预测校准性，且模块化设计便于先验敏感性分析。

title: PrivacySIM: Evaluating LLM Simulation of User Privacy Behavior
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to simulate human behavior, but their ability to simulate $individual$ privacy decisions is not well understood. In this paper, we address the problem of evaluating whether a core set of user persona attributes can drive LLMs to simulate individual-level privacy behavior. We introduce PrivacySIM, an evaluation suite that benchmarks LLM simulation of user privacy behavior against the ground-truth responses of 1,000 users. These users are drawn from five published user studies on privacy spanning LLM healthcare consultations, conversational agents, and chatbots. Drawing on these user studies, we hypothesize three persona facets as plausible predictors of privacy decision-making: demographics, previous experiences, and stated privacy attitudes. We condition nine frontier LLMs on subsets of these three facets and measure how often each model's response to a data-sharing scenario matches the user's actual response. Our findings show that (1) privacy persona conditioning consistently improves simulation quality over no-persona conditioning, but even the strongest model (40.4\% accuracy) remains far from faithfully simulating individual privacy decisions. (2) A user's stated privacy attitudes alone may not be the best predictor because they often diverge from the user's actual privacy behavior. (3) Users with high AI/chatbot experience but low stated privacy attitudes are the most challenging to simulate. PrivacySIM is a first step toward understanding and improving the capabilities of LLMs to simulate user privacy decisions. We release PrivacySIM to enable further evaluation of LLM privacy simulation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出PrivacySIM评估套件，用于测试LLM模拟个人隐私决策的能力。基于1000名用户的真实隐私行为数据，通过三种用户画像维度（人口统计、过往经历、隐私态度）条件化LLM，发现即使最佳模型准确率仅40.4%，且用户隐私态度与实际行为常不一致。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多被用于模拟人类行为，但其模拟个体隐私决策的能力尚不明确。现有研究缺乏系统评估LLM能否基于用户画像属性准确模拟隐私行为。
AI.method: 构建PrivacySIM评估套件，包含1000名用户（来自五项已发表隐私研究）的地面真实响应数据。定义三个画像维度（人口统计、过往经历、隐私态度），在9种前沿LLM上测试不同维度组合条件化后对隐私决策的模拟准确性。
AI.result: (1)隐私画像条件化一致提升模拟质量，但最佳模型准确率仅40.4%；(2)用户声明的隐私态度与实际行为经常背离，不是最佳预测因子；(3)高AI/聊天机器人经验但低隐私态度的用户最难模拟。
AI.conclusion: PrivacySIM是理解并改进LLM模拟用户隐私决策能力的第一步，表明当前LLM在个体级别隐私行为模拟上仍有显著差距。

title: Heterogeneous SoC Integrating an Open-Source Recurrent SNN Accelerator for Neuromorphic Edge Computing on FPGA
comment: Deep Learning meets Neuromorphic Hardware Workshop at ECML-PKDD 2024 Conference in Vilnius, Lithuania
summary: The growing popularity of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) and their applications has led to a significant fast-paced increase of neuromorphic architectures capable of mimicking the spike-based data processing typical of biological neurons. The efficient power consumption and parallel computing capabilities of the SNNs lead researchers towards the development of digital accelerators, which exploit such features to bring fast and low-power computation on edge devices. The spread of digital neuromorphic hardware however is slowed down by the prohibitive costs that the silicon tape out of circuits brings, that's why targeting Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) could represent a viable alternative, offering a flexible and cost-effective platform for implementing digital neuromorphic systems and helping the spread of open-source hardware designs. In this work we present an heterogeneous System-on-Chip (SoC) where the operations of ReckOn, a Recurrent SNN accelerator, are managed through the integration with traditional processors. These include the RISC-V-based, open-source microcontroller X-HEEP and the ARM processor featured in Zynq Ultrascale systems. We validate our design by reproducing the classification results through the implementation on FPGA of the taped-out version of ReckOn in order to check the equivalence of the accuracy and the characteristics in terms of physical implementation. In a second set of experiments, we evaluate the online learning capability of the solution in classifying a subset of the Braille digit dataset recently used to compare neuromorphic frameworks and platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReckOn，一种基于递归脉冲神经网络(RSNN)的异构SoC加速器，通过FPGA实现，集成RISC-V或ARM处理器，在Braille数字数据集上验证了在线学习能力。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络(SNN)具有低功耗和并行计算优势，但专用芯片流片成本高昂，阻碍了数字神经形态硬件的普及。因此需要寻找FPGA等低成本、灵活的替代平台，并实现开放硬件设计。
AI.method: 设计了一个异构SoC系统，将ReckOn（递归SNN加速器）与RISC-V微控制器(X-HEEP)或ARM处理器集成在一起，在FPGA上实现并验证了与流片版本等效的准确率，并在Braille数字数据集上评估在线学习能力。
AI.result: 成功在FPGA上复现了流片版ReckOn的分类精度，证明了FPGA实现与流片版在准确率和物理实现特征上的等价性；并在Braille数字数据集上验证了在线学习能力。
AI.conclusion: FPGA是实现SNN加速器的可行且成本效益高的替代方案，有助于推动开放神经形态硬件设计的发展。

title: Machine Learning for neutron source distributions
comment: Under review at Machine Learning: Science & Technology
summary: In light of the recent advancements in machine learning, we propose a novel approach to neutron source distribution estimation through the utilisation of probabilistic generative models. The estimation is based on a Monte Carlo particle list, which is only required during the training stage of the machine learning model. Once the source distribution has been learned, the model is independent of the original particle list, allowing for further sampling in an efficient, rapid, and memory-costless manner. The performance of various generative models is evaluated, including a variational autoencoder, a normalizing flow, a generative adversarial network, and a denoising diffusion model. These approaches are then compared to existing source distribution estimations, and the advantages and disadvantages of each approach are discussed. The results demonstrate that source distributions can be modeled through the use of probabilistic generative models, which paves the way for further advancements in this field.

AI.tldr: 利用概率生成模型（VAE、Normalizing Flow、GAN、扩散模型）估计中子源分布，基于蒙特卡洛粒子列表训练后即可高效采样，无需保留原始数据。
AI.motivation: 解决中子源分布估计问题，传统方法依赖蒙特卡洛模拟效率低、内存开销大，需要更高效且可独立采样的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用四种生成模型（VAE、Normalizing Flow、GAN、Denoising Diffusion Model）对中子源分布进行建模，训练数据来源于蒙特卡洛粒子列表，训练后模型可独立采样。
AI.result: 各生成模型均能有效建模中子源分布，且训练后无需保留原始粒子列表，实现高效快速采样。
AI.conclusion: 概率生成模型可成功应用于中子源分布估计，为该领域提供了新的研究方向和方法论基础。

title: Information-Theoretic Generalization Bounds for Sequential Decision Making
summary: Information-theoretic generalization bounds based on the supersample construction are a central tool for algorithm-dependent generalization analysis in the batch i.i.d.~setting. However, existing supersample conditional mutual information (CMI) bounds do not directly apply to sequential decision-making problems such as online learning, streaming active learning, and bandits, where data are revealed adaptively and the learner evolves along a causal trajectory. To address this limitation, we develop a sequential supersample framework that separates the learner filtration from a proof-side enlargement used for ghost-coordinate comparisons. Under a row-wise exchangeability assumption, the sequential generalization gap is controlled by sequential CMI, a sum of roundwise selector--loss information terms. We also establish a Bernstein-type refinement that yields faster rates under suitable variance conditions. The selector-SCMI proof strategy applies to online learning, streaming active learning with importance weighting, and stochastic multi-armed bandits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序贯超样本的通用化界框架，通过序贯条件互信息（sequential CMI）控制在线学习、流式主动学习和多臂赌博机等序贯决策问题中的泛化误差，并给出了Bernstein型精细上界。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于超样本构造的信息论泛化界主要适用于批处理i.i.d.场景，无法直接推广到数据自适应到达、学习器沿因果轨迹演化的序贯决策问题（如在线学习、流式主动学习、赌博机）。因此需要发展一个适用于序贯设定的泛化分析框架。
AI.method: 构建序贯超样本框架，将学习者的滤子与用于"鬼坐标"比较的证明侧放大分离开；在行可交换性假设下，通过序贯条件互信息（逐轮选取器-损失信息项之和）控制序贯泛化差距；进一步给出Bernstein型精细化上界以利用方差条件获得更快的收敛速率。
AI.result: 所提出的selector-SCMI证明策略适用于在线学习、带重要性权重的流式主动学习以及随机多臂赌博机问题，实现了对这些序贯决策问题的信息论泛化界。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将超样本CMI泛化界从批处理i.i.d.场景成功推广到序贯决策场景，为在线学习、主动学习和赌博机问题提供了统一的信息论分析工具。

title: TMRL: Diffusion Timestep-Modulated Pretraining Enables Exploration for Efficient Policy Finetuning
summary: Fine-tuning pre-trained robot policies with reinforcement learning (RL) often inherits the bottlenecks introduced by pre-training with behavioral cloning (BC), which produces narrow action distributions that lack the coverage necessary for downstream exploration. We present a unified framework that enables the exploration necessary to enable efficient robot policy finetuning by bridging BC pre-training and RL fine-tuning. Our pre-training method, Context-Smoothed Pre-training (CSP), injects forward-diffusion noise into policy inputs, creating a continuum between precise imitation and broad action coverage. We then fine-tune pre-trained policies via Timestep-Modulated Reinforcement Learning (TMRL), which trains the agent to dynamically adjust this conditioning during fine-tuning by modulating the diffusion timestep, granting explicit control over exploration. Integrating seamlessly with arbitrary policy inputs, e.g., states, 3D point clouds, or image-based VLA policies, we show that TMRL improves RL fine-tuning sample efficiency. Notably, TMRL enables successful real-world fine-tuning on complex manipulation tasks in under one hour. Videos and code available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/tmrl/.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架CSP+TMRL，通过在预训练时注入扩散噪声并让智能体在微调时动态调节去噪步长，弥合了机器人策略的行为克隆预训练与强化学习微调之间的鸿沟，实现高效探索与样本效率提升。
AI.motivation: 行为克隆预训练产生的动作分布狭窄，缺乏覆盖度，阻碍了下游强化学习微调所需的探索；现有方法无法有效弥合BC预训练和RL微调之间的差距。
AI.method: 预训练阶段提出Context-Smoothed Pre-training (CSP)，通过向输入注入前向扩散噪声，在精确模仿与广泛动作覆盖之间建立连续谱；微调阶段提出Timestep-Modulated Reinforcement Learning (TMRL)，让智能体动态调节扩散时间步来显式控制探索强度。
AI.result: TMRL提升了RL微调的样本效率，能够与状态、3D点云、图像VLA策略等任意输入无缝集成，并在复杂操作任务上实现一小时内的真实世界微调。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩散噪声注入和动态步长调节，可以有效弥合BC预训练与RL微调之间的鸿沟，提升机器人策略微调的探索能力和样本效率。

title: Probing Non-Equilibrium Grain Boundary Dynamics with XPCS and Domain-Adaptive Machine Learning
summary: Grain-boundary (GB) dynamics control the stability, mechanical, and functional response of nanocrystalline materials, but direct experimental access to their slow non-equilibrium motion has been limited. Here we establish X-ray photon correlation spectroscopy (XPCS), combined with domain-adaptive machine learning, as a quantitative probe of GB dynamics. Temperature- and grain-size-dependent two-time XPCS measurements in nanocrystalline silicon reveal pronounced departures from time-translation invariance, showing that GB relaxation can remain far from equilibrium over experimental timescales. However, direct extraction of quantitative physical information from these high-dimensional, noisy fluctuation maps faces a significant challenge. To overcome this barrier, we develop a semi-supervised learning framework that transfers physical parameter labels from continuum simulations to unlabeled experimental XPCS maps through domain-adaptive representation alignment. This AI-augmented approach enables the extraction of key kinetic parameters, including bulk diffusivity, GB stiffness, and effective GB concentration, directly from experimental XPCS measurements. Our results show how machine learning can transform indirect fluctuation signals into quantitative materials dynamics, providing a general route to study non-equilibrium defect motion in solids.

AI.tldr: 本文利用X射线光子相关光谱（XPCS）结合领域自适应机器学习，定量探测纳米晶硅中晶界（GB）的非平衡动力学，并通过半监督学习从实验数据中提取关键物理参数（如体扩散率、GB刚度和有效GB浓度）。
AI.motivation: 晶界动力学控制纳米晶材料的稳定性与力学性能，但直接实验测量其缓慢非平衡运动存在困难，需要新的定量探测方法。
AI.method: 采用XPCS进行温度与晶粒尺寸依赖的两时间测量，结合半监督学习框架，通过领域自适应表示对齐将连续模拟的物理参数标签迁移到无标记实验XPCS数据上。
AI.result: 成功从实验XPCS数据中提取了体扩散率、晶界刚度和有效晶界浓度等关键动力学参数，揭示了晶界弛豫在实验时间尺度上远离平衡态。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习能将间接波动信号转化为定量材料动力学信息，为研究固体中非平衡缺陷运动提供通用途径。

title: Harness Engineering as Categorical Architecture
summary: The agent harness, the system layer comprising prompts, tools, memory, and orchestration logic that surrounds the model, has emerged as the central engineering abstraction for LLMbased agents. Yet harness design remains ad hoc, with no formal theory governing composition, preservation of properties under compilation, or systematic comparison across frameworks. We show that the categorical Architecture triple (G, Know, Phi) from the ArchAgents framework provides exactly this formalization. The four pillars of agent externalization (Memory, Skills, Protocols, Harness Engineering) map onto the triple's components: Memory as coalgebraic state, Skills as operad-composed objects, Protocols as syntactic wiring G, and the full Harness as the Architecture itself. Structural guarantees-integrity gates, quality-based escalation, supported convergence checks-are Know-level certificates whose preservation is structural replay: our compiler checks identity and verifier replay, not output-layer correctness or model behavior. We validate this correspondence with a reference implementation featuring compiler functors targeting Swarms, DeerFlow, Ralph, Scion, and LangGraph: the four configuration compilers preserve three named certificate types by identity or replay, and LangGraph preserves the same certificates through its shared per-stage execution path. The LangGraph compiler creates one node per stage using the same per-stage method as the native runtime, providing LangGraph-native observability without reimplementing harness logic. An end-to-end escalation experiment with real LLM agents confirms that the quality-based escalation control path is model-parametric in this two-model, one-task experiment. The result positions categorical architecture as the formal theory behind harness engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用范畴论中的Architecture三元组(G, Know, Phi)形式化LLM Agent的"harness"系统层（提示、工具、记忆、编排逻辑），验证其与Agent外化的四大支柱的映射关系，并通过参考实现证明编译器能够保持结构不变性。
AI.motivation: LLM Agent的harness设计目前缺乏形式化理论支撑，组合、属性保持和跨框架系统比较均无理论指导，亟需建立严格的数学基础。
AI.method: 将ArchAgents框架中的范畴论Architecture三元组(G, Know, Phi)映射到Agent外化的四个支柱（记忆、技能、协议、Harness工程），通过编译器函子将形式化描述编译到多个框架（Swarms, DeerFlow, Ralph, Scion, LangGraph），并验证证书保持性质。
AI.result: 四种配置编译器通过身份保持或重放保持三种命名的证书类型；LangGraph通过共享的逐阶段执行路径保持相同证书；端到端实验证实基于质量的升级控制路径是模型参数化的。
AI.conclusion: 范畴论架构可作为harness工程的形式化理论，为Agent系统的组合、验证和跨框架比较提供严格的数学基础。

title: Pretraining Strategies and Scaling for ECG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study
comment: 59 pages, 16 figures, 59 Tables. Code available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ecg-pretraining-strategies-4DE3
summary: Specialized foundation models are beginning to emerge in various medical subdomains, but pretraining methodologies and parametric scaling with the size of the pretraining dataset are rarely assessed systematically and in a like-for-like manner. This work focuses on foundation models for electrocardiography (ECG) data, one of the most widely captured physiological time series world-wide. We present a comprehensive assessment of pretraining methodologies, covering five different contrastive and non-contrastive self-supervised learning objectives for ECG foundation models, and investigate their scaling behavior with pretraining dataset sizes up to 11M input samples, exclusively from publicly available sources. Pretraining strategy has a meaningful and consistent impact on downstream performance, with contrastive predictive coding (slightly ahead of JEPA) yielding the most transferable representations across diverse clinical tasks. Scaling pretraining data continues to yield meaningful improvements up to 11M samples for most objectives. We also compare model architectures across all pretraining methodologies and find evidence for a clear superiority of structured state space models compared to transformers and CNN models. We hypothesize that the strong inductive biases of structured state space models, rather than pretraining scale alone, are the primary driver of effective ECG representation learning, with important implications for future foundation model development in this and potentially other physiological signal domains.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了心电图（ECG）基础模型的预训练方法（5种对比/非对比自监督学习目标）和规模效应（预训练数据达1100万样本），发现对比预测编码（略优于JEPA）在下游任务中表现最佳，结构化状态空间模型（如Mamba）显著优于Transformer和CNN，且强归纳偏置比预训练规模本身更重要。
AI.motivation: 医疗子领域出现专用基础模型，但预训练方法和数据规模对模型性能的系统性、公平对比评估极为缺乏，尤其在心电图这类广泛采集的生理时间序列数据上。
AI.method: 使用公开数据集构建高达1100万样本的预训练集，系统比较5种自监督学习目标（对比和非对比），并评估Transformer、CNN和结构化状态空间模型三种架构在不同预训练规模下的表现。
AI.result: 1) 对比预测编码（CPC）略优于JEPA，均优于其他目标；2) 预训练数据规模在1100万样本内持续带来收益；3) 结构化状态空间模型在所有预训练方法下显著优于Transformer和CNN。
AI.conclusion: 结构化状态空间模型的强归纳偏置是学习有效ECG表征的主要驱动力，而非预训练规模本身，这对未来生理信号领域基础模型开发有重要启示。

title: Optimal Policy Learning under Budget and Coverage Constraints
summary: We study optimal policy learning under combined budget and minimum coverage constraints. We show that the problem admits a knapsack-type structure and that the optimal policy can be characterized by an affine threshold rule involving both budget and coverage shadow prices. We establish that the linear programming relaxation of the combinatorial solution has an O(1) integrality gap, implying asymptotic equivalence with the optimal discrete allocation. Building on this result, we analyze two implementable approaches: a Greedy-Lagrangian (GLC) and a rank-and-cut (RC) algorithm. We show that the GLC closely approximates the optimal solution and achieves near-optimal performance in finite samples. By contrast, RC is approximately optimal whenever the coverage constraint is slack or costs are homogeneous, while misallocation arises only when cost heterogeneity interacts with a binding coverage constraint. Monte Carlo evidence supports these findings.

AI.tldr: 研究预算和最小覆盖约束下的最优策略学习，揭示了背包结构，提出了贪婪-拉格朗日（GLC）和秩-割（RC）两种近似算法。
AI.motivation: 在预算和最小覆盖双重约束下寻找最优策略，这是组合优化中的经典问题，需要理论刻画和实用算法。
AI.method: 利用背包结构推导最优策略的仿射阈值规则，分析线性规划松弛的O(1)整性间隙，提出GLC和RC算法。
AI.result: GLC在有限样本下达到近优性能；RC在覆盖约束松弛或成本同质时近似最优，仅在成本异质与紧覆盖约束同时存在时出现错配。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析和蒙特卡洛实验验证了两种算法的有效性。

title: Reconnecting Fragmented Citation Networks with Semantic Augmentation
summary: Citation graphs are fundamental tools for modeling scientific structure, but are often fragmented due to missing citations of scientifically connected articles. To address this issue, we propose a computationally efficient hybrid framework integrating citation topology with large language model (LLM)-based text similarity. Using 662,369 Web of Science publications in Mathematics and Operations Research & Management Science, we augment the original graph by adding semantic edges from small, disconnected components and weighting existing citations according to textual similarity. Semantic augmentation substantially reduces fragmentation while preserving disciplinary homogeneity. Compared to embedding-only clustering, cluster detection on augmented graphs using the Leiden algorithm retains structural interpretability while offering multi-scale organization. The method scales efficiently to large datasets and offers a practical strategy for strengthening citation-based indicators without collapsing disciplinary boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合引文拓扑和LLM文本相似性的混合框架，通过语义增强来修复碎片化的引文图，在数学和运筹管理科学领域的大规模数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 引文图是建模科学结构的基础工具，但由于科学相关文章之间的引用缺失，引文图常常是碎片化的，需要一种方法来补充缺失的引文关系。
AI.method: 提出混合框架，将引文拓扑与基于LLM的文本相似性相结合。具体包括：从小的、不连通组件中添加语义边，并基于文本相似性对现有引文加权。使用Leiden算法在增强图上进行聚类检测。
AI.result: 语义增强显著减少了引文图的碎片化，同时保持了学科同质性。与仅使用嵌入的聚类相比，增强图上的Leiden聚类保留了结构可解释性并提供了多尺度组织。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可高效扩展至大规模数据集，为强化基于引文的指标提供了实用策略，且不会打破学科边界。

title: Iterative Audit Convergence in LLM-Managed Multi-Agent Systems: A Case Study in Prompt Engineering Quality Assurance
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables. Companion preprint at arXiv:2604.05000. Submitted to MDPI Software, Special Issue on Software Reliability, Security and Quality Assurance
summary: Prompt specifications for multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems carry data contracts and integration logic across many interdependent files but are rarely subjected to structured-inspection rigor. This paper reports a single-system empirical case study of iterative, agent-driven auditing applied to AEGIS (Autonomous Engineering Governance and Intelligence System), a production seven-lane orchestration pipeline whose prompt-specification surface comprises approximately 7150 lines: 6907 across seven lane PROMPT.md files and a 245-line shared Ticket Contract. Nine sequential audit rounds, executed by Claude sub-agents using a checklist-driven walkthrough adapted from Weinberg and Freedman, surfaced 51 prompt-specification consistency defects, distinct from the 51 STRIDE-categorized adversarial code findings reported in the companion preprint. Per-round counts were 15, 8, 12, 2, 8, 1, 4, 1, and 0. We report a seven-category post-hoc defect taxonomy with explicit coding rules, observed non-monotonic convergence consistent with cascading edits and audit-scope expansion, and an audit protocol distilled from the study, with the final locked checklist released as a reproducibility appendix. Single-file review missed defect classes that were surfaced only by later expanded-scope rounds in this system. The same LLM family authored and audited the specifications; replication with dissimilar models and human reviewers is required before generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文对AEGIS（一个生产级7通道编排管线，约7150行prompt规范）进行了9轮智能体驱动的审计案例研究，发现了51个规范一致性缺陷，并提出了一套后验缺陷分类法和审计协议。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的prompt规范涉及大量跨文件的数据合约和集成逻辑，但缺乏结构化审查的严谨性，可能隐藏一致性和安全性问题。
AI.method: 以AEGIS系统为案例，使用Claude子智能体执行基于Weinberg和Freedman检查表的9轮迭代审计，分析缺陷收敛情况，构建后验缺陷分类法。
AI.result: 共发现51个规范一致性缺陷（不同于STRIDE分类的51个对抗性代码问题），缺陷收敛呈非单调趋势，单文件审查会遗漏某些缺陷类别。
AI.conclusion: 智能体驱动的迭代审计能有效发现prompt规范中的一致性问题，但效果受限于审计范围扩展和级联编辑效应，需在不同模型和人类评审者中验证泛化性。

title: Set-Aggregated Genome Embeddings for Microbiome Abundance Prediction
summary: Microbiome functions are encoded within the genes of the community-wide metagenome. A natural question is whether properties of a microbial community can be predicted just from knowing the raw DNA sequences of its members. In this work, we employ set-aggregated genome embeddings (SAGE) to predict community-level abundance profiles, exploiting the few-shot learning capabilities of genomic language models (GLMs). We benchmark this approach to show improved generalization on novel genomes compared to classical bioinformatics approaches. Model ablation shows that community-level latent representations directly result in improved performance. Lastly, we demonstrate the benefits of intermediate transformations between latent representations and demonstrate the differences between GLM embedding choices.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SAGE方法，利用基因组语言模型（GLM）的少样本学习能力，通过集合聚合的基因组嵌入来预测微生物群落的丰度分布，相比传统生物信息学方法在新基因组上展现更好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 探索是否仅凭微生物成员的原始DNA序列就能预测群落功能属性，以克服传统方法对新基因组泛化能力差的局限。
AI.method: 采用集合聚合的基因组嵌入（SAGE），利用基因组语言模型（GLMs）的少样本学习能力，将原始DNA序列转化为群落级潜在表征，并进行中间变换优化。
AI.result: SAGE方法在新基因组上比传统生物信息学方法具有更好的泛化性能；群落级潜在表征直接提升了预测效果；中间变换对性能有正面影响。
AI.conclusion: 基因组语言模型结合集合级嵌入方法可以有效预测微生物群落功能属性，展示了深度学习在宏基因组学中的潜力。

title: EHR-RAGp: Retrieval-Augmented Prototype-Guided Foundation Model for Electronic Health Records
summary: Electronic Health Records (EHR) contain rich longitudinal patient information and are widely used in predictive modeling applications. However, effectively leveraging historical data remains challenging due to long trajectories, heterogeneous events, temporal irregularity, and the varying relevance of past clinical context. Existing approaches often rely on fixed windows or uniform aggregation, which can obscure clinically important signals. In this work, we introduce EHR-RAGp, a retrieval-augmented foundation model that dynamically integrates the most relevant patient history across diverse clinical event types. We propose a prototype-guided retrieval module that acts as an alignment mechanism and estimates the relevance of retrieved historical chunks with respect to a given prediction task, guiding the model towards the most informative context. Across multiple clinical prediction tasks, EHR-RAGp consistently outperforms state-of-the-art EHR foundation models and transformer-based baselines. Furthermore, integrating EHR-RAGp with existing clinical foundation models yields substantial performance gains. Overall, EHR-RAGp provides a scalable and efficient framework for leveraging long-range clinical context to improve downstream performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 EHR-RAGp，一种基于原型引导检索增强的 EHR 基础模型，通过动态检索最相关的历史患者信息来改进临床预测任务，在多个任务上超越现有基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有 EHR 模型在处理长序列、事件异质性、时间不规则性以及历史上下文的相关性差异时存在不足，固定窗口或统一聚合方法会掩盖重要的临床信号。
AI.method: 提出原型引导的检索模块（prototype-guided retrieval），该模块作为对齐机制，评估检索到的历史片段与当前预测任务的相关性，从而动态整合最相关的患者历史信息。
AI.result: 在多个临床预测任务上，EHR-RAGp 一致优于现有的 EHR 基础模型和基于 Transformer 的基线；与现有临床基础模型集成后，性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: EHR-RAGp 提供了一种可扩展且高效的方法来利用长程临床上下文，从而提升下游预测性能。

title: Online Learning-to-Defer with Varying Experts
summary: Learning-to-Defer (L2D) methods route each query either to a predictive model or to external experts. While existing work studies this problem in batch settings, real-world deployments require handling streaming data, changing expert availability, and shifting expert distribution. We introduce the first online L2D algorithm for multiclass classification with bandit feedback and a dynamically varying pool of experts. Our method achieves regret guarantees of $O((n+n_e)T^{2/3})$ in general and $O((n+n_e)\sqrt{T})$ under a low-noise condition, where $T$ is the time horizon, $n$ is the number of labels, and $n_e$ is the number of distinct experts observed across rounds. The analysis builds on novel $\mathcal{H}$-consistency bounds for the online framework, combined with first-order methods for online convex optimization. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach effectively extends standard Learning-to-Defer to settings with varying expert availability and reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出面向多分类的在线学习-延迟（Online L2D）算法，处理流式数据、动态变化的专家池和bandit反馈，在一般条件下达到$O((n+n_e)T^{2/3})$的遗憾界，低噪声条件下达到$O((n+n_e)\sqrt{T})$，并通过实验验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有L2D方法局限于批量设定，无法应对流式数据、专家动态变化等现实部署场景，亟需在线学习框架。
AI.method: 提出在线L2D算法，结合$\mathcal{H}$-一致性界（consistency bounds）和一阶在线凸优化方法，处理多分类bandit反馈与动态专家池。
AI.result: 一般条件下遗憾界$O((n+n_e)T^{2/3})$，低噪声条件下$O((n+n_e)\sqrt{T})$，合成与真实数据实验验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 成功将L2D扩展到在线动态场景，理论上有遗憾保证，实验上表现良好。

title: Multi-Variable Conformal Prediction: Optimizing Prediction Sets without Data Splitting
summary: Conformal prediction constructs prediction sets with finite-sample coverage guarantees, but its calibration stage is structurally constrained to a scalar score function and a single threshold variable - forcing shapes of prediction sets to be fixed before calibration, typically through data splitting. We introduce multi-variable conformal prediction (MCP), a framework that extends conformal prediction to vector-valued score functions with multiple simultaneous calibration variables. Building on scenario theory as a principled framework for certifying data-driven decisions, MCP unifies prediction set design and calibration into a single optimization problem, eliminating data splitting without sacrificing coverage guarantees. We propose two computationally efficient variants: RemMCP, grounded in constrained optimization with constraint removal, which admits a clean generalization of split conformal prediction; and RelMCP, based on iterative optimization with constraint relaxation, which supports non-convex score functions at the cost of possibly greater conservatism. Through numerical experiments on ellipsoidal and multi-modal prediction sets, we demonstrate that RemMCP and RelMCP consistently meet the target coverage with prediction set sizes smaller than or comparable to those of baselines with data split, while considerably reducing variance across calibration runs - a direct consequence of using all available data for shape optimization and calibration simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多变量共形预测（MCP）框架，将共形预测从标量分数函数扩展到向量值分数函数并支持多个校准变量，基于情景理论统一预测集设计与校准，无需数据拆分即可保证覆盖保证。提出两种变体：RemMCP（基于约束优化与约束移除）和RelMCP（基于迭代优化与约束松弛），实验表明两者在达到目标覆盖率的同时，预测集大小相当或更小，且校准方差显著降低。
AI.motivation: 传统共形预测在校准时受限于标量分数函数和单一阈值变量，导致预测集形状在校准前固定，通常需依赖数据拆分。本文旨在打破这一结构限制，将共形预测扩展到向量值分数函数与多变量校准情景，同时消除数据拆分带来的样本浪费和方差问题。
AI.method: 提出MCP框架，基于情景理论（scenario theory）将预测集设计与校准统一为单个优化问题。两种变体：(1) RemMCP，基于带约束移除的约束优化，是分割共形预测的泛化；(2) RelMCP，基于约束松弛的迭代优化，支持非凸分数函数但可能更保守。
AI.result: 在椭球和多模态预测集上的数值实验表明，RemMCP和RelMCP均能达到目标覆盖率，预测集大小与基线相当或更小，且校准方差显著降低——得益于同时使用全部数据进行形状优化和校准。
AI.conclusion: MCP框架有效扩展了共形预测的适用范围，消除了数据拆分的需求，同时保持有限样本覆盖保证。该方法在不牺牲统计保证的前提下提升了预测集设计的灵活性和校准稳定性。

title: Attacks and Mitigations for Distributed Governance of Agentic AI under Byzantine Adversaries
summary:
Agentic AI governance is a critical component of agentic AI infrastructure ensuring that agents follow their owner's communication and interaction policies, and providing protection against attacks from malicious agents. The state-of-the-art solution, SAGA, assumes a logically centralized point of trust, the Provider, which serves as a repository for user and agent information and actively enforces policies. While SAGA provides protection against malicious agents, it remains vulnerable to a malicious Provider that deviates from the protocol, undermining the security of the identity and access control infrastructure. Deployment on both private and public clouds, each susceptible to insider threats, further increases the risk of Provider compromise.
  In this work, we analyze the attacks that can be mounted from a compromised Provider, taking into account the different system components and realistic deployments. We identify and execute several concrete attacks with devastating effects: undermining agent attributability, extracting private data, or bypassing access control. We then present three types of solutions for securing the Provider that offer different trade-offs between security and performance. We first present SAGA-BFT, a fully byzantine-resilient architecture that provides the strongest protection, but incurs significant performance degradation, due to the high-cost of byzantine resilient protocols. We then propose SAGA-MON and SAGA-AUD, two novel solutions that leverage lightweight server-side monitoring or client-side auditing to provide protection against most classes of attacks with minimal overhead. Finally, we propose SAGA-HYB, a hybrid architecture that combines byzantine-resilience with monitoring and auditing to trade-off security for performance. We evaluate all the architectures and compare them with SAGA. We discuss which solution is best and under what conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体AI治理系统SAGA中Provider被攻陷的安全问题，分析了恶意Provider的攻击方式（如破坏归属性、窃取数据、绕过访问控制），并提出了四种解决方案：SAGA-BFT（拜占庭容错，最强安全但性能差）、SAGA-MON（服务端监控）、SAGA-AUD（客户端审计）和SAGA-HYB（混合架构），在不同安全-性能权衡下提供保护。
AI.motivation: 现有SAGA系统假设Provider是可信中心节点，但在实际私有云和公有云部署中Provider可能被内部攻击者攻陷，导致身份与访问控制基础设施的安全性被破坏。本文旨在系统性地分析来自恶意Provider的攻击，并提出不同安全-性能权衡的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 分析恶意Provider的攻击面，识别具体攻击类型（破坏归属性、数据窃取、绕过访问控制）；2) 设计四种架构：SAGA-BFT（全拜占庭容错）、SAGA-MON（轻量服务端监控）、SAGA-AUD（客户端审计）、SAGA-HYB（混合架构），并通过实验评估其安全性与性能。
AI.result: 成功实施了对恶意Provider的具体攻击，证明了现有系统的脆弱性。四种方案提供了不同的安全-性能权衡：SAGA-BFT安全性最强但性能开销大；SAGA-MON和SAGA-AUD能以最小开销抵御大部分攻击；SAGA-HYB在安全和性能之间取得折中。
AI.conclusion: 不同的部署场景应选择不同的方案：对安全性要求极高的场景采用SAGA-BFT，而对性能敏感的场景可选择SAGA-MON或SGA-AUD，混合架构SAGA-HYB提供了灵活的折中方案。

title: A Family of Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution Algorithms for Numerical Function Optimization
summary: The numerical optimization of continuous functions is a fundamental task in many scientific and engineering domains, ranging from mechanical design to training of artificial intelligence models. Among the most effective and widely used algorithms for this purpose is Differential Evolution (DE), known for its simplicity and strong performance. Recent research has shown that adapting AI models to operate over alternative number systems-such as complex numbers, quaternions, and geometric algebras-can improve model compactness and accuracy. However, such extensions remain underexplored in bio-inspired optimization algorithms. In particular, the use of quaternion algebra represents an emerging area in computational intelligence. This paper introduces a family of novel Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution (QDE) algorithms that operate directly in the quaternion space. We propose several mutation strategies specifically designed to exploit the algebraic and geometric properties of quaternions. Results show that our QDE variants achieve faster convergence and superior performance on several function classes in the BBOB benchmark compared to the traditional real-valued DE algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一族四元数值微分进化(QDE)算法，在四元数空间中利用其代数和几何特性设计变异策略，在BBOB基准测试上比传统实数DE收敛更快、性能更优。
AI.motivation: AI模型在复数、四元数等替代数系上已展现出更好的紧凑性和精度，但这种思路在生物启发优化算法中尚未充分探索，尤其是在四元数代数方面。
AI.method: 提出一族四元数值微分进化(QDE)算法，设计多种利用四元数代数和几何特性的变异策略，直接在四元数空间中进行优化。
AI.result: 在BBOB基准测试的多类函数上，QDE变体相比传统实数DE实现了更快的收敛速度和更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 四元数微分进化算法在连续函数优化方面相比传统实数DE具有优势，表明将替代数系引入进化优化是一个有前景的方向。

title: QAP-Router: Tackling Qubit Routing as Dynamic Quadratic Assignment with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Qubit routing is a fundamental problem in quantum compilation, known to be NP-hard. Its dynamic nature makes local routing decisions propagate and compound over time, making global efficient solutions challenging. Existing heuristic methods rely on local rules with limited lookahead, while recent learning-based approaches often treat routing as a generic sequential decision problem without fully exploiting its underlying structure. In this paper, we introduce QAP-Router, framing qubit routing based on a dynamic Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP) formulation. By modeling logical interactions, or quantum gates, as flow matrices and hardware topology as a distance matrix, our approach captures the interaction-distance coupling in a unified objective, which defines the reward in the reinforcement learning environment. To further exploit this structure, the policy network employs a solution-aware Transformer backbone that encodes the interaction between the flow matrix and the distance matrix into the attention mechanism. We also integrate a lookahead mechanism that blends naturally into the QAP framework, preventing myopic decisions. Extensive experiments on 1,831 real-world quantum circuits from the MQTBench, AgentQ and QUEKO datasets show that our method substantially reduces the CNOT gate count of routed circuits by 15.7%, 30.4% and 12.1%, respectively, relative to existing industry compilers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QAP-Router，将量子比特路由问题建模为动态二次分配问题（QAP），利用解感知Transformer骨架和前瞻机制，在1,831个真实量子电路上相比现有工业编译器降低了15.7%-30.4%的CNOT门数量。
AI.motivation: 量子比特路由是量子编译中的NP-hard问题，现有启发式方法依赖局部规则且视野有限，而基于学习的方案往往将其视为通用序列决策问题，未充分利用其底层结构特征。
AI.method: 将量子比特路由建模为动态QAP，以逻辑交互（量子门）作为流矩阵、硬件拓扑作为距离矩阵；采用解感知Transformer骨架将流矩阵与距离矩阵的交互编码到注意力机制中；结合前瞻机制避免短视决策。
AI.result: 在MQTBench、AgentQ和QUEKO三个数据集上分别降低了15.7%、30.4%和12.1%的CNOT门数量。
AI.conclusion: 通过QAP建模和定制化的Transformer结构，能有效捕捉量子路由问题的结构特性，显著优于现有工业编译器和启发式方法。

title: A Semi-Supervised Framework for Speech Confidence Detection using Whisper
comment: 12 pages, 9 Figures, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing
summary: Automatic detection of speaker confidence is critical for adaptive computing but remains constrained by limited labelled data and the subjectivity of paralinguistic annotations. This paper proposes a semi-supervised hybrid framework that fuses deep semantic embeddings from the Whisper encoder with an interpretable acoustic feature vector composed of eGeMAPS descriptors and auxiliary probability estimates of vocal stress and disfluency. To mitigate reliance on scarce ground truth data, we introduce an Uncertainty-Aware Pseudo-Labelling strategy where a model generates labels for unlabelled data, retaining only high-quality samples for training. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a Macro-F1 score of 0.751, outperforming self-supervised baselines, including WavLM, HuBERT, and Wav2Vec 2.0. The hybrid architecture also surpasses the unimodal Whisper baseline, yielding a 3\% improvement in the minority class, confirming that explicit prosodic and auxiliary features provide necessary corrective signals which are otherwise lost in deep semantic representations. Ablation studies further show that a curated set of high confidence pseudo-labels outperforms indiscriminate large scale augmentation, confirming that data quality outweighs quantity for perceived confidence detection.

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督混合框架，融合Whisper语义嵌入与可解释声学特征（eGeMAPS+辅助概率），结合不确定性感知伪标签策略，在说话人自信度检测任务上达到Macro-F1 0.751，优于WavLM、HuBERT等自监督基线。
AI.motivation: 说话人自信度自动检测对自适应计算至关重要，但受限于标注数据稀缺和副语言标注的主观性，现有方法难以取得良好效果。
AI.method: 1) 混合架构：融合Whisper编码器的深度语义嵌入 + eGeMAPS声学特征 + 声学压力和流利度辅助概率特征；2) 不确定性感知伪标签策略：模型生成伪标签后只保留高质量样本用于训练。
AI.result: Macro-F1达0.751，优于WavLM、HuBERT、Wav2Vec 2.0等自监督基线；混合架构比纯Whisper提升3%少数类F1；高质量伪标签优于大规模无差别数据增强。
AI.conclusion: 显式的韵律和辅助特征能提供深度语义表示中丢失的校正信号；数据质量比数量更重要。

title: Events as Triggers for Behavioral Diversity in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Effective multi-agent cooperation requires agents to adopt diverse behaviors as task conditions evolve-and to do so at the right moment. Yet, current Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) frameworks that facilitate this diversity are still limited by the fact that they bind fixed behaviors to fixed agent identities. Consequently, they are ill-equipped for tasks where agents need to take on different roles at very specific moments in time. We argue that, to define these behavioral transitions, the missing ingredient is events. Events are changes in the state of the system that induce qualitative changes in the task. Based on this view, we introduce a framework that decouples agent identity from behavior, capturing a continuous manifold from which agents instantiate their behaviors in response to events. This framework is based on two elements. First, to build an expressive behavior manifold, we introduce Neural Manifold Diversity (NMD), a formal distance metric that remains well-defined when behaviors are transient and agent-agnostic. Second, we use an event-based hypernetwork that generates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules over a shared team policy, enabling on-the-fly agent-policy reconfiguration in response to events. We prove that this construction ensures that diversity does not interfere with reward maximization by design. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework outperforms established baselines across benchmarks while exhibiting zero-shot generalization, and being the only method that solves tasks requiring sequential behavior reassignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于事件驱动的多智能体强化学习框架，通过神经流形多样性（NMD）和事件驱动超网络生成LoRA模块，实现智能体行为与身份的分离，使其能在特定时刻灵活切换角色，从而解决传统MARL方法在处理需要时序行为重分配任务时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL框架将固定行为绑定到固定智能体身份上，导致无法处理智能体需要在特定时间点扮演不同角色的任务。作者认为行为转换的缺失关键是"事件"（events）——即系统状态的质变。
AI.method: 1) 提出神经流形多样性（NMD）作为行为距离度量，在行为具有暂态性和智能体无关性时仍能良好定义。2) 构建事件驱动的超网络，为共享团队策略生成LoRA模块，实现智能体策略的实时重配置。3) 理论证明该构造保证了多样性不会干扰奖励最大化。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，该框架超越了已有基线方法，展现出零样本泛化能力，并且是唯一能解决需要顺序行为重分配任务的方案。
AI.conclusion: 事件驱动的行为-身份解耦范式能有效提升MARL在动态任务中的灵活性和泛化能力。

title: Trajectory-Agnostic Asteroid Detection in TESS with Deep Learning
comment: Accepted by The Astronomical Journal, 11 May 2026
summary: We present a novel method for extracting moving objects from TESS data using machine learning. Our approach uses two stacked 3D U-Nets with skip connections, which we call a W-Net, to filter background and identify pixels containing moving objects in TESS image time-series data. By augmenting the training data through rotation of the image cubes, our method is robust to differences in speed and direction of asteroids, requiring no assumptions for either parameter range which are typically required in "shift-and-stack" type algorithms. We also developed a novel method for learned data scaling that we call Adaptive Normalization, which allows the neural network to learn the ideal range and scaling distribution required for optimal data processing. We built a code for creating TESS training data with asteroid masks that served as the foundation of our effort (tess-asteroid-ml), which we publicly released for the benefit of the community. Our method is not limited to TESS, but applicable for implementation in other similar time-domain surveys, making it of particular interest for use with data from upcoming missions such as the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope and NEOSurveyor.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于W-Net（两个堆叠的3D U-Net）和自适应归一化的机器学习方法，用于从TESS数据中提取移动天体（小行星），无需对速度/方向做先验假设。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如shift-and-stack）需要对移动物体的速度和方向做参数假设，难以覆盖所有情况。作者希望开发一种无需这些先验假设的、鲁棒性更强的自动提取方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用两个堆叠的3D U-Net（W-Net）进行背景过滤和移动像素识别；2) 通过旋转图像立方体进行数据增强，提升对不同速度和方向的鲁棒性；3) 提出自适应归一化（Adaptive Normalization），让网络自行学习最优的数据缩放范围和分布。
AI.result: 该方法对asteroid的速度和方向具有鲁棒性，无需shift-and-stack中的参数假设。代码已开源（tess-asteroid-ml），可推广至其他时域巡天任务（如Roman望远镜、NEOSurveyor）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的W-Net+自适应归一化框架有效解决了时域数据中移动天体提取的泛化性问题，具有跨任务、跨望远镜的迁移潜力。

title: Model-based Bootstrap of Controlled Markov Chains
summary: We propose and analyze a model-based bootstrap for transition kernels in finite controlled Markov chains (CMCs) with possibly nonstationary or history-dependent control policies, a setting that arises naturally in offline reinforcement learning (RL) when the behavior policy generating the data is unknown. We establish distributional consistency of the bootstrap transition estimator in both a single long-chain regime and the episodic offline RL regime. The key technical tools are a novel bootstrap law of large numbers (LLN) for the visitation counts and a novel use of the martingale central limit theorem (CLT) for the bootstrap transition increments. We extend bootstrap distributional consistency to the downstream targets of offline policy evaluation (OPE) and optimal policy recovery (OPR) via the delta method by verifying Hadamard differentiability of the Bellman operators, yielding asymptotically valid confidence intervals for value and $Q$-functions. Experiments on the RiverSwim problem show that the proposed bootstrap confidence intervals (CIs), especially the percentile CIs, outperform the episodic bootstrap and plug-in CLT CIs, and are often close to nominal ($50\%$, $90\%$, $95\%$) coverage, while the baselines are poorly calibrated at small sample sizes and short episode lengths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了有限受控马尔可夫链中转移核的模型引导自助法，在离线强化学习场景下，建立了自助法转移估计量在分布上的一致性，并通过Delta方法扩展到离线策略评估和最优策略恢复，实验表明该方法在置信区间覆盖上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习中行为策略未知时，需要可靠的统计推断方法来估计转移核及下游任务（如策略评估）的不确定性，现有自助法或渐近方法在有限样本下校准不佳。
AI.method: 提出转移核的模型引导自助法，利用新的自助法大数定律和鞅中心极限定理建立分布一致性，并通过Bellman算子的Hadamard可微性，借助Delta方法扩展到离线策略评估和最优策略恢复。
AI.result: 在RiverSwim问题实验中，所提自助法置信区间（特别是百分位自助法）在50%、90%、95%覆盖水平上接近标称值，而基线方法（情节自助法和插件法CLT）在小样本和短情节长度下校准较差。
AI.conclusion: 模型引导自助法为离线RL中的不确定性量化提供了理论保证和实际有效的工具，尤其在小样本场景下优势明显。

title: Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
summary:
To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most often simulated for various scenarios and do not accurately reflect real deployment behavior or user traffic patterns. Therefore, there is an utmost need for realistic datasets under various conditions. This work presents a dataset collected from a commercially deployed network across various modes of mobility (pedestrian, bike, car, bus, and train) and at multiple speeds to depict real time UE mobility. When collecting the dataset, we focused primarily on handover (HO) scenarios, with the aim of reducing the HO interruption time and maintaining continuous throughput during and immediately after HO execution. To support this research, the dataset includes timing advance (TA) measurements at various signaling events such as RACH trigger, MAC CE, and PDCCH grant which are typically missing in existing works.
  We cover a detailed description of the creation of the dataset; experimental setup, data acquisition, and extraction. We also cover an exploratory analysis of the data, with a primary focus on mobility, beam management, and TA. We discuss multiple use cases in which the proposed dataset can facilitate understanding of the inference of the AI/ML model. One such use case is to train and evaluate various AI/ML models for TA prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个从真实商用5G网络中收集的UE移动性数据集，涵盖多种移动模式（步行、自行车、汽车、公交、火车）和速度，重点聚焦切换场景，包含现有工作缺失的TA测量值等关键信令事件数据，旨在支持AI/ML驱动的波束管理和移动性优化研究。
AI.motivation: 现有5G AI/ML波束管理和移动性方案依赖仿真数据，无法真实反映实际部署行为和用户流量模式，因此亟需基于真实商用网络的、涵盖多种移动场景的高质量数据集来支持相关研究。
AI.method: 从真实商用5G网络中收集数据，覆盖行人、自行车、汽车、公交、火车等多种移动模式和不同速度；重点关注切换场景，采集了RACH触发、MAC CE、PDCCH授权等信令事件中的TA测量数据；对数据集进行了详细描述（实验设置、数据获取与提取）和探索性分析。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含真实UE移动场景、涵盖多种移动模式和速度、包含TA等关键信令测量的数据集；通过探索性分析展示了数据在移动性、波束管理和TA方面的特征。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可用于训练和评估多种AI/ML模型（如TA预测），有助于理解AI/ML模型在真实5G网络中的推理行为，推动AI/ML驱动的5G移动性优化。

title: A proximal gradient algorithm for composite log-concave sampling
summary: We propose an algorithm to sample from composite log-concave distributions over $\mathbb{R}^d$, i.e., densities of the form $π\propto e^{-f-g}$, assuming access to gradient evaluations of $f$ and a restricted Gaussian oracle (RGO) for $g$. The latter requirement means that we can easily sample from the density $\text{RGO}_{g,h,y}(x) \propto \exp(-g(x) -\frac{1}{2h}||y-x||^2)$, which is the sampling analogue of the proximal operator for $g$. If $f + g$ is $α$-strongly convex and $f$ is $β$-smooth, our sampler achieves $\varepsilon$ error in total variation distance in $\widetilde{\mathcal O}(κ\sqrt d \log^4(1/\varepsilon))$ iterations where $κ:= β/α$, which matches prior state-of-the-art results for the case $g=0$. We further extend our results to cases where (1) $π$ is non-log-concave but satisfies a Poincaré or log-Sobolev inequality, and (2) $f$ is non-smooth but Lipschitz.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从复合对数凹分布中采样的算法，利用f的梯度评估和g的受限高斯预言机(RGO)，在强凸且光滑条件下实现了与当前最优方法相当的迭代复杂度，并推广到非对数凹和非光滑情形。
AI.motivation: 现有采样方法在处理复合分布（目标密度由两个函数组成）时效率有限，尤其是在其中一个函数难以直接处理的情况下。作者希望设计一种算法，利用RGO（类似于近端算子的采样版本）来高效地从复合对数凹分布中采样。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于受限高斯预言机(RGO)的采样算法，该算法交替使用f的梯度信息和对g的RGO采样。理论分析覆盖了强凸+光滑情形、满足Poincaré/log-Sobolev不等式的非对数凹情形，以及f非光滑但Lipschitz的情形。
AI.result: 在f+g为α-强凸且f为β-光滑的条件下，算法达到ε总变差距离误差所需的迭代次数为Õ(κ√d log⁴(1/ε))，其中κ=β/α，匹配了g=0时的最优结果。此外，算法也适用于非对数凹和非光滑的扩展情形。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为复合对数凹分布的采样问题提供了理论保证，并展示了RGO作为一种灵活的采样原语的有效性，为更广泛的贝叶斯推断和机器学习问题提供了潜在工具。
